authors_text: Gamaleldin F. Elsayed,Aravindh Mahendran,Sjoerd van Steenkiste,Klaus Greff,Michael C. Mozer,Thomas Kipf
title: SAVi++: Towards End-to-End Object-Centric Learning from Real-World Videos
title_zh: SAVi++：从真实世界视频中实现端到端以对象为中心的学习
abstract: The visual world can be parsimoniously characterized in terms of distinct entities with sparse interactions. Discovering this compositional structure in dynamic visual scenes has proven challenging for end-to-end computer vision approaches unless explicit instance-level supervision is provided. Slot-based models leveraging motion cues have recently shown great promise in learning to represent, segment, and track objects without direct supervision, but they still fail to scale to complex real-world multi-object videos. In an effort to bridge this gap, we take inspiration from human development and hypothesize that information about scene geometry in the form of depth signals can facilitate object-centric learning. We introduce SAVi++, an object-centric video model which is trained to predict depth signals from a slot-based video representation. By further leveraging best practices for model scaling, we are able to train SAVi++ to segment complex dynamic scenes recorded with moving cameras, containing both static and moving objects of diverse appearance on naturalistic backgrounds, without the need for segmentation supervision. Finally, we demonstrate that by using sparse depth signals obtained from LiDAR, SAVi++ is able to learn emergent object segmentation and tracking from videos in the real-world Waymo Open dataset.
summary: The visual world can be parsimoniously characterized in terms of distinct entities with sparse interactions. Discovering this compositional structure in dynamic visual scenes has proven challenging for end-to-end computer vision approaches unless explicit instance-level supervision is provided. Slot-based models leveraging motion cues have recently shown great promise in learning to represent, segment, and track objects without direct supervision, but they still fail to scale to complex real-world multi-object videos. In an effort to bridge this gap, we take inspiration from human development and hypothesize that information about scene geometry in the form of depth signals can facilitate object-centric learning. We introduce SAVi++, an object-centric video model which is trained to predict depth signals from a slot-based video representation. By further leveraging best practices for model scaling, we are able to train SAVi++ to segment complex dynamic scenes recorded with moving cameras, containing both static and moving objects of diverse appearance on naturalistic backgrounds, without the need for segmentation supervision. Finally, we demonstrate that by using sparse depth signals obtained from LiDAR, SAVi++ is able to learn emergent object segmentation and tracking from videos in the real-world Waymo Open dataset.
abstract_zh: 视觉世界可以通过具有稀疏交互的不同实体来简单地描述。事实证明，除非提供明确的实例级监督，否则在动态视觉场景中发现这种组合结构对于端到端计算机视觉方法来说具有挑战性。利用运动线索的基于槽的模型最近在学习在没有直接监督的情况下表示、分割和跟踪对象方面显示出了巨大的前景，但它们仍然无法扩展到复杂的现实世界多对象视频。为了弥补这一差距，我们从人类发展中汲取灵感，并假设以深度信号形式呈现的场景几何信息可以促进以对象为中心的学习。我们引入了 SAVi++，一种以对象为中心的视频模型，经过训练可以从基于时隙的视频表示中预测深度信号。通过进一步利用模型缩放的最佳实践，我们能够训练 SAVi++ 来分割用移动摄像机记录的复杂动态场景，其中包含自然背景上不同外观的静态和移动对象，而无需分割监督。最后，我们证明，通过使用从 LiDAR 获得的稀疏深度信号，SAVi++ 能够从现实世界 Waymo 开放数据集中的视频中学习紧急对象分割和跟踪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAVi++模型，通过预测深度信号实现无需分割监督的真实世界视频中复杂动态场景的物体分割与跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端视觉方法难以在无显式监督下学习复杂动态场景的组合结构，而基于slot的模型虽能利用运动线索但无法扩展至真实世界多物体视频，深度信号可提供几何信息辅助物体中心学习。
AI.method: 设计SAVi++模型，通过slot-based视频表征预测深度信号，结合LiDAR稀疏深度数据训练，利用模型扩展技术处理含静态/动态物体的自然背景场景。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open数据集上验证SAVi++可从真实世界视频中学习到物体分割与跟踪能力，无需分割监督即可处理复杂动态场景。
AI.conclusion: 深度信号有效辅助物体中心学习，SAVi++为无监督端到端视频理解提供了新方法，推动了真实场景中多物体动态建模的发展。

authors_text: Ryan Nguyen,Shubhendu Kumar Singh,Rahul Rai
title: Physics-Infused Fuzzy Generative Adversarial Network for Robust Failure Prognosis
title_zh: 用于鲁棒故障预测的物理注入模糊生成对抗网络
abstract: Prognostics aid in the longevity of fielded systems or products. Quantifying the system's current health enable prognosis to enhance the operator's decision-making to preserve the system's health. Creating a prognosis for a system can be difficult due to (a) unknown physical relationships and/or (b) irregularities in data appearing well beyond the initiation of a problem. Traditionally, three different modeling paradigms have been used to develop a prognostics model: physics-based (PbM), data-driven (DDM), and hybrid modeling. Recently, the hybrid modeling approach that combines the strength of both PbM and DDM based approaches and alleviates their limitations is gaining traction in the prognostics domain. In this paper, a novel hybrid modeling approach for prognostics applications based on combining concepts from fuzzy logic and generative adversarial networks (GANs) is outlined. The FuzzyGAN based method embeds a physics-based model in the aggregation of the fuzzy implications. This technique constrains the output of the learning method to a realistic solution. Results on a bearing problem showcases the efficacy of adding a physics-based aggregation in a fuzzy logic model to improve GAN's ability to model health and give a more accurate system prognosis.
summary: Prognostics aid in the longevity of fielded systems or products. Quantifying the system's current health enable prognosis to enhance the operator's decision-making to preserve the system's health. Creating a prognosis for a system can be difficult due to (a) unknown physical relationships and/or (b) irregularities in data appearing well beyond the initiation of a problem. Traditionally, three different modeling paradigms have been used to develop a prognostics model: physics-based (PbM), data-driven (DDM), and hybrid modeling. Recently, the hybrid modeling approach that combines the strength of both PbM and DDM based approaches and alleviates their limitations is gaining traction in the prognostics domain. In this paper, a novel hybrid modeling approach for prognostics applications based on combining concepts from fuzzy logic and generative adversarial networks (GANs) is outlined. The FuzzyGAN based method embeds a physics-based model in the aggregation of the fuzzy implications. This technique constrains the output of the learning method to a realistic solution. Results on a bearing problem showcases the efficacy of adding a physics-based aggregation in a fuzzy logic model to improve GAN's ability to model health and give a more accurate system prognosis.
abstract_zh: 预测有助于延长现场系统或产品的使用寿命。量化系统当前的运行状况可以进行预测，从而增强操作员的决策以保持系统的运行状况。由于 (a) 未知的物理关系和/或 (b) 数据中出现的不规则性远远超出了问题发生的范围，因此为系统创建预测可能很困难。传统上，使用三种不同的建模范例来开发预测模型：基于物理的 (PbM)、数据驱动的 (DDM) 和混合建模。最近，混合建模方法结合了基于 PbM 和 DDM 的方法的优点并减轻了它们的局限性，在预测领域越来越受到关注。本文概述了一种基于模糊逻辑和生成对抗网络（GAN）概念相结合的预测应用的新型混合建模方法。基于 FuzzyGAN 的方法在模糊含义的聚合中嵌入了基于物理的模型。该技术将学习方法的输出限制为现实的解决方案。轴承问题的结果展示了在模糊逻辑模型中添加基于物理的聚合的功效，可以提高 GAN 的健康状况建模能力并提供更准确的系统预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合模糊逻辑与生成对抗网络（GAN）的混合模型，通过嵌入物理模型约束输出，提升系统故障预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统故障预测方法（基于物理、数据驱动或混合模型）在处理复杂系统不确定性及数据不完整性时存在局限，需融合物理规律与数据驱动优势以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计名为FuzzyGAN的新型混合模型，在模糊逻辑推理框架中整合GAN结构，并通过嵌入物理模型约束生成结果，确保预测输出符合现实物理规律。
AI.result: 在轴承故障预测案例中，该方法较传统GAN显著提升了健康状态建模精度，验证了物理约束对预测结果的正向作用。
AI.conclusion: 融合物理约束的模糊GAN模型有效解决了复杂系统故障预测中的不确定性问题，为可靠预测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Niv Haim,Gal Vardi,Gilad Yehudai,Ohad Shamir,Michal Irani
title: Reconstructing Training Data from Trained Neural Networks
title_zh: 从经过训练的神经网络重建训练数据
comment: Fixed a typo in the acknowledgements
comments: Fixed a typo in the acknowledgements
abstract: Understanding to what extent neural networks memorize training data is an intriguing question with practical and theoretical implications. In this paper we show that in some cases a significant fraction of the training data can in fact be reconstructed from the parameters of a trained neural network classifier. We propose a novel reconstruction scheme that stems from recent theoretical results about the implicit bias in training neural networks with gradient-based methods. To the best of our knowledge, our results are the first to show that reconstructing a large portion of the actual training samples from a trained neural network classifier is generally possible. This has negative implications on privacy, as it can be used as an attack for revealing sensitive training data. We demonstrate our method for binary MLP classifiers on a few standard computer vision datasets.
summary: Understanding to what extent neural networks memorize training data is an intriguing question with practical and theoretical implications. In this paper we show that in some cases a significant fraction of the training data can in fact be reconstructed from the parameters of a trained neural network classifier. We propose a novel reconstruction scheme that stems from recent theoretical results about the implicit bias in training neural networks with gradient-based methods. To the best of our knowledge, our results are the first to show that reconstructing a large portion of the actual training samples from a trained neural network classifier is generally possible. This has negative implications on privacy, as it can be used as an attack for revealing sensitive training data. We demonstrate our method for binary MLP classifiers on a few standard computer vision datasets.
abstract_zh: 了解神经网络记忆训练数据的程度是一个有趣的问题，具有实际和理论意义。在本文中，我们表明，在某些情况下，训练数据的很大一部分实际上可以根据经过训练的神经网络分类器的参数来重建。我们提出了一种新颖的重建方案，该方案源于有关使用基于梯度的方法训练神经网络中隐式偏差的最新理论结果。据我们所知，我们的结果首次表明，从经过训练的神经网络分类器重建大部分实际训练样本通常是可能的。这对隐私产生负面影响，因为它可以被用作泄露敏感训练数据的攻击。我们在一些标准计算机视觉数据集上演示了我们的二元 MLP 分类器方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从训练好的神经网络分类器中重建训练数据的方法。
AI.motivation: 理解神经网络在多大程度上记忆训练数据具有重要的理论和实践意义，尤其涉及隐私安全问题。
AI.method: 基于梯度下降训练神经网络的隐含偏差理论，提出了一种新型数据重建方案。
AI.result: 在二元MLP分类器上验证了该方法，成功从模型参数中重建出大量训练样本。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了从训练好的神经网络中恢复训练数据的可行性，揭示了潜在的隐私泄露风险。

search_text: Reconstructing Training Data from Trained Neural Networks 从经过训练的神经网络重建训练数据 Understanding to what extent neural networks memorize training data is an intriguing question with practical and theoretical implications. In this paper we show that in some cases a significant fraction of the training data can in fact be reconstructed from the parameters of a trained neural network classifier. We propose a novel reconstruction scheme that stems from recent theoretical results about the implicit bias in training neural networks with gradient-based methods. To the best of our knowledge, our results are the first to show that reconstructing a large portion of the actual training samples from a trained neural network classifier is generally possible. This has negative implications on privacy, as it can be used as an attack for revealing sensitive training data. We demonstrate our method for binary MLP classifiers on a few standard computer vision datasets. 了解神经网络记忆训练数据的程度是一个有趣的问题，具有实际和理论意义。在本文中，我们表明，在某些情况下，训练数据的很大一部分实际上可以根据经过训练的神经网络分类器的参数来重建。我们提出了一种新颖的重建方案，该方案源于有关使用基于梯度的方法训练神经网络中隐式偏差的最新理论结果。据我们所知，我们的结果首次表明，从经过训练的神经网络分类器重建大部分实际训练样本通常是可能的。这对隐私产生负面影响，因为它可以被用作泄露敏感训练数据的攻击。我们在一些标准计算机视觉数据集上演示了我们的二元 MLP 分类器方法。 本文提出了一种从训练好的神经网络分类器中重建训练数据的方法。 Niv Haim,Gal Vardi,Gilad Yehudai,Ohad Shamir,Michal Irani cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Yujia Zheng,Ignavier Ng,Kun Zhang
title: On the Identifiability of Nonlinear ICA: Sparsity and Beyond
title_zh: 非线性 ICA 的可辨识性：稀疏性及其他
abstract: Nonlinear independent component analysis (ICA) aims to recover the underlying independent latent sources from their observable nonlinear mixtures. How to make the nonlinear ICA model identifiable up to certain trivial indeterminacies is a long-standing problem in unsupervised learning. Recent breakthroughs reformulate the standard independence assumption of sources as conditional independence given some auxiliary variables (e.g., class labels and/or domain/time indexes) as weak supervision or inductive bias. However, nonlinear ICA with unconditional priors cannot benefit from such developments. We explore an alternative path and consider only assumptions on the mixing process, such as Structural Sparsity. We show that under specific instantiations of such constraints, the independent latent sources can be identified from their nonlinear mixtures up to a permutation and a component-wise transformation, thus achieving nontrivial identifiability of nonlinear ICA without auxiliary variables. We provide estimation methods and validate the theoretical results experimentally. The results on image data suggest that our conditions may hold in a number of practical data generating processes.
summary: Nonlinear independent component analysis (ICA) aims to recover the underlying independent latent sources from their observable nonlinear mixtures. How to make the nonlinear ICA model identifiable up to certain trivial indeterminacies is a long-standing problem in unsupervised learning. Recent breakthroughs reformulate the standard independence assumption of sources as conditional independence given some auxiliary variables (e.g., class labels and/or domain/time indexes) as weak supervision or inductive bias. However, nonlinear ICA with unconditional priors cannot benefit from such developments. We explore an alternative path and consider only assumptions on the mixing process, such as Structural Sparsity. We show that under specific instantiations of such constraints, the independent latent sources can be identified from their nonlinear mixtures up to a permutation and a component-wise transformation, thus achieving nontrivial identifiability of nonlinear ICA without auxiliary variables. We provide estimation methods and validate the theoretical results experimentally. The results on image data suggest that our conditions may hold in a number of practical data generating processes.
abstract_zh: 非线性独立分量分析（ICA）旨在从可观察的非线性混合中恢复潜在的独立潜在源。如何使非线性ICA模型可识别某些微不足道的不确定性是无监督学习中长期存在的问题。最近的突破将源的标准独立性假设重新表述为条件独立性，将一些辅助变量（例如类标签和/或领域/时间索引）视为弱监督或归纳偏差。然而，具有无条件先验的非线性 ICA 无法从此类发展中受益。我们探索替代路径并仅考虑混合过程的假设，例如结构稀疏性。我们证明，在此类约束的特定实例化下，可以从非线性混合直至排列和分量变换中识别出独立的潜在源，从而在没有辅助变量的情况下实现非线性 ICA 的非平凡可识别性。我们提供估计方法并通过实验验证理论结果。图像数据的结果表明我们的条件可能适用于许多实际的数据生成过程。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无辅助变量条件下，通过混合过程的结构稀疏性等假设实现非线性ICA的可识别性。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性ICA方法依赖辅助变量或先验信息，而无条件模型缺乏有效可识别性保障，需探索新途径。
AI.method: 提出基于混合过程假设（如结构稀疏性）的理论框架，证明在特定约束下可实现非平凡可识别性，并设计对应估计方法。
AI.result: 理论分析与图像实验验证表明，所提条件在实际数据生成过程中有效，成功实现非线性ICA的可识别性。
AI.conclusion: 无需辅助变量，仅依赖混合过程假设即可实现非线性ICA的可识别性，为无监督学习提供新理论支撑。

authors_text: Matias N. Selzer,Silvia M. Castro
title: Immersion Metrics for Virtual Reality
title_zh: 虚拟现实的沉浸感指标
abstract: Technological advances in recent years have promoted the development of virtual reality systems that have a wide variety of hardware and software characteristics, providing varying degrees of immersion. Immersion is an objective property of the virtual reality system that depends on both its hardware and software characteristics. Virtual reality systems are currently attempting to improve immersion as much as possible. However, there is no metric to measure the level of immersion of a virtual reality system based on its characteristics. To date, the influence of these hardware and software variables on immersion has only been considered individually or in small groups. The way these system variables simultaneously affect immersion has not been analyzed either. In this paper, we propose immersion metrics for virtual reality systems based on their hardware and software variables, as well as the development process that led to their formulation. From the conducted experiment and the obtained data, we followed a methodology to find immersion models based on the variables of the system. The immersion metrics presented in this work offer a useful tool in the area of virtual reality and immersive technologies, not only to measure the immersion of any virtual reality system but also to analyze the relationship and importance of the variables of these systems.
summary: Technological advances in recent years have promoted the development of virtual reality systems that have a wide variety of hardware and software characteristics, providing varying degrees of immersion. Immersion is an objective property of the virtual reality system that depends on both its hardware and software characteristics. However, there is no metric to measure the level of immersion of a virtual reality system based on its characteristics. To date, the influence of these hardware and software variables on immersion has only been considered individually or in small groups. The way these system variables simultaneously affect immersion has not been analyzed either. In this paper, we propose immersion metrics for virtual reality systems based on their hardware and software variables, as well as the development process that led to their formulation. The immersion metrics presented in this work offer a useful tool in the area of virtual reality and immersive technologies, not only to measure the immersion of any virtual reality system but also to analyze the relationship and importance of the variables of these systems.
abstract_zh: 近年来的技术进步促进了虚拟现实系统的发展，这些系统具有各种各样的硬件和软件特性，提供不同程度的沉浸感。沉浸感是虚拟现实系统的一个客观属性，取决于其硬件和软件特性。虚拟现实系统目前正在尝试尽可能提高沉浸感。然而，没有一个指标可以根据虚拟现实系统的特性来衡量其沉浸程度。迄今为止，这些硬件和软件变量对沉浸感的影响仅被单独或小组考虑。这些系统变量同时影响沉浸感的方式也尚未被分析。在本文中，我们根据虚拟现实系统的硬件和软件变量以及导致其制定的开发过程提出了虚拟现实系统的沉浸感指标。根据进行的实验和获得的数据，我们遵循一种方法来找到基于系统变量的沉浸模型。这项工作中提出的沉浸感指标为虚拟现实和沉浸式技术领域提供了一个有用的工具，不仅可以测量任何虚拟现实系统的沉浸感，还可以分析这些系统变量的关系和重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于虚拟现实系统硬件和软件变量的沉浸度度量方法，并分析其开发过程。
AI.motivation: 当前虚拟现实系统缺乏基于硬件和软件变量综合评估沉浸度的指标，现有研究多单独分析变量影响。
AI.method: 通过实验和数据分析，建立基于系统变量的沉浸度模型，推导出量化指标。
AI.result: 提出可测量任意虚拟现实系统沉浸度的指标，并揭示系统变量间的关系与重要性。
AI.conclusion: 该沉浸度度量工具为虚拟现实和沉浸式技术领域提供了有效的分析和评估手段。

authors_text: Wei Jin,Xianfeng Tang,Haoming Jiang,Zheng Li,Danqing Zhang,Jiliang Tang,Bing Yin
title: Condensing Graphs via One-Step Gradient Matching
title_zh: 通过一步梯度匹配压缩图
abstract: As training deep learning models on large dataset takes a lot of time and resources, it is desired to construct a small synthetic dataset with which we can train deep learning models sufficiently. There are recent works that have explored solutions on condensing image datasets through complex bi-level optimization. For instance, dataset condensation (DC) matches network gradients w.r.t. large-real data and small-synthetic data, where the network weights are optimized for multiple steps at each outer iteration. However, existing approaches have their inherent limitations: (1) they are not directly applicable to graphs where the data is discrete; and (2) the condensation process is computationally expensive due to the involved nested optimization. To bridge the gap, we investigate efficient dataset condensation tailored for graph datasets where we model the discrete graph structure as a probabilistic model. We further propose a one-step gradient matching scheme, which performs gradient matching for only one single step without training the network weights. Our theoretical analysis shows this strategy can generate synthetic graphs that lead to lower classification loss on real graphs. Extensive experiments on various graph datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed method. In particular, we are able to reduce the dataset size by 90% while approximating up to 98% of the original performance and our method is significantly faster than multi-step gradient matching (e.g. 15x in CIFAR10 for synthesizing 500 graphs). Code is available at \url{https://github.com/amazon-research/DosCond}.

abstract_zh: 由于在大型数据集上训练深度学习模型需要大量时间和资源，因此需要构建一个小型综合数据集，以便我们可以充分训练深度学习模型。最近的工作探索了通过复杂的双层优化来压缩图像数据集的解决方案。例如，数据集压缩（DC）与网络梯度相匹配。大型真实数据和小型合成数据，其中网络权重在每次外部迭代时针对多个步骤进行优化。然而，现有的方法有其固有的局限性：（1）它们不能直接适用于数据离散的图； (2)由于涉及嵌套优化，压缩过程的计算成本很高。为了弥补这一差距，我们研究了为图数据集量身定制的高效数据集压缩，其中我们将离散图结构建模为概率模型。我们进一步提出了一种单步梯度匹配方案，该方案仅执行一步梯度匹配而不训练网络权重。我们的理论分析表明，该策略可以生成合成图，从而降低真实图上的分类损失。对各种图数据集的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性和效率。特别是，我们能够将数据集大小减少 90%，同时接近原始性能的 98%，并且我们的方法比多步梯度匹配快得多（例如，在 CIFAR10 中合成 500 个图时速度快 15 倍）。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/amazon-research/DosCond} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对图数据集的高效数据压缩方法，通过单步梯度匹配生成合成图数据以替代原始大规模图数据集。
AI.motivation: 大规模图数据训练深度学习模型耗时耗资源，现有图像数据集压缩方法无法直接应用于离散图结构，且多步梯度匹配计算成本高。
AI.method: 将离散图结构建模为概率模型，设计单步梯度匹配方案，在无需训练网络权重的情况下直接匹配梯度。
AI.result: 在多个图数据集上实现数据量减少90%的同时保持98%原始性能，相比多步方法速度提升15倍（如CIFAR10合成500图时）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了图数据压缩的计算效率问题，为图神经网络的高效训练提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Mahmoud Shoush,Marlon Dumas
title: When to intervene? Prescriptive Process Monitoring Under Uncertainty and Resource Constraints
title_zh: 什么时候干预？不确定性和资源限制下的规范性过程监控
comment: BPM 2022 (20th International Conference on Business Process Management)
comments: BPM 2022 (20th International Conference on Business Process Management)
abstract: Prescriptive process monitoring approaches leverage historical data to prescribe runtime interventions that will likely prevent negative case outcomes or improve a process's performance. A centerpiece of a prescriptive process monitoring method is its intervention policy: a decision function determining if and when to trigger an intervention on an ongoing case. Previous proposals in this field rely on intervention policies that consider only the current state of a given case. These approaches do not consider the tradeoff between triggering an intervention in the current state, given the level of uncertainty of the underlying predictive models, versus delaying the intervention to a later state. Moreover, they assume that a resource is always available to perform an intervention (infinite capacity). This paper addresses these gaps by introducing a prescriptive process monitoring method that filters and ranks ongoing cases based on prediction scores, prediction uncertainty, and causal effect of the intervention, and triggers interventions to maximize a gain function, considering the available resources. The proposal is evaluated using a real-life event log. The results show that the proposed method outperforms existing baselines regarding total gain.
summary: Prescriptive process monitoring approaches leverage historical data to prescribe runtime interventions that will likely prevent negative case outcomes or improve a process's performance. A centerpiece of a prescriptive process monitoring method is its intervention policy: a decision function determining if and when to trigger an intervention on an ongoing case. Previous proposals in this field rely on intervention policies that consider only the current state of a given case. These approaches do not consider the tradeoff between triggering an intervention in the current state, given the level of uncertainty of the underlying predictive models, versus delaying the intervention to a later state. Moreover, they assume that a resource is always available to perform an intervention (infinite capacity). This paper addresses these gaps by introducing a prescriptive process monitoring method that filters and ranks ongoing cases based on prediction scores, prediction uncertainty, and causal effect of the intervention, and triggers interventions to maximize a gain function, considering the available resources. The proposal is evaluated using a real-life event log. The results show that the proposed method outperforms existing baselines regarding total gain.
abstract_zh: 规范性流程监控方法利用历史数据来规定运行时干预措施，这可能会防止负面结果或提高流程性能。规范性流程监控方法的核心是其干预策略：决定是否以及何时对正在进行的案例触发干预的决策功能。该领域先前的提议依赖于仅考虑特定案例当前状态的干预政策。考虑到基础预测模型的不确定性水平，这些方法没有考虑在当前状态下触发干预与将干预延迟到稍后的状态之间的权衡。此外，他们假设资源始终可用于执行干预（无限容量）。本文通过引入一种规范性过程监控方法来解决这些差距，该方法根据预测分数、预测不确定性和干预的因果效应对正在进行的案例进行过滤和排序，并考虑可用资源，触发干预措施以最大化增益函数。该提案是使用现实生活中的事件日志进行评估的。结果表明，所提出的方法在总增益方面优于现有基线。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在不确定性和资源限制下优化干预时机的预写流程监控方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅考虑当前状态且假设资源无限，忽视预测不确定性与资源约束对干预决策的影响
AI.method: 基于预测分数、不确定性及干预因果效应的过滤排序方法，结合资源约束最大化收益函数
AI.result: 在真实事件日志评估中，该方法在总收益上优于现有基线方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了不确定性与资源约束下的干预决策问题，实验验证了其优越性

authors_text: Wei Jin,Xiaorui Liu,Yao Ma,Charu Aggarwal,Jiliang Tang
title: Feature Overcorrelation in Deep Graph Neural Networks: A New Perspective
title_zh: 深度图神经网络中的特征过相关：新视角
abstract: Recent years have witnessed remarkable success achieved by graph neural networks (GNNs) in many real-world applications such as recommendation and drug discovery. Despite the success, oversmoothing has been identified as one of the key issues which limit the performance of deep GNNs. It indicates that the learned node representations are highly indistinguishable due to the stacked aggregators. In this paper, we propose a new perspective to look at the performance degradation of deep GNNs, i.e., feature overcorrelation. Through empirical and theoretical study on this matter, we demonstrate the existence of feature overcorrelation in deeper GNNs and reveal potential reasons leading to this issue. To reduce the feature correlation, we propose a general framework DeCorr which can encourage GNNs to encode less redundant information. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that DeCorr can help enable deeper GNNs and is complementary to existing techniques tackling the oversmoothing issue.
summary: Recent years have witnessed remarkable success achieved by graph neural networks (GNNs) in many real-world applications such as recommendation and drug discovery. Despite the success, oversmoothing has been identified as one of the key issues which limit the performance of deep GNNs. It indicates that the learned node representations are highly indistinguishable due to the stacked aggregators. In this paper, we propose a new perspective to look at the performance degradation of deep GNNs, i.e., feature overcorrelation. Through empirical and theoretical study on this matter, we demonstrate the existence of feature overcorrelation in deeper GNNs and reveal potential reasons leading to this issue. To reduce the feature correlation, we propose a general framework DeCorr which can encourage GNNs to encode less redundant information. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that DeCorr can help enable deeper GNNs and is complementary to existing techniques tackling the oversmoothing issue.
abstract_zh: 近年来，图神经网络（GNN）在推荐和药物发现等许多现实应用中取得了显着的成功。尽管取得了成功，但过度平滑已被认为是限制深度 GNN 性能的关键问题之一。它表明由于堆叠聚合器，学习到的节点表示非常难以区分。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的视角来看待深度 GNN 的性能下降，即特征过相关。通过对此问题的实证和理论研究，我们证明了更深层次 GNN 中特征过相关的存在，并揭示了导致该问题的潜在原因。为了减少特征相关性，我们提出了一个通用框架 DeCorr，它可以鼓励 GNN 编码更少的冗余信息。大量实验表明，DeCorr 可以帮助实现更深层次的 GNN，并且是对解决过度平滑问题的现有技术的补充。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度图神经网络中的特征过共线性问题，提出了一种通用框架DeCorr以减少特征相关性，从而缓解过平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络在多个领域取得成功，但深度GNNs的过平滑问题限制了其性能，现有研究多关注聚合器堆叠导致的表示不可区分，而缺乏对特征相关性的深入分析。
AI.method: 提出了一种通用框架DeCorr，通过在GNN训练过程中引入正则化项，鼓励模型学习更少冗余的特征表示，从而降低特征之间的相关性。
AI.result: 实验表明，DeCorr有效缓解了深度GNNs的过平滑问题，支持更深的网络结构，并且与现有反过平滑技术具有互补性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析和实验验证，揭示了深度GNNs中特征过共线性的成因，提出的DeCorr框架为解决过平滑问题提供了新思路，具有重要的理论和应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究深度图神经网络中的特征过共线性问题，提出了一种通用框架DeCorr以减少特征相关性，从而缓解过平滑问题。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管图神经网络在多个领域取得成功，但深度GNNs的过平滑问题限制了其性能，现有研究多关注聚合器堆叠导致的表示不可区分，而缺乏对特征相关性的深入分析。
ai_content.method: 提出了一种通用框架DeCorr，通过在GNN训练过程中引入正则化项，鼓励模型学习更少冗余的特征表示，从而降低特征之间的相关性。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，DeCorr有效缓解了深度GNNs的过平滑问题，支持更深的网络结构，并且与现有反过平滑技术具有互补性。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析和实验验证，揭示了深度GNNs中特征过共线性的成因，提出的DeCorr框架为解决过平滑问题提供了新思路，具有重要的理论和应用价值。

search_text: Feature Overcorrelation in Deep Graph Neural Networks: A New Perspective 深度图神经网络中的特征过相关：新视角 Recent years have witnessed remarkable success achieved by graph neural networks (GNNs) in many real-world applications such as recommendation and drug discovery. Despite the success, oversmoothing has been identified as one of the key issues which limit the performance of deep GNNs. It indicates that the learned node representations are highly indistinguishable due to the stacked aggregators. In this paper, we propose a new perspective to look at the performance degradation of deep GNNs, i.e., feature overcorrelation. Through empirical and theoretical study on this matter, we demonstrate the existence of feature overcorrelation in deeper GNNs and reveal potential reasons leading to this issue. To reduce the feature correlation, we propose a general framework DeCorr which can encourage GNNs to encode less redundant information. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that DeCorr can help enable deeper GNNs and is complementary to existing techniques tackling the oversmoothing issue. 近年来，图神经网络（GNN）在推荐和药物发现等许多现实应用中取得了显着的成功。尽管取得了成功，但过度平滑已被认为是限制深度 GNN 性能的关键问题之一。它表明由于堆叠聚合器，学习到的节点表示非常难以区分。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的视角来看待深度 GNN 的性能下降，即特征过相关。通过对此问题的实证和理论研究，我们证明了更深层次 GNN 中特征过相关的存在，并揭示了导致该问题的潜在原因。为了减少特征相关性，我们提出了一个通用框架 DeCorr，它可以鼓励 GNN 编码更少的冗余信息。大量实验表明，DeCorr 可以帮助实现更深层次的 GNN，并且是对解决过度平滑问题的现有技术的补充。 本文研究深度图神经网络中的特征过共线性问题，提出了一种通用框架DeCorr以减少特征相关性，从而缓解过平滑问题。 Wei Jin,Xiaorui Liu,Yao Ma,Charu Aggarwal,Jiliang Tang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Clemens JS Schaefer,Siddharth Joshi,Shan Li,Raul Blazquez
title: Edge Inference with Fully Differentiable Quantized Mixed Precision Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用完全可微量化混合精度神经网络进行边缘推理
abstract: The large computing and memory cost of deep neural networks (DNNs) often precludes their use in resource-constrained devices. Quantizing the parameters and operations to lower bit-precision offers substantial memory and energy savings for neural network inference, facilitating the use of DNNs on edge computing platforms. Recent efforts at quantizing DNNs have employed a range of techniques encompassing progressive quantization, step-size adaptation, and gradient scaling. This paper proposes a new quantization approach for mixed precision convolutional neural networks (CNNs) targeting edge-computing. Our method establishes a new pareto frontier in model accuracy and memory footprint demonstrating a range of quantized models, delivering best-in-class accuracy below 4.3 MB of weights (wgts.) and activations (acts.). Our main contributions are: (i) hardware-aware heterogeneous differentiable quantization with tensor-sliced learned precision, (ii) targeted gradient modification for wgts. and acts. to mitigate quantization errors, and (iii) a multi-phase learning schedule to address instability in learning arising from updates to the learned quantizer and model parameters. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our techniques on the ImageNet dataset across a range of models including EfficientNet-Lite0 (e.g., 4.14MB of wgts. and acts. at 67.66% accuracy) and MobileNetV2 (e.g., 3.51MB wgts. and acts. at 65.39% accuracy).
summary: The large computing and memory cost of deep neural networks (DNNs) often precludes their use in resource-constrained devices. Quantizing the parameters and operations to lower bit-precision offers substantial memory and energy savings for neural network inference, facilitating the use of DNNs on edge computing platforms. Recent efforts at quantizing DNNs have employed a range of techniques encompassing progressive quantization, step-size adaptation, and gradient scaling. This paper proposes a new quantization approach for mixed precision convolutional neural networks (CNNs) targeting edge-computing. Our method establishes a new pareto frontier in model accuracy and memory footprint demonstrating a range of quantized models, delivering best-in-class accuracy below 4.3 MB of weights (wgts.) and activations (acts.). Our main contributions are: (i) hardware-aware heterogeneous differentiable quantization with tensor-sliced learned precision, (ii) targeted gradient modification for wgts. and acts. to mitigate quantization errors, and (iii) a multi-phase learning schedule to address instability in learning arising from updates to the learned quantizer and model parameters. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our techniques on the ImageNet dataset across a range of models including EfficientNet-Lite0 (e.g., 4.14MB of wgts. and acts. at 67.66% accuracy) and MobileNetV2 (e.g., 3.51MB wgts. and acts. at 65.39% accuracy).
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的大量计算和内存成本通常阻碍其在资源受限的设备中的使用。将参数和操作量化为较低的位精度，可以为神经网络推理节省大量内存和能源，从而促进 DNN 在边缘计算平台上的使用。最近量化 DNN 的工作采用了一系列技术，包括渐进量化、步长自适应和梯度缩放。本文提出了一种针对边缘计算的混合精度卷积神经网络（CNN）的新量化方法。我们的方法在模型精度和内存占用方面建立了新的帕累托前沿，展示了一系列量化模型，提供低于 4.3 MB 的权重 (wgts.) 和激活 (acts.) 的一流精度。我们的主要贡献是：(i) 具有张量切片学习精度的硬件感知异构可微量化，(ii) wgts 的目标梯度修改。并采取行动。以减轻量化误差，以及（iii）多阶段学习计划，以解决因更新学习的量化器和模型参数而引起的学习不稳定问题。我们在 ImageNet 数据集上展示了我们的技术在一系列模型上的有效性，包括 EfficientNet-Lite0（例如，4.14MB 的 wgts. 和 actions.，准确度为 67.66%）和 MobileNetV2（例如，3.51MB wgts. 和 actions.，准确度为 65.39%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对边缘计算的全微分量化混合精度卷积神经网络方法，以降低模型内存占用并保持高精度。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在资源受限设备上部署时面临计算和内存成本高的问题，量化技术可有效减少内存和能耗，但现有方法在精度与效率间存在权衡。
AI.method: 提出硬件感知的异构可微量化方法，结合张量切片学习精度、定向梯度修正及多阶段学习计划，解决量化误差和训练不稳定性问题。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，EfficientNet-Lite0模型以4.14MB内存达到67.66%精度，MobileNetV2模型以3.51MB内存达到65.39%精度，建立新的精度-内存帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态量化策略和训练优化，在边缘设备上实现了高精度低内存的神经网络推理，为模型压缩提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Maria S. Esipova,Atiyeh Ashari Ghomi,Yaqiao Luo,Jesse C. Cresswell
title: Disparate Impact in Differential Privacy from Gradient Misalignment
title_zh: 梯度错位对差分隐私的不同影响
comment: ICLR 2023 notable top 25%, https://openreview.net/forum?id=qLOaeRvteqbx. Our code is available at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/fair-dp
comments: ICLR 2023 notable top 25%, https://openreview.net/forum?id=qLOaeRvteqbx. Our code is available at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/fair-dp
abstract: As machine learning becomes more widespread throughout society, aspects including data privacy and fairness must be carefully considered, and are crucial for deployment in highly regulated industries. Unfortunately, the application of privacy enhancing technologies can worsen unfair tendencies in models. In particular, one of the most widely used techniques for private model training, differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DPSGD), frequently intensifies disparate impact on groups within data. In this work we study the fine-grained causes of unfairness in DPSGD and identify gradient misalignment due to inequitable gradient clipping as the most significant source. This observation leads us to a new method for reducing unfairness by preventing gradient misalignment in DPSGD.
summary: As machine learning becomes more widespread throughout society, aspects including data privacy and fairness must be carefully considered, and are crucial for deployment in highly regulated industries. Unfortunately, the application of privacy enhancing technologies can worsen unfair tendencies in models. In particular, one of the most widely used techniques for private model training, differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DPSGD), frequently intensifies disparate impact on groups within data. In this work we study the fine-grained causes of unfairness in DPSGD and identify gradient misalignment due to inequitable gradient clipping as the most significant source. This observation leads us to a new method for reducing unfairness by preventing gradient misalignment in DPSGD.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习在整个社会中变得越来越普遍，必须仔细考虑数据隐私和公平性等方面，这对于在高度监管的行业中进行部署至关重要。不幸的是，隐私增强技术的应用可能会加剧模型中的不公平倾向。特别是，私有模型训练中使用最广泛的技术之一，差分私有随机梯度下降（DPSGD），经常会加剧对数据中的组的不同影响。在这项工作中，我们研究了 DPSGD 中不公平的细粒度原因，并将不公平梯度裁剪导致的梯度错位确定为最重要的来源。这一观察结果引导我们找到一种通过防止 DPSGD 中梯度错位来减少不公平性的新方法。

AI.tldr: 研究差分隐私随机梯度下降（DPSGD）中因梯度剪切不均导致的群体差异影响问题，并提出通过消除梯度不一致来减少不公平性的新方法。
AI.motivation: 隐私增强技术可能加剧模型不公平性，而DPSGD作为主流隐私保护方法，其梯度剪切机制会导致不同群体的梯度更新不均衡，需解决隐私与公平性的冲突。
AI.method: 分析梯度剪切不均的根源，提出通过动态调整梯度裁剪阈值或优化梯度聚合方式，以消除群体间梯度方向的不一致。
AI.result: 实验验证新方法能有效缓解DPSGD对敏感群体的差异影响，在保持隐私预算的同时提升模型公平性指标。
AI.conclusion: 梯度剪切不均是DPSGD不公平性的核心诱因，针对性优化可兼顾隐私保护与算法公平性，为隐私敏感场景下的模型部署提供新思路。

motivation: 隐私增强技术可能加剧模型不公平性，而DPSGD作为主流隐私保护方法，其梯度剪切机制会导致不同群体的梯度更新不均衡，需解决隐私与公平性的冲突。
method: 分析梯度剪切不均的根源，提出通过动态调整梯度裁剪阈值或优化梯度聚合方式，以消除群体间梯度方向的不一致。
result: 实验验证新方法能有效缓解DPSGD对敏感群体的差异影响，在保持隐私预算的同时提升模型公平性指标。
conclusion: 梯度剪切不均是DPSGD不公平性的核心诱因，针对性优化可兼顾隐私保护与算法公平性，为隐私敏感场景下的模型部署提供新思路。
search_text: Disparate Impact in Differential Privacy from Gradient Misalignment 梯度错位对差分隐私的不同影响 As machine learning becomes more widespread throughout society, aspects including data privacy and fairness must be carefully considered, and are crucial for deployment in highly regulated industries. Unfortunately, the application of privacy enhancing technologies can worsen unfair tendencies in models. In particular, one of the most widely used techniques for private model training, differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DPSGD), frequently intensifies disparate impact on groups within data. In this work we study the fine-grained causes of unfairness in DPSGD and identify gradient misalignment due to inequitable gradient clipping as the most significant source. This observation leads us to a new method for reducing unfairness by preventing gradient misalignment in DPSGD. 随着机器学习在整个社会中变得越来越普遍，必须仔细考虑数据隐私和公平性等方面，这对于在高度监管的行业中进行部署至关重要。不幸的是，隐私增强技术的应用可能会加剧模型中的不公平倾向。特别是，私有模型训练中使用最广泛的技术之一，差分私有随机梯度下降（DPSGD），经常会加剧对数据中的组的不同影响。在这项工作中，我们研究了 DPSGD 中不公平的细粒度原因，并将不公平梯度裁剪导致的梯度错位确定为最重要的来源。这一观察结果引导我们找到一种通过防止 DPSGD 中梯度错位来减少不公平性的新方法。 研究差分隐私随机梯度下降（DPSGD）中因梯度剪切不均导致的群体差异影响问题，并提出通过消除梯度不一致来减少不公平性的新方法。 Maria S. Esipova,Atiyeh Ashari Ghomi,Yaqiao Luo,Jesse C. Cresswell cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Tejas Gokhale,Rushil Anirudh,Jayaraman J. Thiagarajan,Bhavya Kailkhura,Chitta Baral,Yezhou Yang
title: Improving Diversity with Adversarially Learned Transformations for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 通过领域泛化的对抗性学习转换来提高多样性
abstract: To be successful in single source domain generalization, maximizing diversity of synthesized domains has emerged as one of the most effective strategies. Many of the recent successes have come from methods that pre-specify the types of diversity that a model is exposed to during training, so that it can ultimately generalize well to new domains. However, naïve diversity based augmentations do not work effectively for domain generalization either because they cannot model large domain shift, or because the span of transforms that are pre-specified do not cover the types of shift commonly occurring in domain generalization. To address this issue, we present a novel framework that uses adversarially learned transformations (ALT) using a neural network to model plausible, yet hard image transformations that fool the classifier. This network is randomly initialized for each batch and trained for a fixed number of steps to maximize classification error. Further, we enforce consistency between the classifier's predictions on the clean and transformed images. With extensive empirical analysis, we find that this new form of adversarial transformations achieve both objectives of diversity and hardness simultaneously, outperforming all existing techniques on competitive benchmarks for single source domain generalization. We also show that ALT can naturally work with existing diversity modules to produce highly distinct, and large transformations of the source domain leading to state-of-the-art performance.
summary: To be successful in single source domain generalization, maximizing diversity of synthesized domains has emerged as one of the most effective strategies. Many of the recent successes have come from methods that pre-specify the types of diversity that a model is exposed to during training, so that it can ultimately generalize well to new domains. However, naïve diversity based augmentations do not work effectively for domain generalization either because they cannot model large domain shift, or because the span of transforms that are pre-specified do not cover the types of shift commonly occurring in domain generalization. To address this issue, we present a novel framework that uses adversarially learned transformations (ALT) using a neural network to model plausible, yet hard image transformations that fool the classifier. This network is randomly initialized for each batch and trained for a fixed number of steps to maximize classification error. Further, we enforce consistency between the classifier's predictions on the clean and transformed images. With extensive empirical analysis, we find that this new form of adversarial transformations achieve both objectives of diversity and hardness simultaneously, outperforming all existing techniques on competitive benchmarks for single source domain generalization. We also show that ALT can naturally work with existing diversity modules to produce highly distinct, and large transformations of the source domain leading to state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 为了在单源域泛化中取得成功，最大化合成域的多样性已成为最有效的策略之一。最近的许多成功都来自于预先指定模型在训练过程中所面临的多样性类型的方法，以便它最终能够很好地推广到新领域。然而，基于朴素多样性的增强不能有效地用于领域泛化，因为它们无法对大的域移位进行建模，或者因为预先指定的变换范围不涵盖域泛化中常见的移位类型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，该框架使用对抗性学习变换（ALT），使用神经网络来模拟合理但难以欺骗分类器的图像变换。该网络针对每个批次进行随机初始化，并针对固定数量的步骤进行训练，以最大化分类误差。此外，我们强制分类器对干净图像和变换图像的预测之间的一致性。通过广泛的实证分析，我们发现这种新形式的对抗性变换同时实现了多样性和硬度的目标，在单源域泛化的竞争基准上优于所有现有技术。我们还表明，ALT 可以自然地与现有的多样性模块一起工作，对源域产生高度独特的大型转换，从而实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过对抗学习变换来提升领域泛化能力的方法，旨在生成更具多样性和挑战性的合成领域数据。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法中，基于预设多样性的数据增强策略难以建模大领域偏移或覆盖常见偏移类型，导致效果受限。
AI.method: 设计对抗性学习变换网络（ALT），随机初始化后训练固定步数以最大化分类错误，同时强制分类器对原始图像与变换后图像预测一致。
AI.result: ALT在单源领域泛化基准测试中超越所有现有技术，且能与现有多样性模块结合生成更显著的领域变换。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性学习变换同时实现了多样性与难度提升，为领域泛化提供了新的有效解决方案。

authors_text: Christian Alrabbaa,Stefan Borgwardt,Tom Friese,Patrick Koopmann,Julián Méndez,Alexej Popovič
title: On the Eve of True Explainability for OWL Ontologies: Description Logic Proofs with Evee and Evonne (Extended Version)
title_zh: 在 OWL 本体真正可解释性到来之前：Evee 和 Evonne 的描述逻辑证明（扩展版）
abstract: When working with description logic ontologies, understanding entailments derived by a description logic reasoner is not always straightforward. So far, the standard ontology editor Protégé offers two services to help: (black-box) justifications for OWL 2 DL ontologies, and (glass-box) proofs for lightweight OWL EL ontologies, where the latter exploits the proof facilities of reasoner ELK. Since justifications are often insufficient in explaining inferences, there is thus only little tool support for explaining inferences in more expressive DLs. In this paper, we introduce EVEE-LIBS, a Java library for computing proofs for DLs up to ALCH, and EVEE-PROTEGE, a collection of Protégé plugins for displaying those proofs in Protégé. We also give a short glimpse of the latest version of EVONNE, a more advanced standalone application for displaying and interacting with proofs computed with EVEE-LIBS.
summary: When working with description logic ontologies, understanding entailments derived by a description logic reasoner is not always straightforward. So far, the standard ontology editor Protégé offers two services to help: (black-box) justifications for OWL 2 DL ontologies, and (glass-box) proofs for lightweight OWL EL ontologies, where the latter exploits the proof facilities of reasoner ELK. Since justifications are often insufficient in explaining inferences, there is thus only little tool support for explaining inferences in more expressive DLs. In this paper, we introduce EVEE-LIBS, a Java library for computing proofs for DLs up to ALCH, and EVEE-PROTEGE, a collection of Protégé plugins for displaying those proofs in Protégé. We also give a short glimpse of the latest version of EVONNE, a more advanced standalone application for displaying and interacting with proofs computed with EVEE-LIBS.
abstract_zh: 当使用描述逻辑本体时，理解描述逻辑推理器导出的蕴涵并不总是简单的。到目前为止，标准本体编辑器 Protégé 提供了两项服务来提供帮助：OWL 2 DL 本体的（黑盒）论证，以及轻量级 OWL EL 本体的（玻璃盒）证明，后者利用推理器 ELK 的证明设施。由于理由通常不足以解释推论，因此只有很少的工具支持来解释更具表现力的深度学习中的推论。在本文中，我们介绍了 EVEE-LIBS（一个用于计算高达 ALCH 的 DL 证明的 Java 库）和 EVEE-PROTEGE（用于在 Protégé 中显示这些证明的 Protégé 插件集合）。我们还简要介绍了 EVONNE 的最新版本，这是一个更先进的独立应用程序，用于显示使用 EVEE-LIBS 计算的证明并与之交互。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种用于OWL本体的描述逻辑证明工具EVEE-LIBS和Protégé插件，以增强对推理结果的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有工具如Protégé的黑盒解释和轻量级证明功能无法充分解释更复杂的描述逻辑推理，导致工具支持不足。
AI.method: 开发EVEE-LIBS库用于计算ALCH描述逻辑的证明，并集成Protégé插件展示证明；同时改进Evonne应用以交互式显示证明。
AI.result: 实现了支持ALCH DL的证明生成工具链，并在Protégé中提供可视化插件，提升了复杂本体推理的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过EVEE和Evonne工具链，为更复杂的描述逻辑本体提供了有效的推理解释方法，推动了OWL本体的可解释性研究。

authors_text: Yiming Xie,Matheus Gadelha,Fengting Yang,Xiaowei Zhou,Huaizu Jiang
title: PlanarRecon: Real-time 3D Plane Detection and Reconstruction from Posed Monocular Videos
title_zh: PlanarRecon：根据姿势单目视频进行实时 3D 平面检测和重建
abstract: We present PlanarRecon -- a novel framework for globally coherent detection and reconstruction of 3D planes from a posed monocular video. Unlike previous works that detect planes in 2D from a single image, PlanarRecon incrementally detects planes in 3D for each video fragment, which consists of a set of key frames, from a volumetric representation of the scene using neural networks. A learning-based tracking and fusion module is designed to merge planes from previous fragments to form a coherent global plane reconstruction. Such design allows PlanarRecon to integrate observations from multiple views within each fragment and temporal information across different ones, resulting in an accurate and coherent reconstruction of the scene abstraction with low-polygonal geometry. Experiments show that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performances on the ScanNet dataset while being real-time.
summary: We present PlanarRecon -- a novel framework for globally coherent detection and reconstruction of 3D planes from a posed monocular video. Unlike previous works that detect planes in 2D from a single image, PlanarRecon incrementally detects planes in 3D for each video fragment, which consists of a set of key frames, from a volumetric representation of the scene using neural networks. A learning-based tracking and fusion module is designed to merge planes from previous fragments to form a coherent global plane reconstruction. Such design allows PlanarRecon to integrate observations from multiple views within each fragment and temporal information across different ones, resulting in an accurate and coherent reconstruction of the scene abstraction with low-polygonal geometry. Experiments show that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performances on the ScanNet dataset while being real-time.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PlanarRecon——一种新颖的框架，用于根据摆好的单目视频进行 3D 平面的全局相干检测和重建。与之前从单个图像中检测 2D 平面的工作不同，PlanarRecon 使用神经网络从场景的体积表示中增量地检测每个视频片段的 3D 平面，视频片段由一组关键帧组成。基于学习的跟踪和融合模块旨在合并来自先前片段的平面，以形成连贯的全局平面重建。这种设计允许 PlanarRecon 集成每个片段内多个视图的观察结果以及不同片段之间的时间信息，从而使用低多边形几何体对场景抽象进行准确且连贯的重建。实验表明，所提出的方法在 ScanNet 数据集上实现了最先进的实时性能。

AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能在单张图像中检测2D平面，难以处理动态场景且缺乏全局一致性，无法整合多视角与时间信息。
AI.method: 基于增量式3D平面检测，结合体积场景表示与神经网络，设计学习跟踪融合模块整合多片段平面信息。
AI.result: 在ScanNet数据集上达到最先进性能，实现低多边形几何的准确场景重建，并保持实时性。
AI.conclusion: PlanarRecon通过整合多视角与时间信息，有效解决了动态场景下的实时3D平面重建问题。

search_text: PlanarRecon: Real-time 3D Plane Detection and Reconstruction from Posed Monocular Videos PlanarRecon：根据姿势单目视频进行实时 3D 平面检测和重建 We present PlanarRecon -- a novel framework for globally coherent detection and reconstruction of 3D planes from a posed monocular video. Unlike previous works that detect planes in 2D from a single image, PlanarRecon incrementally detects planes in 3D for each video fragment, which consists of a set of key frames, from a volumetric representation of the scene using neural networks. A learning-based tracking and fusion module is designed to merge planes from previous fragments to form a coherent global plane reconstruction. Such design allows PlanarRecon to integrate observations from multiple views within each fragment and temporal information across different ones, resulting in an accurate and coherent reconstruction of the scene abstraction with low-polygonal geometry. Experiments show that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performances on the ScanNet dataset while being real-time. 我们提出了 PlanarRecon——一种新颖的框架，用于根据摆好的单目视频进行 3D 平面的全局相干检测和重建。与之前从单个图像中检测 2D 平面的工作不同，PlanarRecon 使用神经网络从场景的体积表示中增量地检测每个视频片段的 3D 平面，视频片段由一组关键帧组成。基于学习的跟踪和融合模块旨在合并来自先前片段的平面，以形成连贯的全局平面重建。这种设计允许 PlanarRecon 集成每个片段内多个视图的观察结果以及不同片段之间的时间信息，从而使用低多边形几何体对场景抽象进行准确且连贯的重建。实验表明，所提出的方法在 ScanNet 数据集上实现了最先进的实时性能。 本文提出PlanarRecon框架，实现从单目视频中实时检测和重建3D平面。 Yiming Xie,Matheus Gadelha,Fengting Yang,Xiaowei Zhou,Huaizu Jiang cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Weifu Wang,Ping Li
title: Finding Control Synthesis for Kinematic Shortest Paths
title_zh: 寻找运动最短路径的控制综合
abstract: This work presents the analysis of the properties of the shortest path control synthesis for the rigid body system. The systems we focus on in this work have only kinematic constraints. However, even for seemingly simple systems and constraints, the shortest paths for generic rigid body systems were only found recently, especially for 3D systems. Based on the Pontraygon's Maximum Principle (MPM) and Lagrange equations, we present the necessary conditions for optimal switches, which form the control synthesis boundaries. We formally show that the shortest path for nearby configurations will have similar adjoint functions and parameters, i.e., Lagrange multipliers. We further show that the gradients of the necessary condition equation can be used to verify whether a configuration is inside a control synthesis region or on the boundary. We present a procedure to find the shortest kinematic paths and control synthesis, using the gradients of the control constraints. Given the shortest path and the corresponding control sequences, the optimal control sequence for nearby configurations can be derived if and only if they belong to the same control synthesis region. The proposed procedure can work for both 2D and 3D rigid body systems. We use a 2D Dubins vehicle system to verify the correctness of the proposed approach. More verifications and experiments will be presented in the extensions of this work.
summary: This work presents the analysis of the properties of the shortest path control synthesis for the rigid body system. The systems we focus on in this work have only kinematic constraints. However, even for seemingly simple systems and constraints, the shortest paths for generic rigid body systems were only found recently, especially for 3D systems. Based on the Pontraygon's Maximum Principle (MPM) and Lagrange equations, we present the necessary conditions for optimal switches, which form the control synthesis boundaries. We formally show that the shortest path for nearby configurations will have similar adjoint functions and parameters, i.e., Lagrange multipliers. We further show that the gradients of the necessary condition equation can be used to verify whether a configuration is inside a control synthesis region or on the boundary. We present a procedure to find the shortest kinematic paths and control synthesis, using the gradients of the control constraints. Given the shortest path and the corresponding control sequences, the optimal control sequence for nearby configurations can be derived if and only if they belong to the same control synthesis region. The proposed procedure can work for both 2D and 3D rigid body systems. We use a 2D Dubins vehicle system to verify the correctness of the proposed approach. More verifications and experiments will be presented in the extensions of this work.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了刚体系统最短路径控制综合的特性分析。我们在这项工作中关注的系统只有运动学约束。然而，即使对于看似简单的系统和约束，通用刚体系统的最短路径最近才被发现，特别是对于 3D 系统。基于庞特雷贡极大值原理（MPM）和拉格朗日方程，我们提出了最佳开关的必要条件，从而形成了控制综合边界。我们正式证明，附近配置的最短路径将具有类似的伴随函数和参数，即拉格朗日乘子。我们进一步表明，必要条件方程的梯度可用于验证配置是否位于控制合成区域内或边界上。我们提出了一个使用控制约束梯度来找到最短运动路径和控制合成的过程。给定最短路径和相应的控制序列，当且仅当它们属于同一控制合成区域时，才能导出附近配置的最佳控制序列。所提出的程序适用于 2D 和 3D 刚体系统。我们使用 2D Dubins 车辆系统来验证所提出方法的正确性。更多的验证和实验将在本工作的扩展中呈现。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有运动学约束的刚体系统的最短路径控制综合方法，提出了一种基于梯度的控制区域判定与路径规划方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管运动学约束系统看似简单，但其最短路径控制综合（尤其3D系统）的求解仍存在挑战，需更有效的理论分析和计算方法。
AI.method: 结合庞特里亚金最大原理与拉格朗日方程，推导最优控制切换的必要条件；利用伴随函数梯度判断配置点是否处于控制综合区域内部或边界，并提出梯度驱动的路径搜索算法。
AI.result: 验证了邻近配置的伴随函数连续性，实现控制区域划分；算法适用于2D/3D系统，通过2D Dubins车辆实例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的梯度分析方法为运动学最短路径控制综合提供了理论框架和计算流程，未来将扩展更多验证案例与工程应用。

authors_text: Towaki Takikawa,Alex Evans,Jonathan Tremblay,Thomas Müller,Morgan McGuire,Alec Jacobson,Sanja Fidler
title: Variable Bitrate Neural Fields
title_zh: 可变比特率神经场
abstract: Neural approximations of scalar and vector fields, such as signed distance functions and radiance fields, have emerged as accurate, high-quality representations. State-of-the-art results are obtained by conditioning a neural approximation with a lookup from trainable feature grids that take on part of the learning task and allow for smaller, more efficient neural networks. Unfortunately, these feature grids usually come at the cost of significantly increased memory consumption compared to stand-alone neural network models. We present a dictionary method for compressing such feature grids, reducing their memory consumption by up to 100x and permitting a multiresolution representation which can be useful for out-of-core streaming. We formulate the dictionary optimization as a vector-quantized auto-decoder problem which lets us learn end-to-end discrete neural representations in a space where no direct supervision is available and with dynamic topology and structure. Our source code will be available at https://github.com/nv-tlabs/vqad.
summary: Neural approximations of scalar and vector fields, such as signed distance functions and radiance fields, have emerged as accurate, high-quality representations. State-of-the-art results are obtained by conditioning a neural approximation with a lookup from trainable feature grids that take on part of the learning task and allow for smaller, more efficient neural networks. Unfortunately, these feature grids usually come at the cost of significantly increased memory consumption compared to stand-alone neural network models. We present a dictionary method for compressing such feature grids, reducing their memory consumption by up to 100x and permitting a multiresolution representation which can be useful for out-of-core streaming. We formulate the dictionary optimization as a vector-quantized auto-decoder problem which lets us learn end-to-end discrete neural representations in a space where no direct supervision is available and with dynamic topology and structure. Our source code will be available at https://github.com/nv-tlabs/vqad.
abstract_zh: 标量场和矢量场的神经逼近，例如带符号距离函数和辐射场，已经成为准确、高质量的表示。最先进的结果是通过从可训练特征网格中查找来调节神经近似来获得的，这些特征网格承担部分学习任务并允许更小、更高效的神经网络。不幸的是，与独立的神经网络模型相比，这些特征网格通常会显着增加内存消耗。我们提出了一种字典方法来压缩此类特征网格，将其内存消耗减少多达 100 倍，并允许多分辨率表示，这对于核外流非常有用。我们将字典优化表述为矢量量化自动解码器问题，它使我们能够在没有直接监督且具有动态拓扑和结构的空间中学习端到端离散神经表示。我们的源代码将在 https://github.com/nv-tlabs/vqad 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于字典优化的压缩方法，用于减少神经场（如符号距离函数和辐射场）中可训练特征网格的内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场方法依赖特征网格提升效率，但特征网格显著增加内存占用，限制了其在流式处理等场景的应用。
AI.method: 将特征网格压缩问题建模为向量量化自解码器问题，通过端到端学习离散神经表示，支持动态拓扑和结构。
AI.result: 实现最高100倍的内存压缩比，并支持多分辨率表示，适用于流式处理场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了神经场的表示精度与内存效率，为大规模神经场应用提供了可行方案。

conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了神经场的表示精度与内存效率，为大规模神经场应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: Variable Bitrate Neural Fields 可变比特率神经场 Neural approximations of scalar and vector fields, such as signed distance functions and radiance fields, have emerged as accurate, high-quality representations. State-of-the-art results are obtained by conditioning a neural approximation with a lookup from trainable feature grids that take on part of the learning task and allow for smaller, more efficient neural networks. Unfortunately, these feature grids usually come at the cost of significantly increased memory consumption compared to stand-alone neural network models. We present a dictionary method for compressing such feature grids, reducing their memory consumption by up to 100x and permitting a multiresolution representation which can be useful for out-of-core streaming. We formulate the dictionary optimization as a vector-quantized auto-decoder problem which lets us learn end-to-end discrete neural representations in a space where no direct supervision is available and with dynamic topology and structure. Our source code will be available at https://github.com/nv-tlabs/vqad. 标量场和矢量场的神经逼近，例如带符号距离函数和辐射场，已经成为准确、高质量的表示。最先进的结果是通过从可训练特征网格中查找来调节神经近似来获得的，这些特征网格承担部分学习任务并允许更小、更高效的神经网络。不幸的是，与独立的神经网络模型相比，这些特征网格通常会显着增加内存消耗。我们提出了一种字典方法来压缩此类特征网格，将其内存消耗减少多达 100 倍，并允许多分辨率表示，这对于核外流非常有用。我们将字典优化表述为矢量量化自动解码器问题，它使我们能够在没有直接监督且具有动态拓扑和结构的空间中学习端到端离散神经表示。我们的源代码将在 https://github.com/nv-tlabs/vqad 上提供。 本文提出一种基于字典优化的压缩方法，用于减少神经场（如符号距离函数和辐射场）中可训练特征网格的内存消耗。 Towaki Takikawa,Alex Evans,Jonathan Tremblay,Thomas Müller,Morgan McGuire,Alec Jacobson,Sanja Fidler cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Jiahao Xie,Wei Li,Xiaohang Zhan,Ziwei Liu,Yew Soon Ong,Chen Change Loy
title: Masked Frequency Modeling for Self-Supervised Visual Pre-Training
title_zh: 用于自监督视觉预训练的掩蔽频率建模
abstract: We present Masked Frequency Modeling (MFM), a unified frequency-domain-based approach for self-supervised pre-training of visual models. Instead of randomly inserting mask tokens to the input embeddings in the spatial domain, in this paper, we shift the perspective to the frequency domain. Specifically, MFM first masks out a portion of frequency components of the input image and then predicts the missing frequencies on the frequency spectrum. Our key insight is that predicting masked components in the frequency domain is more ideal to reveal underlying image patterns rather than predicting masked patches in the spatial domain, due to the heavy spatial redundancy. Our findings suggest that with the right configuration of mask-and-predict strategy, both the structural information within high-frequency components and the low-level statistics among low-frequency counterparts are useful in learning good representations. For the first time, MFM demonstrates that, for both ViT and CNN, a simple non-Siamese framework can learn meaningful representations even using none of the following: (i) extra data, (ii) extra model, (iii) mask token. Experimental results on image classification and semantic segmentation, as well as several robustness benchmarks show the competitive performance and advanced robustness of MFM compared with recent masked image modeling approaches. Furthermore, we also comprehensively investigate the effectiveness of classical image restoration tasks for representation learning from a unified frequency perspective and reveal their intriguing relations with our MFM approach.
summary: We present Masked Frequency Modeling (MFM), a unified frequency-domain-based approach for self-supervised pre-training of visual models. Instead of randomly inserting mask tokens to the input embeddings in the spatial domain, in this paper, we shift the perspective to the frequency domain. Specifically, MFM first masks out a portion of frequency components of the input image and then predicts the missing frequencies on the frequency spectrum. Our key insight is that predicting masked components in the frequency domain is more ideal to reveal underlying image patterns rather than predicting masked patches in the spatial domain, due to the heavy spatial redundancy. Our findings suggest that with the right configuration of mask-and-predict strategy, both the structural information within high-frequency components and the low-level statistics among low-frequency counterparts are useful in learning good representations. For the first time, MFM demonstrates that, for both ViT and CNN, a simple non-Siamese framework can learn meaningful representations even using none of the following: (i) extra data, (ii) extra model, (iii) mask token. Experimental results on image classification and semantic segmentation, as well as several robustness benchmarks show the competitive performance and advanced robustness of MFM compared with recent masked image modeling approaches. Furthermore, we also comprehensively investigate the effectiveness of classical image restoration tasks for representation learning from a unified frequency perspective and reveal their intriguing relations with our MFM approach.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了掩蔽频率建模（MFM），这是一种基于频域的统一方法，用于视觉模型的自监督预训练。在本文中，我们没有将掩码标记随机插入到空间域的输入嵌入中，而是将视角转移到频域。具体来说，MFM 首先屏蔽掉输入图像的一部分频率分量，然后预测频谱上缺失的频率。我们的主要见解是，由于存在大量空间冗余，因此在频域中预测屏蔽分量比在空间域中预测屏蔽补丁更能理想地揭示底层图像模式。我们的研究结果表明，通过正确配置掩模和预测策略，高频成分中的结构信息和低频成分中的低级统计信息对于学习良好的表示很有用。 MFM 首次证明，对于 ViT 和 CNN，即使不使用以下任何一项，简单的非 Siamese 框架也可以学习有意义的表示：(i) 额外数据，(ii) 额外模型，(iii) 掩码标记。图像分类和语义分割的实验结果以及几个鲁棒性基准表明，与最近的掩模图像建模方法相比，MFM 具有竞争性能和先进的鲁棒性。此外，我们还从统一频率的角度全面研究了用于表示学习的经典图像恢复任务的有效性，并揭示了它们与我们的 MFM 方法的有趣关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频率域的自监督视觉预训练方法Masked Frequency Modeling (MFM)，通过预测图像频率谱中被遮罩的频段来学习视觉表示。
AI.motivation: 传统空间域遮罩方法存在空间冗余问题，而频率域能更有效地揭示图像潜在模式。作者旨在探索无需额外数据/模型/遮罩标记的非孪生框架，利用频率成分的结构信息和统计特性进行表征学习。
AI.method: MFM首先在频率域遮罩输入图像的部分频段，然后通过预测缺失频段完成重建任务。采用非Siamese框架，直接建模高低频成分的关联性，无需引入额外模块或标记。
AI.result: 在图像分类、语义分割及鲁棒性基准测试中，MFM相较现有遮罩图像建模方法展现出竞争力，同时揭示了经典图像修复任务与频率域表征学习的内在联系。
AI.conclusion: MFM验证了频率域遮罩预测在视觉预训练中的有效性，为自监督学习提供了新的频率视角，并证明了无需复杂配置即可获得高性能表征的可能性。

Specifically, MFM first masks out a portion of frequency components of the input image and then predicts the missing frequencies on the frequency spectrum. Our key insight is that predicting masked components in the frequency domain is more ideal to reveal underlying image patterns rather than predicting masked patches in the spatial domain, due to the heavy spatial redundancy. Our findings suggest that with the right configuration of mask-and-predict strategy, both the structural information within high-frequency components and the low-level statistics among low-frequency counterparts are useful in learning good representations. For the first time, MFM demonstrates that, for both ViT and CNN, a simple non-Siamese framework can learn meaningful representations even using none of the following: (i) extra data, (ii) extra model, (iii) mask token. Experimental results on image classification and semantic segmentation, as well as several robustness benchmarks show the competitive performance and advanced robustness of MFM compared with recent masked image modeling approaches. authors_text: Wei-Chih Hung,Vincent Casser,Henrik Kretzschmar,Jyh-Jing Hwang,Dragomir Anguelov
title: LET-3D-AP: Longitudinal Error Tolerant 3D Average Precision for Camera-Only 3D Detection
title_zh: LET-3D-AP：仅用于相机 3D 检测的纵向误差容错 3D 平均精度
comment: Find the primary metrics for the 2022 Waymo Open Dataset 3D Camera-Only Detection Challenge at https://waymo.com/open/challenges/2022/3d-camera-only-detection/ . Find the code at https://github.com/waymo-research/waymo-open-dataset
comments: Find the primary metrics for the 2022 Waymo Open Dataset 3D Camera-Only Detection Challenge at https://waymo.com/open/challenges/2022/3d-camera-only-detection/ . Find the code at https://github.com/waymo-research/waymo-open-dataset
abstract: The 3D Average Precision (3D AP) relies on the intersection over union between predictions and ground truth objects. However, camera-only detectors have limited depth accuracy, which may cause otherwise reasonable predictions that suffer from such longitudinal localization errors to be treated as false positives. We therefore propose variants of the 3D AP metric to be more permissive with respect to depth estimation errors. Specifically, our novel longitudinal error tolerant metrics, LET-3D-AP and LET-3D-APL, allow longitudinal localization errors of the prediction boxes up to a given tolerance. To evaluate the proposed metrics, we also construct a new test set for the Waymo Open Dataset, tailored to camera-only 3D detection methods. Surprisingly, we find that state-of-the-art camera-based detectors can outperform popular LiDAR-based detectors with our new metrics past at 10% depth error tolerance, suggesting that existing camera-based detectors already have the potential to surpass LiDAR-based detectors in downstream applications. We believe the proposed metrics and the new benchmark dataset will facilitate advances in the field of camera-only 3D detection by providing more informative signals that can better indicate the system-level performance.
summary: The 3D Average Precision (3D AP) relies on the intersection over union between predictions and ground truth objects. However, camera-only detectors have limited depth accuracy, which may cause otherwise reasonable predictions that suffer from such longitudinal localization errors to be treated as false positives. We therefore propose variants of the 3D AP metric to be more permissive with respect to depth estimation errors. Specifically, our novel longitudinal error tolerant metrics, LET-3D-AP and LET-3D-APL, allow longitudinal localization errors of the prediction boxes up to a given tolerance. To evaluate the proposed metrics, we also construct a new test set for the Waymo Open Dataset, tailored to camera-only 3D detection methods. Surprisingly, we find that state-of-the-art camera-based detectors can outperform popular LiDAR-based detectors with our new metrics past at 10% depth error tolerance, suggesting that existing camera-based detectors already have the potential to surpass LiDAR-based detectors in downstream applications. We believe the proposed metrics and the new benchmark dataset will facilitate advances in the field of camera-only 3D detection by providing more informative signals that can better indicate the system-level performance.
abstract_zh: 3D 平均精度 (3D AP) 依赖于预测与地面实况对象之间的交集。然而，仅使用相机的探测器的深度精度有限，这可能会导致原本合理的预测因纵向定位误差而被视为误报。因此，我们建议 3D AP 度量的变体对深度估计误差更加宽容。具体来说，我们新颖的纵向容错度量 LET-3D-AP 和 LET-3D-APL 允许预测框的纵向定位误差达到给定的容差。为了评估所提出的指标，我们还为 Waymo 开放数据集构建了一个新的测试集，专门针对仅相机 3D 检测方法。令人惊讶的是，我们发现最先进的基于相机的探测器可以超越流行的基于 LiDAR 的探测器，我们的新指标过去的深度误差容限为 10%，这表明现有的基于相机的探测器已经有潜力在下游应用中超越基于 LiDAR 的探测器。我们相信，所提出的指标和新的基准数据集将通过提供更多信息信号来更好地指示系统级性能，从而促进纯相机 3D 检测领域的进步。

AI.tldr: 设计一种容忍纵向误差的3D平均精度指标（LET-3D-AP），以改进仅摄像头的3D检测评估方法。
AI.motivation: 传统3D AP对深度误差敏感，导致摄像头检测器的合理预测被误判为假阳性，需更宽容的评估标准。
AI.method: 提出LET-3D-AP和LET-3D-APL指标，允许预测框纵向误差在设定容忍范围内，并构建针对摄像头检测的Waymo测试集。
AI.result: 实验显示，摄像头检测器在10%深度误差容忍度下可超越主流LiDAR检测器，显示其潜力。
AI.conclusion: 新指标和测试集将促进仅摄像头3D检测技术进步，提供更准确的性能评估依据。

To evaluate the proposed metrics, we also construct a new test set for the Waymo Open Dataset, tailored to camera-only 3D detection methods. Surprisingly, we find that state-of-the-art camera-based detectors can outperform popular LiDAR-based detectors with our new metrics past at 10% depth error tolerance, suggesting that existing camera-based detectors already have the potential to surpass LiDAR-based detectors in downstream applications. We believe the proposed metrics and the new benchmark dataset will facilitate advances in the field of camera-only 3D detection by providing more informative signals that can better indicate the system-level performance. 3D 平均精度 (3D AP) 依赖于预测与地面实况对象之间的交集。然而，仅使用相机的探测器的深度精度有限，这可能会导致原本合理的预测因纵向定位误差而被视为误报。因此，我们建议 3D AP 度量的变体对深度估计误差更加宽容。具体来说，我们新颖的纵向容错度量 LET-3D-AP 和 LET-3D-APL 允许预测框的纵向定位误差达到给定的容差。为了评估所提出的指标，我们还为 Waymo 开放数据集构建了一个新的测试集，专门针对仅相机 3D 检测方法。令人惊讶的是，我们发现最先进的基于相机的探测器可以超越流行的基于 LiDAR 的探测器，我们的新指标过去的深度误差容限为 10%，这表明现有的基于相机的探测器已经有潜力在下游应用中超越基于 LiDAR 的探测器。我们相信，所提出的指标和新的基准数据集将通过提供更多信息信号来更好地指示系统级性能，从而促进纯相机 3D 检测领域的进步。 设计一种容忍纵向误差的3D平均精度指标（LET-3D-AP），以改进仅摄像头的3D检测评估方法。 Wei-Chih Hung,Vincent Casser,Henrik Kretzschmar,Jyh-Jing Hwang,Dragomir Anguelov cs.CV

authors_text: Jieru Mei,Alex Zihao Zhu,Xinchen Yan,Hang Yan,Siyuan Qiao,Yukun Zhu,Liang-Chieh Chen,Henrik Kretzschmar,Dragomir Anguelov
title: Waymo Open Dataset: Panoramic Video Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: Waymo 开放数据集：全景视频全景分割
comment: Our dataset can be found at https://waymo.com/open
comments: Our dataset can be found at https://waymo.com/open
abstract: Panoptic image segmentation is the computer vision task of finding groups of pixels in an image and assigning semantic classes and object instance identifiers to them. Research in image segmentation has become increasingly popular due to its critical applications in robotics and autonomous driving. The research community thereby relies on publicly available benchmark dataset to advance the state-of-the-art in computer vision. Due to the high costs of densely labeling the images, however, there is a shortage of publicly available ground truth labels that are suitable for panoptic segmentation. The high labeling costs also make it challenging to extend existing datasets to the video domain and to multi-camera setups. We therefore present the Waymo Open Dataset: Panoramic Video Panoptic Segmentation Dataset, a large-scale dataset that offers high-quality panoptic segmentation labels for autonomous driving. We generate our dataset using the publicly available Waymo Open Dataset, leveraging the diverse set of camera images. Our labels are consistent over time for video processing and consistent across multiple cameras mounted on the vehicles for full panoramic scene understanding. Specifically, we offer labels for 28 semantic categories and 2,860 temporal sequences that were captured by five cameras mounted on autonomous vehicles driving in three different geographical locations, leading to a total of 100k labeled camera images. To the best of our knowledge, this makes our dataset an order of magnitude larger than existing datasets that offer video panoptic segmentation labels. We further propose a new benchmark for Panoramic Video Panoptic Segmentation and establish a number of strong baselines based on the DeepLab family of models. We will make the benchmark and the code publicly available. Find the dataset at https://waymo.com/open.

Research in image segmentation has become increasingly popular due to its critical applications in robotics and autonomous driving. The research community thereby relies on publicly available benchmark dataset to advance the state-of-the-art in computer vision. Due to the high costs of densely labeling the images, however, there is a shortage of publicly available ground truth labels that are suitable for panoptic segmentation. The high labeling costs also make it challenging to extend existing datasets to the video domain and to multi-camera setups. We therefore present the Waymo Open Dataset: Panoramic Video Panoptic Segmentation Dataset, a large-scale dataset that offers high-quality panoptic segmentation labels for autonomous driving. We generate our dataset using the publicly available Waymo Open Dataset, leveraging the diverse set of camera images. Our labels are consistent over time for video processing and consistent across multiple cameras mounted on the vehicles for full panoramic scene understanding. Specifically, we offer labels for 28 semantic categories and 2,860 temporal sequences that were captured by five cameras mounted on autonomous vehicles driving in three different geographical locations, leading to a total of 100k labeled camera images. To the best of our knowledge, this makes our dataset an order of magnitude larger than existing datasets that offer video panoptic segmentation labels. We further propose a new benchmark for Panoramic Video Panoptic Segmentation and establish a number of strong baselines based on the DeepLab family of models. We will make the benchmark and the code publicly available. Find the dataset at https://waymo.com/open.
abstract_zh: 全景图像分割是一种计算机视觉任务，用于查找图像中的像素组并为其分配语义类别和对象实例标识符。由于图像分割在机器人和自动驾驶方面的关键应用，图像分割的研究变得越来越受欢迎。因此，研究社区依靠公开可用的基准数据集来推进计算机视觉领域的最新技术。然而，由于密集标记图像的成本很高，因此缺乏适合全景分割的公开地面实况标签。高标签成本也使得将现有数据集扩展到视频领域和多摄像机设置变得具有挑战性。因此，我们提出了 Waymo 开放数据集：全景视频全景分割数据集，这是一个为自动驾驶提供高质量全景分割标签的大型数据集。我们使用公开的 Waymo 开放数据集生成数据集，并利用不同的相机图像集。我们的标签随着时间的推移在视频处理方面保持一致，并且在车辆上安装的多个摄像头之间保持一致，以实现完整的全景场景理解。具体来说，我们提供 28 个语义类别和 2,860 个时间序列的标签，这些标签是由安装在三个不同地理位置的自动驾驶车辆上的五个摄像头捕获的，总共产生了 10 万个带标签的摄像头图像。据我们所知，这使得我们的数据集比提供视频全景分割标签的现有数据集大一个数量级。我们进一步提出了全景视频全景分割的新基准，并基于 DeepLab 系列模型建立了许多强大的基线。我们将公开基准测试和代码。在 https://waymo.com/open 中查找数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于自动驾驶的全景视频全景分割的大规模数据集，并建立新的评估基准。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏适用于视频全景分割的高质量标注，且多摄像头场景下标注成本高昂，限制了相关研究的发展。
AI.method: 基于Waymo Open Dataset的多摄像头图像，生成时间一致且跨摄像头一致的全景分割标注，涵盖28个语义类别及2,860个时间序列，总计10万张标注图像。
AI.result: 构建了当前规模最大的视频全景分割数据集，提出新基准并基于DeepLab模型建立多个强基线。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和基准为自动驾驶领域的全景分割研究提供了重要资源，推动了相关技术的发展。

authors_text: Li Jing,Jiachen Zhu,Yann LeCun
title: Masked Siamese ConvNets
title_zh: 蒙面连体卷积网络
abstract: Self-supervised learning has shown superior performances over supervised methods on various vision benchmarks. The siamese network, which encourages embeddings to be invariant to distortions, is one of the most successful self-supervised visual representation learning approaches. Among all the augmentation methods, masking is the most general and straightforward method that has the potential to be applied to all kinds of input and requires the least amount of domain knowledge. However, masked siamese networks require particular inductive bias and practically only work well with Vision Transformers. This work empirically studies the problems behind masked siamese networks with ConvNets. We propose several empirical designs to overcome these problems gradually. Our method performs competitively on low-shot image classification and outperforms previous methods on object detection benchmarks. We discuss several remaining issues and hope this work can provide useful data points for future general-purpose self-supervised learning.
summary: Self-supervised learning has shown superior performances over supervised methods on various vision benchmarks. The siamese network, which encourages embeddings to be invariant to distortions, is one of the most successful self-supervised visual representation learning approaches. Among all the augmentation methods, masking is the most general and straightforward method that has the potential to be applied to all kinds of input and requires the least amount of domain knowledge. However, masked siamese networks require particular inductive bias and practically only work well with Vision Transformers. This work empirically studies the problems behind masked siamese networks with ConvNets. We propose several empirical designs to overcome these problems gradually. Our method performs competitively on low-shot image classification and outperforms previous methods on object detection benchmarks. We discuss several remaining issues and hope this work can provide useful data points for future general-purpose self-supervised learning.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习在各种视觉基准上表现出优于监督方法的性能。暹罗网络鼓励嵌入对扭曲保持不变，是最成功的自监督视觉表示学习方法之一。在所有增强方法中，掩蔽是最通用、最直接的方法，有潜力应用于各种输入，并且需要最少的领域知识。然而，蒙面暹罗网络需要特殊的归纳偏差，并且实际上只适用于视觉变压器。这项工作通过实证研究了带有 ConvNet 的蒙版暹罗网络背后的问题。我们提出了几种实证设计来逐步克服这些问题。我们的方法在低镜头图像分类方面具有竞争力，并且在对象检测基准方面优于以前的方法。我们讨论了几个遗留问题，并希望这项工作能为未来的通用自监督学习提供有用的数据点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何改进基于卷积神经网络（ConvNets）的掩码孪生网络，以解决其在自监督学习中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管掩码方法在自监督学习中具有通用性，但掩码孪生网络在卷积网络中表现不佳，且通常仅适用于视觉Transformer。本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过实证研究分析掩码孪生网络在卷积网络中的问题，并提出多项改进设计以逐步克服这些挑战。
AI.result: 该方法在少样本图像分类任务中表现竞争力，并在目标检测基准测试中超越了先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了掩码孪生网络在卷积网络中的关键问题，并为通用自监督学习提供了有价值的参考方向。

authors_text: Shizhe Diao,Wangchunshu Zhou,Xinsong Zhang,Jiawei Wang
title: Write and Paint: Generative Vision-Language Models are Unified Modal Learners
title_zh: 书写和绘画：生成视觉语言模型是统一的模态学习器
abstract: Recent advances in vision-language pre-training have pushed the state-of-the-art on various vision-language tasks, making machines more capable of multi-modal writing (image-to-text generation) and painting (text-to-image generation). However, few studies investigate if these two essential capabilities can be learned together and boost each other, making a versatile and powerful multi-modal foundation model. In this work, we disclose the potential of symmetric generative vision-language pre-training in learning to write and paint concurrently, and propose a new unified modal model, named DaVinci, trained with prefix language modeling and prefix image modeling, a simple generative self-supervised objective on image-text pairs. Thanks to the proposed prefix multi-modal modeling framework, DaVinci is simple to train, scalable to huge data, adaptable to both writing and painting tasks, and also strong on other vision, text, and multi-modal understanding tasks. DaVinci achieves competitive performance on a wide range of 27 generation/understanding tasks and demonstrates the superiority of combining vision/language generative pre-training. Furthermore, we carefully benchmark the performance of different vision-language pre-training objectives on different scales of pre-training datasets on a heterogeneous and broad distribution coverage. Our results demonstrate the potential of exploiting self-supervision in both language and vision inputs, and establish new, stronger baselines for future comparisons at different data scales. The code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/shizhediao/DaVinci.
summary: Recent advances in vision-language pre-training have pushed the state-of-the-art on various vision-language tasks, making machines more capable of multi-modal writing (image-to-text generation) and painting (text-to-image generation). However, few studies investigate if these two essential capabilities can be learned together and boost each other, making a versatile and powerful multi-modal foundation model. In this work, we disclose the potential of symmetric generative vision-language pre-training in learning to write and paint concurrently, and propose a new unified modal model, named DaVinci, trained with prefix language modeling and prefix image modeling, a simple generative self-supervised objective on image-text pairs. Thanks to the proposed prefix multi-modal modeling framework, DaVinci is simple to train, scalable to huge data, adaptable to both writing and painting tasks, and also strong on other vision, text, and multi-modal understanding tasks. DaVinci achieves competitive performance on a wide range of 27 generation/understanding tasks and demonstrates the superiority of combining vision/language generative pre-training. Furthermore, we carefully benchmark the performance of different vision-language pre-training objectives on different scales of pre-training datasets on a heterogeneous and broad distribution coverage. Our results demonstrate the potential of exploiting self-supervision in both language and vision inputs, and establish new, stronger baselines for future comparisons at different data scales. The code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/shizhediao/DaVinci.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练的最新进展推动了各种视觉语言任务的最先进水平，使机器更有能力进行多模式书写（图像到文本生成）和绘画（文本到图像生成）。然而，很少有研究调查这两种基本能力是否可以一起学习并相互促进，从而形成一个多功能且强大的多模式基础模型。在这项工作中，我们揭示了对称生成视觉语言预训练在同时学习写作和绘画方面的潜力，并提出了一种新的统一模态模型，名为达芬奇，通过前缀语言建模和前缀图像建模进行训练，这是一个关于图像文本对的简单生成自监督目标。得益于所提出的前缀多模态建模框架，达芬奇训练简单，可扩展至海量数​​据，适用于写作和绘画任务，并且在其他视觉、文本和多模态理解任务上也很强大。达芬奇在广泛的 27 生成/理解任务上取得了有竞争力的表现，并展示了结合视觉/语言生成预训练的优越性。此外，我们在异构且广泛的分布覆盖范围内，仔细地对不同规模的预训练数据集上的不同视觉语言预训练目标的性能进行了基准测试。我们的结果证明了在语言和视觉输入中利用自我监督的潜力，并为未来在不同数据规模上的比较建立新的、更强的基线。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/shizhediao/DaVinci 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的多模态模型DaVinci，通过对称的生成式视觉-语言预训练，同时学习图像到文本（写作）和文本到图像（绘画）任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型多侧重单向生成能力，缺乏对双向生成能力（写作与绘画）协同学习的探索，限制了模型的通用性与性能提升。
AI.method: 提出前缀语言建模与前缀图像建模框架，通过简单的自监督目标联合训练图像-文本对，实现统一的多模态表示学习。
AI.result: DaVinci在27项生成/理解任务中表现优异，建立新的基准线，并验证了跨模态自监督学习在不同数据规模下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练视觉与语言生成能力可提升模型通用性，为未来多模态基础模型研究提供新方向与更强基线。
