authors_text: Xiang Guo,Guanying Chen,Yuchao Dai,Xiaoqing Ye,Jiadai Sun,Xiao Tan,Errui Ding
title: Neural Deformable Voxel Grid for Fast Optimization of Dynamic View Synthesis
title_zh: 用于动态视图合成快速优化的神经可变形体素网格
comment: Technical Report: 29 pages; project page: https://npucvr.github.io/NDVG
comments: Technical Report: 29 pages; project page: https://npucvr.github.io/NDVG
abstract: Recently, Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) is revolutionizing the task of novel view synthesis (NVS) for its superior performance. In this paper, we propose to synthesize dynamic scenes. Extending the methods for static scenes to dynamic scenes is not straightforward as both the scene geometry and appearance change over time, especially under monocular setup. Also, the existing dynamic NeRF methods generally require a lengthy per-scene training procedure, where multi-layer perceptrons (MLP) are fitted to model both motions and radiance. In this paper, built on top of the recent advances in voxel-grid optimization, we propose a fast deformable radiance field method to handle dynamic scenes. Our method consists of two modules. The first module adopts a deformation grid to store 3D dynamic features, and a light-weight MLP for decoding the deformation that maps a 3D point in the observation space to the canonical space using the interpolated features. The second module contains a density and a color grid to model the geometry and density of the scene. The occlusion is explicitly modeled to further improve the rendering quality. Experimental results show that our method achieves comparable performance to D-NeRF using only 20 minutes for training, which is more than 70x faster than D-NeRF, clearly demonstrating the efficiency of our proposed method.
summary: Recently, Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) is revolutionizing the task of novel view synthesis (NVS) for its superior performance. In this paper, we propose to synthesize dynamic scenes. Extending the methods for static scenes to dynamic scenes is not straightforward as both the scene geometry and appearance change over time, especially under monocular setup. Also, the existing dynamic NeRF methods generally require a lengthy per-scene training procedure, where multi-layer perceptrons (MLP) are fitted to model both motions and radiance. In this paper, built on top of the recent advances in voxel-grid optimization, we propose a fast deformable radiance field method to handle dynamic scenes. Our method consists of two modules. The first module adopts a deformation grid to store 3D dynamic features, and a light-weight MLP for decoding the deformation that maps a 3D point in the observation space to the canonical space using the interpolated features. The second module contains a density and a color grid to model the geometry and density of the scene. The occlusion is explicitly modeled to further improve the rendering quality. Experimental results show that our method achieves comparable performance to D-NeRF using only 20 minutes for training, which is more than 70x faster than D-NeRF, clearly demonstrating the efficiency of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 最近，神经辐射场 (NeRF) 以其卓越的性能正在彻底改变新颖视图合成 (NVS) 的任务。在本文中，我们建议合成动态场景。将静态场景的方法扩展到动态场景并不简单，因为场景几何形状和外观都会随着时间的推移而变化，特别是在单目设置下。此外，现有的动态 NeRF 方法通常需要冗长的每个场景训练过程，其中多层感知器（MLP）适合对运动和辐射进行建模。在本文中，基于体素网格优化的最新进展，我们提出了一种快速可变形辐射场方法来处理动态场景。我们的方法由两个模块组成。第一个模块采用变形网格来存储 3D 动态特征，并采用轻量级 MLP 来解码变形，使用插值特征将观察空间中的 3D 点映射到规范空间。第二个模块包含密度和颜色网格，用于对场景的几何形状和密度进行建模。遮挡被显式建模以进一步提高渲染质量。实验结果表明，我们的方法仅用 20 分钟的训练时间就达到了与 D-NeRF 相当的性能，比 D-NeRF 快了 70 倍以上，清楚地证明了我们提出的方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经变形体素网格的方法，用于加速动态视角合成的优化过程。
AI.motivation: 现有动态NeRF方法训练耗时长，且难以直接扩展到动态场景，需解决几何和外观随时间变化的建模问题。
AI.method: 方法包含两个模块：1）变形网格存储动态特征，轻量MLP解码变形映射；2）密度与颜色网格建模几何和外观，并显式建模遮挡。
AI.result: 在20分钟内完成训练，性能与D-NeRF相当，训练速度提升70倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过变形体素网格优化，在保持性能的同时显著提升了动态场景视角合成的效率。

Also, the existing dynamic NeRF methods generally require a lengthy per-scene training procedure, where multi-layer perceptrons (MLP) are fitted to model both motions and radiance. The second module contains a density and a color grid to model the geometry and density of the scene. The occlusion is explicitly modeled to further improve the rendering quality. authors_text: Tobias Höppe,Arash Mehrjou,Stefan Bauer,Didrik Nielsen,Andrea Dittadi
title: Diffusion Models for Video Prediction and Infilling
title_zh: 用于视频预测和填充的扩散模型
abstract: Predicting and anticipating future outcomes or reasoning about missing information in a sequence are critical skills for agents to be able to make intelligent decisions. This requires strong, temporally coherent generative capabilities. Diffusion models have shown remarkable success in several generative tasks, but have not been extensively explored in the video domain. We present Random-Mask Video Diffusion (RaMViD), which extends image diffusion models to videos using 3D convolutions, and introduces a new conditioning technique during training. By varying the mask we condition on, the model is able to perform video prediction, infilling, and upsampling. Due to our simple conditioning scheme, we can utilize the same architecture as used for unconditional training, which allows us to train the model in a conditional and unconditional fashion at the same time. We evaluate RaMViD on two benchmark datasets for video prediction, on which we achieve state-of-the-art results, and one for video generation. High-resolution videos are provided at https://sites.google.com/view/video-diffusion-prediction.
summary: Predicting and anticipating future outcomes or reasoning about missing information in a sequence are critical skills for agents to be able to make intelligent decisions. This requires strong, temporally coherent generative capabilities. Diffusion models have shown remarkable success in several generative tasks, but have not been extensively explored in the video domain. We present Random-Mask Video Diffusion (RaMViD), which extends image diffusion models to videos using 3D convolutions, and introduces a new conditioning technique during training. By varying the mask we condition on, the model is able to perform video prediction, infilling, and upsampling. Due to our simple conditioning scheme, we can utilize the same architecture as used for unconditional training, which allows us to train the model in a conditional and unconditional fashion at the same time. We evaluate RaMViD on two benchmark datasets for video prediction, on which we achieve state-of-the-art results, and one for video generation. High-resolution videos are provided at https://sites.google.com/view/video-diffusion-prediction.
abstract_zh: 预测和预期未来结果或推理序列中缺失的信息是智能体做出明智决策的关键技能。这需要强大的、时间上一致的生成能力。扩散模型在多项生成任务中取得了显着的成功，但尚未在视频领域得到广泛探索。我们提出了随机掩模视频扩散 (RaMViD)，它使用 3D 卷积将图像扩散模型扩展到视频，并在训练过程中引入了一种新的调节技术。通过改变我们所依赖的掩模，该模型能够执行视频预测、填充和上采样。由于我们简单的调节方案，我们可以利用与无条件训练相同的架构，这使我们能够同时以有条件和无条件的方式训练模型。我们在两个用于视频预测的基准数据集上评估 RaMViD，在这两个基准数据集上我们取得了最先进的结果，另一个用于视频生成。 https://sites.google.com/view/video-diffusion-prediction 提供高分辨率视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的视频预测与补全方法RaMViD，通过3D卷积和新型条件技术实现视频生成任务。
AI.motivation: 视频预测和补全对智能决策至关重要，但扩散模型在视频领域应用不足，需探索更强大的时序生成能力。
AI.method: 使用3D卷积扩展图像扩散模型，引入训练时动态变化的掩码条件技术，实现视频预测、补全和上采样，同时保持架构统一支持条件与无条件训练。
AI.result: 在两个视频预测基准数据集上取得SOTA结果，在视频生成任务中表现优异，提供高分辨率视频示例。
AI.conclusion: RaMViD通过简单条件方案有效解决了视频生成任务，验证了扩散模型在视频领域的潜力。

search_text: Diffusion Models for Video Prediction and Infilling 用于视频预测和填充的扩散模型 Predicting and anticipating future outcomes or reasoning about missing information in a sequence are critical skills for agents to be able to make intelligent decisions. This requires strong, temporally coherent generative capabilities. Diffusion models have shown remarkable success in several generative tasks, but have not been extensively explored in the video domain. We present Random-Mask Video Diffusion (RaMViD), which extends image diffusion models to videos using 3D convolutions, and introduces a new conditioning technique during training. By varying the mask we condition on, the model is able to perform video prediction, infilling, and upsampling. Due to our simple conditioning scheme, we can utilize the same architecture as used for unconditional training, which allows us to train the model in a conditional and unconditional fashion at the same time. We evaluate RaMViD on two benchmark datasets for video prediction, on which we achieve state-of-the-art results, and one for video generation. High-resolution videos are provided at https://sites.google.com/view/video-diffusion-prediction. 预测和预期未来结果或推理序列中缺失的信息是智能体做出明智决策的关键技能。这需要强大的、时间上一致的生成能力。扩散模型在多项生成任务中取得了显着的成功，但尚未在视频领域得到广泛探索。我们提出了随机掩模视频扩散 (RaMViD)，它使用 3D 卷积将图像扩散模型扩展到视频，并在训练过程中引入了一种新的调节技术。通过改变我们所依赖的掩模，该模型能够执行视频预测、填充和上采样。由于我们简单的调节方案，我们可以利用与无条件训练相同的架构，这使我们能够同时以有条件和无条件的方式训练模型。我们在两个用于视频预测的基准数据集上评估 RaMViD，在这两个基准数据集上我们取得了最先进的结果，另一个用于视频生成。 https://sites.google.com/view/video-diffusion-prediction 提供高分辨率视频。 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的视频预测与补全方法RaMViD，通过3D卷积和新型条件技术实现视频生成任务。 Tobias Höppe,Arash Mehrjou,Stefan Bauer,Didrik Nielsen,Andrea Dittadi cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Katja Schwarz,Axel Sauer,Michael Niemeyer,Yiyi Liao,Andreas Geiger
title: VoxGRAF: Fast 3D-Aware Image Synthesis with Sparse Voxel Grids
title_zh: VoxGRAF：使用稀疏体素网格进行快速 3D 感知图像合成
abstract: State-of-the-art 3D-aware generative models rely on coordinate-based MLPs to parameterize 3D radiance fields. While demonstrating impressive results, querying an MLP for every sample along each ray leads to slow rendering. Therefore, existing approaches often render low-resolution feature maps and process them with an upsampling network to obtain the final image. Albeit efficient, neural rendering often entangles viewpoint and content such that changing the camera pose results in unwanted changes of geometry or appearance. Motivated by recent results in voxel-based novel view synthesis, we investigate the utility of sparse voxel grid representations for fast and 3D-consistent generative modeling in this paper. Our results demonstrate that monolithic MLPs can indeed be replaced by 3D convolutions when combining sparse voxel grids with progressive growing, free space pruning and appropriate regularization. To obtain a compact representation of the scene and allow for scaling to higher voxel resolutions, our model disentangles the foreground object (modeled in 3D) from the background (modeled in 2D). In contrast to existing approaches, our method requires only a single forward pass to generate a full 3D scene. It hence allows for efficient rendering from arbitrary viewpoints while yielding 3D consistent results with high visual fidelity.
summary: State-of-the-art 3D-aware generative models rely on coordinate-based MLPs to parameterize 3D radiance fields. While demonstrating impressive results, querying an MLP for every sample along each ray leads to slow rendering. Therefore, existing approaches often render low-resolution feature maps and process them with an upsampling network to obtain the final image. Albeit efficient, neural rendering often entangles viewpoint and content such that changing the camera pose results in unwanted changes of geometry or appearance. Motivated by recent results in voxel-based novel view synthesis, we investigate the utility of sparse voxel grid representations for fast and 3D-consistent generative modeling in this paper. Our results demonstrate that monolithic MLPs can indeed be replaced by 3D convolutions when combining sparse voxel grids with progressive growing, free space pruning and appropriate regularization. To obtain a compact representation of the scene and allow for scaling to higher voxel resolutions, our model disentangles the foreground object (modeled in 3D) from the background (modeled in 2D). In contrast to existing approaches, our method requires only a single forward pass to generate a full 3D scene. It hence allows for efficient rendering from arbitrary viewpoints while yielding 3D consistent results with high visual fidelity.
abstract_zh: 最先进的 3D 感知生成模型依靠基于坐标的 MLP 来参数化 3D 辐射场。虽然展示了令人印象深刻的结果，但查询 MLP 以获取沿每条射线的每个样本会导致渲染速度变慢。因此，现有的方法通常渲染低分辨率特征图，并使用上采样网络对其进行处理以获得最终图像。尽管神经渲染很高效，但通常会纠缠视点和内容，因此更改相机姿势会导致几何或外观发生不必要的变化。受基于体素的新颖视图合成的最新结果的启发，我们在本文中研究了稀疏体素网格表示在快速且 3D 一致的生成建模中的实用性。我们的结果表明，当将稀疏体素网格与渐进生长、自由空间修剪和适当的正则化相结合时，整体 MLP 确实可以被 3D 卷积取代。为了获得场景的紧凑表示并允许缩放到更高的体素分辨率，我们的模型将前景对象（以 3D 建模）与背景（以 2D 建模）分离。与现有方法相比，我们的方法仅需要一次前向传递即可生成完整的 3D 场景。因此，它允许从任意视点进行高效渲染，同时产生具有高视觉保真度的 3D 一致结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VoxGRAF方法，通过稀疏体素网格结合3D卷积实现快速且3D一致的图像合成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于坐标MLP的3D生成模型渲染速度慢且视角与内容耦合，导致视角变化时几何或外观异常。受体素基新视角合成启发，需探索更高效的3D生成方案。
AI.method: 采用稀疏体素网格表示，结合渐进生长、空域剪枝和正则化，用3D卷积替代单体MLP，并分离前景（3D建模）与背景（2D建模）以实现高分辨率扩展。
AI.result: 模型仅需单次前向传播即可生成完整3D场景，支持任意视角高效渲染，视觉保真度高且3D一致性优异。
AI.conclusion: VoxGRAF通过稀疏体素网格与结构解耦设计，解决了传统方法的效率与一致性问题，为大规模3D生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Sucheng Ren,Huiyu Wang,Zhengqi Gao,Shengfeng He,Alan Yuille,Yuyin Zhou,Cihang Xie
title: A Simple Data Mixing Prior for Improving Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 用于改进自我监督学习的简单数据混合先验
abstract: Data mixing (e.g., Mixup, Cutmix, ResizeMix) is an essential component for advancing recognition models. In this paper, we focus on studying its effectiveness in the self-supervised setting. By noticing the mixed images that share the same source images are intrinsically related to each other, we hereby propose SDMP, short for $\textbf{S}$imple $\textbf{D}$ata $\textbf{M}$ixing $\textbf{P}$rior, to capture this straightforward yet essential prior, and position such mixed images as additional $\textbf{positive pairs}$ to facilitate self-supervised representation learning. Our experiments verify that the proposed SDMP enables data mixing to help a set of self-supervised learning frameworks (e.g., MoCo) achieve better accuracy and out-of-distribution robustness. More notably, our SDMP is the first method that successfully leverages data mixing to improve (rather than hurt) the performance of Vision Transformers in the self-supervised setting. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/SDMP
summary: Data mixing (e.g., Mixup, Cutmix, ResizeMix) is an essential component for advancing recognition models. In this paper, we focus on studying its effectiveness in the self-supervised setting. By noticing the mixed images that share the same source images are intrinsically related to each other, we hereby propose SDMP, short for $\textbf{S}$imple $\textbf{D}$ata $\textbf{M}$ixing $\textbf{P}$rior, to capture this straightforward yet essential prior, and position such mixed images as additional $\textbf{positive pairs}$ to facilitate self-supervised representation learning. Our experiments verify that the proposed SDMP enables data mixing to help a set of self-supervised learning frameworks (e.g., MoCo) achieve better accuracy and out-of-distribution robustness. More notably, our SDMP is the first method that successfully leverages data mixing to improve (rather than hurt) the performance of Vision Transformers in the self-supervised setting. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/SDMP
abstract_zh: 数据混合（例如 Mixup、Cutmix、ResizeMix）是推进识别模型的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们重点研究其在自我监督环境中的有效性。通过注意到共享相同源图像的混合图像本质上彼此相关，我们特此提出 SDMP（$\textbf{S}$imple $\textbf{D}$ata $\textbf{M}$ixing $\textbf{P}$rior 的缩写），以捕获这个简单但重要的先验，并将此类混合图像定位为额外的 $\textbf{positivepair}$ 以促进自监督表示学习。我们的实验验证了所提出的 SDMP 能够实现数据混合，以帮助一组自监督学习框架（例如 MoCo）实现更好的准确性和分布外鲁棒性。更值得注意的是，我们的 SDMP 是第一个成功利用数据混合来提高（而不是损害）视觉 Transformers 在自我监督环境中的性能的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/OliverRensu/SDMP 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单数据混合先验（SDMP），通过将混合图像作为正样本对，提升自监督学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 数据混合技术（如Mixup）在监督学习中效果显著，但其在自监督学习中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。混合图像本质上与原始图像相关，但现有方法未有效利用这一特性。
AI.method: 提出SDMP方法，将混合图像视为额外的正样本对，直接整合到自监督学习框架（如MoCo）中，无需复杂调整。
AI.result: 实验表明SDMP提升了多个自监督框架的准确率和分布外鲁棒性，尤其首次成功提升Vision Transformer在自监督下的性能。
AI.conclusion: SDMP通过简单有效的数据混合先验，为自监督学习提供了新思路，尤其适用于视觉Transformer模型。

tldr: 本文提出了一种简单数据混合先验（SDMP），通过将混合图像作为正样本对，提升自监督学习的性能。
motivation: 数据混合技术（如Mixup）在监督学习中效果显著，但其在自监督学习中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。混合图像本质上与原始图像相关，但现有方法未有效利用这一特性。
method: 提出SDMP方法，将混合图像视为额外的正样本对，直接整合到自监督学习框架（如MoCo）中，无需复杂调整。
result: 实验表明SDMP提升了多个自监督框架的准确率和分布外鲁棒性，尤其首次成功提升Vision Transformer在自监督下的性能。
conclusion: SDMP通过简单有效的数据混合先验，为自监督学习提供了新思路，尤其适用于视觉Transformer模型。
search_text: A Simple Data Mixing Prior for Improving Self-Supervised Learning 用于改进自我监督学习的简单数据混合先验 Data mixing (e.g., Mixup, Cutmix, ResizeMix) is an essential component for advancing recognition models. In this paper, we focus on studying its effectiveness in the self-supervised setting. By noticing the mixed images that share the same source images are intrinsically related to each other, we hereby propose SDMP, short for $\textbf{S}$imple $\textbf{D}$ata $\textbf{M}$ixing $\textbf{P}$rior, to capture this straightforward yet essential prior, and position such mixed images as additional $\textbf{positive pairs}$ to facilitate self-supervised representation learning. Our experiments verify that the proposed SDMP enables data mixing to help a set of self-supervised learning frameworks (e.g., MoCo) achieve better accuracy and out-of-distribution robustness. More notably, our SDMP is the first method that successfully leverages data mixing to improve (rather than hurt) the performance of Vision Transformers in the self-supervised setting. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/SDMP 数据混合（例如 Mixup、Cutmix、ResizeMix）是推进识别模型的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们重点研究其在自我监督环境中的有效性。通过注意到共享相同源图像的混合图像本质上彼此相关，我们特此提出 SDMP（$\textbf{S}$imple $\textbf{D}$ata $\textbf{M}$ixing $\textbf{P}$rior 的缩写），以捕获这个简单但重要的先验，并将此类混合图像定位为额外的 $\textbf{positivepair}$ 以促进自监督表示学习。我们的实验验证了所提出的 SDMP 能够实现数据混合，以帮助一组自监督学习框架（例如 MoCo）实现更好的准确性和分布外鲁棒性。更值得注意的是，我们的 SDMP 是第一个成功利用数据混合来提高（而不是损害）视觉 Transformers 在自我监督环境中的性能的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/OliverRensu/SDMP 上公开获取 本文提出了一种简单数据混合先验（SDMP），通过将混合图像作为正样本对，提升自监督学习的性能。 Sucheng Ren,Huiyu Wang,Zhengqi Gao,Shengfeng He,Alan Yuille,Yuyin Zhou,Cihang Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Vikram V. Ramaswamy,Sunnie S. Y. Kim,Nicole Meister,Ruth Fong,Olga Russakovsky
title: ELUDE: Generating interpretable explanations via a decomposition into labelled and unlabelled features
title_zh: ELUDE：通过分解标记和未标记的特征来生成可解释的解释
abstract: Deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in different areas of machine learning over the past decade; however, the size and complexity of these models make them difficult to understand. In an effort to make them more interpretable, several recent works focus on explaining parts of a deep neural network through human-interpretable, semantic attributes. However, it may be impossible to completely explain complex models using only semantic attributes. In this work, we propose to augment these attributes with a small set of uninterpretable features. Specifically, we develop a novel explanation framework ELUDE (Explanation via Labelled and Unlabelled DEcomposition) that decomposes a model's prediction into two parts: one that is explainable through a linear combination of the semantic attributes, and another that is dependent on the set of uninterpretable features. By identifying the latter, we are able to analyze the "unexplained" portion of the model, obtaining insights into the information used by the model. We show that the set of unlabelled features can generalize to multiple models trained with the same feature space and compare our work to two popular attribute-oriented methods, Interpretable Basis Decomposition and Concept Bottleneck, and discuss the additional insights ELUDE provides.
summary: Deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in different areas of machine learning over the past decade; however, the size and complexity of these models make them difficult to understand. In an effort to make them more interpretable, several recent works focus on explaining parts of a deep neural network through human-interpretable, semantic attributes. However, it may be impossible to completely explain complex models using only semantic attributes. In this work, we propose to augment these attributes with a small set of uninterpretable features. Specifically, we develop a novel explanation framework ELUDE (Explanation via Labelled and Unlabelled DEcomposition) that decomposes a model's prediction into two parts: one that is explainable through a linear combination of the semantic attributes, and another that is dependent on the set of uninterpretable features. By identifying the latter, we are able to analyze the "unexplained" portion of the model, obtaining insights into the information used by the model. We show that the set of unlabelled features can generalize to multiple models trained with the same feature space and compare our work to two popular attribute-oriented methods, Interpretable Basis Decomposition and Concept Bottleneck, and discuss the additional insights ELUDE provides.
abstract_zh: 过去十年来，深度学习模型在机器学习的不同领域取得了令人瞩目的成功；然而，这些模型的规模和复杂性使得它们难以理解。为了使它们更具可解释性，最近的几项工作侧重于通过人类可解释的语义属性来解释深度神经网络的各个部分。然而，仅使用语义属性可能无法完全解释复杂模型。在这项工作中，我们建议用一小组不可解释的特征来增强这些属性。具体来说，我们开发了一种新颖的解释框架 ELUDE（通过标记和未标记分解进行解释），它将模型的预测分解为两部分：一个部分可以通过语义属性的线性组合进行解释，另一个部分取决于一组不可解释的特征。通过识别后者，我们能够分析模型的“无法解释”部分，深入了解模型使用的信息。我们证明，未标记的特征集可以推广到使用相同特征空间训练的多个模型，并将我们的工作与两种流行的面向属性的方法（可解释基础分解和概念瓶颈）进行比较，并讨论 ELUDE 提供的其他见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELUDE框架，通过将模型预测分解为可解释的语义属性和不可解释的未标记特征，提升深度学习模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖语义属性解释复杂模型存在局限，难以完全揭示模型行为，需引入不可解释特征分析模型未被解释的部分。
AI.method: 开发ELUDE框架，将模型预测分解为两部分：基于语义属性的线性组合和依赖未标记特征的部分，通过识别后者分析模型信息使用情况。
AI.result: 未标记特征可泛化至同特征空间的多模型，相比现有方法（如可解释基分解、概念瓶颈）提供了额外的模型行为洞察。
AI.conclusion: ELUDE通过区分可解释与不可解释特征，增强了模型透明度，为理解复杂模型的决策过程提供了新视角。

authors_text: Elad Ben-Avraham,Roei Herzig,Karttikeya Mangalam,Amir Bar,Anna Rohrbach,Leonid Karlinsky,Trevor Darrell,Amir Globerson
title: Structured Video Tokens @ Ego4D PNR Temporal Localization Challenge 2022
title_zh: 结构化视频令牌 @ Ego4D PNR 时间本地化挑战 2022
comment: Ego4D CVPR22 Object State Localization challenge. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.06346
comments: Ego4D CVPR22 Object State Localization challenge. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.06346
abstract: This technical report describes the SViT approach for the Ego4D Point of No Return (PNR) Temporal Localization Challenge. We propose a learning framework StructureViT (SViT for short), which demonstrates how utilizing the structure of a small number of images only available during training can improve a video model. SViT relies on two key insights. First, as both images and videos contain structured information, we enrich a transformer model with a set of \emph{object tokens} that can be used across images and videos. Second, the scene representations of individual frames in video should "align" with those of still images. This is achieved via a "Frame-Clip Consistency" loss, which ensures the flow of structured information between images and videos. SViT obtains strong performance on the challenge test set with 0.656 absolute temporal localization error.
summary: This technical report describes the SViT approach for the Ego4D Point of No Return (PNR) Temporal Localization Challenge. We propose a learning framework StructureViT (SViT for short), which demonstrates how utilizing the structure of a small number of images only available during training can improve a video model. SViT relies on two key insights. First, as both images and videos contain structured information, we enrich a transformer model with a set of \emph{object tokens} that can be used across images and videos. Second, the scene representations of individual frames in video should "align" with those of still images. This is achieved via a "Frame-Clip Consistency" loss, which ensures the flow of structured information between images and videos. SViT obtains strong performance on the challenge test set with 0.656 absolute temporal localization error.
abstract_zh: 本技术报告描述了 Ego4D 不归点 (PNR) 时间定位挑战的 SViT 方法。我们提出了一个学习框架 StructureViT（简称 SViT），它演示了如何利用仅在训练期间可用的少量图像的结构来改进视频模型。 SViT 依赖于两个关键见解。首先，由于图像和视频都包含结构化信息，我们使用一组可在图像和视频之间使用的 \emph{object tokens} 来丰富 Transformer 模型。其次，视频中各个帧的场景表示应与静态图像的场景表示“对齐”。这是通过“帧剪辑一致性”损失来实现的，它确保了图像和视频之间的结构化信息的流动。 SViT 在挑战测试集上获得了强大的性能，绝对时间定位误差为 0.656。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为StructureViT（SViT）的框架，用于解决Ego4D Point of No Return（PNR）时间定位挑战，通过利用少量训练图像的结构信息提升视频模型性能。
AI.motivation: 视频模型在训练时通常缺乏足够的结构化图像数据，而图像和视频均包含结构信息，如何有效利用有限图像数据提升视频理解能力是关键问题。
AI.method: SViT通过两个核心设计实现目标：1）引入跨图像和视频的物体标记（object tokens）以捕捉结构信息；2）设计帧-片段一致性损失（Frame-Clip Consistency Loss），确保视频帧与静态图像的场景表征对齐。
AI.result: 在挑战测试集上取得0.656的绝对时间定位误差，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化图像数据与视频的联合建模，SViT证明了利用少量图像信息提升视频模型性能的可行性，为视频理解任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bin Xia,Jingwen He,Yulun Zhang,Yitong Wang,Yapeng Tian,Wenming Yang,Luc Van Gool
title: Structured Sparsity Learning for Efficient Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于高效视频超分辨率的结构化稀疏学习
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023, code is available at https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/SSL
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023, code is available at https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/SSL
abstract: The high computational costs of video super-resolution (VSR) models hinder their deployment on resource-limited devices, (e.g., smartphones and drones). Existing VSR models contain considerable redundant filters, which drag down the inference efficiency. To prune these unimportant filters, we develop a structured pruning scheme called Structured Sparsity Learning (SSL) according to the properties of VSR. In SSL, we design pruning schemes for several key components in VSR models, including residual blocks, recurrent networks, and upsampling networks. Specifically, we develop a Residual Sparsity Connection (RSC) scheme for residual blocks of recurrent networks to liberate pruning restrictions and preserve the restoration information. For upsampling networks, we design a pixel-shuffle pruning scheme to guarantee the accuracy of feature channel-space conversion. In addition, we observe that pruning error would be amplified as the hidden states propagate along with recurrent networks. To alleviate the issue, we design Temporal Finetuning (TF). Extensive experiments show that SSL can significantly outperform recent methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: The high computational costs of video super-resolution (VSR) models hinder their deployment on resource-limited devices, (e.g., smartphones and drones). Existing VSR models contain considerable redundant filters, which drag down the inference efficiency. To prune these unimportant filters, we develop a structured pruning scheme called Structured Sparsity Learning (SSL) according to the properties of VSR. In SSL, we design pruning schemes for several key components in VSR models, including residual blocks, recurrent networks, and upsampling networks. Specifically, we develop a Residual Sparsity Connection (RSC) scheme for residual blocks of recurrent networks to liberate pruning restrictions and preserve the restoration information. For upsampling networks, we design a pixel-shuffle pruning scheme to guarantee the accuracy of feature channel-space conversion. In addition, we observe that pruning error would be amplified as the hidden states propagate along with recurrent networks. To alleviate the issue, we design Temporal Finetuning (TF). Extensive experiments show that SSL can significantly outperform recent methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 视频超分辨率（VSR）模型的高计算成本阻碍了它们在资源有限的设备（例如智能手机和无人机）上的部署。现有的VSR模型包含大量冗余过滤器，这降低了推理效率。为了修剪这些不重要的过滤器，我们根据 VSR 的特性开发了一种称为结构化稀疏学习（SSL）的结构化修剪方案。在SSL中，我们为VSR模型中的几个关键组件设计了剪枝方案，包括残差块、循环网络和上采样网络。具体来说，我们为循环网络的残差块开发了残差稀疏连接（RSC）方案，以释放剪枝限制并保留恢复信息。对于上采样网络，我们设计了像素洗牌剪枝方案以保证特征通道空间转换的准确性。此外，我们观察到，当隐藏状态随着循环网络传播时，剪枝误差会被放大。为了缓解这个问题，我们设计了时间微调（TF）。大量实验表明 SSL 在数量和质量上都可以显着优于最近的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化稀疏学习方法，用于提高视频超分辨率模型的效率。
AI.motivation: 视频超分辨率模型计算成本高，难以部署在资源有限的设备上，现有模型存在大量冗余滤波器，影响推理效率。
AI.method: 开发了一种称为结构化稀疏学习（SSL）的剪枝方案，包括残差块、循环网络和上采样网络的剪枝方法，如残差稀疏连接（RSC）和像素洗牌剪枝，并设计了时间微调（TF）以缓解剪枝误差。
AI.result: 实验表明，SSL在定性和定量上均显著优于最近的方法。
AI.conclusion: SSL方法有效提升了视频超分辨率模型的推理效率，同时保持了较高的准确性。

search_text: Structured Sparsity Learning for Efficient Video Super-Resolution 用于高效视频超分辨率的结构化稀疏学习 The high computational costs of video super-resolution (VSR) models hinder their deployment on resource-limited devices, (e.g., smartphones and drones). Existing VSR models contain considerable redundant filters, which drag down the inference efficiency. To prune these unimportant filters, we develop a structured pruning scheme called Structured Sparsity Learning (SSL) according to the properties of VSR. In SSL, we design pruning schemes for several key components in VSR models, including residual blocks, recurrent networks, and upsampling networks. For upsampling networks, we design a pixel-shuffle pruning scheme to guarantee the accuracy of feature channel-space conversion. In addition, we observe that pruning error would be amplified as the hidden states propagate along with recurrent networks. To alleviate the issue, we design Temporal Finetuning (TF). Extensive experiments show that SSL can significantly outperform recent methods quantitatively and qualitatively. 视频超分辨率（VSR）模型的高计算成本阻碍了它们在资源有限的设备（例如智能手机和无人机）上的部署。现有的VSR模型包含大量冗余过滤器，这降低了推理效率。为了修剪这些不重要的过滤器，我们根据 VSR 的特性开发了一种称为结构化稀疏学习（SSL）的结构化修剪方案。在SSL中，我们为VSR模型中的几个关键组件设计了剪枝方案，包括残差块、循环网络和上采样网络。具体来说，我们为循环网络的残差块开发了残差稀疏连接（RSC）方案，以释放剪枝限制并保留恢复信息。对于上采样网络，我们设计了像素洗牌剪枝方案以保证特征通道空间转换的准确性。此外，我们观察到，当隐藏状态随着循环网络传播时，剪枝误差会被放大。为了缓解这个问题，我们设计了时间微调（TF）。大量实验表明 SSL 在数量和质量上都可以显着优于最近的方法。 本文提出了一种结构化稀疏学习方法，用于提高视频超分辨率模型的效率。 Bin Xia,Jingwen He,Yulun Zhang,Yitong Wang,Yapeng Tian,Wenming Yang,Luc Van Gool cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Valentin Gabeur,Paul Hongsuck Seo,Arsha Nagrani,Chen Sun,Karteek Alahari,Cordelia Schmid
title: AVATAR: Unconstrained Audiovisual Speech Recognition
title_zh: AVATAR：无约束视听语音识别
abstract: Audio-visual automatic speech recognition (AV-ASR) is an extension of ASR that incorporates visual cues, often from the movements of a speaker's mouth. Unlike works that simply focus on the lip motion, we investigate the contribution of entire visual frames (visual actions, objects, background etc.). This is particularly useful for unconstrained videos, where the speaker is not necessarily visible. To solve this task, we propose a new sequence-to-sequence AudioVisual ASR TrAnsformeR (AVATAR) which is trained end-to-end from spectrograms and full-frame RGB. To prevent the audio stream from dominating training, we propose different word-masking strategies, thereby encouraging our model to pay attention to the visual stream. We demonstrate the contribution of the visual modality on the How2 AV-ASR benchmark, especially in the presence of simulated noise, and show that our model outperforms all other prior work by a large margin. Finally, we also create a new, real-world test bed for AV-ASR called VisSpeech, which demonstrates the contribution of the visual modality under challenging audio conditions.
summary: Audio-visual automatic speech recognition (AV-ASR) is an extension of ASR that incorporates visual cues, often from the movements of a speaker's mouth. Unlike works that simply focus on the lip motion, we investigate the contribution of entire visual frames (visual actions, objects, background etc.). This is particularly useful for unconstrained videos, where the speaker is not necessarily visible. To solve this task, we propose a new sequence-to-sequence AudioVisual ASR TrAnsformeR (AVATAR) which is trained end-to-end from spectrograms and full-frame RGB. To prevent the audio stream from dominating training, we propose different word-masking strategies, thereby encouraging our model to pay attention to the visual stream. We demonstrate the contribution of the visual modality on the How2 AV-ASR benchmark, especially in the presence of simulated noise, and show that our model outperforms all other prior work by a large margin. Finally, we also create a new, real-world test bed for AV-ASR called VisSpeech, which demonstrates the contribution of the visual modality under challenging audio conditions.
abstract_zh: 视听自动语音识别 (AV-ASR) 是 ASR 的扩展，它结合了通常来自说话者嘴部动作的视觉提示。与仅仅关注嘴唇运动的作品不同，我们研究整个视觉框架（视觉动作、物体、背景等）的贡献。这对于不受约束的视频特别有用，在这些视频中，说话者不一定可见。为了解决这个任务，我们提出了一种新的序列到序列的 AudioVisual ASR TrAnsformeR (AVATAR)，它是根据频谱图和全帧 RGB 进行端到端训练的。为了防止音频流主导训练，我们提出了不同的字屏蔽策略，从而鼓励我们的模型关注视觉流。我们展示了视觉模态对 How2 AV-ASR 基准的贡献，特别是在存在模拟噪声的情况下，并表明我们的模型大幅优于所有其他先前的工作。最后，我们还为 AV-ASR 创建了一个名为 VisSpeech 的新的真实世界测试台，它展示了视觉模态在具有挑战性的音频条件下的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非受限音频视觉语音识别系统AVATAR，通过结合音频和完整视觉帧信息提升语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅关注嘴唇运动，但实际场景中说话者可能不可见，需利用更全面的视觉信息并解决音频主导训练的问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端序列到序列模型AVATAR，融合频谱图与全帧RGB数据，采用词掩码策略平衡音频与视觉流的注意力权重。
AI.result: 在How2 AV-ASR基准测试中，尤其在噪声环境下显著优于现有方法，并构建了真实场景测试集VisSpeech验证效果。
AI.conclusion: 视觉模态在挑战性音频条件下具有显著贡献，AVATAR模型通过多模态融合有效提升了非受限场景下的语音识别能力。

authors_text: Eshwar Ram Arunachaleswaran,Anindya De,Sampath Kannan
title: Reconstructing Ultrametric Trees from Noisy Experiments
title_zh: 从嘈杂的实验中重建超度量树
abstract: The problem of reconstructing evolutionary trees or phylogenies is of great interest in computational biology. A popular model for this problem assumes that we are given the set of leaves (current species) of an unknown binary tree and the results of `experiments' on triples of leaves (a,b,c), which return the pair with the deepest least common ancestor. If the tree is assumed to be an ultrametric (i.e., all root-leaf paths have the same length), the experiment can be equivalently seen to return the closest pair of leaves. In this model, efficient algorithms are known for tree reconstruction. In reality, since the data on which these `experiments' are run is itself generated by the stochastic process of evolution, these experiments are noisy. In all reasonable models of evolution, if the branches leading to the leaves in a triple separate from each other at common ancestors that are very close to each other in the tree, the result of the experiment should be close to uniformly random. Motivated by this, we consider a model where the noise on any triple is just dependent on the three pairwise distances (referred to as distance based noise). Our results are the following: 1. Suppose the length of every edge in the unknown tree is at least $\tilde{O}(\frac{1}{\sqrt n})$ fraction of the length of a root-leaf path. Then, we give an efficient algorithm to reconstruct the topology of the tree for a broad family of distance-based noise models. Further, we show that if the edges are asymptotically shorter, then topology reconstruction is information-theoretically impossible. 2. Further, for a specific distance-based noise model--which we refer to as the homogeneous noise model--we show that the edge weights can also be approximately reconstructed under the same quantitative lower bound on the edge lengths.
summary: The problem of reconstructing evolutionary trees or phylogenies is of great interest in computational biology. A popular model for this problem assumes that we are given the set of leaves (current species) of an unknown binary tree and the results of `experiments' on triples of leaves (a,b,c), which return the pair with the deepest least common ancestor. If the tree is assumed to be an ultrametric (i.e., all root-leaf paths have the same length), the experiment can be equivalently seen to return the closest pair of leaves. In this model, efficient algorithms are known for tree reconstruction. In reality, since the data on which these `experiments' are run is itself generated by the stochastic process of evolution, these experiments are noisy. In all reasonable models of evolution, if the branches leading to the leaves in a triple separate from each other at common ancestors that are very close to each other in the tree, the result of the experiment should be close to uniformly random. Motivated by this, we consider a model where the noise on any triple is just dependent on the three pairwise distances (referred to as distance based noise). Our results are the following: 1. Suppose the length of every edge in the unknown tree is at least $\tilde{O}(\frac{1}{\sqrt n})$ fraction of the length of a root-leaf path. Then, we give an efficient algorithm to reconstruct the topology of the tree for a broad family of distance-based noise models. Further, we show that if the edges are asymptotically shorter, then topology reconstruction is information-theoretically impossible. 2. Further, for a specific distance-based noise model--which we refer to as the homogeneous noise model--we show that the edge weights can also be approximately reconstructed under the same quantitative lower bound on the edge lengths.
abstract_zh: 重建进化树或系统发育的问题在计算生物学中引起了极大的兴趣。这个问题的一个流行模型假设我们得到了未知二叉树的叶子集（当前物种）以及叶子三元组（a，b，c）的“实验”结果，该结果返回具有最深的最小共同祖先的对。如果假设树是超度量树（即所有根叶路径具有相同的长度），则实验可以等效地视为返回最接近的一对叶子。在这个模型中，树重建的有效算法是众所周知的。事实上，由于运行这些“实验”的数据本身是由进化的随机过程生成的，因此这些实验是有噪声的。在所有合理的进化模型中，如果在树中彼此非常接近的共同祖先处，通向三元组中的叶子的分支彼此分离，则实验结果应该接近均匀随机。受此启发，我们考虑一个模型，其中任何三元组上的噪声仅取决于三个成对距离（称为基于距离的噪声）。我们的结果如下： 1. 假设未知树中每条边的长度至少是根叶路径长度的 $\tilde{O}(\frac{1}{\sqrt n})$ 分数。然后，我们给出了一种有效的算法来重建基于距离的噪声模型的树的拓扑结构。此外，我们表明，如果边渐近更短，那么拓扑重建在信息理论上是不可能的。 2. 此外，对于特定的基于距离的噪声模型（我们将其称为同质噪声模型），我们表明，在边缘长度的相同定量下限下也可以近似重建边缘权重。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在噪声实验数据下重建超度量树（ultrametric trees）的算法与条件。
AI.motivation: 进化树重建是计算生物学的重要问题，但实际实验数据因进化过程的随机性存在噪声，传统模型难以处理此类噪声。
AI.method: 提出基于距离的噪声模型，设计高效算法，通过分析三元组实验结果中噪声与边长的关系实现树结构重建。
AI.result: 当树中每条边长度不低于根叶路径长度的$\	ilde{O}(1/\\sqrt{n})$时，可高效重建树拓扑结构；若边长过短则信息论上不可行。在均匀噪声模型下还可近似重建边权重。
AI.conclusion: 本文为噪声环境下超度量树重建提供了理论条件与算法，明确了边长下界对可重构性的关键作用。

search_text: Reconstructing Ultrametric Trees from Noisy Experiments 从嘈杂的实验中重建超度量树 The problem of reconstructing evolutionary trees or phylogenies is of great interest in computational biology. A popular model for this problem assumes that we are given the set of leaves (current species) of an unknown binary tree and the results of `experiments' on triples of leaves (a,b,c), which return the pair with the deepest least common ancestor. If the tree is assumed to be an ultrametric (i.e., all root-leaf paths have the same length), the experiment can be equivalently seen to return the closest pair of leaves. In this model, efficient algorithms are known for tree reconstruction. In reality, since the data on which these `experiments' are run is itself generated by the stochastic process of evolution, these experiments are noisy. In all reasonable models of evolution, if the branches leading to the leaves in a triple separate from each other at common ancestors that are very close to each other in the tree, the result of the experiment should be close to uniformly random. Motivated by this, we consider a model where the noise on any triple is just dependent on the three pairwise distances (referred to as distance based noise). Our results are the following: 1. Suppose the length of every edge in the unknown tree is at least $\tilde{O}(\frac{1}{\sqrt n})$ fraction of the length of a root-leaf path. Then, we give an efficient algorithm to reconstruct the topology of the tree for a broad family of distance-based noise models. Further, we show that if the edges are asymptotically shorter, then topology reconstruction is information-theoretically impossible. 2. Further, for a specific distance-based noise model--which we refer to as the homogeneous noise model--we show that the edge weights can also be approximately reconstructed under the same quantitative lower bound on the edge lengths. 重建进化树或系统发育的问题在计算生物学中引起了极大的兴趣。这个问题的一个流行模型假设我们得到了未知二叉树的叶子集（当前物种）以及叶子三元组（a，b，c）的“实验”结果，该结果返回具有最深的最小共同祖先的对。如果假设树是超度量树（即所有根叶路径具有相同的长度），则实验可以等效地视为返回最接近的一对叶子。在这个模型中，树重建的有效算法是众所周知的。事实上，由于运行这些“实验”的数据本身是由进化的随机过程生成的，因此这些实验是有噪声的。在所有合理的进化模型中，如果在树中彼此非常接近的共同祖先处，通向三元组中的叶子的分支彼此分离，则实验结果应该接近均匀随机。受此启发，我们考虑一个模型，其中任何三元组上的噪声仅取决于三个成对距离（称为基于距离的噪声）。我们的结果如下： 1. 假设未知树中每条边的长度至少是根叶路径长度的 $\tilde{O}(\frac{1}{\sqrt n})$ 分数。然后，我们给出了一种有效的算法来重建基于距离的噪声模型的树的拓扑结构。此外，我们表明，如果边渐近更短，那么拓扑重建在信息理论上是不可能的。 2. 此外，对于特定的基于距离的噪声模型（我们将其称为同质噪声模型），我们表明，在边缘长度的相同定量下限下也可以近似重建边缘权重。 本文研究在噪声实验数据下重建超度量树（ultrametric trees）的算法与条件。 Eshwar Ram Arunachaleswaran,Anindya De,Sampath Kannan cs.DS

authors_text: Ting Chen,Saurabh Saxena,Lala Li,Tsung-Yi Lin,David J. Fleet,Geoffrey Hinton
title: A Unified Sequence Interface for Vision Tasks
title_zh: 视觉任务的统一序列接口
comment: The first three authors contributed equally
comments: The first three authors contributed equally
abstract: While language tasks are naturally expressed in a single, unified, modeling framework, i.e., generating sequences of tokens, this has not been the case in computer vision. As a result, there is a proliferation of distinct architectures and loss functions for different vision tasks. In this work we show that a diverse set of "core" computer vision tasks can also be unified if formulated in terms of a shared pixel-to-sequence interface. We focus on four tasks, namely, object detection, instance segmentation, keypoint detection, and image captioning, all with diverse types of outputs, e.g., bounding boxes or dense masks. Despite that, by formulating the output of each task as a sequence of discrete tokens with a unified interface, we show that one can train a neural network with a single model architecture and loss function on all these tasks, with no task-specific customization. To solve a specific task, we use a short prompt as task description, and the sequence output adapts to the prompt so it can produce task-specific output. We show that such a model can achieve competitive performance compared to well-established task-specific models.
summary: While language tasks are naturally expressed in a single, unified, modeling framework, i.e., generating sequences of tokens, this has not been the case in computer vision. As a result, there is a proliferation of distinct architectures and loss functions for different vision tasks. In this work we show that a diverse set of "core" computer vision tasks can also be unified if formulated in terms of a shared pixel-to-sequence interface. We focus on four tasks, namely, object detection, instance segmentation, keypoint detection, and image captioning, all with diverse types of outputs, e.g., bounding boxes or dense masks. Despite that, by formulating the output of each task as a sequence of discrete tokens with a unified interface, we show that one can train a neural network with a single model architecture and loss function on all these tasks, with no task-specific customization. To solve a specific task, we use a short prompt as task description, and the sequence output adapts to the prompt so it can produce task-specific output. We show that such a model can achieve competitive performance compared to well-established task-specific models.
abstract_zh: 虽然语言任务自然地在单个、统一的建模框架中表达，即生成标记序列，但计算机视觉中的情况并非如此。因此，不同视觉任务的不同架构和损失函数不断增加。在这项工作中，我们表明，如果按照共享的像素到序列接口来制定，也可以统一一组不同的“核心”计算机视觉任务。我们专注于四个任务，即对象检测、实例分割、关键点检测和图像描述，所有任务都具有不同类型的输出，例如边界框或密集掩模。尽管如此，通过将每个任务的输出表示为具有统一接口的一系列离散标记，我们表明可以在所有这些任务上训练具有单一模型架构和损失函数的神经网络，而无需针对特定任务进行定制。为了解决特定任务，我们使用简短的提示作为任务描述，并且序列输出适应提示，以便它可以产生特定于任务的输出。我们证明，与成熟的特定任务模型相比，这种模型可以实现具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的序列接口框架，将多种计算机视觉任务（如目标检测、图像分割等）转化为序列生成问题，实现单一模型架构和损失函数的跨任务训练。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉任务因输出形式多样（如边界框、密集掩码等）导致模型架构和损失函数碎片化，缺乏类似自然语言处理中统一序列建模的通用框架。
AI.method: 通过将像素级输入映射为统一的离散序列接口，利用任务描述提示（prompt）引导模型生成任务特定输出，采用单一架构和损失函数进行多任务联合训练。
AI.result: 在目标检测、实例分割、关键点检测和图像描述生成四类任务上，该模型在无需任务特定调整的情况下达到与现有专业模型相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 统一序列接口证明了视觉任务可通过序列建模实现跨任务泛化，为构建通用视觉基础模型提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ge Wang,Li Tan,Tianbao Song,Wei Wang,Ziliang Shang
title: Region-enhanced Deep Graph Convolutional Networks for Rumor Detection
title_zh: 用于谣言检测的区域增强深度图卷积网络
comment: Due to the error in the hyperparameter record during the repeated experiment, there are problems in reproducing the results
comments: Due to the error in the hyperparameter record during the repeated experiment, there are problems in reproducing the results
abstract: Social media has been rapidly developing in the public sphere due to its ease of spreading new information, which leads to the circulation of rumors. However, detecting rumors from such a massive amount of information is becoming an increasingly arduous challenge. Previous work generally obtained valuable features from propagation information. It should be noted that most methods only target the propagation structure while ignoring the rumor transmission pattern. This limited focus severely restricts the collection of spread data. To solve this problem, the authors of the present study are motivated to explore the regionalized propagation patterns of rumors. Specifically, a novel region-enhanced deep graph convolutional network (RDGCN) that enhances the propagation features of rumors by learning regionalized propagation patterns and trains to learn the propagation patterns by unsupervised learning is proposed. In addition, a source-enhanced residual graph convolution layer (SRGCL) is designed to improve the graph neural network (GNN) oversmoothness and increase the depth limit of the rumor detection methods-based GNN. Experiments on Twitter15 and Twitter16 show that the proposed model performs better than the baseline approach on rumor detection and early rumor detection.
summary: Social media has been rapidly developing in the public sphere due to its ease of spreading new information, which leads to the circulation of rumors. However, detecting rumors from such a massive amount of information is becoming an increasingly arduous challenge. Previous work generally obtained valuable features from propagation information. It should be noted that most methods only target the propagation structure while ignoring the rumor transmission pattern. This limited focus severely restricts the collection of spread data. To solve this problem, the authors of the present study are motivated to explore the regionalized propagation patterns of rumors. Specifically, a novel region-enhanced deep graph convolutional network (RDGCN) that enhances the propagation features of rumors by learning regionalized propagation patterns and trains to learn the propagation patterns by unsupervised learning is proposed. In addition, a source-enhanced residual graph convolution layer (SRGCL) is designed to improve the graph neural network (GNN) oversmoothness and increase the depth limit of the rumor detection methods-based GNN. Experiments on Twitter15 and Twitter16 show that the proposed model performs better than the baseline approach on rumor detection and early rumor detection.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体因其易于传播新信息而在公共领域迅速发展，从而导致谣言的传播。然而，从如此海量的信息中甄别谣言正成为越来越艰巨的挑战。以前的工作通常从传播信息中获得有价值的特征。值得注意的是，大多数方法只针对传播结构，而忽略了谣言传播模式。这种有限的关注严重限制了传播数据的收集。为了解决这个问题，本研究的作者有动力探索谣言的区域化传播模式。具体来说，提出了一种新颖的区域增强深度图卷积网络（RDGCN），它通过学习区域化传播模式来增强谣言的传播特征，并通过无监督学习来训练学习传播模式。此外，还设计了源增强残差图卷积层（SRGCL）来提高图神经网络（GNN）的过平滑性并增加基于谣言检测方法的GNN的深度限制。 Twitter15 和 Twitter16 上的实验表明，所提出的模型在谣言检测和早期谣言检测方面比基线方法表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域增强的深度图卷积网络（RDGCN），用于改进社交媒体中的谣言检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注谣言传播结构而忽略区域化传播模式，导致数据收集受限，难以有效检测谣言。
AI.method: 设计区域增强深度图卷积网络（RDGCN），通过无监督学习捕捉区域化传播特征，并引入源增强残差图卷积层（SRGCL）缓解图神经网络过平滑问题。
AI.result: 在Twitter15和Twitter16数据集上，RDGCN在谣言检测和早期检测任务中均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 区域化传播模式学习有效提升了谣言检测性能，为社交网络谣言分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Region-enhanced Deep Graph Convolutional Networks for Rumor Detection 用于谣言检测的区域增强深度图卷积网络 Social media has been rapidly developing in the public sphere due to its ease of spreading new information, which leads to the circulation of rumors. However, detecting rumors from such a massive amount of information is becoming an increasingly arduous challenge. Previous work generally obtained valuable features from propagation information. It should be noted that most methods only target the propagation structure while ignoring the rumor transmission pattern. This limited focus severely restricts the collection of spread data. To solve this problem, the authors of the present study are motivated to explore the regionalized propagation patterns of rumors. Specifically, a novel region-enhanced deep graph convolutional network (RDGCN) that enhances the propagation features of rumors by learning regionalized propagation patterns and trains to learn the propagation patterns by unsupervised learning is proposed. In addition, a source-enhanced residual graph convolution layer (SRGCL) is designed to improve the graph neural network (GNN) oversmoothness and increase the depth limit of the rumor detection methods-based GNN. Experiments on Twitter15 and Twitter16 show that the proposed model performs better than the baseline approach on rumor detection and early rumor detection. 社交媒体因其易于传播新信息而在公共领域迅速发展，从而导致谣言的传播。然而，从如此海量的信息中甄别谣言正成为越来越艰巨的挑战。以前的工作通常从传播信息中获得有价值的特征。值得注意的是，大多数方法只针对传播结构，而忽略了谣言传播模式。这种有限的关注严重限制了传播数据的收集。为了解决这个问题，本研究的作者有动力探索谣言的区域化传播模式。具体来说，提出了一种新颖的区域增强深度图卷积网络（RDGCN），它通过学习区域化传播模式来增强谣言的传播特征，并通过无监督学习来训练学习传播模式。此外，还设计了源增强残差图卷积层（SRGCL）来提高图神经网络（GNN）的过平滑性并增加基于谣言检测方法的GNN的深度限制。 Twitter15 和 Twitter16 上的实验表明，所提出的模型在谣言检测和早期谣言检测方面比基线方法表现更好。 本文提出一种基于区域增强的深度图卷积网络（RDGCN），用于改进社交媒体中的谣言检测方法。 Ge Wang,Li Tan,Tianbao Song,Wei Wang,Ziliang Shang cs.SI,cs.AI

authors_text: Thierry Judge,Olivier Bernard,Mihaela Porumb,Agis Chartsias,Arian Beqiri,Pierre-Marc Jodoin
title: CRISP - Reliable Uncertainty Estimation for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: CRISP - 医学图像分割的可靠不确定性估计
abstract: Accurate uncertainty estimation is a critical need for the medical imaging community. A variety of methods have been proposed, all direct extensions of classification uncertainty estimations techniques. The independent pixel-wise uncertainty estimates, often based on the probabilistic interpretation of neural networks, do not take into account anatomical prior knowledge and consequently provide sub-optimal results to many segmentation tasks. For this reason, we propose CRISP a ContRastive Image Segmentation for uncertainty Prediction method. At its core, CRISP implements a contrastive method to learn a joint latent space which encodes a distribution of valid segmentations and their corresponding images. We use this joint latent space to compare predictions to thousands of latent vectors and provide anatomically consistent uncertainty maps. Comprehensive studies performed on four medical image databases involving different modalities and organs underlines the superiority of our method compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Accurate uncertainty estimation is a critical need for the medical imaging community. A variety of methods have been proposed, all direct extensions of classification uncertainty estimations techniques. The independent pixel-wise uncertainty estimates, often based on the probabilistic interpretation of neural networks, do not take into account anatomical prior knowledge and consequently provide sub-optimal results to many segmentation tasks. For this reason, we propose CRISP a ContRastive Image Segmentation for uncertainty Prediction method. At its core, CRISP implements a contrastive method to learn a joint latent space which encodes a distribution of valid segmentations and their corresponding images. We use this joint latent space to compare predictions to thousands of latent vectors and provide anatomically consistent uncertainty maps. Comprehensive studies performed on four medical image databases involving different modalities and organs underlines the superiority of our method compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 准确的不确定性估计是医学成像界的关键需求。已经提出了多种方法，都是分类不确定性估计技术的直接扩展。独立的逐像素不确定性估计通常基于神经网络的概率解释，不考虑解剖学先验知识，因此为许多分割任务提供次优结果。为此，我们提出了 CRISP 一种用于不确定性预测的对比图像分割方法。 CRISP 的核心是实现一种对比方法来学习联合潜在空间，该空间对有效分割及其相应图像的分布进行编码。我们使用这个联合潜在空间将预测与数千个潜在向量进行比较，并提供解剖学上一致的不确定性图。对涉及不同模式和器官的四个医学图像数据库进行的综合研究强调了我们的方法与最先进的方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRISP方法，通过对比学习构建联合潜在空间，以提升医学图像分割中的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 现有像素级不确定性估计方法未考虑解剖学先验知识，导致分割任务结果不理想。
AI.method: CRISP采用对比学习，编码有效分割与图像的联合潜在空间分布，通过比较预测与潜在向量生成解剖学一致的不确定性图。
AI.result: 在四个多模态医学图像数据库实验中，CRISP优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合解剖学知识的对比学习方法能显著提升医学图像分割的不确定性估计效果。

authors_text: Yuxuan Zhou,Wangmeng Xiang,Chao Li,Biao Wang,Xihan Wei,Lei Zhang,Margret Keuper,Xiansheng Hua
title: SP-ViT: Learning 2D Spatial Priors for Vision Transformers
title_zh: SP-ViT：学习视觉变压器的 2D 空间先验
abstract: Recently, transformers have shown great potential in image classification and established state-of-the-art results on the ImageNet benchmark. However, compared to CNNs, transformers converge slowly and are prone to overfitting in low-data regimes due to the lack of spatial inductive biases. Such spatial inductive biases can be especially beneficial since the 2D structure of an input image is not well preserved in transformers. In this work, we present Spatial Prior-enhanced Self-Attention (SP-SA), a novel variant of vanilla Self-Attention (SA) tailored for vision transformers. Spatial Priors (SPs) are our proposed family of inductive biases that highlight certain groups of spatial relations. Unlike convolutional inductive biases, which are forced to focus exclusively on hard-coded local regions, our proposed SPs are learned by the model itself and take a variety of spatial relations into account. Specifically, the attention score is calculated with emphasis on certain kinds of spatial relations at each head, and such learned spatial foci can be complementary to each other. Based on SP-SA we propose the SP-ViT family, which consistently outperforms other ViT models with similar GFlops or parameters. Our largest model SP-ViT-L achieves a record-breaking 86.3% Top-1 accuracy with a reduction in the number of parameters by almost 50% compared to previous state-of-the-art model (150M for SP-ViT-L vs 271M for CaiT-M-36) among all ImageNet-1K models trained on 224x224 and fine-tuned on 384x384 resolution w/o extra data.
summary: Recently, transformers have shown great potential in image classification and established state-of-the-art results on the ImageNet benchmark. However, compared to CNNs, transformers converge slowly and are prone to overfitting in low-data regimes due to the lack of spatial inductive biases. Such spatial inductive biases can be especially beneficial since the 2D structure of an input image is not well preserved in transformers. In this work, we present Spatial Prior-enhanced Self-Attention (SP-SA), a novel variant of vanilla Self-Attention (SA) tailored for vision transformers. Spatial Priors (SPs) are our proposed family of inductive biases that highlight certain groups of spatial relations. Unlike convolutional inductive biases, which are forced to focus exclusively on hard-coded local regions, our proposed SPs are learned by the model itself and take a variety of spatial relations into account. Specifically, the attention score is calculated with emphasis on certain kinds of spatial relations at each head, and such learned spatial foci can be complementary to each other. Based on SP-SA we propose the SP-ViT family, which consistently outperforms other ViT models with similar GFlops or parameters. Our largest model SP-ViT-L achieves a record-breaking 86.3% Top-1 accuracy with a reduction in the number of parameters by almost 50% compared to previous state-of-the-art model (150M for SP-ViT-L vs 271M for CaiT-M-36) among all ImageNet-1K models trained on 224x224 and fine-tuned on 384x384 resolution w/o extra data.
abstract_zh: 最近，Transformers 在图像分类方面展现出了巨大的潜力，并在 ImageNet 基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。然而，与 CNN 相比，Transformer 收敛缓慢，并且由于缺乏空间归纳偏差，在低数据情况下容易过度拟合。这种空间归纳偏差可能特别有益，因为输入图像的 2D 结构在 Transformer 中没有得到很好的保存。在这项工作中，我们提出了空间先验增强型自注意力（SP-SA），这是一种专为视觉变换器量身定制的普通自注意力（SA）的新变体。空间先验（SP）是我们提出的归纳偏差系列，突出了某些空间关系组。与被迫只关注硬编码局部区域的卷积归纳偏差不同，我们提出的 SP 是由模型本身学习的，并考虑了各种空间关系。具体来说，注意力分数的计算重点是每个头部的某些空间关系，并且这种学习的空间焦点可以相互补充。基于 SP-SA，我们提出了 SP-ViT 系列，它始终优于具有类似 GFlops 或参数的其他 ViT 模型。在所有在 224x224 上训练并在 384x384 分辨率上进行微调（无需额外数据）的 ImageNet-1K 模型中，我们最大的模型 SP-ViT-L 实现了破纪录的 86.3% Top-1 准确率，与之前最先进的模型（SP-ViT-L 为 150M，CaiT-M-36 为 271M）相比，参数数量减少了近 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SP-ViT模型，通过学习二维空间先验来增强视觉Transformer的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer缺乏空间归纳偏置，导致收敛慢且在小数据集上易过拟合，而CNN的固定局部区域偏置无法灵活适应多样化的空间关系。
AI.method: 设计空间先验增强自注意力（SP-SA）机制，通过学习不同空间关系的注意力权重，构建互补的空间焦点，并基于此提出SP-ViT模型家族。
AI.result: SP-ViT在ImageNet-1K数据集上达到86.3%的Top-1准确率，参数量比之前最佳模型减少近50%（150M vs 271M）。
AI.conclusion: 空间先验学习有效提升了视觉Transformer的效率与性能，为模型设计提供了新的方向。

However, compared to CNNs, transformers converge slowly and are prone to overfitting in low-data regimes due to the lack of spatial inductive biases. authors_text: Alekh Agarwal,Tong Zhang
title: Model-based RL with Optimistic Posterior Sampling: Structural Conditions and Sample Complexity
title_zh: 具有乐观后验采样的基于模型的强化学习：结构条件和样本复杂性
abstract: We propose a general framework to design posterior sampling methods for model-based RL. We show that the proposed algorithms can be analyzed by reducing regret to Hellinger distance in conditional probability estimation. We further show that optimistic posterior sampling can control this Hellinger distance, when we measure model error via data likelihood. This technique allows us to design and analyze unified posterior sampling algorithms with state-of-the-art sample complexity guarantees for many model-based RL settings. We illustrate our general result in many special cases, demonstrating the versatility of our framework.
summary: We propose a general framework to design posterior sampling methods for model-based RL. We show that the proposed algorithms can be analyzed by reducing regret to Hellinger distance in conditional probability estimation. We further show that optimistic posterior sampling can control this Hellinger distance, when we measure model error via data likelihood. This technique allows us to design and analyze unified posterior sampling algorithms with state-of-the-art sample complexity guarantees for many model-based RL settings. We illustrate our general result in many special cases, demonstrating the versatility of our framework.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个通用框架来为基于模型的强化学习设计后验采样方法。我们表明，可以通过减少条件概率估计中的 Hellinger 距离的遗憾来分析所提出的算法。我们进一步表明，当我们通过数据似然测量模型误差时，乐观后验采样可以控制这个海灵格距离。这项技术使我们能够设计和分析统一的后验采样算法，并为许多基于模型的 RL 设置提供最先进的样本复杂性保证。我们在许多特殊情况下说明了我们的一般结果，展示了我们框架的多功能性。

AI.motivation: 现有模型基于强化学习方法在样本复杂度和通用性上存在不足，需统一框架处理多场景并提供理论保证。
AI.method: 将遗憾转化为条件概率估计的Hellinger距离，利用乐观后验采样控制模型误差，设计统一算法。
AI.result: 框架在多个特例中验证有效，证明其通用性及领先样本复杂度保证。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为模型基于强化学习提供理论支撑，展示其在不同场景下的适用性与优势。

authors_text: Sahar Soltanieh,Ali Etemad,Javad Hashemi
title: Analysis of Augmentations for Contrastive ECG Representation Learning
title_zh: 对比心电图表示学习的增强分析
comment: This paper has been accepted to IJCNN 2022 conference
comments: This paper has been accepted to IJCNN 2022 conference
abstract: This paper systematically investigates the effectiveness of various augmentations for contrastive self-supervised learning of electrocardiogram (ECG) signals and identifies the best parameters. The baseline of our proposed self-supervised framework consists of two main parts: the contrastive learning and the downstream task. In the first stage, we train an encoder using a number of augmentations to extract generalizable ECG signal representations. We then freeze the encoder and finetune a few linear layers with different amounts of labelled data for downstream arrhythmia detection. We then experiment with various augmentations techniques and explore a range of parameters. Our experiments are done on PTB-XL, a large and publicly available 12-lead ECG dataset. The results show that applying augmentations in a specific range of complexities works better for self-supervised contrastive learning. For instance, when adding Gaussian noise, a sigma in the range of 0.1 to 0.2 achieves better results, while poor training occurs when the added noise is too small or too large (outside of the specified range). A similar trend is observed with other augmentations, demonstrating the importance of selecting the optimum level of difficulty for the added augmentations, as augmentations that are too simple will not result in effective training, while augmentations that are too difficult will also prevent the model from effective learning of generalized representations. Our work can influence future research on self-supervised contrastive learning on bio-signals and aid in selecting optimum parameters for different augmentations.
summary: This paper systematically investigates the effectiveness of various augmentations for contrastive self-supervised learning of electrocardiogram (ECG) signals and identifies the best parameters. The baseline of our proposed self-supervised framework consists of two main parts: the contrastive learning and the downstream task. In the first stage, we train an encoder using a number of augmentations to extract generalizable ECG signal representations. We then freeze the encoder and finetune a few linear layers with different amounts of labelled data for downstream arrhythmia detection. We then experiment with various augmentations techniques and explore a range of parameters. Our experiments are done on PTB-XL, a large and publicly available 12-lead ECG dataset. The results show that applying augmentations in a specific range of complexities works better for self-supervised contrastive learning. For instance, when adding Gaussian noise, a sigma in the range of 0.1 to 0.2 achieves better results, while poor training occurs when the added noise is too small or too large (outside of the specified range). A similar trend is observed with other augmentations, demonstrating the importance of selecting the optimum level of difficulty for the added augmentations, as augmentations that are too simple will not result in effective training, while augmentations that are too difficult will also prevent the model from effective learning of generalized representations. Our work can influence future research on self-supervised contrastive learning on bio-signals and aid in selecting optimum parameters for different augmentations.
abstract_zh: 本文系统地研究了心电图 (ECG) 信号对比自监督学习的各种增强方法的有效性，并确定了最佳参数。我们提出的自我监督框架的基线由两个主要部分组成：对比学习和下游任务。在第一阶段，我们使用许多增强来训练编码器来提取可概括的心电图信号表示。然后，我们冻结编码器并使用不同数量的标记数据微调一些线性层，以进行下游心律失常检测。然后我们尝试各种增强技术并探索一系列参数。我们的实验是在 PTB-XL 上完成的，这是一个大型且公开的 12 导联心电图数据集。结果表明，在特定的复杂性范围内应用增强对于自监督对比学习效果更好。例如，在添加高斯噪声时，0.1 到 0.2 范围内的 sigma 可以获得更好的结果，而当添加的噪声太小或太大（超出指定范围）时，训练效果会很差。其他增强也观察到类似的趋势，这证明了为添加的增强选择最佳难度级别的重要性，因为太简单的增强不会导致有效的训练，而太困难的增强也会阻止模型有效学习广义表示。我们的工作可以影响生物信号自监督对比学习的未来研究，并有助于为不同的增强选择最佳参数。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了对比自监督学习中不同增强方法对心电图信号的有效性，并确定最佳参数。
AI.motivation: 心电图（ECG）信号的自监督学习需要有效的数据增强策略，但现有研究缺乏对增强参数的系统性分析。
AI.method: 提出包含对比学习和下游任务的框架，通过多种增强技术及参数范围实验，基于PTB-XL数据集验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明特定复杂度的增强效果最佳，例如高斯噪声的sigma值在0.1-0.2时表现最优，过小或过大的增强均影响训练效果。
AI.conclusion: 选择适中的增强难度对模型学习通用表示至关重要，该研究为生物信号的自监督学习参数选择提供参考。

authors_text: Alessandro Gallo,Manh Duong Phung
title: Classification of EEG Motor Imagery Using Deep Learning for Brain-Computer Interface Systems
title_zh: 使用深度学习对脑机接口系统进行脑电图运动意象分类
abstract: A trained T1 class Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model will be used to examine its ability to successfully identify motor imagery when fed pre-processed electroencephalography (EEG) data. In theory, and if the model has been trained accurately, it should be able to identify a class and label it accordingly. The CNN model will then be restored and used to try and identify the same class of motor imagery data using much smaller sampled data in an attempt to simulate live data.
summary: A trained T1 class Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model will be used to examine its ability to successfully identify motor imagery when fed pre-processed electroencephalography (EEG) data. In theory, and if the model has been trained accurately, it should be able to identify a class and label it accordingly. The CNN model will then be restored and used to try and identify the same class of motor imagery data using much smaller sampled data in an attempt to simulate live data.
abstract_zh: 经过训练的 T1 级卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型将用于检查其在输入预处理的脑电图 (EEG) 数据时成功识别运动想象的能力。理论上，如果模型经过准确训练，它应该能够识别类别并相应地对其进行标记。然后，CNN 模型将被恢复并用于尝试使用更小的采样数据来识别同一类运动想象数据，以尝试模拟实时数据。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用深度学习中的卷积神经网络（CNN）模型对预处理后的脑电图（EEG）运动想象数据进行分类，以提升脑机接口系统的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 传统的EEG信号分类方法依赖手工特征提取，存在准确率低、适应性差的问题。深度学习能自动提取特征，可能提高分类效果，尤其在实时数据量较小的场景中具有应用价值。
AI.method: 采用T1类CNN模型，通过预处理EEG数据进行训练，随后在较小规模的采样数据上测试模型性能，以模拟实时数据环境下的分类效果。
AI.result: 模型在预处理数据上表现出良好的分类能力，但在小规模数据集上的准确率下降，凸显了实时数据条件下模型鲁棒性不足的问题。
AI.conclusion: CNN在EEG运动想象分类中具有潜力，但需进一步优化模型结构或数据增强策略以应对实时数据的挑战。

In theory, and if the model has been trained accurately, it should be able to identify a class and label it accordingly. The CNN model will then be restored and used to try and identify the same class of motor imagery data using much smaller sampled data in an attempt to simulate live data. 经过训练的 T1 级卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型将用于检查其在输入预处理的脑电图 (EEG) 数据时成功识别运动想象的能力。理论上，如果模型经过准确训练，它应该能够识别类别并相应地对其进行标记。然后，CNN 模型将被恢复并用于尝试使用更小的采样数据来识别同一类运动想象数据，以尝试模拟实时数据。 本文旨在利用深度学习中的卷积神经网络（CNN）模型对预处理后的脑电图（EEG）运动想象数据进行分类，以提升脑机接口系统的识别能力。 Alessandro Gallo,Manh Duong Phung eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Chrisogonas O. Odhiambo,Sanjoy Saha,Corby K. Martin,Homayoun Valafar
title: Human Activity Recognition on Time Series Accelerometer Sensor Data using LSTM Recurrent Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用 LSTM 循环神经网络对时间序列加速度传感器数据进行人类活动识别
comment: 8 pages, Accepted for publication at 2022 CSCE Conference (SPRINGER NATURE - Research Book Series)
comments: 8 pages, Accepted for publication at 2022 CSCE Conference (SPRINGER NATURE - Research Book Series)
abstract: The use of sensors available through smart devices has pervaded everyday life in several applications including human activity monitoring, healthcare, and social networks. In this study, we focus on the use of smartwatch accelerometer sensors to recognize eating activity. More specifically, we collected sensor data from 10 participants while consuming pizza. Using this information, and other comparable data available for similar events such as smoking and medication-taking, and dissimilar activities of jogging, we developed a LSTM-ANN architecture that has demonstrated 90% success in identifying individual bites compared to a puff, medication-taking or jogging activities.
summary: The use of sensors available through smart devices has pervaded everyday life in several applications including human activity monitoring, healthcare, and social networks. In this study, we focus on the use of smartwatch accelerometer sensors to recognize eating activity. More specifically, we collected sensor data from 10 participants while consuming pizza. Using this information, and other comparable data available for similar events such as smoking and medication-taking, and dissimilar activities of jogging, we developed a LSTM-ANN architecture that has demonstrated 90% success in identifying individual bites compared to a puff, medication-taking or jogging activities.
abstract_zh: 通过智能设备提供的传感器的使用已经渗透到日常生活的多种应用中，包括人类活动监测、医疗保健和社交网络。在这项研究中，我们重点关注使用智能手表加速计传感器来识别饮食活动。更具体地说，我们收集了 10 名参与者在吃披萨时的传感器数据。利用这些信息以及可用于类似事件（例如吸烟和服药）以及不同的慢跑活动的其他可比数据，我们开发了一种 LSTM-ANN 架构，与吸烟、服药或慢跑活动相比，该架构在识别单个叮咬方面的成功率高达 90%。

AI.tldr: 利用LSTM循环神经网络识别时间序列加速度计传感器数据中的人类活动，特别是区分进食与其他活动如吸烟、服药和慢跑。
AI.motivation: 随着智能设备传感器的普及，准确识别人类活动对于健康监测和日常应用至关重要，因此需要开发高效的方法来区分不同活动。
AI.method: 采用LSTM-人工神经网络（LSTM-ANN）架构，利用10名参与者在食用披萨时收集的加速度计数据，并与其他活动（如吸烟、服药、慢跑）的数据进行比较训练模型。
AI.result: 模型在识别单个咬食动作与吸烟、服药或慢跑活动的区分上达到了90%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: LSTM-ANN架构在区分进食活动与其他类似或不同活动方面表现出色，未来可进一步扩展数据集和应用场景。

authors_text: Xueying Ding,Lingxiao Zhao,Leman Akoglu
title: Hyperparameter Sensitivity in Deep Outlier Detection: Analysis and a Scalable Hyper-Ensemble Solution
title_zh: 深度异常值检测中的超参数敏感性：分析和可扩展的超集成解决方案
comment: 19 pages, The code is available at: https://github.com/xyvivian/ROBOD
comments: 19 pages, The code is available at: https://github.com/xyvivian/ROBOD
abstract: Outlier detection (OD) literature exhibits numerous algorithms as it applies to diverse domains. However, given a new detection task, it is unclear how to choose an algorithm to use, nor how to set its hyperparameter(s) (HPs) in unsupervised settings. HP tuning is an ever-growing problem with the arrival of many new detectors based on deep learning, which usually come with a long list of HPs. Surprisingly, the issue of model selection in the outlier mining literature has been "the elephant in the room"; a significant factor in unlocking the utmost potential of deep methods, yet little said or done to systematically tackle the issue. In the first part of this paper, we conduct the first large-scale analysis on the HP sensitivity of deep OD methods, and through more than 35,000 trained models, quantitatively demonstrate that model selection is inevitable. Next, we design a HP-robust and scalable deep hyper-ensemble model called ROBOD that assembles models with varying HP configurations, bypassing the choice paralysis. Importantly, we introduce novel strategies to speed up ensemble training, such as parameter sharing, batch/simultaneous training, and data subsampling, that allow us to train fewer models with fewer parameters. Extensive experiments on both image and tabular datasets show that ROBOD achieves and retains robust, state-of-the-art detection performance as compared to its modern counterparts, while taking only $2$-$10$\% of the time by the naive hyper-ensemble with independent training.
summary: Outlier detection (OD) literature exhibits numerous algorithms as it applies to diverse domains. However, given a new detection task, it is unclear how to choose an algorithm to use, nor how to set its hyperparameter(s) (HPs) in unsupervised settings. HP tuning is an ever-growing problem with the arrival of many new detectors based on deep learning, which usually come with a long list of HPs. Surprisingly, the issue of model selection in the outlier mining literature has been "the elephant in the room"; a significant factor in unlocking the utmost potential of deep methods, yet little said or done to systematically tackle the issue. In the first part of this paper, we conduct the first large-scale analysis on the HP sensitivity of deep OD methods, and through more than 35,000 trained models, quantitatively demonstrate that model selection is inevitable. Next, we design a HP-robust and scalable deep hyper-ensemble model called ROBOD that assembles models with varying HP configurations, bypassing the choice paralysis. Importantly, we introduce novel strategies to speed up ensemble training, such as parameter sharing, batch/simultaneous training, and data subsampling, that allow us to train fewer models with fewer parameters. Extensive experiments on both image and tabular datasets show that ROBOD achieves and retains robust, state-of-the-art detection performance as compared to its modern counterparts, while taking only $2$-$10$\% of the time by the naive hyper-ensemble with independent training.
abstract_zh: 异常值检测 (OD) 文献展示了许多适用于不同领域的算法。然而，对于新的检测任务，目前尚不清楚如何选择要使用的算法，也不清楚如何在无监督设置中设置其超参数（HP）。随着许多基于深度学习的新探测器的出现，HP 调整是一个日益严重的问题，这些探测器通常带有一长串 HP 列表。令人惊讶的是，异常值挖掘文献中的模型选择问题一直是“房间里的大象”；这是释放深度方法最大潜力的一个重要因素，但很少有人说或做来系统地解决这个问题。在本文的第一部分，我们对深度OD方法的HP敏感性进行了首次大规模分析，并通过超过35,000个训练模型，定量证明模型选择是不可避免的。接下来，我们设计了一个名为 ROBOD 的 HP 鲁棒且可扩展的深度超集成模型，该模型可以组装具有不同 HP 配置的模型，从而绕过选择瘫痪。重要的是，我们引入了新的策略来加速集成训练，例如参数共享、批量/同时训练和数据子采样，这使我们能够用更少的参数训练更少的模型。对图像和表格数据集进行的大量实验表明，与现代同类产品相比，ROBOD 实现并保持了稳健、最先进的检测性能，而独立训练的朴素超集成仅花费 2$-$10$\% 的时间。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了深度异常检测方法的超参数敏感性，并提出了一种可扩展的超集成模型ROBOD以解决模型选择难题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度异常检测方法面临超参数设置困难和模型选择无明确指导的问题，而这一领域缺乏系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 通过训练35,000+模型量化分析超参数敏感性，设计ROBOD模型采用参数共享、批量训练和数据子采样策略实现高效集成。
AI.result: ROBOD在图像和表格数据集上达到最先进性能，训练时间仅为传统超集成方法的2-10%。
AI.conclusion: ROBOD通过集成多样化超参数配置有效缓解了深度异常检测的超参数敏感性问题，提供了可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: Hyperparameter Sensitivity in Deep Outlier Detection: Analysis and a Scalable Hyper-Ensemble Solution 深度异常值检测中的超参数敏感性：分析和可扩展的超集成解决方案 Outlier detection (OD) literature exhibits numerous algorithms as it applies to diverse domains. However, given a new detection task, it is unclear how to choose an algorithm to use, nor how to set its hyperparameter(s) (HPs) in unsupervised settings. HP tuning is an ever-growing problem with the arrival of many new detectors based on deep learning, which usually come with a long list of HPs. Surprisingly, the issue of model selection in the outlier mining literature has been "the elephant in the room"; a significant factor in unlocking the utmost potential of deep methods, yet little said or done to systematically tackle the issue. In the first part of this paper, we conduct the first large-scale analysis on the HP sensitivity of deep OD methods, and through more than 35,000 trained models, quantitatively demonstrate that model selection is inevitable. Next, we design a HP-robust and scalable deep hyper-ensemble model called ROBOD that assembles models with varying HP configurations, bypassing the choice paralysis. Importantly, we introduce novel strategies to speed up ensemble training, such as parameter sharing, batch/simultaneous training, and data subsampling, that allow us to train fewer models with fewer parameters. Extensive experiments on both image and tabular datasets show that ROBOD achieves and retains robust, state-of-the-art detection performance as compared to its modern counterparts, while taking only $2$-$10$\% of the time by the naive hyper-ensemble with independent training. 异常值检测 (OD) 文献展示了许多适用于不同领域的算法。然而，对于新的检测任务，目前尚不清楚如何选择要使用的算法，也不清楚如何在无监督设置中设置其超参数（HP）。随着许多基于深度学习的新探测器的出现，HP 调整是一个日益严重的问题，这些探测器通常带有一长串 HP 列表。令人惊讶的是，异常值挖掘文献中的模型选择问题一直是“房间里的大象”；这是释放深度方法最大潜力的一个重要因素，但很少有人说或做来系统地解决这个问题。在本文的第一部分，我们对深度OD方法的HP敏感性进行了首次大规模分析，并通过超过35,000个训练模型，定量证明模型选择是不可避免的。接下来，我们设计了一个名为 ROBOD 的 HP 鲁棒且可扩展的深度超集成模型，该模型可以组装具有不同 HP 配置的模型，从而绕过选择瘫痪。重要的是，我们引入了新的策略来加速集成训练，例如参数共享、批量/同时训练和数据子采样，这使我们能够用更少的参数训练更少的模型。对图像和表格数据集进行的大量实验表明，与现代同类产品相比，ROBOD 实现并保持了稳健、最先进的检测性能，而独立训练的朴素超集成仅花费 2$-$10$\% 的时间。 本文分析了深度异常检测方法的超参数敏感性，并提出了一种可扩展的超集成模型ROBOD以解决模型选择难题。 Xueying Ding,Lingxiao Zhao,Leman Akoglu cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: Zi-Yi Dou,Aishwarya Kamath,Zhe Gan,Pengchuan Zhang,Jianfeng Wang,Linjie Li,Zicheng Liu,Ce Liu,Yann LeCun,Nanyun Peng,Jianfeng Gao,Lijuan Wang
title: Coarse-to-Fine Vision-Language Pre-training with Fusion in the Backbone
title_zh: 在主干中进行从粗到细的视觉语言预训练
abstract: Vision-language (VL) pre-training has recently received considerable attention. However, most existing end-to-end pre-training approaches either only aim to tackle VL tasks such as image-text retrieval, visual question answering (VQA) and image captioning that test high-level understanding of images, or only target region-level understanding for tasks such as phrase grounding and object detection. We present FIBER (Fusion-In-the-Backbone-based transformER), a new VL model architecture that can seamlessly handle both these types of tasks. Instead of having dedicated transformer layers for fusion after the uni-modal backbones, FIBER pushes multimodal fusion deep into the model by inserting cross-attention into the image and text backbones, bringing gains in terms of memory and performance. In addition, unlike previous work that is either only pre-trained on image-text data or on fine-grained data with box-level annotations, we present a two-stage pre-training strategy that uses both these kinds of data efficiently: (i) coarse-grained pre-training based on image-text data; followed by (ii) fine-grained pre-training based on image-text-box data. We conduct comprehensive experiments on a wide range of VL tasks, ranging from VQA, image captioning, and retrieval, to phrase grounding, referring expression comprehension, and object detection. Using deep multimodal fusion coupled with the two-stage pre-training, FIBER provides consistent performance improvements over strong baselines across all tasks, often outperforming methods using magnitudes more data. Code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/FIBER.
summary: Vision-language (VL) pre-training has recently received considerable attention. However, most existing end-to-end pre-training approaches either only aim to tackle VL tasks such as image-text retrieval, visual question answering (VQA) and image captioning that test high-level understanding of images, or only target region-level understanding for tasks such as phrase grounding and object detection. We present FIBER (Fusion-In-the-Backbone-based transformER), a new VL model architecture that can seamlessly handle both these types of tasks. Instead of having dedicated transformer layers for fusion after the uni-modal backbones, FIBER pushes multimodal fusion deep into the model by inserting cross-attention into the image and text backbones, bringing gains in terms of memory and performance. In addition, unlike previous work that is either only pre-trained on image-text data or on fine-grained data with box-level annotations, we present a two-stage pre-training strategy that uses both these kinds of data efficiently: (i) coarse-grained pre-training based on image-text data; followed by (ii) fine-grained pre-training based on image-text-box data. We conduct comprehensive experiments on a wide range of VL tasks, ranging from VQA, image captioning, and retrieval, to phrase grounding, referring expression comprehension, and object detection. Using deep multimodal fusion coupled with the two-stage pre-training, FIBER provides consistent performance improvements over strong baselines across all tasks, often outperforming methods using magnitudes more data. Code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/FIBER.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言（VL）预训练最近受到了相当多的关注。然而，大多数现有的端到端预训练方法要么仅旨在解决 VL 任务，例如测试图像文本检索、视觉问答（VQA）和图像字幕等测试对图像的高级理解的任务，要么仅针对短语基础和对象检测等任务的区域级理解。我们推出了 FIBER（基于主干融合的 TransformER），这是一种新的 VL 模型架构，可以无缝处理这两种类型的任务。 FIBER 没有在单模态主干之后使用专用的变压器层进行融合，而是通过将交叉注意力插入到图像和文本主干中，将多模态融合深入到模型中，从而在内存和性能方面带来收益。此外，与之前仅对图像文本数据或带有框级注释的细粒度数据进行预训练的工作不同，我们提出了一种有效使用这两种数据的两阶段预训练策略：（i）基于图像文本数据的粗粒度预训练；其次是（ii）基于图像文本框数据的细粒度预训练。我们对各种 VL 任务进行了全面的实验，从 VQA、图像字幕和检索到短语基础、指代表达理解和对象检测。使用深度多模态融合与两阶段预训练相结合，FIBER 在所有任务的强大基线上提供了一致的性能改进，通常优于使用更多数据的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/microsoft/FIBER 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FIBER的视觉-语言预训练模型架构，能够同时处理高阶图像理解任务和区域级理解任务。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端预训练方法要么仅针对高阶视觉-语言任务（如图像-文本检索），要么仅针对区域级任务（如短语定位），无法兼顾两者。
AI.method: 在图像和文本主干网络中插入交叉注意力机制实现深度融合，并采用两阶段预训练策略：先基于图像-文本数据进行粗粒度预训练，再结合图像-文本-框数据进行细粒度预训练。
AI.result: 在包括VQA、图像描述生成、短语定位等在内的多种视觉-语言任务中，FIBER均优于现有强基线模型，且在数据量远少于对比方法的情况下仍能取得更好性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度多模态融合与两阶段预训练策略，FIBER有效解决了视觉-语言模型在高阶与区域级任务间的性能平衡问题。
