search_text: Coarse-to-Fine Vision-Language Pre-training with Fusion in the Backbone 在主干中进行从粗到细的视觉语言预训练 Vision-language (VL) pre-training has recently received considerable attention. However, most existing end-to-end pre-training approaches either only aim to tackle VL tasks such as image-text retrieval, visual question answering (VQA) and image captioning that test high-level understanding of images, or only target region-level understanding for tasks such as phrase grounding and object detection. We present FIBER (Fusion-In-the-Backbone-based transformER), a new VL model architecture that can seamlessly handle both these types of tasks. Instead of having dedicated transformer layers for fusion after the uni-modal backbones, FIBER pushes multimodal fusion deep into the model by inserting cross-attention into the image and text backbones, bringing gains in terms of memory and performance. In addition, unlike previous work that is either only pre-trained on image-text data or on fine-grained data with box-level annotations, we present a two-stage pre-training strategy that uses both these kinds of data efficiently: (i) coarse-grained pre-training based on image-text data; followed by (ii) fine-grained pre-training based on image-text-box data. We conduct comprehensive experiments on a wide range of VL tasks, ranging from VQA, image captioning, and retrieval, to phrase grounding, referring expression comprehension, and object detection. Using deep multimodal fusion coupled with the two-stage pre-training, FIBER provides consistent performance improvements over strong baselines across all tasks, often outperforming methods using magnitudes more data. Code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/FIBER. 视觉语言（VL）预训练最近受到了相当多的关注。然而，大多数现有的端到端预训练方法要么仅旨在解决 VL 任务，例如测试图像文本检索、视觉问答（VQA）和图像字幕等测试对图像的高级理解的任务，要么仅针对短语基础和对象检测等任务的区域级理解。我们推出了 FIBER（基于主干融合的 TransformER），这是一种新的 VL 模型架构，可以无缝处理这两种类型的任务。 FIBER 没有在单模态主干之后使用专用的变压器层进行融合，而是通过将交叉注意力插入到图像和文本主干中，将多模态融合深入到模型中，从而在内存和性能方面带来收益。此外，与之前仅对图像文本数据或带有框级注释的细粒度数据进行预训练的工作不同，我们提出了一种有效使用这两种数据的两阶段预训练策略：（i）基于图像文本数据的粗粒度预训练；其次是（ii）基于图像文本框数据的细粒度预训练。我们对各种 VL 任务进行了全面的实验，从 VQA、图像字幕和检索到短语基础、指代表达理解和对象检测。使用深度多模态融合与两阶段预训练相结合，FIBER 在所有任务的强大基线上提供了一致的性能改进，通常优于使用更多数据的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/microsoft/FIBER 获取。 本文提出了一种名为FIBER的视觉-语言预训练模型架构，能够同时处理高阶图像理解任务和区域级理解任务。 Zi-Yi Dou,Aishwarya Kamath,Zhe Gan,Pengchuan Zhang,Jianfeng Wang,Linjie Li,Zicheng Liu,Ce Liu,Yann LeCun,Nanyun Peng,Jianfeng Gao,Lijuan Wang cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Dingyang Chen,Qi Zhang,Thinh T. Doan
title: Convergence and Price of Anarchy Guarantees of the Softmax Policy Gradient in Markov Potential Games
title_zh: 马尔可夫势博弈中 Softmax 策略梯度的收敛性和无政府状态保证的价格
abstract: We study the performance of policy gradient methods for the subclass of Markov games known as Markov potential games (MPGs), which extends the notion of normal-form potential games to the stateful setting and includes the important special case of the fully cooperative setting where the agents share an identical reward function. Our focus in this paper is to study the convergence of the policy gradient method for solving MPGs under softmax policy parameterization, both tabular and parameterized with general function approximators such as neural networks. We first show the asymptotic convergence of this method to a Nash equilibrium of MPGs for tabular softmax policies. Second, we derive the finite-time performance of the policy gradient in two settings: 1) using the log-barrier regularization, and 2) using the natural policy gradient under the best-response dynamics (NPG-BR). Finally, extending the notion of price of anarchy (POA) and smoothness in normal-form games, we introduce the POA for MPGs and provide a POA bound for NPG-BR. To our knowledge, this is the first POA bound for solving MPGs. To support our theoretical results, we empirically compare the convergence rates and POA of policy gradient variants for both tabular and neural softmax policies.
summary: We study the performance of policy gradient methods for the subclass of Markov games known as Markov potential games (MPGs), which extends the notion of normal-form potential games to the stateful setting and includes the important special case of the fully cooperative setting where the agents share an identical reward function. Our focus in this paper is to study the convergence of the policy gradient method for solving MPGs under softmax policy parameterization, both tabular and parameterized with general function approximators such as neural networks. We first show the asymptotic convergence of this method to a Nash equilibrium of MPGs for tabular softmax policies. Second, we derive the finite-time performance of the policy gradient in two settings: 1) using the log-barrier regularization, and 2) using the natural policy gradient under the best-response dynamics (NPG-BR). Finally, extending the notion of price of anarchy (POA) and smoothness in normal-form games, we introduce the POA for MPGs and provide a POA bound for NPG-BR. To our knowledge, this is the first POA bound for solving MPGs. To support our theoretical results, we empirically compare the convergence rates and POA of policy gradient variants for both tabular and neural softmax policies.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了马尔可夫博弈子类（称为马尔可夫潜在博弈（MPG））的策略梯度方法的性能，它将正常形式潜在博弈的概念扩展到有状态设置，并包括完全合作设置的重要特殊情况，其中代理共享相同的奖励函数。本文的重点是研究在 softmax 策略参数化（表格形式和使用神经网络等通用函数逼近器进行参数化）下求解 MPG 的策略梯度方法的收敛性。我们首先展示了该方法对于表格 softmax 策略的 MPG 纳什均衡的渐近收敛性。其次，我们在两种设置下推导出策略梯度的有限时间性能：1）使用对数障碍正则化，2）使用最佳响应动态下的自然策略梯度（NPG-BR）。最后，扩展了正常形式游戏中的无政府价格（POA）和平滑度的概念，我们引入了 MPG 的 POA 并为 NPG-BR 提供了 POA 界限。据我们所知，这是解决 MPG 的第一个 POA 界限。为了支持我们的理论结果，我们根据经验比较了表格和神经 Softmax 策略的策略梯度变体的收敛速度和 POA。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Softmax策略梯度方法在马尔可夫势博弈（MPGs）中的收敛性及价格的无政府状态（POA）保证，涵盖表格和神经网络参数化场景。
AI.motivation: MPGs扩展了传统势博弈至状态相关场景，但缺乏对策略梯度方法收敛性及POA的理论分析，需填补该领域研究空白。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明表格Softmax策略的渐近收敛性，结合有限时间性能分析（log-barrier正则化与自然策略梯度最佳响应动态），并扩展POA概念至MPGs。
AI.result: 证明表格Softmax策略收敛至纳什均衡，推导两种设置的有限时间性能界，首次提出MPGs的POA界，实验验证收敛率与POA差异。
AI.conclusion: 首次为MPGs提供POA界，理论分析与实验验证共同支持Softmax策略梯度的有效性，推动多智能体强化学习理论发展。

authors_text: Amin Coja-Oghlan,Oliver Gebhard,Max Hahn-Klimroth,Alexander S. Wein,Ilias Zadik
title: Statistical and Computational Phase Transitions in Group Testing
title_zh: 分组测试中的统计和计算相变
comment: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2022
comments: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2022
abstract: We study the group testing problem where the goal is to identify a set of k infected individuals carrying a rare disease within a population of size n, based on the outcomes of pooled tests which return positive whenever there is at least one infected individual in the tested group. We consider two different simple random procedures for assigning individuals to tests: the constant-column design and Bernoulli design. Our first set of results concerns the fundamental statistical limits. For the constant-column design, we give a new information-theoretic lower bound which implies that the proportion of correctly identifiable infected individuals undergoes a sharp "all-or-nothing" phase transition when the number of tests crosses a particular threshold. For the Bernoulli design, we determine the precise number of tests required to solve the associated detection problem (where the goal is to distinguish between a group testing instance and pure noise), improving both the upper and lower bounds of Truong, Aldridge, and Scarlett (2020). For both group testing models, we also study the power of computationally efficient (polynomial-time) inference procedures. We determine the precise number of tests required for the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms to solve the detection problem. This provides evidence for an inherent computational-statistical gap in both the detection and recovery problems at small sparsity levels. Notably, our evidence is contrary to that of Iliopoulos and Zadik (2021), who predicted the absence of a computational-statistical gap in the Bernoulli design.
summary: We study the group testing problem where the goal is to identify a set of k infected individuals carrying a rare disease within a population of size n, based on the outcomes of pooled tests which return positive whenever there is at least one infected individual in the tested group. For both group testing models, we also study the power of computationally efficient (polynomial-time) inference procedures. We determine the precise number of tests required for the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms to solve the detection problem. This provides evidence for an inherent computational-statistical gap in both the detection and recovery problems at small sparsity levels. Notably, our evidence is contrary to that of Iliopoulos and Zadik (2021), who predicted the absence of a computational-statistical gap in the Bernoulli design.
abstract_zh: 我们研究群体测试问题，其目标是根据汇总测试的结果，在规模为 n 的人群中识别出一组 k 个携带罕见疾病的感染个体，只要测试组中至少有一个感染个体，这些测试就会返回阳性。我们考虑两种不同的简单随机程序来分配个体进行测试：常柱设计和伯努利设计。我们的第一组结果涉及基本统计限制。对于常量列设计，我们给出了一个新的信息论下限，这意味着当测试数量超过特定阈值时，正确识别的感染个体的比例会经历急剧的“全有或全无”阶段转变。对于伯努利设计，我们确定解决相关检测问题所需的精确测试数量（目标是区分组测试实例和纯噪声），从而改进 Truong、Aldridge 和 Scarlett (2020) 的上限和下限。对于这两个组测试模型，我们还研究了计算高效（多项式时间）推理过程的能力。我们确定低次多项式算法类别所需的精确测试次数来解决检测问题。这为小稀疏水平下的检测和恢复问题中固有的计算统计差距提供了证据。值得注意的是，我们的证据与 Iliopoulos 和 Zadik (2021) 的证据相反，他们预测伯努利设计中不存在计算统计差距。

AI.tldr: 本文研究群体检测问题中统计与计算相变现象，分析两种随机设计下的感染个体识别极限及高效算法性能。
AI.motivation: 群体检测在疾病筛查等场景中具有重要意义，但现有研究对统计极限与计算可行性之间的关系理解不足，需明确相变阈值及算法效率的理论边界。
AI.method: 采用常数列设计和伯努利设计两种随机分组策略，结合信息论下界分析、检测问题阈值计算及低度多项式算法复杂度分析，对比不同设计的统计与计算性能。
AI.result: 发现常数列设计存在锐利的'全有或全无'相变，伯努利设计检测阈值精度提升；证明低度多项式算法在稀疏场景下存在统计-计算差距，与部分现有结论相左。
AI.conclusion: 群体检测问题在低稀疏度下存在统计与计算性能的固有差距，伯努利设计的计算复杂度与统计极限差异需重新评估。

search_text: Statistical and Computational Phase Transitions in Group Testing 分组测试中的统计和计算相变 We study the group testing problem where the goal is to identify a set of k infected individuals carrying a rare disease within a population of size n, based on the outcomes of pooled tests which return positive whenever there is at least one infected individual in the tested group. We consider two different simple random procedures for assigning individuals to tests: the constant-column design and Bernoulli design. Our first set of results concerns the fundamental statistical limits. For the constant-column design, we give a new information-theoretic lower bound which implies that the proportion of correctly identifiable infected individuals undergoes a sharp "all-or-nothing" phase transition when the number of tests crosses a particular threshold. For the Bernoulli design, we determine the precise number of tests required to solve the associated detection problem (where the goal is to distinguish between a group testing instance and pure noise), improving both the upper and lower bounds of Truong, Aldridge, and Scarlett (2020). For both group testing models, we also study the power of computationally efficient (polynomial-time) inference procedures. We determine the precise number of tests required for the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms to solve the detection problem. This provides evidence for an inherent computational-statistical gap in both the detection and recovery problems at small sparsity levels. Notably, our evidence is contrary to that of Iliopoulos and Zadik (2021), who predicted the absence of a computational-statistical gap in the Bernoulli design. 我们研究群体测试问题，其目标是根据汇总测试的结果，在规模为 n 的人群中识别出一组 k 个携带罕见疾病的感染个体，只要测试组中至少有一个感染个体，这些测试就会返回阳性。我们考虑两种不同的简单随机程序来分配个体进行测试：常柱设计和伯努利设计。我们的第一组结果涉及基本统计限制。对于常量列设计，我们给出了一个新的信息论下限，这意味着当测试数量超过特定阈值时，正确识别的感染个体的比例会经历急剧的“全有或全无”阶段转变。对于伯努利设计，我们确定解决相关检测问题所需的精确测试数量（目标是区分组测试实例和纯噪声），从而改进 Truong、Aldridge 和 Scarlett (2020) 的上限和下限。对于这两个组测试模型，我们还研究了计算高效（多项式时间）推理过程的能力。我们确定低次多项式算法类别所需的精确测试次数来解决检测问题。这为小稀疏水平下的检测和恢复问题中固有的计算统计差距提供了证据。值得注意的是，我们的证据与 Iliopoulos 和 Zadik (2021) 的证据相反，他们预测伯努利设计中不存在计算统计差距。 本文研究群体检测问题中统计与计算相变现象，分析两种随机设计下的感染个体识别极限及高效算法性能。 Amin Coja-Oghlan,Oliver Gebhard,Max Hahn-Klimroth,Alexander S. authors_text: Mengyi Wei,Zhixuan Zhou
title: AI Ethics Issues in Real World: Evidence from AI Incident Database
title_zh: 现实世界中的人工智能道德问题：来自人工智能事件数据库的证据
comment: 56th Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences (HICSS)
comments: 56th Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences (HICSS)
abstract: With the powerful performance of Artificial Intelligence (AI) also comes prevalent ethical issues. Though governments and corporations have curated multiple AI ethics guidelines to curb unethical behavior of AI, the effect has been limited, probably due to the vagueness of the guidelines. In this paper, we take a closer look at how AI ethics issues take place in real world, in order to have a more in-depth and nuanced understanding of different ethical issues as well as their social impact. With a content analysis of AI Incident Database, which is an effort to prevent repeated real world AI failures by cataloging incidents, we identified 13 application areas which often see unethical use of AI, with intelligent service robots, language/vision models and autonomous driving taking the lead. Ethical issues appear in 8 different forms, from inappropriate use and racial discrimination, to physical safety and unfair algorithm. With this taxonomy of AI ethics issues, we aim to provide AI practitioners with a practical guideline when trying to deploy AI applications ethically.
summary: With the powerful performance of Artificial Intelligence (AI) also comes prevalent ethical issues. Though governments and corporations have curated multiple AI ethics guidelines to curb unethical behavior of AI, the effect has been limited, probably due to the vagueness of the guidelines. In this paper, we take a closer look at how AI ethics issues take place in real world, in order to have a more in-depth and nuanced understanding of different ethical issues as well as their social impact. With a content analysis of AI Incident Database, which is an effort to prevent repeated real world AI failures by cataloging incidents, we identified 13 application areas which often see unethical use of AI, with intelligent service robots, language/vision models and autonomous driving taking the lead. Ethical issues appear in 8 different forms, from inappropriate use and racial discrimination, to physical safety and unfair algorithm. With this taxonomy of AI ethics issues, we aim to provide AI practitioners with a practical guideline when trying to deploy AI applications ethically.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的强大性能也带来了普遍的伦理问题。尽管政府和企业制定了多项人工智能道德准则来遏制人工智能的不道德行为，但效果有限，可能是由于准则的模糊性。在本文中，我们更深入地研究人工智能伦理问题在现实世界中是如何发生的，以便对不同的伦理问题及其社会影响有更深入和细致的了解。通过对人工智能事件数据库的内容分析，我们确定了 13 个经常出现不道德使用人工智能的应用领域，其中智能服务机器人、语言/视觉模型和自动驾驶处于领先地位。道德问题以 8 种不同的形式出现，从不当使用和种族歧视，到人身安全和不公平的算法。通过对人工智能道德问题的分类，我们的目标是为人工智能从业者在尝试以道德方式部署人工智能应用程序时提供实用指南。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析AI事故数据库，探讨现实世界中AI伦理问题的类型及社会影响，为AI实践者提供伦理部署指南。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伦理准则因模糊性导致约束效果有限，需通过现实案例深入理解伦理问题及其影响。
AI.method: 对AI事故数据库进行内容分析，分类统计伦理问题的领域和表现形式。
AI.result: 识别出13个常见伦理问题应用领域（如智能服务机器人、自动驾驶等）及8类伦理问题（如种族歧视、算法不公等）。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建伦理问题分类体系，为AI开发者提供更具体的伦理实践参考框架。

authors_text: Petr Šebek,Šimon Pokorný,Patrik Vacek,Tomáš Svoboda
title: Real3D-Aug: Point Cloud Augmentation by Placing Real Objects with Occlusion Handling for 3D Detection and Segmentation
title_zh: Real3D-Aug：通过放置真实对象并进行遮挡处理进行 3D 检测和分割来增强点云
comment: Submitted on 15th June 2022 to IEEE RA-L journal
comments: Submitted on 15th June 2022 to IEEE RA-L journal
abstract: Object detection and semantic segmentation with the 3D lidar point cloud data require expensive annotation. We propose a data augmentation method that takes advantage of already annotated data multiple times. We propose an augmentation framework that reuses real data, automatically finds suitable placements in the scene to be augmented, and handles occlusions explicitly. Due to the usage of the real data, the scan points of newly inserted objects in augmentation sustain the physical characteristics of the lidar, such as intensity and raydrop. The pipeline proves competitive in training top-performing models for 3D object detection and semantic segmentation. The new augmentation provides a significant performance gain in rare and essential classes, notably 6.65% average precision gain for "Hard" pedestrian class in KITTI object detection or 2.14 mean IoU gain in the SemanticKITTI segmentation challenge over the state of the art.
summary: Object detection and semantic segmentation with the 3D lidar point cloud data require expensive annotation. We propose a data augmentation method that takes advantage of already annotated data multiple times. We propose an augmentation framework that reuses real data, automatically finds suitable placements in the scene to be augmented, and handles occlusions explicitly. Due to the usage of the real data, the scan points of newly inserted objects in augmentation sustain the physical characteristics of the lidar, such as intensity and raydrop. The pipeline proves competitive in training top-performing models for 3D object detection and semantic segmentation. The new augmentation provides a significant performance gain in rare and essential classes, notably 6.65% average precision gain for "Hard" pedestrian class in KITTI object detection or 2.14 mean IoU gain in the SemanticKITTI segmentation challenge over the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 使用 3D 激光雷达点云数据进行对象检测和语义分割需要昂贵的注释。我们提出了一种数据增强方法，可以多次利用已经注释的数据。我们提出了一个增强框架，它重用真实数据，自动在场景中找到合适的位置进行增强，并显式处理遮挡。由于使用真实数据，增强中新插入物体的扫描点维持了激光雷达的物理特性，例如强度和射线下降。事实证明，该管道在训练 3D 对象检测和语义分割的最佳性能模型方面具有竞争力。新的增强在稀有类别和基本类别中提供了显着的性能增益，特别是 KITTI 对象检测中“硬”行人类别的平均精度增益为 6.65%，或者 SemanticKITTI 分割挑战中的平均 IoU 增益超过现有技术水平的 2.14。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Real3D-Aug的点云数据增强方法，通过放置真实物体并处理遮挡来提升3D目标检测和语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 3D激光雷达点云数据的标注成本高昂，现有方法难以有效利用已有标注数据，尤其对稀有类别性能提升有限。
AI.method: 框架通过复用真实标注数据，自动寻找场景适配位置插入物体，并显式处理遮挡关系，保留激光雷达物理特性（如强度、射线衰减）。
AI.result: 在KITTI检测任务中稀有行人类别平均精度提升6.65%，在SemanticKITTI分割挑战中均IoU提升2.14，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该增强方法通过物理保真度高的真实数据复用，有效提升了3D检测与分割模型在稀有类别上的性能，为数据标注效率提供新思路。

search_text: Real3D-Aug: Point Cloud Augmentation by Placing Real Objects with Occlusion Handling for 3D Detection and Segmentation Real3D-Aug：通过放置真实对象并进行遮挡处理进行 3D 检测和分割来增强点云 Object detection and semantic segmentation with the 3D lidar point cloud data require expensive annotation. We propose a data augmentation method that takes advantage of already annotated data multiple times. We propose an augmentation framework that reuses real data, automatically finds suitable placements in the scene to be augmented, and handles occlusions explicitly. Due to the usage of the real data, the scan points of newly inserted objects in augmentation sustain the physical characteristics of the lidar, such as intensity and raydrop. The pipeline proves competitive in training top-performing models for 3D object detection and semantic segmentation. The new augmentation provides a significant performance gain in rare and essential classes, notably 6.65% average precision gain for "Hard" pedestrian class in KITTI object detection or 2.14 mean IoU gain in the SemanticKITTI segmentation challenge over the state of the art. 使用 3D 激光雷达点云数据进行对象检测和语义分割需要昂贵的注释。我们提出了一种数据增强方法，可以多次利用已经注释的数据。我们提出了一个增强框架，它重用真实数据，自动在场景中找到合适的位置进行增强，并显式处理遮挡。由于使用真实数据，增强中新插入物体的扫描点维持了激光雷达的物理特性，例如强度和射线下降。事实证明，该管道在训练 3D 对象检测和语义分割的最佳性能模型方面具有竞争力。新的增强在稀有类别和基本类别中提供了显着的性能增益，特别是 KITTI 对象检测中“硬”行人类别的平均精度增益为 6.65%，或者 SemanticKITTI 分割挑战中的平均 IoU 增益超过现有技术水平的 2.14。 本文提出一种名为Real3D-Aug的点云数据增强方法，通过放置真实物体并处理遮挡来提升3D目标检测和语义分割性能。 Petr Šebek,Šimon Pokorný,Patrik Vacek,Tomáš Svoboda cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Arpit Agarwal,Sanjeev Khanna,Huan Li,Prathamesh Patil
title: Sublinear Algorithms for Hierarchical Clustering
title_zh: 层次聚类的次线性算法
abstract: Hierarchical clustering over graphs is a fundamental task in data mining and machine learning with applications in domains such as phylogenetics, social network analysis, and information retrieval. Specifically, we consider the recently popularized objective function for hierarchical clustering due to Dasgupta. Previous algorithms for (approximately) minimizing this objective function require linear time/space complexity. In many applications the underlying graph can be massive in size making it computationally challenging to process the graph even using a linear time/space algorithm. As a result, there is a strong interest in designing algorithms that can perform global computation using only sublinear resources. The focus of this work is to study hierarchical clustering for massive graphs under three well-studied models of sublinear computation which focus on space, time, and communication, respectively, as the primary resources to optimize: (1) (dynamic) streaming model where edges are presented as a stream, (2) query model where the graph is queried using neighbor and degree queries, (3) MPC model where the graph edges are partitioned over several machines connected via a communication channel. We design sublinear algorithms for hierarchical clustering in all three models above. At the heart of our algorithmic results is a view of the objective in terms of cuts in the graph, which allows us to use a relaxed notion of cut sparsifiers to do hierarchical clustering while introducing only a small distortion in the objective function. Our main algorithmic contributions are then to show how cut sparsifiers of the desired form can be efficiently constructed in the query model and the MPC model. We complement our algorithmic results by establishing nearly matching lower bounds that rule out the possibility of designing better algorithms in each of these models.
summary: Hierarchical clustering over graphs is a fundamental task in data mining and machine learning with applications in domains such as phylogenetics, social network analysis, and information retrieval. Specifically, we consider the recently popularized objective function for hierarchical clustering due to Dasgupta. Previous algorithms for (approximately) minimizing this objective function require linear time/space complexity. In many applications the underlying graph can be massive in size making it computationally challenging to process the graph even using a linear time/space algorithm. As a result, there is a strong interest in designing algorithms that can perform global computation using only sublinear resources. The focus of this work is to study hierarchical clustering for massive graphs under three well-studied models of sublinear computation which focus on space, time, and communication, respectively, as the primary resources to optimize: (1) (dynamic) streaming model where edges are presented as a stream, (2) query model where the graph is queried using neighbor and degree queries, (3) MPC model where the graph edges are partitioned over several machines connected via a communication channel. We design sublinear algorithms for hierarchical clustering in all three models above. At the heart of our algorithmic results is a view of the objective in terms of cuts in the graph, which allows us to use a relaxed notion of cut sparsifiers to do hierarchical clustering while introducing only a small distortion in the objective function. Our main algorithmic contributions are then to show how cut sparsifiers of the desired form can be efficiently constructed in the query model and the MPC model. We complement our algorithmic results by establishing nearly matching lower bounds that rule out the possibility of designing better algorithms in each of these models.
abstract_zh: 图的层次聚类是数据挖掘和机器学习中的一项基本任务，在系统发育学、社交网络分析和信息检索等领域都有应用。具体来说，我们考虑最近流行的 Dasgupta 分层聚类目标函数。先前用于（近似）最小化该目标函数的算法需要线性时间/空间复杂度。在许多应用中，底层图的尺寸可能很大，使得即使使用线性时间/空间算法来处理图在计算上也具有挑战性。因此，人们对设计仅使用次线性资源执行全局计算的算法产生了浓厚的兴趣。这项工作的重点是在三种经过充分研究的次线性计算模型下研究海量图的层次聚类，这些模型分别侧重于空间、时间和通信，作为优化的主要资源：（1）（动态）流模型，其中边呈现为流，（2）查询模型，其中使用邻居和度查询来查询图，（3）MPC模型，其中图边被划分到通过通信通道连接的多台机器上。我们在上述所有三个模型中设计了用于层次聚类的次线性算法。我们算法结果的核心是根据图中的切割来看待目标，这使我们能够使用切割稀疏器的宽松概念来进行层次聚类，同时在目标函数中仅引入很小的失真。我们的主要算法贡献是展示如何在查询模型和 MPC 模型中有效构建所需形式的切割稀疏器。我们通过建立几乎匹配的下限来补充我们的算法结果，排除在每个模型中设计更好算法的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在三个子线性计算模型下设计用于大规模图的层次聚类算法。
AI.motivation: 传统层次聚类算法的时间/空间复杂度为线性，难以处理超大规模图数据，需设计仅需子线性资源的高效算法。
AI.method: 通过将目标函数转化为图的割问题，并利用松弛的割稀疏化技术，在查询模型和MPC模型中高效构建所需稀疏图。
AI.result: 提出了三种模型下的子线性算法，并证明了接近最优的下界结果，表明算法性能难以进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文算法为大规模图的层次聚类提供了高效解决方案，且理论下界分析验证了其近似最优性。

authors_text: Jan Lehečka,Jan Švec,Aleš Pražák,Josef V. Psutka
title: Exploring Capabilities of Monolingual Audio Transformers using Large Datasets in Automatic Speech Recognition of Czech
title_zh: 使用大数据集探索单语音频变压器在捷克语自动语音识别中的能力
comment: to be published in Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: to be published in Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: In this paper, we present our progress in pretraining Czech monolingual audio transformers from a large dataset containing more than 80 thousand hours of unlabeled speech, and subsequently fine-tuning the model on automatic speech recognition tasks using a combination of in-domain data and almost 6 thousand hours of out-of-domain transcribed speech. We are presenting a large palette of experiments with various fine-tuning setups evaluated on two public datasets (CommonVoice and VoxPopuli) and one extremely challenging dataset from the MALACH project. Our results show that monolingual Wav2Vec 2.0 models are robust ASR systems, which can take advantage of large labeled and unlabeled datasets and successfully compete with state-of-the-art LVCSR systems. Moreover, Wav2Vec models proved to be good zero-shot learners when no training data are available for the target ASR task.
summary: In this paper, we present our progress in pretraining Czech monolingual audio transformers from a large dataset containing more than 80 thousand hours of unlabeled speech, and subsequently fine-tuning the model on automatic speech recognition tasks using a combination of in-domain data and almost 6 thousand hours of out-of-domain transcribed speech. We are presenting a large palette of experiments with various fine-tuning setups evaluated on two public datasets (CommonVoice and VoxPopuli) and one extremely challenging dataset from the MALACH project. Our results show that monolingual Wav2Vec 2.0 models are robust ASR systems, which can take advantage of large labeled and unlabeled datasets and successfully compete with state-of-the-art LVCSR systems. Moreover, Wav2Vec models proved to be good zero-shot learners when no training data are available for the target ASR task.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了从包含超过 8 万小时未标记语音的大型数据集中预训练捷克语单语音频转换器的进展，并随后结合域内数据和近 6000 小时的域外转录语音对自动语音识别任务的模型进行微调。我们展示了一系列实验，其中包括在两个公共数据集（CommonVoice 和 VoxPopuli）以及来自 MALACH 项目的一个极具挑战性的数据集上评估的各种微调设置。我们的结果表明，单语言 Wav2Vec 2.0 模型是强大的 ASR 系统，它可以利用大型标记和未标记数据集，并成功与最先进的 LVCSR 系统竞争。此外，当目标 ASR 任务没有可用的训练数据时，Wav2Vec 模型被证明是良好的零样本学习器。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用大规模数据集预训练单语音频Transformer模型以提升捷克语自动语音识别（ASR）性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 捷克语ASR系统在数据资源有限的情况下表现不足，需探索利用大规模未标注数据和预训练模型提升效果。
AI.method: 基于超过8万小时未标注捷克语语音预训练Wav2Vec 2.0模型，结合领域内数据和近6千小时领域外转录数据进行微调，并在CommonVoice、VoxPopuli及MALACH数据集上评估。
AI.result: 单语Wav2Vec 2.0模型在多个数据集上表现稳健，可有效利用大规模标注/未标注数据，且在无目标任务数据时仍具零样本学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 预训练音频Transformer在捷克语ASR中具有竞争力，尤其适合数据稀缺场景，为低资源语言ASR提供有效方案。

We are presenting a large palette of experiments with various fine-tuning setups evaluated on two public datasets (CommonVoice and VoxPopuli) and one extremely challenging dataset from the MALACH project. Our results show that monolingual Wav2Vec 2.0 models are robust ASR systems, which can take advantage of large labeled and unlabeled datasets and successfully compete with state-of-the-art LVCSR systems. Moreover, Wav2Vec models proved to be good zero-shot learners when no training data are available for the target ASR task. 在本文中，我们介绍了从包含超过 8 万小时未标记语音的大型数据集中预训练捷克语单语音频转换器的进展，并随后结合域内数据和近 6000 小时的域外转录语音对自动语音识别任务的模型进行微调。我们展示了一系列实验，其中包括在两个公共数据集（CommonVoice 和 VoxPopuli）以及来自 MALACH 项目的一个极具挑战性的数据集上评估的各种微调设置。我们的结果表明，单语言 Wav2Vec 2.0 模型是强大的 ASR 系统，它可以利用大型标记和未标记数据集，并成功与最先进的 LVCSR 系统竞争。此外，当目标 ASR 任务没有可用的训练数据时，Wav2Vec 模型被证明是良好的零样本学习器。 本文研究了使用大规模数据集预训练单语音频Transformer模型以提升捷克语自动语音识别（ASR）性能的方法。 Jan Lehečka,Jan Švec,Aleš Pražák,Josef V. Psutka cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Shireen Kudukkil Manchingal,Fabio Cuzzolin
title: Epistemic Deep Learning
title_zh: 认知深度学习
comment: Accepted at ICML 2022 Workshop on Distribution-Free Uncertainty Quantification
comments: Accepted at ICML 2022 Workshop on Distribution-Free Uncertainty Quantification
abstract: The belief function approach to uncertainty quantification as proposed in the Demspter-Shafer theory of evidence is established upon the general mathematical models for set-valued observations, called random sets. Set-valued predictions are the most natural representations of uncertainty in machine learning. In this paper, we introduce a concept called epistemic deep learning based on the random-set interpretation of belief functions to model epistemic learning in deep neural networks. We propose a novel random-set convolutional neural network for classification that produces scores for sets of classes by learning set-valued ground truth representations. We evaluate different formulations of entropy and distance measures for belief functions as viable loss functions for these random-set networks. We also discuss methods for evaluating the quality of epistemic predictions and the performance of epistemic random-set neural networks. We demonstrate through experiments that the epistemic approach produces better performance results when compared to traditional approaches of estimating uncertainty.
summary: The belief function approach to uncertainty quantification as proposed in the Demspter-Shafer theory of evidence is established upon the general mathematical models for set-valued observations, called random sets. Set-valued predictions are the most natural representations of uncertainty in machine learning. In this paper, we introduce a concept called epistemic deep learning based on the random-set interpretation of belief functions to model epistemic learning in deep neural networks. We propose a novel random-set convolutional neural network for classification that produces scores for sets of classes by learning set-valued ground truth representations. We evaluate different formulations of entropy and distance measures for belief functions as viable loss functions for these random-set networks. We also discuss methods for evaluating the quality of epistemic predictions and the performance of epistemic random-set neural networks. We demonstrate through experiments that the epistemic approach produces better performance results when compared to traditional approaches of estimating uncertainty.
abstract_zh: Demspter-Shafer 证据理论中提出的不确定性量化的置信函数方法是建立在集值观测（称为随机集）的通用数学模型之上的。集值预测是机器学习中不确定性的最自然表示。在本文中，我们引入了一种称为认知深度学习的概念，它基于信念函数的随机集解释来模拟深度神经网络中的认知学习。我们提出了一种新颖的用于分类的随机集卷积神经网络，它通过学习集值的基本事实表示来生成类集的分数。我们评估信念函数的熵和距离度量的不同公式作为这些随机集网络的可行损失函数。我们还讨论了评估认知预测质量和认知随机集神经网络性能的方法。我们通过实验证明，与估计不确定性的传统方法相比，认知方法可以产生更好的性能结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于随机集理论的认识论深度学习方法，用于改进深度神经网络中的不确定性建模与分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习在不确定性量化方面存在局限，难以有效处理集合值预测和信念函数的不确定性表示。
AI.method: 引入随机集卷积神经网络，通过学习集合值真实表示并结合熵与距离度量作为损失函数，实现认识论学习的不确定性建模。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在分类任务中相比传统不确定性估计方法具有更优的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 基于随机集的认识论深度学习能够有效提升模型的不确定性量化能力与分类准确性。

authors_text: Adam Goodge,Bryan Hooi,See Kiong Ng,Wee Siong Ng
title: ARES: Locally Adaptive Reconstruction-based Anomaly Scoring
title_zh: ARES：基于局部自适应重建的异常评分
abstract: How can we detect anomalies: that is, samples that significantly differ from a given set of high-dimensional data, such as images or sensor data? This is a practical problem with numerous applications and is also relevant to the goal of making learning algorithms more robust to unexpected inputs. Autoencoders are a popular approach, partly due to their simplicity and their ability to perform dimension reduction. However, the anomaly scoring function is not adaptive to the natural variation in reconstruction error across the range of normal samples, which hinders their ability to detect real anomalies. In this paper, we empirically demonstrate the importance of local adaptivity for anomaly scoring in experiments with real data. We then propose our novel Adaptive Reconstruction Error-based Scoring approach, which adapts its scoring based on the local behaviour of reconstruction error over the latent space. We show that this improves anomaly detection performance over relevant baselines in a wide variety of benchmark datasets.
summary: How can we detect anomalies: that is, samples that significantly differ from a given set of high-dimensional data, such as images or sensor data? This is a practical problem with numerous applications and is also relevant to the goal of making learning algorithms more robust to unexpected inputs. Autoencoders are a popular approach, partly due to their simplicity and their ability to perform dimension reduction. However, the anomaly scoring function is not adaptive to the natural variation in reconstruction error across the range of normal samples, which hinders their ability to detect real anomalies. In this paper, we empirically demonstrate the importance of local adaptivity for anomaly scoring in experiments with real data. We then propose our novel Adaptive Reconstruction Error-based Scoring approach, which adapts its scoring based on the local behaviour of reconstruction error over the latent space. We show that this improves anomaly detection performance over relevant baselines in a wide variety of benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们如何检测异常：即与给定的一组高维数据（例如图像或传感器数据）显着不同的样本？这是许多应用程序中的一个实际问题，也与使学习算法对意外输入更加鲁棒的目标相关。自动编码器是一种流行的方法，部分原因是其简单性和执行降维的能力。然而，异常评分函数不能适应正常样本范围内重建误差的自然变化，这阻碍了它们检测真实异常的能力。在本文中，我们凭经验证明了局部适应性对于真实数据实验中异常评分的重要性。然后，我们提出了新颖的基于自适应重建误差的评分方法，该方法根据潜在空间上重建误差的局部行为来调整其评分。我们表明，与各种基准数据集中的相关基线相比，这提高了异常检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部自适应重建误差的异常评分方法ARES，用于改进高维数据的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有自编码器方法的异常评分函数无法适应正常样本中重建误差的自然变化，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 通过分析潜在空间中重建误差的局部行为，设计自适应的异常评分机制以提升检测性能。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了ARES方法相比现有基线的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 局部自适应机制对异常检测至关重要，ARES方法有效解决了重建误差适应性不足的问题。

authors_text: Yiqing Shen,Bingxin Zhou,Xinye Xiong,Ruitian Gao,Yu Guang Wang
title: How GNNs Facilitate CNNs in Mining Geometric Information from Large-Scale Medical Images
title_zh: GNN 如何帮助 CNN 从大规模医学图像中挖掘几何信息
abstract: Gigapixel medical images provide massive data, both morphological textures and spatial information, to be mined. Due to the large data scale in histology, deep learning methods play an increasingly significant role as feature extractors. Existing solutions heavily rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for global pixel-level analysis, leaving the underlying local geometric structure such as the interaction between cells in the tumor microenvironment unexplored. The topological structure in medical images, as proven to be closely related to tumor evolution, can be well characterized by graphs. To obtain a more comprehensive representation for downstream oncology tasks, we propose a fusion framework for enhancing the global image-level representation captured by CNNs with the geometry of cell-level spatial information learned by graph neural networks (GNN). The fusion layer optimizes an integration between collaborative features of global images and cell graphs. Two fusion strategies have been developed: one with MLP which is simple but turns out efficient through fine-tuning, and the other with Transformer gains a champion in fusing multiple networks. We evaluate our fusion strategies on histology datasets curated from large patient cohorts of colorectal and gastric cancers for three biomarker prediction tasks. Both two models outperform plain CNNs or GNNs, reaching a consistent AUC improvement of more than 5% on various network backbones. The experimental results yield the necessity for combining image-level morphological features with cell spatial relations in medical image analysis. Codes are available at https://github.com/yiqings/HEGnnEnhanceCnn.
summary: Gigapixel medical images provide massive data, both morphological textures and spatial information, to be mined. Due to the large data scale in histology, deep learning methods play an increasingly significant role as feature extractors. Existing solutions heavily rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for global pixel-level analysis, leaving the underlying local geometric structure such as the interaction between cells in the tumor microenvironment unexplored. The topological structure in medical images, as proven to be closely related to tumor evolution, can be well characterized by graphs. To obtain a more comprehensive representation for downstream oncology tasks, we propose a fusion framework for enhancing the global image-level representation captured by CNNs with the geometry of cell-level spatial information learned by graph neural networks (GNN). The fusion layer optimizes an integration between collaborative features of global images and cell graphs. Two fusion strategies have been developed: one with MLP which is simple but turns out efficient through fine-tuning, and the other with Transformer gains a champion in fusing multiple networks. We evaluate our fusion strategies on histology datasets curated from large patient cohorts of colorectal and gastric cancers for three biomarker prediction tasks. Both two models outperform plain CNNs or GNNs, reaching a consistent AUC improvement of more than 5% on various network backbones. The experimental results yield the necessity for combining image-level morphological features with cell spatial relations in medical image analysis. Codes are available at https://github.com/yiqings/HEGnnEnhanceCnn.
abstract_zh: 十亿像素医学图像提供了大量可供挖掘的数据，包括形态纹理和空间信息。由于组织学数据规模庞大，深度学习方法作为特征提取器发挥着越来越重要的作用。现有的解决方案严重依赖卷积神经网络（CNN）进行全局像素级分析，而没有探索潜在的局部几何结构，例如肿瘤微环境中细胞之间的相互作用。医学图像中的拓扑结构已被证明与肿瘤进化密切相关，可以通过图形很好地表征。为了获得下游肿瘤学任务的更全面的表示，我们提出了一个融合框架，用于通过图神经网络（GNN）学习的细胞级空间信息的几何形状来增强 CNN 捕获的全局图像级表示。融合层优化了全局图像和细胞图的协作特征之间的集成。已经开发了两种融合策略：一种使用 MLP，虽然简单，但通过微调变得高效，另一种使用 Transformer，在融合多个网络方面获得了冠军。我们在从结直肠癌和胃癌的大型患者队列中收集的组织学数据集上评估了我们的融合策略，以完成三种生物标志物预测任务。这两种模型的性能均优于普通 CNN 或 GNN，在各种网络主干上均实现了超过 5% 的 AUC 改进。实验结果表明在医学图像分析中将图像级形态特征与细胞空间关系相结合的必要性。代码可在 https://github.com/yiqings/HEGnnEnhanceCnn 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合图神经网络（GNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的框架，以从大规模医学图像中更全面地提取全局形态学特征和局部细胞空间关系，提升肿瘤相关任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在医学图像分析中难以捕捉局部几何结构（如肿瘤微环境中细胞间的相互作用），而GNN能有效表征拓扑结构。结合两者可更全面地挖掘医学图像信息。
AI.method: 设计融合层将CNN的全局图像特征与GNN学习的细胞空间信息结合，提出两种策略：基于MLP的简单高效方法和基于Transformer的多网络融合方法。
AI.result: 在结直肠癌和胃癌的组织学数据集上，两种融合模型在三个生物标志物预测任务中均优于独立CNN或GNN，AUC值提升超过5%。
AI.conclusion: 医学图像分析需结合图像级形态学特征与细胞空间关系，GNN与CNN的融合框架能有效提升肿瘤相关任务的性能。

ai_content.result: 在结直肠癌和胃癌的组织学数据集上，两种融合模型在三个生物标志物预测任务中均优于独立CNN或GNN，AUC值提升超过5%。
ai_content.conclusion: 医学图像分析需结合图像级形态学特征与细胞空间关系，GNN与CNN的融合框架能有效提升肿瘤相关任务的性能。

ai_content_json.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合图神经网络（GNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的框架，以从大规模医学图像中更全面地提取全局形态学特征和局部细胞空间关系，提升肿瘤相关任务的性能。

search_text: How GNNs Facilitate CNNs in Mining Geometric Information from Large-Scale Medical Images GNN 如何帮助 CNN 从大规模医学图像中挖掘几何信息 Gigapixel medical images provide massive data, both morphological textures and spatial information, to be mined. Due to the large data scale in histology, deep learning methods play an increasingly significant role as feature extractors. Existing solutions heavily rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for global pixel-level analysis, leaving the underlying local geometric structure such as the interaction between cells in the tumor microenvironment unexplored. The topological structure in medical images, as proven to be closely related to tumor evolution, can be well characterized by graphs. To obtain a more comprehensive representation for downstream oncology tasks, we propose a fusion framework for enhancing the global image-level representation captured by CNNs with the geometry of cell-level spatial information learned by graph neural networks (GNN). The fusion layer optimizes an integration between collaborative features of global images and cell graphs. Two fusion strategies have been developed: one with MLP which is simple but turns out efficient through fine-tuning, and the other with Transformer gains a champion in fusing multiple networks. We evaluate our fusion strategies on histology datasets curated from large patient cohorts of colorectal and gastric cancers for three biomarker prediction tasks. Both two models outperform plain CNNs or GNNs, reaching a consistent AUC improvement of more than 5% on various network backbones. The experimental results yield the necessity for combining image-level morphological features with cell spatial relations in medical image analysis. Codes are available at https://github.com/yiqings/HEGnnEnhanceCnn. 十亿像素医学图像提供了大量可供挖掘的数据，包括形态纹理和空间信息。由于组织学数据规模庞大，深度学习方法作为特征提取器发挥着越来越重要的作用。现有的解决方案严重依赖卷积神经网络（CNN）进行全局像素级分析，而没有探索潜在的局部几何结构，例如肿瘤微环境中细胞之间的相互作用。医学图像中的拓扑结构已被证明与肿瘤进化密切相关，可以通过图形很好地表征。为了获得下游肿瘤学任务的更全面的表示，我们提出了一个融合框架，用于通过图神经网络（GNN）学习的细胞级空间信息的几何形状来增强 CNN 捕获的全局图像级表示。融合层优化了全局图像和细胞图的协作特征之间的集成。已经开发了两种融合策略：一种使用 MLP，虽然简单，但通过微调变得高效，另一种使用 Transformer，在融合多个网络方面获得了冠军。我们在从结直肠癌和胃癌的大型患者队列中收集的组织学数据集上评估了我们的融合策略，以完成三种生物标志物预测任务。这两种模型的性能均优于普通 CNN 或 GNN，在各种网络主干上均实现了超过 5% 的 AUC 改进。实验结果表明在医学图像分析中将图像级形态特征与细胞空间关系相结合的必要性。代码可在 https://github.com/yiqings/HEGnnEnhanceCnn 获取。 本文提出了一种融合图神经网络（GNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的框架，以从大规模医学图像中更全面地提取全局形态学特征和局部细胞空间关系，提升肿瘤相关任务的性能。 Yiqing Shen,Bingxin Zhou,Xinye Xiong,Ruitian Gao,Yu Guang Wang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Tawsifur Rahman,Muhammad E. H. Chowdhury,Amith Khandakar,Zaid Bin Mahbub,Md Sakib Abrar Hossain,Abraham Alhatou,Eynas Abdalla,Sreekumar Muthiyal,Khandaker Farzana Islam,Saad Bin Abul Kashem,Muhammad Salman Khan,Susu M. Zughaier,Maqsud Hossain
title: BIO-CXRNET: A Robust Multimodal Stacking Machine Learning Technique for Mortality Risk Prediction of COVID-19 Patients using Chest X-Ray Images and Clinical Data
title_zh: BIO-CXRNET：一种稳健的多模式堆叠机器学习技术，使用胸部 X 射线图像和临床数据预测 COVID-19 患者的死亡风险
abstract: Fast and accurate detection of the disease can significantly help in reducing the strain on the healthcare facility of any country to reduce the mortality during any pandemic. The goal of this work is to create a multimodal system using a novel machine learning framework that uses both Chest X-ray (CXR) images and clinical data to predict severity in COVID-19 patients. In addition, the study presents a nomogram-based scoring technique for predicting the likelihood of death in high-risk patients. This study uses 25 biomarkers and CXR images in predicting the risk in 930 COVID-19 patients admitted during the first wave of COVID-19 (March-June 2020) in Italy. The proposed multimodal stacking technique produced the precision, sensitivity, and F1-score, of 89.03%, 90.44%, and 89.03%, respectively to identify low or high-risk patients. This multimodal approach improved the accuracy by 6% in comparison to the CXR image or clinical data alone. Finally, nomogram scoring system using multivariate logistic regression -- was used to stratify the mortality risk among the high-risk patients identified in the first stage. Lactate Dehydrogenase (LDH), O2 percentage, White Blood Cells (WBC) Count, Age, and C-reactive protein (CRP) were identified as useful predictor using random forest feature selection model. Five predictors parameters and a CXR image based nomogram score was developed for quantifying the probability of death and categorizing them into two risk groups: survived (<50%), and death (>=50%), respectively. The multi-modal technique was able to predict the death probability of high-risk patients with an F1 score of 92.88 %. The area under the curves for the development and validation cohorts are 0.981 and 0.939, respectively.

abstract_zh: 快速准确地检测疾病可以极大地帮助减轻任何国家医疗机构的压力，从而降低任何大流行期间的死亡率。这项工作的目标是使用新颖的机器学习框架创建一个多模态系统，该框架使用胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 图像和临床数据来预测 COVID-19 患者的严重程度。此外，该研究还提出了一种基于列线图的评分技术，用于预测高危患者的死亡可能性。本研究使用 25 种生物标志物和 CXR 图像来预测意大利第一波 COVID-19（2020 年 3 月至 6 月）期间入院的 930 名 COVID-19 患者的风险。所提出的多模态叠加技术在识别低风险或高风险患者方面的精确度、灵敏度和 F1 分数分别为 89.03%、90.44% 和 89.03%。与单独使用 CXR 图像或临床数据相比，这种多模态方法将准确性提高了 6%。最后，使用多元逻辑回归的列线图评分系统对第一阶段确定的高风险患者的死亡风险进行分层。使用随机森林特征选择模型，乳酸脱氢酶 (LDH)、O2 百分比、白细胞 (WBC) 计数、年龄和 C 反应蛋白 (CRP) 被确定为有用的预测因子。开发了五个预测参数和基于 CXR 图像的列线图评分，用于量化死亡概率并将其分为两个风险组：分别为存活 (<50%) 和死亡 (>=50%)。多模态技术能够预测高危患者的死亡概率，F1 评分为 92.88%。开发组和验证组的曲线下面积分别为 0.981 和 0.939。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态堆叠机器学习框架BIO-CXRNET，结合胸部X光图像和临床数据预测COVID-19患者死亡风险，并构建诺马图评分系统进行风险分层。
AI.motivation: 快速准确的疾病检测可减轻医疗压力并降低疫情死亡率，单一数据源预测效果有限，需融合多模态信息提升准确性。
AI.method: 采用多模态堆叠技术整合CXR图像特征与25项临床指标，通过随机森林筛选关键特征（LDH、O2、WBC、年龄、CRP），利用多变量逻辑回归构建诺马图评分系统。
AI.result: 多模态模型在测试集达到89.03%精确率、90.44%灵敏度和89.03% F1分数，较单一模态提升6%；诺马图对高危患者死亡预测F1达92.88%，AUC为0.981（开发集）和0.939（验证集）。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合显著提升死亡风险预测性能，诺马图评分系统可有效分层高危患者，为临床决策提供量化依据。

authors_text: Marina Sapir
title: Theory of Machine Learning with Limited Data
title_zh: 有限数据下的机器学习理论
abstract: Application of machine learning may be understood as deriving new knowledge for practical use through explaining accumulated observations, training set. Peirce used the term abduction for this kind of inference. Here I formalize the concept of abduction for real valued hypotheses, and show that 14 of the most popular textbook ML learners (every learner I tested), covering classification, regression and clustering, implement this concept of abduction inference. The approach is proposed as an alternative to statistical learning theory, which requires an impractical assumption of indefinitely increasing training set for its justification.
summary: Application of machine learning may be understood as deriving new knowledge for practical use through explaining accumulated observations, training set. Peirce used the term abduction for this kind of inference. Here I formalize the concept of abduction for real valued hypotheses, and show that 14 of the most popular textbook ML learners (every learner I tested), covering classification, regression and clustering, implement this concept of abduction inference. The approach is proposed as an alternative to statistical learning theory, which requires an impractical assumption of indefinitely increasing training set for its justification.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的应用可以理解为通过解释积累的观察结果、训练集来推导出用于实际用途的新知识。皮尔士使用术语“溯因推理”来表达这种推论。在这里，我将溯因的概念形式化为真实有价值的假设，并展示了 14 个最受欢迎的教科书 ML 学习器（我测试的每个学习器），涵盖分类、回归和聚类，实现了溯因推理的概念。该方法被提出作为统计学习理论的替代方案，统计学习理论需要无限增加训练集的不切实际的假设来证明其合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文将皮尔士的溯因推理概念形式化，并证明主流机器学习方法均基于此推理框架，提出有限数据下的机器学习理论。
AI.motivation: 传统统计学习理论依赖无限增长训练集的假设，与现实场景中数据有限的矛盾促使寻找替代理论框架。
AI.method: 通过形式化实数值假设下的溯因推理，验证14种主流机器学习算法（涵盖分类、回归、聚类）均符合该推理范式。
AI.result: 证实所有测试的机器学习方法本质上均执行溯因推理，无需依赖无限数据假设。
AI.conclusion: 溯因推理可作为统计学习理论的替代方案，为有限数据场景提供更符合实际的机器学习理论基础。

search_text: Theory of Machine Learning with Limited Data 有限数据下的机器学习理论 Application of machine learning may be understood as deriving new knowledge for practical use through explaining accumulated observations, training set. Peirce used the term abduction for this kind of inference. Here I formalize the concept of abduction for real valued hypotheses, and show that 14 of the most popular textbook ML learners (every learner I tested), covering classification, regression and clustering, implement this concept of abduction inference. The approach is proposed as an alternative to statistical learning theory, which requires an impractical assumption of indefinitely increasing training set for its justification. 机器学习的应用可以理解为通过解释积累的观察结果、训练集来推导出用于实际用途的新知识。皮尔士使用术语“溯因推理”来表达这种推论。在这里，我将溯因的概念形式化为真实有价值的假设，并展示了 14 个最受欢迎的教科书 ML 学习器（我测试的每个学习器），涵盖分类、回归和聚类，实现了溯因推理的概念。该方法被提出作为统计学习理论的替代方案，统计学习理论需要无限增加训练集的不切实际的假设来证明其合理性。 本文将皮尔士的溯因推理概念形式化，并证明主流机器学习方法均基于此推理框架，提出有限数据下的机器学习理论。 Marina Sapir cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

authors_text: Saikat Chakraborty,Toufique Ahmed,Yangruibo Ding,Premkumar Devanbu,Baishakhi Ray
title: NatGen: Generative pre-training by "Naturalizing" source code
title_zh: NatGen：通过“自然化”源代码进行生成预训练
comment: Accepted to be published in ESEC/FSE 2022
comments: Accepted to be published in ESEC/FSE 2022
abstract: Pre-trained Generative Language models (e.g. PLBART, CodeT5, SPT-Code) for source code yielded strong results on several tasks in the past few years, including code generation and translation. These models have adopted varying pre-training objectives to learn statistics of code construction from very large-scale corpora in a self-supervised fashion; the success of pre-trained models largely hinges on these pre-training objectives. This paper proposes a new pre-training objective, "Naturalizing" of source code, exploiting code's bimodal, dual-channel (formal & natural channels) nature. Unlike natural language, code's bimodal, dual-channel nature allows us to generate semantically equivalent code at scale. We introduce six classes of semantic preserving transformations to introduce un-natural forms of code, and then force our model to produce more natural original programs written by developers. Learning to generate equivalent, but more natural code, at scale, over large corpora of open-source code, without explicit manual supervision, helps the model learn to both ingest & generate code. We fine-tune our model in three generative Software Engineering tasks: code generation, code translation, and code refinement with limited human-curated labeled data and achieve state-of-the-art performance rivaling CodeT5. We show that our pre-trained model is especially competitive at zero-shot and few-shot learning, and better at learning code properties (e.g., syntax, data flow).
summary: Pre-trained Generative Language models (e.g. PLBART, CodeT5, SPT-Code) for source code yielded strong results on several tasks in the past few years, including code generation and translation. These models have adopted varying pre-training objectives to learn statistics of code construction from very large-scale corpora in a self-supervised fashion; the success of pre-trained models largely hinges on these pre-training objectives. This paper proposes a new pre-training objective, "Naturalizing" of source code, exploiting code's bimodal, dual-channel (formal & natural channels) nature. Unlike natural language, code's bimodal, dual-channel nature allows us to generate semantically equivalent code at scale. We introduce six classes of semantic preserving transformations to introduce un-natural forms of code, and then force our model to produce more natural original programs written by developers. Learning to generate equivalent, but more natural code, at scale, over large corpora of open-source code, without explicit manual supervision, helps the model learn to both ingest & generate code. We fine-tune our model in three generative Software Engineering tasks: code generation, code translation, and code refinement with limited human-curated labeled data and achieve state-of-the-art performance rivaling CodeT5. We show that our pre-trained model is especially competitive at zero-shot and few-shot learning, and better at learning code properties (e.g., syntax, data flow).
abstract_zh: 用于源代码的预训练生成语言模型（例如 PLBART、CodeT5、SPT-Code）在过去几年中在包括代码生成和翻译在内的多项任务上取得了出色的成果。这些模型采用了不同的预训练目标，以自我监督的方式从超大规模的语料库中学习代码构造的统计数据；预训练模型的成功很大程度上取决于这些预训练目标。本文提出了一个新的预训练目标，即源代码的“自然化”，利用代码的双峰、双通道（正式通道和自然通道）性质。与自然语言不同，代码的双模态、双通道性质使我们能够大规模生成语义上等效的代码。我们引入了六类语义保留转换来引入非自然形式的代码，然后迫使我们的模型生成由开发人员编写的更自然的原始程序。学习在大型开源代码库中大规模生成等效但更自然的代码，而无需明确的手动监督，有助于模型学习摄取和生成代码。我们在三个生成软件工程任务中微调我们的模型：代码生成、代码翻译和代码细化，并使用有限的人工标记数据来实现与 CodeT5 相媲美的最先进的性能。我们表明，我们的预训练模型在零样本和少样本学习方面特别具有竞争力，并且在学习代码属性（例如语法、数据流）方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的预训练目标'自然化'源代码，通过生成语义等效但更自然的代码形式，提升代码生成模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成模型依赖传统预训练目标，未能充分挖掘代码双通道（形式与自然语言）特性，导致生成代码与开发者习惯存在差异。
AI.method: 设计六类语义保持转换生成'不自然'代码，训练模型将其还原为开发者撰写的自然代码，利用大规模开源代码库进行无监督学习。
AI.result: 在代码生成、翻译和优化任务中达到SOTA性能，尤其在零样本和少样本场景下优于CodeT5，且更擅长学习代码语法和数据流特性。
AI.conclusion: 通过双通道自然化预训练，模型能更好理解代码本质，为代码生成任务提供更优解决方案，未来可探索更多语义转换方式增强效果。

authors_text: Pedro Esteban Chavarrias-Solano,Carlos Axel Garcia-Vega,Francisco Javier Lopez-Tiro,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Thomas Bazin,Dominique Lamarque,Christian Daul
title: Evaluating object detector ensembles for improving the robustness of artifact detection in endoscopic video streams
title_zh: 评估对象检测器集合以提高内窥镜视频流中伪影检测的鲁棒性
abstract: In this contribution we use an ensemble deep-learning method for combining the prediction of two individual one-stage detectors (i.e., YOLOv4 and Yolact) with the aim to detect artefacts in endoscopic images. This ensemble strategy enabled us to improve the robustness of the individual models without harming their real-time computation capabilities. We demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach by training and testing the two individual models and various ensemble configurations on the "Endoscopic Artifact Detection Challenge" dataset. Extensive experiments show the superiority, in terms of mean average precision, of the ensemble approach over the individual models and previous works in the state of the art.
summary: In this contribution we use an ensemble deep-learning method for combining the prediction of two individual one-stage detectors (i.e., YOLOv4 and Yolact) with the aim to detect artefacts in endoscopic images. This ensemble strategy enabled us to improve the robustness of the individual models without harming their real-time computation capabilities. We demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach by training and testing the two individual models and various ensemble configurations on the "Endoscopic Artifact Detection Challenge" dataset. Extensive experiments show the superiority, in terms of mean average precision, of the ensemble approach over the individual models and previous works in the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用集成深度学习方法来结合两个单独的单级检测器（即 YOLOv4 和 Yolact）的预测，旨在检测内窥镜图像中的伪影。这种集成策略使我们能够提高各个模型的鲁棒性，而不会损害其实时计算能力。我们通过在“内窥镜伪影检测挑战”数据集上训练和测试两个单独的模型和各种集成配置来证明我们方法的有效性。大量的实验表明，就平均精度而言，集成方法相对于单个模型和现有技术中的先前作品具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种集成深度学习方法，结合YOLOv4和Yolact两个单阶段检测器，以提升内窥镜图像伪影检测的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 内窥镜视频中的伪影检测面临复杂场景挑战，单一检测器存在鲁棒性不足的问题，需探索实时且可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过集成YOLOv4与Yolact两个检测器的预测结果，设计多种集成策略，在保持实时计算能力的同时提升检测稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，集成方法在Endoscopic Artifact Detection Challenge数据集上的平均精度均值（mAP）优于单模型及现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 集成检测器能有效增强伪影检测鲁棒性，且不牺牲实时性，为内窥镜视频分析提供了可行技术路径。

This ensemble strategy enabled us to improve the robustness of the individual models without harming their real-time computation capabilities. We demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach by training and testing the two individual models and various ensemble configurations on the "Endoscopic Artifact Detection Challenge" dataset. Extensive experiments show the superiority, in terms of mean average precision, of the ensemble approach over the individual models and previous works in the state of the art. 在本文中，我们使用集成深度学习方法来结合两个单独的单级检测器（即 YOLOv4 和 Yolact）的预测，旨在检测内窥镜图像中的伪影。这种集成策略使我们能够提高各个模型的鲁棒性，而不会损害其实时计算能力。我们通过在“内窥镜伪影检测挑战”数据集上训练和测试两个单独的模型和各种集成配置来证明我们方法的有效性。大量的实验表明，就平均精度而言，集成方法相对于单个模型和现有技术中的先前作品具有优越性。 本文提出一种集成深度学习方法，结合YOLOv4和Yolact两个单阶段检测器，以提升内窥镜图像伪影检测的鲁棒性。 Pedro Esteban Chavarrias-Solano,Carlos Axel Garcia-Vega,Francisco Javier Lopez-Tiro,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Thomas Bazin,Dominique Lamarque,Christian Daul cs.CV

authors_text: Sheng Zhou,Hongjia Xu,Zhuonan Zheng,Jiawei Chen,Zhao li,Jiajun Bu,Jia Wu,Xin Wang,Wenwu Zhu,Martin Ester
title: A Comprehensive Survey on Deep Clustering: Taxonomy, Challenges, and Future Directions
title_zh: 深度聚类的全面调查：分类、挑战和未来方向
abstract: Clustering is a fundamental machine learning task which has been widely studied in the literature. Classic clustering methods follow the assumption that data are represented as features in a vectorized form through various representation learning techniques. As the data become increasingly complicated and complex, the shallow (traditional) clustering methods can no longer handle the high-dimensional data type. With the huge success of deep learning, especially the deep unsupervised learning, many representation learning techniques with deep architectures have been proposed in the past decade. Recently, the concept of Deep Clustering, i.e., jointly optimizing the representation learning and clustering, has been proposed and hence attracted growing attention in the community. Motivated by the tremendous success of deep learning in clustering, one of the most fundamental machine learning tasks, and the large number of recent advances in this direction, in this paper we conduct a comprehensive survey on deep clustering by proposing a new taxonomy of different state-of-the-art approaches. We summarize the essential components of deep clustering and categorize existing methods by the ways they design interactions between deep representation learning and clustering. Moreover, this survey also provides the popular benchmark datasets, evaluation metrics and open-source implementations to clearly illustrate various experimental settings. Last but not least, we discuss the practical applications of deep clustering and suggest challenging topics deserving further investigations as future directions.
summary: Clustering is a fundamental machine learning task which has been widely studied in the literature. Classic clustering methods follow the assumption that data are represented as features in a vectorized form through various representation learning techniques. As the data become increasingly complicated and complex, the shallow (traditional) clustering methods can no longer handle the high-dimensional data type. With the huge success of deep learning, especially the deep unsupervised learning, many representation learning techniques with deep architectures have been proposed in the past decade. Recently, the concept of Deep Clustering, i.e., jointly optimizing the representation learning and clustering, has been proposed and hence attracted growing attention in the community. Motivated by the tremendous success of deep learning in clustering, one of the most fundamental machine learning tasks, and the large number of recent advances in this direction, in this paper we conduct a comprehensive survey on deep clustering by proposing a new taxonomy of different state-of-the-art approaches. We summarize the essential components of deep clustering and categorize existing methods by the ways they design interactions between deep representation learning and clustering. Moreover, this survey also provides the popular benchmark datasets, evaluation metrics and open-source implementations to clearly illustrate various experimental settings. Last but not least, we discuss the practical applications of deep clustering and suggest challenging topics deserving further investigations as future directions.
abstract_zh: 聚类是一项基本的机器学习任务，已在文献中得到广泛研究。经典的聚类方法遵循这样的假设：通过各种表示学习技术将数据表示为矢量化形式的特征。随着数据变得越来越复杂，浅层（传统）聚类方法已经无法处理高维数据类型。随着深度学习，特别是深度无监督学习的巨大成功，在过去十年中提出了许多具有深度架构的表示学习技术。最近，深度聚类（Deep Clustering）的概念，即联合优化表示学习和聚类被提出，并因此引起了社区的越来越多的关注。受深度学习在聚类（最基本的机器学习任务之一）方面取得的巨大成功以及该方向最近取得的大量进展的推动，在本文中，我们通过提出不同最先进方法的新分类法，对深度聚类进行了全面的调查。我们总结了深度聚类的基本组成部分，并根据现有方法设计深度表示学习和聚类之间交互的方式对现有方法进行分类。此外，本次调查还提供了流行的基准数据集、评估指标和开源实现，以清楚地说明各种实验设置。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们讨论了深度聚类的实际应用，并提出了值得进一步研究的具有挑战性的主题作为未来的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对深度聚类方法进行全面综述，提出新的分类体系，总结核心组件，并探讨应用与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法难以处理高维数据，深度学习为聚类任务带来新机遇，需系统梳理现有方法与挑战。
AI.method: 提出深度聚类方法的新分类体系，按表征学习与聚类的交互方式划分现有技术，并总结数据集、评估指标与开源实现。
AI.result: 构建了深度聚类的分类框架，归纳了主流方法的核心组件，提供了实验基准与应用案例分析。
AI.conclusion: 深度聚类在复杂数据处理中展现潜力，但仍需解决可解释性、稳定性等挑战，未来研究应关注跨领域应用与算法优化。

authors_text: Jongwan Kim,DongJin Lee,Byunggook Na,Seongsik Park,Jeonghee Jo,Sungroh Yoon
title: E2V-SDE: From Asynchronous Events to Fast and Continuous Video Reconstruction via Neural Stochastic Differential Equations
title_zh: E2V-SDE：通过神经随机微分方程从异步事件到快速连续视频重建
comment: arXiv admin note: This submission has been withdrawn by arXiv administrators due to inappropriate text overlap with external sources. Additional information at https://doi.org/10.1109/CVPR52688.2022.01319
comments: arXiv admin note: This submission has been withdrawn by arXiv administrators due to inappropriate text overlap with external sources. Additional information at https://doi.org/10.1109/CVPR52688.2022.01319
abstract: Event cameras respond to brightness changes in the scene asynchronously and independently for every pixel. Due to the properties, these cameras have distinct features: high dynamic range (HDR), high temporal resolution, and low power consumption. However, the results of event cameras should be processed into an alternative representation for computer vision tasks. Also, they are usually noisy and cause poor performance in areas with few events. In recent years, numerous researchers have attempted to reconstruct videos from events. However, they do not provide good quality videos due to a lack of temporal information from irregular and discontinuous data. To overcome these difficulties, we introduce an E2V-SDE whose dynamics are governed in a latent space by Stochastic differential equations (SDE). Therefore, E2V-SDE can rapidly reconstruct images at arbitrary time steps and make realistic predictions on unseen data. In addition, we successfully adopted a variety of image composition techniques for improving image clarity and temporal consistency. By conducting extensive experiments on simulated and real-scene datasets, we verify that our model outperforms state-of-the-art approaches under various video reconstruction settings. In terms of image quality, the LPIPS score improves by up to 12% and the reconstruction speed is 87% higher than that of ET-Net.
summary: Event cameras respond to brightness changes in the scene asynchronously and independently for every pixel. Due to the properties, these cameras have distinct features: high dynamic range (HDR), high temporal resolution, and low power consumption. However, the results of event cameras should be processed into an alternative representation for computer vision tasks. Also, they are usually noisy and cause poor performance in areas with few events. In recent years, numerous researchers have attempted to reconstruct videos from events. However, they do not provide good quality videos due to a lack of temporal information from irregular and discontinuous data. To overcome these difficulties, we introduce an E2V-SDE whose dynamics are governed in a latent space by Stochastic differential equations (SDE). Therefore, E2V-SDE can rapidly reconstruct images at arbitrary time steps and make realistic predictions on unseen data. In addition, we successfully adopted a variety of image composition techniques for improving image clarity and temporal consistency. By conducting extensive experiments on simulated and real-scene datasets, we verify that our model outperforms state-of-the-art approaches under various video reconstruction settings. In terms of image quality, the LPIPS score improves by up to 12% and the reconstruction speed is 87% higher than that of ET-Net.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机对场景中每个像素的亮度变化进行异步且独立的响应。由于这些特性，这些相机具有显着的特点：高动态范围 (HDR)、高时间分辨率和低功耗。然而，事件相机的结果应该被处理成计算机视觉任务的替代表示。此外，它们通常很吵，并且会在事件很少的区域导致性能不佳。近年来，许多研究人员尝试重建事件视频。然而，由于缺乏来自不规则和不连续数据的时间信息，它们不能提供高质量的视频。为了克服这些困难，我们引入了 E2V-SDE，其动力学由随机微分方程 (SDE) 在潜在空间中控制。因此，E2V-SDE 可以在任意时间步快速重建图像，并对看不见的数据做出现实的预测。此外，我们成功地采用了多种图像合成技术来提高图像清晰度和时间一致性。通过对模拟和真实场景数据集进行广泛的实验，我们验证了我们的模型在各种视频重建设置下优于最先进的方法。在图像质量方面，LPIPS得分比ET-Net提升高达12%，重建速度提升87%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经随机微分方程（SDE）的事件相机视频重建方法E2V-SDE，用于解决异步事件数据在视频重建中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 事件相机具有高动态范围和高时间分辨率，但其异步、离散的事件数据导致传统方法难以生成高质量连续视频，存在时间信息缺失和噪声干扰问题。
AI.method: 通过构建潜空间中的随机微分方程动态模型，E2V-SDE能够快速生成任意时间步的图像，并结合图像合成技术提升时空一致性。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上，LPIPS指标提升最高达12%，重建速度较ET-Net提高87%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: E2V-SDE通过引入SDE动态建模和图像合成技术，有效解决了事件视频重建中的时空连续性问题，验证了其在质量和速度上的优势。

authors_text: Rajarsi Gupta,Jakub Kaczmarzyk,Soma Kobayashi,Tahsin Kurc,Joel Saltz
title: AI and Pathology: Steering Treatment and Predicting Outcomes
title_zh: 人工智能和病理学：指导治疗和预测结果
abstract: The combination of data analysis methods, increasing computing capacity, and improved sensors enable quantitative granular, multi-scale, cell-based analyses. We describe the rich set of application challenges related to tissue interpretation and survey AI methods currently used to address these challenges. We focus on a particular class of targeted human tissue analysis - histopathology - aimed at quantitative characterization of disease state, patient outcome prediction and treatment steering.
summary: The combination of data analysis methods, increasing computing capacity, and improved sensors enable quantitative granular, multi-scale, cell-based analyses. We describe the rich set of application challenges related to tissue interpretation and survey AI methods currently used to address these challenges. We focus on a particular class of targeted human tissue analysis - histopathology - aimed at quantitative characterization of disease state, patient outcome prediction and treatment steering.

authors_text: Qicong Xie,Shan Yang,Yi Lei,Lei Xie,Dan Su
title: End-to-End Voice Conversion with Information Perturbation
title_zh: 带有信息扰动的端到端语音转换
abstract: The ideal goal of voice conversion is to convert the source speaker's speech to sound naturally like the target speaker while maintaining the linguistic content and the prosody of the source speech. However, current approaches are insufficient to achieve comprehensive source prosody transfer and target speaker timbre preservation in the converted speech, and the quality of the converted speech is also unsatisfied due to the mismatch between the acoustic model and the vocoder. In this paper, we leverage the recent advances in information perturbation and propose a fully end-to-end approach to conduct high-quality voice conversion. We first adopt information perturbation to remove speaker-related information in the source speech to disentangle speaker timbre and linguistic content and thus the linguistic information is subsequently modeled by a content encoder. To better transfer the prosody of the source speech to the target, we particularly introduce a speaker-related pitch encoder which can maintain the general pitch pattern of the source speaker while flexibly modifying the pitch intensity of the generated speech. Finally, one-shot voice conversion is set up through continuous speaker space modeling. Experimental results indicate that the proposed end-to-end approach significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art models in terms of intelligibility, naturalness, and speaker similarity.
summary: The ideal goal of voice conversion is to convert the source speaker's speech to sound naturally like the target speaker while maintaining the linguistic content and the prosody of the source speech. However, current approaches are insufficient to achieve comprehensive source prosody transfer and target speaker timbre preservation in the converted speech, and the quality of the converted speech is also unsatisfied due to the mismatch between the acoustic model and the vocoder. In this paper, we leverage the recent advances in information perturbation and propose a fully end-to-end approach to conduct high-quality voice conversion. We first adopt information perturbation to remove speaker-related information in the source speech to disentangle speaker timbre and linguistic content and thus the linguistic information is subsequently modeled by a content encoder. To better transfer the prosody of the source speech to the target, we particularly introduce a speaker-related pitch encoder which can maintain the general pitch pattern of the source speaker while flexibly modifying the pitch intensity of the generated speech. Finally, one-shot voice conversion is set up through continuous speaker space modeling. Experimental results indicate that the proposed end-to-end approach significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art models in terms of intelligibility, naturalness, and speaker similarity.
abstract_zh: 语音转换的理想目标是将源说话者的语音转换为目标说话者自然的声音，同时保持源语音的语言内容和韵律。然而，当前的方法不足以在转换后的语音中实现全面的源韵律迁移和目标说话人音色保留，并且由于声学模型和声码器之间的不匹配，转换后的语音的质量也不能令人满意。在本文中，我们利用信息扰动的最新进展，提出了一种完全端到端的方法来进行高质量的语音转换。我们首先采用信息扰动来去除源语音中与说话人相关的信息，以解开说话人的音色和语言内容，从而随后通过内容编码器对语言信息进行建模。为了更好地将源语音的韵律传输到目标，我们特别引入了一种与说话人相关的音调编码器，它可以保持源说话人的一般音调模式，同时灵活地修改生成语音的音调强度。最后，通过连续的说话人空间建模建立一次性语音转换。实验结果表明，所提出的端到端方法在清晰度、自然度和说话者相似度方面显着优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的语音转换方法，通过信息扰动实现高质量的语音转换。
AI.motivation: 当前语音转换方法在源语音韵律传递和目标说话人音色保持方面存在不足，且由于声学模型和声码器之间的不匹配，转换语音的质量不理想。
AI.method: 本文利用信息扰动技术去除源语音中的说话人相关信息，解耦说话人音色和语言内容，然后通过内容编码器建模语言信息。同时引入与说话人相关的音高编码器，以保持源说话人的音高模式并灵活调整生成语音的音高强度。最后通过连续说话人空间建模实现单次语音转换。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的端到端方法在可理解性、自然性和说话人相似性方面显著优于现有最先进的模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过信息扰动和端到端建模，在语音转换任务中取得了显著的性能提升。

authors_text: Benjamin Eysenbach,Tianjun Zhang,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Sergey Levine
title: Contrastive Learning as Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 对比学习作为目标条件强化学习
comment: NeurIPS 2022. Code is available on the website: https://ben-eysenbach.github.io/contrastive_rl
comments: NeurIPS 2022. Code is available on the website: https://ben-eysenbach.github.io/contrastive_rl
abstract: In reinforcement learning (RL), it is easier to solve a task if given a good representation. While deep RL should automatically acquire such good representations, prior work often finds that learning representations in an end-to-end fashion is unstable and instead equip RL algorithms with additional representation learning parts (e.g., auxiliary losses, data augmentation). How can we design RL algorithms that directly acquire good representations? In this paper, instead of adding representation learning parts to an existing RL algorithm, we show (contrastive) representation learning methods can be cast as RL algorithms in their own right. To do this, we build upon prior work and apply contrastive representation learning to action-labeled trajectories, in such a way that the (inner product of) learned representations exactly corresponds to a goal-conditioned value function. We use this idea to reinterpret a prior RL method as performing contrastive learning, and then use the idea to propose a much simpler method that achieves similar performance. Across a range of goal-conditioned RL tasks, we demonstrate that contrastive RL methods achieve higher success rates than prior non-contrastive methods, including in the offline RL setting. We also show that contrastive RL outperforms prior methods on image-based tasks, without using data augmentation or auxiliary objectives.
summary: In reinforcement learning (RL), it is easier to solve a task if given a good representation. While deep RL should automatically acquire such good representations, prior work often finds that learning representations in an end-to-end fashion is unstable and instead equip RL algorithms with additional representation learning parts (e.g., auxiliary losses, data augmentation). How can we design RL algorithms that directly acquire good representations? In this paper, instead of adding representation learning parts to an existing RL algorithm, we show (contrastive) representation learning methods can be cast as RL algorithms in their own right. To do this, we build upon prior work and apply contrastive representation learning to action-labeled trajectories, in such a way that the (inner product of) learned representations exactly corresponds to a goal-conditioned value function. We use this idea to reinterpret a prior RL method as performing contrastive learning, and then use the idea to propose a much simpler method that achieves similar performance. Across a range of goal-conditioned RL tasks, we demonstrate that contrastive RL methods achieve higher success rates than prior non-contrastive methods, including in the offline RL setting. We also show that contrastive RL outperforms prior methods on image-based tasks, without using data augmentation or auxiliary objectives.
abstract_zh: 在强化学习（RL）中，如果给出良好的表示，解决任务就会更容易。虽然深度 RL 应该自动获取如此好的表示，但之前的工作经常发现以端到端方式学习表示是不稳定的，而是为 RL 算法配备了额外的表示学习部分（例如辅助损失、数据增强）。我们如何设计直接获得良好表示的强化学习算法？在本文中，我们展示了（对比）表示学习方法本身可以作为 RL 算法，而不是向现有 RL 算法添加表示学习部分。为此，我们以先前的工作为基础，将对比表示学习应用于动作标记的轨迹，从而使学习到的表示（的内积）完全对应于目标条件的价值函数。我们使用这个想法将之前的 RL 方法重新解释为执行对比学习，然后使用这个想法提出一种更简单的方法来实现类似的性能。在一系列目标条件强化学习任务中，我们证明了对比强化学习方法比之前的非对比强化学习方法取得了更高的成功率，包括在离线强化学习环境中。我们还表明，在不使用数据增强或辅助目标的情况下，对比强化学习在基于图像的任务上优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文将对比学习框架转化为目标条件强化学习方法，并提出一种无需额外辅助目标的简化算法。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习在端到端学习表征时存在不稳定性，现有方法依赖辅助损失或数据增强等额外模块，而本文旨在直接构建能学习良好表征的RL算法。
AI.method: 通过将对比学习应用于带动作标签的轨迹数据，使学习到的表征内积对应目标条件价值函数，重新诠释现有RL方法并提出简化版本。
AI.result: 在多类目标条件RL任务中，对比RL方法成功率优于非对比方法，且在离线设置和图像任务中无需数据增强即可取得更好效果。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习作为目标条件RL的视角有效提升了表征学习效率，为简化RL算法设计提供了新思路。

search_text: Contrastive Learning as Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning 对比学习作为目标条件强化学习 In reinforcement learning (RL), it is easier to solve a task if given a good representation. While deep RL should automatically acquire such good representations, prior work often finds that learning representations in an end-to-end fashion is unstable and instead equip RL algorithms with additional representation learning parts (e.g., auxiliary losses, data augmentation). How can we design RL algorithms that directly acquire good representations? In this paper, instead of adding representation learning parts to an existing RL algorithm, we show (contrastive) representation learning methods can be cast as RL algorithms in their own right. To do this, we build upon prior work and apply contrastive representation learning to action-labeled trajectories, in such a way that the (inner product of) learned representations exactly corresponds to a goal-conditioned value function. We use this idea to reinterpret a prior RL method as performing contrastive learning, and then use the idea to propose a much simpler method that achieves similar performance. Across a range of goal-conditioned RL tasks, we demonstrate that contrastive RL methods achieve higher success rates than prior non-contrastive methods, including in the offline RL setting. We also show that contrastive RL outperforms prior methods on image-based tasks, without using data augmentation or auxiliary objectives. 在强化学习（RL）中，如果给出良好的表示，解决任务就会更容易。虽然深度 RL 应该自动获取如此好的表示，但之前的工作经常发现以端到端方式学习表示是不稳定的，而是为 RL 算法配备了额外的表示学习部分（例如辅助损失、数据增强）。我们如何设计直接获得良好表示的强化学习算法？在本文中，我们展示了（对比）表示学习方法本身可以作为 RL 算法，而不是向现有 RL 算法添加表示学习部分。为此，我们以先前的工作为基础，将对比表示学习应用于动作标记的轨迹，从而使学习到的表示（的内积）完全对应于目标条件的价值函数。我们使用这个想法将之前的 RL 方法重新解释为执行对比学习，然后使用这个想法提出一种更简单的方法来实现类似的性能。在一系列目标条件强化学习任务中，我们证明了对比强化学习方法比之前的非对比强化学习方法取得了更高的成功率，包括在离线强化学习环境中。我们还表明，在不使用数据增强或辅助目标的情况下，对比强化学习在基于图像的任务上优于现有方法。 本文将对比学习框架转化为目标条件强化学习方法，并提出一种无需额外辅助目标的简化算法。 Benjamin Eysenbach,Tianjun Zhang,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Sergey Levine cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Benjamin Feuer,Ameya Joshi,Chinmay Hegde
title: A Meta-Analysis of Distributionally-Robust Models
title_zh: 分布稳健模型的荟萃分析
comment: To be presented at ICML Workshop on Principles of Distribution Shift 2022. Copyright 2022 by the author(s)
comments: To be presented at ICML Workshop on Principles of Distribution Shift 2022. Copyright 2022 by the author(s)
abstract: State-of-the-art image classifiers trained on massive datasets (such as ImageNet) have been shown to be vulnerable to a range of both intentional and incidental distribution shifts. On the other hand, several recent classifiers with favorable out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness properties have emerged, achieving high accuracy on their target tasks while maintaining their in-distribution accuracy on challenging benchmarks. We present a meta-analysis on a wide range of publicly released models, most of which have been published over the last twelve months. Through this meta-analysis, we empirically identify four main commonalities for all the best-performing OOD-robust models, all of which illuminate the considerable promise of vision-language pre-training.
summary: State-of-the-art image classifiers trained on massive datasets (such as ImageNet) have been shown to be vulnerable to a range of both intentional and incidental distribution shifts. On the other hand, several recent classifiers with favorable out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness properties have emerged, achieving high accuracy on their target tasks while maintaining their in-distribution accuracy on challenging benchmarks. We present a meta-analysis on a wide range of publicly released models, most of which have been published over the last twelve months. Through this meta-analysis, we empirically identify four main commonalities for all the best-performing OOD-robust models, all of which illuminate the considerable promise of vision-language pre-training.
abstract_zh: 在海量数据集（例如 ImageNet）上训练的最先进的图像分类器已被证明容易受到一系列有意和偶然的分布变化的影响。另一方面，最近出现了一些具有良好的分布外（OOD）鲁棒性的分类器，在目标任务上实现了高精度，同时在具有挑战性的基准上保持了分布内的准确性。我们对各种公开发布的模型进行了荟萃分析，其中大部分模型是在过去十二个月内发布的。通过这种荟萃分析，我们凭经验确定了所有表现最佳的 OOD 鲁棒模型的四个主要共性，所有这些都阐明了视觉语言预训练的巨大前景。

AI.tldr: 本文对多种分布鲁棒模型进行元分析，旨在发现其共同特征以提升模型在分布外场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前主流图像分类模型在面对分布偏移时表现脆弱，而近期出现的分布鲁棒模型在保持高精度的同时展现了更强的泛化能力，需探究其成功共性。
AI.method: 通过分析过去一年内公开发布的多种模型，实证归纳出表现最佳的分布鲁棒模型的四个共同特征。
AI.result: 发现所有最佳分布鲁棒模型均具有四个共性，表明视觉-语言预训练在提升模型鲁棒性方面具有显著潜力。
AI.conclusion: 分布鲁棒模型的成功关键在于其共享的四个特征，尤其是视觉-语言预训练技术，为未来研究提供了重要方向。
