authors_text: Bruno Taillé
title: Contextualization and Generalization in Entity and Relation Extraction
title_zh: 实体和关系提取中的上下文化和泛化
abstract: During the past decade, neural networks have become prominent in Natural Language Processing (NLP), notably for their capacity to learn relevant word representations from large unlabeled corpora. These word embeddings can then be transferred and finetuned for diverse end applications during a supervised training phase. More recently, in 2018, the transfer of entire pretrained Language Models and the preservation of their contextualization capacities enabled to reach unprecedented performance on virtually every NLP benchmark, sometimes even outperforming human baselines. However, as models reach such impressive scores, their comprehension abilities still appear as shallow, which reveal limitations of benchmarks to provide useful insights on their factors of performance and to accurately measure understanding capabilities. In this thesis, we study the behaviour of state-of-the-art models regarding generalization to facts unseen during training in two important Information Extraction tasks: Named Entity Recognition (NER) and Relation Extraction (RE). Indeed, traditional benchmarks present important lexical overlap between mentions and relations used for training and evaluating models, whereas the main interest of Information Extraction is to extract previously unknown information. We propose empirical studies to separate performance based on mention and relation overlap with the training set and find that pretrained Language Models are mainly beneficial to detect unseen mentions, in particular out-of-domain. While this makes them suited for real use cases, there is still a gap in performance between seen and unseen mentions that hurts generalization to new facts. In particular, even state-of-the-art ERE models rely on a shallow retention heuristic, basing their prediction more on arguments surface forms than context.
summary: During the past decade, neural networks have become prominent in Natural Language Processing (NLP), notably for their capacity to learn relevant word representations from large unlabeled corpora. These word embeddings can then be transferred and finetuned for diverse end applications during a supervised training phase. More recently, in 2018, the transfer of entire pretrained Language Models and the preservation of their contextualization capacities enabled to reach unprecedented performance on virtually every NLP benchmark, sometimes even outperforming human baselines. However, as models reach such impressive scores, their comprehension abilities still appear as shallow, which reveal limitations of benchmarks to provide useful insights on their factors of performance and to accurately measure understanding capabilities. In this thesis, we study the behaviour of state-of-the-art models regarding generalization to facts unseen during training in two important Information Extraction tasks: Named Entity Recognition (NER) and Relation Extraction (RE). Indeed, traditional benchmarks present important lexical overlap between mentions and relations used for training and evaluating models, whereas the main interest of Information Extraction is to extract previously unknown information. We propose empirical studies to separate performance based on mention and relation overlap with the training set and find that pretrained Language Models are mainly beneficial to detect unseen mentions, in particular out-of-domain. While this makes them suited for real use cases, there is still a gap in performance between seen and unseen mentions that hurts generalization to new facts. In particular, even state-of-the-art ERE models rely on a shallow retention heuristic, basing their prediction more on arguments surface forms than context.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，神经网络在自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域变得举足轻重，特别是其从大型未标记语料库中学习相关单词表示的能力。然后，可以在监督训练阶段转移这些词嵌入并针对不同的最终应用进行微调。最近，在 2018 年，整个预训练语言模型的迁移及其情境化能力的保留使得几乎在每个 NLP 基准上都达到了前所未有的性能，有时甚至超越了人类基准。然而，当模型达到如此令人印象深刻的分数时，它们的理解能力仍然显得很浅，这揭示了基准的局限性，无法提供有关其性能因素的有用见解并准确测量理解能力。在本文中，我们研究了最先进模型的行为，这些模型在两个重要的信息提取任务：命名实体识别（NER）和关系提取（RE）训练期间对未见过的事实进行泛化。事实上，传统基准在用于训练和评估模型的提及和关系之间呈现出重要的词汇重叠，而信息提取的主要兴趣是提取以前未知的信息。我们提出实证研究，根据提及和与训练集的关系重叠来分离性能，并发现预训练的语言模型主要有利于检测未见过的提及，特别是域外提及。虽然这使得它们适合真实的用例，但看到的和看不见的提及之间仍然存在性能差距，这不利于对新事实的概括。特别是，即使是最先进的 ERE 模型也依赖于浅层保留启发式，其预测更多地基于论点表面形式而不是上下文。

AI.tldr: 研究预训练语言模型在实体和关系抽取任务中对训练未见事实的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统基准测试中训练与评估数据存在词汇重叠，而信息抽取的核心目标是提取未知信息，需评估模型对新事实的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过实证分析，区分模型在训练集提及/关系重叠程度下的性能差异，评估预训练模型在未见实体和关系上的表现。
AI.result: 预训练模型擅长检测领域外未见实体，但未见关系性能不足，且依赖论元表面形式而非上下文进行预测。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型在实际应用中表现良好，但对新事实的泛化能力仍受限于浅层记忆机制，需提升上下文理解能力。

authors_text: Guo-Hua Wang,Bin-Bin Gao,Chengjie Wang
title: How to Reduce Change Detection to Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 如何减少语义分割的变更检测
comment: Accepted by Pattern Recognition. Code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/C-3PO
comments: Accepted by Pattern Recognition. Code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/C-3PO
abstract: Change detection (CD) aims to identify changes that occur in an image pair taken different times. Prior methods devise specific networks from scratch to predict change masks in pixel-level, and struggle with general segmentation problems. In this paper, we propose a new paradigm that reduces CD to semantic segmentation which means tailoring an existing and powerful semantic segmentation network to solve CD. This new paradigm conveniently enjoys the mainstream semantic segmentation techniques to deal with general segmentation problems in CD. Hence we can concentrate on studying how to detect changes. We propose a novel and importance insight that different change types exist in CD and they should be learned separately. Based on it, we devise a module named MTF to extract the change information and fuse temporal features. MTF enjoys high interpretability and reveals the essential characteristic of CD. And most segmentation networks can be adapted to solve the CD problems with our MTF module. Finally, we propose C-3PO, a network to detect changes at pixel-level. C-3PO achieves state-of-the-art performance without bells and whistles. It is simple but effective and can be considered as a new baseline in this field. Our code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/C-3PO.

This new paradigm conveniently enjoys the mainstream semantic segmentation techniques to deal with general segmentation problems in CD. Hence we can concentrate on studying how to detect changes. We propose a novel and importance insight that different change types exist in CD and they should be learned separately. Based on it, we devise a module named MTF to extract the change information and fuse temporal features. MTF enjoys high interpretability and reveals the essential characteristic of CD. And most segmentation networks can be adapted to solve the CD problems with our MTF module. Finally, we propose C-3PO, a network to detect changes at pixel-level. C-3PO achieves state-of-the-art performance without bells and whistles. It is simple but effective and can be considered as a new baseline in this field. Our code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/C-3PO.
abstract_zh: 变化检测（CD）旨在识别不同时间拍摄的图像对中发生的变化。先前的方法从头开始设计特定的网络来预测像素级的变化掩模，并努力解决一般的分割问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的范式，将 CD 简化为语义分割，这意味着定制现有且强大的语义分割网络来解决 CD 问题。这种新范式方便地利用主流语义分割技术来处理 CD 中的一般分割问题。因此我们可以集中精力研究如何检测变化。我们提出了一种新颖且重要的见解，即持续交付中存在不同的变更类型，并且应该单独学习它们。在此基础上，我们设计了一个名为 MTF 的模块来提取变化信息并融合时间特征。 MTF具有较高的可解释性，揭示了CD的本质特征。大多数分割网络都可以通过我们的 MTF 模块来解决 CD 问题。最后，我们提出了 C-3PO，一种检测像素级变化的网络。 C-3PO 无需附加任何附加功能即可实现最先进的性能。它简单而有效，可以被视为该领域的新基线。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/DoctorKey/C-3PO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将变化检测（CD）任务转化为语义分割问题，通过设计MTF模块和C-3PO网络实现像素级变化检测。
AI.motivation: 传统CD方法需从零设计网络且难以处理通用分割问题，而语义分割网络已成熟。本文旨在利用现有分割技术简化CD任务，提升检测效果。
AI.method: 提出MTF模块提取变化信息并融合时序特征，结合语义分割框架构建C-3PO网络，通过分离学习不同变化类型实现像素级检测。
AI.result: C-3PO在无需复杂设计的情况下达到SOTA性能，成为该领域的新型基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 将CD转化为语义分割的新范式有效提升了检测性能，MTF模块的可解释性揭示了CD的本质特征。

search_text: How to Reduce Change Detection to Semantic Segmentation 如何减少语义分割的变更检测 Change detection (CD) aims to identify changes that occur in an image pair taken different times. Prior methods devise specific networks from scratch to predict change masks in pixel-level, and struggle with general segmentation problems. In this paper, we propose a new paradigm that reduces CD to semantic segmentation which means tailoring an existing and powerful semantic segmentation network to solve CD. This new paradigm conveniently enjoys the mainstream semantic segmentation techniques to deal with general segmentation problems in CD. Hence we can concentrate on studying how to detect changes. We propose a novel and importance insight that different change types exist in CD and they should be learned separately. Based on it, we devise a module named MTF to extract the change information and fuse temporal features. MTF enjoys high interpretability and reveals the essential characteristic of CD. And most segmentation networks can be adapted to solve the CD problems with our MTF module. Finally, we propose C-3PO, a network to detect changes at pixel-level. C-3PO achieves state-of-the-art performance without bells and whistles. It is simple but effective and can be considered as a new baseline in this field. Our code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/C-3PO. 变化检测（CD）旨在识别不同时间拍摄的图像对中发生的变化。先前的方法从头开始设计特定的网络来预测像素级的变化掩模，并努力解决一般的分割问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的范式，将 CD 简化为语义分割，这意味着定制现有且强大的语义分割网络来解决 CD 问题。这种新范式方便地利用主流语义分割技术来处理 CD 中的一般分割问题。因此我们可以集中精力研究如何检测变化。我们提出了一种新颖且重要的见解，即持续交付中存在不同的变更类型，并且应该单独学习它们。在此基础上，我们设计了一个名为 MTF 的模块来提取变化信息并融合时间特征。 MTF具有较高的可解释性，揭示了CD的本质特征。大多数分割网络都可以通过我们的 MTF 模块来解决 CD 问题。最后，我们提出了 C-3PO，一种检测像素级变化的网络。 C-3PO 无需附加任何附加功能即可实现最先进的性能。它简单而有效，可以被视为该领域的新基线。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/DoctorKey/C-3PO。 本文提出将变化检测（CD）任务转化为语义分割问题，通过设计MTF模块和C-3PO网络实现像素级变化检测。 Guo-Hua Wang,Bin-Bin Gao,Chengjie Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: William Seymour,Max Van Kleek,Reuben Binns,Dave Murray-Rust
title: Respect as a Lens for the Design of AI Systems
title_zh: 尊重是人工智能系统设计的镜头
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES '22)
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES '22)
abstract: Critical examinations of AI systems often apply principles such as fairness, justice, accountability, and safety, which is reflected in AI regulations such as the EU AI Act. Are such principles sufficient to promote the design of systems that support human flourishing? Even if a system is in some sense fair, just, or 'safe', it can nonetheless be exploitative, coercive, inconvenient, or otherwise conflict with cultural, individual, or social values. This paper proposes a dimension of interactional ethics thus far overlooked: the ways AI systems should treat human beings. For this purpose, we explore the philosophical concept of respect: if respect is something everyone needs and deserves, shouldn't technology aim to be respectful? Despite its intuitive simplicity, respect in philosophy is a complex concept with many disparate senses. Like fairness or justice, respect can characterise how people deserve to be treated; but rather than relating primarily to the distribution of benefits or punishments, respect relates to how people regard one another, and how this translates to perception, treatment, and behaviour. We explore respect broadly across several literatures, synthesising perspectives on respect from Kantian, post-Kantian, dramaturgical, and agential realist design perspectives with a goal of drawing together a view of what respect could mean for AI. In so doing, we identify ways that respect may guide us towards more sociable artefacts that ethically and inclusively honour and recognise humans using the rich social language that we have evolved to interact with one another every day.

Are such principles sufficient to promote the design of systems that support human flourishing? Even if a system is in some sense fair, just, or 'safe', it can nonetheless be exploitative, coercive, inconvenient, or otherwise conflict with cultural, individual, or social values. This paper proposes a dimension of interactional ethics thus far overlooked: the ways AI systems should treat human beings. For this purpose, we explore the philosophical concept of respect: if respect is something everyone needs and deserves, shouldn't technology aim to be respectful? Despite its intuitive simplicity, respect in philosophy is a complex concept with many disparate senses. Like fairness or justice, respect can characterise how people deserve to be treated; but rather than relating primarily to the distribution of benefits or punishments, respect relates to how people regard one another, and how this translates to perception, treatment, and behaviour. We explore respect broadly across several literatures, synthesising perspectives on respect from Kantian, post-Kantian, dramaturgical, and agential realist design perspectives with a goal of drawing together a view of what respect could mean for AI. In so doing, we identify ways that respect may guide us towards more sociable artefacts that ethically and inclusively honour and recognise humans using the rich social language that we have evolved to interact with one another every day.
abstract_zh: 对人工智能系统的严格审查通常采用公平、公正、问责和安全等原则，这在《欧盟人工智能法案》等人工智能法规中得到了体现。这些原则是否足以促进支持人类繁荣的系统设计？即使一个系统在某种意义上是公平、公正或“安全”的，它仍然可能具有剥削性、胁迫性、不便性或与文化、个人或社会价值观相冲突。本文提出了迄今为止被忽视的互动伦理维度：人工智能系统应该如何对待人类。为此，我们探讨尊重的哲学概念：如果尊重是每个人都需要和应得的，那么技术不应该以尊重为目标吗？尽管直观上很简单，但哲学中的尊重是一个复杂的概念，具有许多不同的含义。与公平或正义一样，尊重可以表征人们应如何受到对待；但尊重不是主要涉及利益或惩罚的分配，而是涉及人们如何看待彼此，以及这种看法如何转化为看法、待遇和行为。我们在多种文献中广泛探讨了尊重，综合了康德主义、后康德主义、戏剧学和代理现实主义设计视角的尊重观点，目的是总结出尊重对人工智能意味着什么。在此过程中，我们找到了尊重的方式，可以引导我们创造出更具社交性的人工制品，这些人工制品在道德上和包容性上尊重和认可人类，使用我们每天相互交流而进化出的丰富的社会语言。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将'尊重'作为设计人工智能系统的新伦理维度，以补充现有原则如公平性和安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伦理原则（如公平、正义）可能不足以避免系统设计中的剥削、强制或文化冲突，需引入尊重这一被忽视的伦理维度。
AI.method: 通过哲学分析，综合康德主义、后康德主义、戏剧理论及代理现实主义等多学科视角，构建尊重的理论框架。
AI.result: 提出尊重在AI设计中的具体体现方式，指导开发更符合人类社会互动语言的伦理化、包容性技术。
AI.conclusion: 尊重作为核心伦理原则，能推动AI系统更符合人类价值观，需与现有原则共同构成完整的设计规范。

authors_text: Sepehr Assadi,Vaggos Chatziafratis,Jakub Łącki,Vahab Mirrokni,Chen Wang
title: Hierarchical Clustering in Graph Streams: Single-Pass Algorithms and Space Lower Bounds
title_zh: 图流中的层次聚类：单通道算法和空间下界
comment: Full version of the paper accepted to COLT 2022. 55 pages, 3 figures
comments: Full version of the paper accepted to COLT 2022. 55 pages, 3 figures
abstract: The Hierarchical Clustering (HC) problem consists of building a hierarchy of clusters to represent a given dataset. Motivated by the modern large-scale applications, we study the problem in the \streaming model, in which the memory is heavily limited and only a single or very few passes over the input are allowed. Specifically, we investigate whether a good hierarchical clustering can be obtained, or at least whether we can approximately estimate the value of the optimal hierarchy. To measure the quality of a hierarchy, we use the HC minimization objective introduced by Dasgupta. Assuming that the input is an $n$-vertex weighted graph whose edges arrive in a stream, we derive the following results on space-vs-accuracy tradeoffs: * With $O(n\cdot \text{polylog}\,{n})$ space, we develop a single-pass algorithm, whose approximation ratio matches the currently best offline algorithm. * When the space is more limited, namely, $n^{1-o(1)}$, we prove that no algorithm can even estimate the value of optimum HC tree to within an $o(\frac{\log{n}}{\log\log{n}})$ factor, even when allowed $\text{polylog}{\,{n}}$ passes over the input. * In the most stringent setting of $\text{polylog}\,{n}$ space, we rule out algorithms that can even distinguish between "highly"-vs-"poorly" clusterable graphs, namely, graphs that have an $n^{1/2-o(1)}$ factor gap between their HC objective value. * Finally, we prove that any single-pass streaming algorithm that computes an optimal HC tree requires to store almost the entire input even if allowed exponential time. Our algorithmic results establish a general structural result that proves that cut sparsifiers of input graph can preserve cost of "balanced" HC trees to within a constant factor. Our lower bound results include a new streaming lower bound for a novel problem "One-vs-Many-Expanders", which can be of independent interest.

Our algorithmic results establish a general structural result that proves that cut sparsifiers of input graph can preserve cost of "balanced" HC trees to within a constant factor. Our lower bound results include a new streaming lower bound for a novel problem "One-vs-Many-Expanders", which can be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 层次聚类 (HC) 问题包括构建聚类层次结构来表示给定的数据集。受现代大规模应用的推动，我们研究了流模型中的问题，其中内存受到严重限制，并且只允许对输入进行一次或很少的传递。具体来说，我们研究是否可以获得良好的层次聚类，或者至少我们是否可以近似估计最佳层次的值。为了衡量层次结构的质量，我们使用 Dasgupta 引入的 HC 最小化目标。假设输入是一个 $n$ 顶点加权图，其边到达流中，我们在空间与精度权衡上得出以下结果： * 使用 $O(n\cdot \text{polylog}\,{n})$ 空间，我们开发了一种单通道算法，其逼近率与当前最佳离线算法相匹配。 * 当空间更加有限时，即 $n^{1-o(1)}$，我们证明没有算法甚至可以将最佳 HC 树的值估计在 $o(\frac{\log{n}}{\log\log{n}})$ 因子内，即使允许 $\text{polylog}{\,{n}}$ 传递输入。 * 在最严格的 $\text{polylog}\,{n}$ 空间设置中，我们排除了甚至可以区分“高度”与“较差”可聚类图的算法，即在其 HC 目标值之间具有 $n^{1/2-o(1)}$ 因子差距的图。 * 最后，我们证明任何计算最优 HC 树的单通道流算法都需要存储几乎整个输入，即使允许指数时间也是如此。我们的算法结果建立了一个通用的结构结果，证明输入图的切割稀疏器可以将“平衡”HC 树的成本保持在恒定因子内。我们的下界结果包括新问题“一对多扩展器”的新流下界，这可能是独立的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在流模型下进行层次聚类的单次通过算法及空间复杂度下界，分析空间与精度的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 现代大规模数据应用需要处理流式输入，受限于内存和单次遍历约束，需探索层次聚类的可行性及理论边界。
AI.method: 设计单次通过算法并利用图的割稀疏子图结构，结合新型流模型下界证明技术（如“One-vs-Many-Expanders”问题）。
AI.result: 提出空间复杂度为$O(n\\cdot \text{polylog}\,n)$的单次算法，近似比匹配最优离线算法；证明低空间下无法有效估计最优解或区分聚类性差异；单次算法需存储几乎全部输入。
AI.conclusion: 在流模型下，层次聚类需在空间与精度间权衡，算法设计受限于理论下界，为流式聚类提供理论指导。

search_text: Hierarchical Clustering in Graph Streams: Single-Pass Algorithms and Space Lower Bounds 图流中的层次聚类：单通道算法和空间下界 The Hierarchical Clustering (HC) problem consists of building a hierarchy of clusters to represent a given dataset. Motivated by the modern large-scale applications, we study the problem in the \streaming model, in which the memory is heavily limited and only a single or very few passes over the input are allowed. Specifically, we investigate whether a good hierarchical clustering can be obtained, or at least whether we can approximately estimate the value of the optimal hierarchy. To measure the quality of a hierarchy, we use the HC minimization objective introduced by Dasgupta. Assuming that the input is an $n$-vertex weighted graph whose edges arrive in a stream, we derive the following results on space-vs-accuracy tradeoffs: * With $O(n\cdot \text{polylog}\,{n})$ space, we develop a single-pass algorithm, whose approximation ratio matches the currently best offline algorithm. * When the space is more limited, namely, $n^{1-o(1)}$, we prove that no algorithm can even estimate the value of optimum HC tree to within an $o(\frac{\log{n}}{\log\log{n}})$ factor, even when allowed $\text{polylog}{\,{n}}$ passes over the input. * In the most stringent setting of $\text{polylog}\,{n}$ space, we rule out algorithms that can even distinguish between "highly"-vs-"poorly" clusterable graphs, namely, graphs that have an $n^{1/2-o(1)}$ factor gap between their HC objective value. * Finally, we prove that any single-pass streaming algorithm that computes an optimal HC tree requires to store almost the entire input even if allowed exponential time. Our algorithmic results establish a general structural result that proves that cut sparsifiers of input graph can preserve cost of "balanced" HC trees to within a constant factor. Our lower bound results include a new streaming lower bound for a novel problem "One-vs-Many-Expanders", which can be of independent interest. 层次聚类 (HC) 问题包括构建聚类层次结构来表示给定的数据集。受现代大规模应用的推动，我们研究了流模型中的问题，其中内存受到严重限制，并且只允许对输入进行一次或很少的传递。具体来说，我们研究是否可以获得良好的层次聚类，或者至少我们是否可以近似估计最佳层次的值。为了衡量层次结构的质量，我们使用 Dasgupta 引入的 HC 最小化目标。假设输入是一个 $n$ 顶点加权图，其边到达流中，我们在空间与精度权衡上得出以下结果： * 使用 $O(n\cdot \text{polylog}\,{n})$ 空间，我们开发了一种单通道算法，其逼近率与当前最佳离线算法相匹配。 * 当空间更加有限时，即 $n^{1-o(1)}$，我们证明没有算法甚至可以将最佳 HC 树的值估计在 $o(\frac{\log{n}}{\log\log{n}})$ 因子内，即使允许 $\text{polylog}{\,{n}}$ 传递输入。 * 在最严格的 $\text{polylog}\,{n}$ 空间设置中，我们排除了甚至可以区分“高度”与“较差”可聚类图的算法，即在其 HC 目标值之间具有 $n^{1/2-o(1)}$ 因子差距的图。 * 最后，我们证明任何计算最优 HC 树的单通道流算法都需要存储几乎整个输入，即使允许指数时间也是如此。我们的算法结果建立了一个通用的结构结果，证明输入图的切割稀疏器可以将“平衡”HC 树的成本保持在恒定因子内。我们的下界结果包括新问题“一对多扩展器”的新流下界，这可能是独立的兴趣。 本文研究在流模型下进行层次聚类的单次通过算法及空间复杂度下界，分析空间与精度的权衡关系。 Sepehr Assadi,Vaggos Chatziafratis,Jakub Łącki,Vahab Mirrokni,Chen Wang cs.DS

authors_text: Raghu Bollapragada,Tyler Chen,Rachel Ward
title: On the fast convergence of minibatch heavy ball momentum
title_zh: 论小批量重球动量的快速收敛
abstract: Simple stochastic momentum methods are widely used in machine learning optimization, but their good practical performance is at odds with an absence of theoretical guarantees of acceleration in the literature. In this work, we aim to close the gap between theory and practice by showing that stochastic heavy ball momentum retains the fast linear rate of (deterministic) heavy ball momentum on quadratic optimization problems, at least when minibatching with a sufficiently large batch size. The algorithm we study can be interpreted as an accelerated randomized Kaczmarz algorithm with minibatching and heavy ball momentum. The analysis relies on carefully decomposing the momentum transition matrix, and using new spectral norm concentration bounds for products of independent random matrices. We provide numerical illustrations demonstrating that our bounds are reasonably sharp.
summary: Simple stochastic momentum methods are widely used in machine learning optimization, but their good practical performance is at odds with an absence of theoretical guarantees of acceleration in the literature. In this work, we aim to close the gap between theory and practice by showing that stochastic heavy ball momentum retains the fast linear rate of (deterministic) heavy ball momentum on quadratic optimization problems, at least when minibatching with a sufficiently large batch size. The algorithm we study can be interpreted as an accelerated randomized Kaczmarz algorithm with minibatching and heavy ball momentum. The analysis relies on carefully decomposing the momentum transition matrix, and using new spectral norm concentration bounds for products of independent random matrices. We provide numerical illustrations demonstrating that our bounds are reasonably sharp.
abstract_zh: 简单的随机动量方法广泛应用于机器学习优化中，但其良好的实际性能与文献中缺乏加速的理论保证相矛盾。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过证明随机重球动量在二次优化问题上保留（确定性）重球动量的快速线性速率（至少在具有足够大批量大小的小批量处理时）来缩小理论与实践之间的差距。我们研究的算法可以解释为具有小批量和重球动量的加速随机 Kaczmarz 算法。该分析依赖于仔细分解动量转移矩阵，并对独立随机矩阵的乘积使用新的谱范数浓度界限。我们提供了数字说明，证明我们的界限相当清晰。

AI.tldr: 本文研究小批量重球动量法在二次优化问题中的快速收敛性，旨在弥合随机动量方法的理论与实践差距。
AI.motivation: 尽管随机动量方法在实践中表现良好，但缺乏理论上的加速保证，需填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 通过分解动量转移矩阵，并利用独立随机矩阵乘积的谱范数集中界进行分析。
AI.result: 证明了在足够大的批量大小下，随机重球动量保持快速线性收敛率，并通过数值实验验证了理论界限的合理性。
AI.conclusion: 小批量重球动量法在理论上具有加速潜力，可能推动其在优化问题中的应用。

authors_text: JoonHo Jang,Byeonghu Na,DongHyeok Shin,Mingi Ji,Kyungwoo Song,Il-Chul Moon
title: Unknown-Aware Domain Adversarial Learning for Open-Set Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于开放集域适应的未知域对抗学习
abstract: Open-Set Domain Adaptation (OSDA) assumes that a target domain contains unknown classes, which are not discovered in a source domain. Existing domain adversarial learning methods are not suitable for OSDA because distribution matching with $\textit{unknown}$ classes leads to negative transfer. Previous OSDA methods have focused on matching the source and the target distribution by only utilizing $\textit{known}$ classes. However, this $\textit{known}$-only matching may fail to learn the target-$\textit{unknown}$ feature space. Therefore, we propose Unknown-Aware Domain Adversarial Learning (UADAL), which $\textit{aligns}$ the source and the target-$\textit{known}$ distribution while simultaneously $\textit{segregating}$ the target-$\textit{unknown}$ distribution in the feature alignment procedure. We provide theoretical analyses on the optimized state of the proposed $\textit{unknown-aware}$ feature alignment, so we can guarantee both $\textit{alignment}$ and $\textit{segregation}$ theoretically. Empirically, we evaluate UADAL on the benchmark datasets, which shows that UADAL outperforms other methods with better feature alignments by reporting state-of-the-art performances.
summary: Open-Set Domain Adaptation (OSDA) assumes that a target domain contains unknown classes, which are not discovered in a source domain. Existing domain adversarial learning methods are not suitable for OSDA because distribution matching with $\textit{unknown}$ classes leads to negative transfer. Previous OSDA methods have focused on matching the source and the target distribution by only utilizing $\textit{known}$ classes. However, this $\textit{known}$-only matching may fail to learn the target-$\textit{unknown}$ feature space. Therefore, we propose Unknown-Aware Domain Adversarial Learning (UADAL), which $\textit{aligns}$ the source and the target-$\textit{known}$ distribution while simultaneously $\textit{segregating}$ the target-$\textit{unknown}$ distribution in the feature alignment procedure. We provide theoretical analyses on the optimized state of the proposed $\textit{unknown-aware}$ feature alignment, so we can guarantee both $\textit{alignment}$ and $\textit{segregation}$ theoretically. Empirically, we evaluate UADAL on the benchmark datasets, which shows that UADAL outperforms other methods with better feature alignments by reporting state-of-the-art performances.
abstract_zh: 开集域适应 (OSDA) 假设目标域包含未知类，这些类在源域中未发现。现有的领域对抗性学习方法不适合 OSDA，因为与 $\textit{unknown}$ 类的分布匹配会导致负迁移。以前的 OSDA 方法侧重于仅利用 $\textit{known}$ 类来匹配源分布和目标分布。然而，这种仅限 $\textit{known}$ 的匹配可能无法学习目标 $\textit{unknown}$ 特征空间。因此，我们提出未知领域对抗学习（UADAL），它在特征对齐过程中$\textit{align}$源和目标$\textit{known}$分布，同时$\textit{segregating}$目标-$\textit{unknown}$分布。我们对所提出的$\textit{unknown-aware}$特征对齐的优化状态进行了理论分析，因此我们可以在理论上保证$\textit{alignment}$和$\textit{segregation}$。根据经验，我们在基准数据集上评估 UADAL，这表明 UADAL 通过报告最先进的性能，以更好的特征对齐优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向开放集域适应（OSDA）的未知感知域对抗学习方法（UADAL），旨在解决目标域中存在源域未知类别时的域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有域对抗方法在处理OSDA时因未考虑未知类别导致负迁移，仅依赖已知类别对齐可能无法学习目标未知特征空间。
AI.method: UADAL在特征对齐过程中同时实现源域与目标已知类别的对齐，并通过理论分析保证目标未知类别的分离，从而避免负迁移。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，UADAL在特征对齐效果上优于其他方法，达到当时最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入未知感知的特征对齐与分离机制，UADAL有效解决了开放集域适应中未知类别的处理难题。

tldr: 本文提出了一种面向开放集域适应（OSDA）的未知感知域对抗学习方法（UADAL），旨在解决目标域中存在源域未知类别时的域适应问题。
motivation: 现有域对抗方法在处理OSDA时因未考虑未知类别导致负迁移，仅依赖已知类别对齐可能无法学习目标未知特征空间。
method: UADAL在特征对齐过程中同时实现源域与目标已知类别的对齐，并通过理论分析保证目标未知类别的分离，从而避免负迁移。
result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，UADAL在特征对齐效果上优于其他方法，达到当时最先进的性能水平。
conclusion: 通过引入未知感知的特征对齐与分离机制，UADAL有效解决了开放集域适应中未知类别的处理难题。
search_text: Unknown-Aware Domain Adversarial Learning for Open-Set Domain Adaptation 用于开放集域适应的未知域对抗学习 Open-Set Domain Adaptation (OSDA) assumes that a target domain contains unknown classes, which are not discovered in a source domain. Existing domain adversarial learning methods are not suitable for OSDA because distribution matching with $\textit{unknown}$ classes leads to negative transfer. Previous OSDA methods have focused on matching the source and the target distribution by only utilizing $\textit{known}$ classes. However, this $\textit{known}$-only matching may fail to learn the target-$\textit{unknown}$ feature space. Therefore, we propose Unknown-Aware Domain Adversarial Learning (UADAL), which $\textit{aligns}$ the source and the target-$\textit{known}$ distribution while simultaneously $\textit{segregating}$ the target-$\textit{unknown}$ distribution in the feature alignment procedure. We provide theoretical analyses on the optimized state of the proposed $\textit{unknown-aware}$ feature alignment, so we can guarantee both $\textit{alignment}$ and $\textit{segregation}$ theoretically. Empirically, we evaluate UADAL on the benchmark datasets, which shows that UADAL outperforms other methods with better feature alignments by reporting state-of-the-art performances. 开集域适应 (OSDA) 假设目标域包含未知类，这些类在源域中未发现。现有的领域对抗性学习方法不适合 OSDA，因为与 $\textit{unknown}$ 类的分布匹配会导致负迁移。以前的 OSDA 方法侧重于仅利用 $\textit{known}$ 类来匹配源分布和目标分布。然而，这种仅限 $\textit{known}$ 的匹配可能无法学习目标 $\textit{unknown}$ 特征空间。因此，我们提出未知领域对抗学习（UADAL），它在特征对齐过程中$\textit{align}$源和目标$\textit{known}$分布，同时$\textit{segregating}$目标-$\textit{unknown}$分布。我们对所提出的$\textit{unknown-aware}$特征对齐的优化状态进行了理论分析，因此我们可以在理论上保证$\textit{alignment}$和$\textit{segregation}$。根据经验，我们在基准数据集上评估 UADAL，这表明 UADAL 通过报告最先进的性能，以更好的特征对齐优于其他方法。 本文提出了一种面向开放集域适应（OSDA）的未知感知域对抗学习方法（UADAL），旨在解决目标域中存在源域未知类别时的域适应问题。 JoonHo Jang,Byeonghu Na,DongHyeok Shin,Mingi Ji,Kyungwoo Song,Il-Chul Moon cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Guangyuan Jiang,Manjie Xu,Song-Chun Zhu,Wenjuan Han,Chi Zhang,Yixin Zhu
title: Evaluating and Inducing Personality in Pre-trained Language Models
title_zh: 在预训练语言模型中评估和诱导个性
abstract: Standardized and quantified evaluation of machine behaviors is a crux of understanding LLMs. In this study, we draw inspiration from psychometric studies by leveraging human personality theory as a tool for studying machine behaviors. Originating as a philosophical quest for human behaviors, the study of personality delves into how individuals differ in thinking, feeling, and behaving. Toward building and understanding human-like social machines, we are motivated to ask: Can we assess machine behaviors by leveraging human psychometric tests in a principled and quantitative manner? If so, can we induce a specific personality in LLMs? To answer these questions, we introduce the Machine Personality Inventory (MPI) tool for studying machine behaviors; MPI follows standardized personality tests, built upon the Big Five Personality Factors (Big Five) theory and personality assessment inventories. By systematically evaluating LLMs with MPI, we provide the first piece of evidence demonstrating the efficacy of MPI in studying LLMs behaviors. We further devise a Personality Prompting (P^2) method to induce LLMs with specific personalities in a controllable way, capable of producing diverse and verifiable behaviors. We hope this work sheds light on future studies by adopting personality as the essential indicator for various downstream tasks, and could further motivate research into equally intriguing human-like machine behaviors.
summary: Standardized and quantified evaluation of machine behaviors is a crux of understanding LLMs. In this study, we draw inspiration from psychometric studies by leveraging human personality theory as a tool for studying machine behaviors. Originating as a philosophical quest for human behaviors, the study of personality delves into how individuals differ in thinking, feeling, and behaving. Toward building and understanding human-like social machines, we are motivated to ask: Can we assess machine behaviors by leveraging human psychometric tests in a principled and quantitative manner? If so, can we induce a specific personality in LLMs? To answer these questions, we introduce the Machine Personality Inventory (MPI) tool for studying machine behaviors; MPI follows standardized personality tests, built upon the Big Five Personality Factors (Big Five) theory and personality assessment inventories. By systematically evaluating LLMs with MPI, we provide the first piece of evidence demonstrating the efficacy of MPI in studying LLMs behaviors. We further devise a Personality Prompting (P^2) method to induce LLMs with specific personalities in a controllable way, capable of producing diverse and verifiable behaviors. We hope this work sheds light on future studies by adopting personality as the essential indicator for various downstream tasks, and could further motivate research into equally intriguing human-like machine behaviors.
abstract_zh: 对机器行为的标准化和量化评估是理解法学硕士的关键。在这项研究中，我们利用人类人格理论作为研究机器行为的工具，从心理测量研究中汲取灵感。人格研究起源于对人类行为的哲学探索，深入研究个体在思维、情感和行为方面的差异。为了构建和理解类人社交机器，我们不禁要问：我们能否以原则性和定量的方式利用人类心理测试来评估机器行为？如果是这样，我们能否在法学硕士中引入特定的个性？为了回答这些问题，我们引入了机器个性清单（MPI）工具来研究机器行为； MPI 遵循基于大五人格因素（大五）理论和人格评估量表的标准化人格测试。通过使用 MPI 系统地评估法学硕士，我们提供了第一个证据，证明 MPI 在研究法学硕士行为方面的有效性。我们进一步设计了一种人格提示（P^2）方法，以可控的方式诱导具有特定人格的法学硕士，能够产生多样化且可验证的行为。我们希望这项工作通过采用个性作为各种下游任务的基本指标来为未来的研究带来启示，并可以进一步推动对同样有趣的类人机器行为的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人格理论的机器人格评估工具（MPI）和人格诱导方法（P^2），用于量化评估并引导预训练语言模型（LLMs）表现出特定人格特征。
AI.motivation: 通过借鉴心理学中的人格测评理论，探索是否能以系统化、量化的方式评估机器行为，并进一步实现对LLMs人格的可控诱导，从而推动类人社交机器人的研究。
AI.method: 构建基于大五人格理论的机器人格量表（MPI），通过标准化测试评估LLMs行为；设计人格提示方法（P^2），利用特定指令诱导模型生成符合目标人格的可控输出。
AI.result: 验证了MPI在评估LLMs行为中的有效性，展示了P^2方法能成功诱导模型产生多样化且可验证的人格相关行为。
AI.conclusion: 人格可作为LLMs行为分析的核心指标，为下游任务提供新视角，并激励未来研究更复杂的类人机器行为特性。

authors_text: Abdulah Fawaz,Logan Z. Williams,A. David Edwards,Emma Robinson
title: A Deep Generative Model of Neonatal Cortical Surface Development
title_zh: 新生儿皮质表面发育的深层生成模型
abstract: The neonatal cortical surface is known to be affected by preterm birth, and the subsequent changes to cortical organisation have been associated with poorer neurodevelopmental outcomes. Deep Generative models have the potential to lead to clinically interpretable models of disease, but developing these on the cortical surface is challenging since established techniques for learning convolutional filters are inappropriate on non-flat topologies. To close this gap, we implement a surface-based CycleGAN using mixture model CNNs (MoNet) to translate sphericalised neonatal cortical surface features (curvature and T1w/T2w cortical myelin) between different stages of cortical maturity. Results show our method is able to reliably predict changes in individual patterns of cortical organisation at later stages of gestation, validated by comparison to longitudinal data; and translate appearance between preterm and term gestation (> 37 weeks gestation), validated through comparison with a trained term/preterm classifier. Simulated differences in cortical maturation are consistent with observations in the literature.
summary: The neonatal cortical surface is known to be affected by preterm birth, and the subsequent changes to cortical organisation have been associated with poorer neurodevelopmental outcomes. Deep Generative models have the potential to lead to clinically interpretable models of disease, but developing these on the cortical surface is challenging since established techniques for learning convolutional filters are inappropriate on non-flat topologies. To close this gap, we implement a surface-based CycleGAN using mixture model CNNs (MoNet) to translate sphericalised neonatal cortical surface features (curvature and T1w/T2w cortical myelin) between different stages of cortical maturity. Results show our method is able to reliably predict changes in individual patterns of cortical organisation at later stages of gestation, validated by comparison to longitudinal data; and translate appearance between preterm and term gestation (> 37 weeks gestation), validated through comparison with a trained term/preterm classifier. Simulated differences in cortical maturation are consistent with observations in the literature.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，新生儿皮质表面会受到早产的影响，随后皮质组织的变化与较差的神经发育结果相关。深度生成模型有可能产生临床上可解释的疾病模型，但在皮质表面开发这些模型具有挑战性，因为用于学习卷积滤波器的现有技术不适合非平坦拓扑。为了弥补这一差距，我们使用混合模型 CNN (MoNet) 实现了基于表面的 CycleGAN，以在皮质成熟的不同阶段之间转换球形新生儿皮质表面特征（曲率和 T1w/T2w 皮质髓磷脂）。结果表明，我们的方法能够可靠地预测妊娠后期皮质组织个体模式的变化，并通过与纵向数据的比较进行验证；并翻译早产和足月妊娠（> 37 周妊娠）之间的外观，通过与训练有素的足月/早产分类器进行比较进行验证。皮质成熟的模拟差异与文献中的观察结果一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度生成模型的方法，用于模拟和预测新生儿皮层表面发育过程。
AI.motivation: 早产会显著影响新生儿皮层结构发育，而现有卷积神经网络难以处理非平面拓扑结构的皮层表面数据，限制了生成模型在该领域的应用。
AI.method: 采用基于曲面的CycleGAN框架，结合混合模型卷积网络（MoNet），实现对球形化新生儿皮层曲率和髓鞘化特征的跨发育阶段转换。
AI.result: 模型能准确预测个体皮层组织模式的后期变化，且成功实现早产与足月新生儿皮层表观特征的相互转换，通过分类器验证了转换效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为研究皮层发育机制提供了新工具，可潜在应用于临床疾病可解释性建模与发育评估。

Simulated differences in cortical maturation are consistent with observations in the literature. 众所周知，新生儿皮质表面会受到早产的影响，随后皮质组织的变化与较差的神经发育结果相关。深度生成模型有可能产生临床上可解释的疾病模型，但在皮质表面开发这些模型具有挑战性，因为用于学习卷积滤波器的现有技术不适合非平坦拓扑。为了弥补这一差距，我们使用混合模型 CNN (MoNet) 实现了基于表面的 CycleGAN，以在皮质成熟的不同阶段之间转换球形新生儿皮质表面特征（曲率和 T1w/T2w 皮质髓磷脂）。结果表明，我们的方法能够可靠地预测妊娠后期皮质组织个体模式的变化，并通过与纵向数据的比较进行验证；并翻译早产和足月妊娠（> 37 周妊娠）之间的外观，通过与训练有素的足月/早产分类器进行比较进行验证。皮质成熟的模拟差异与文献中的观察结果一致。 本文提出一种基于深度生成模型的方法，用于模拟和预测新生儿皮层表面发育过程。 Abdulah Fawaz,Logan Z. Williams,A. David Edwards,Emma Robinson q-bio.NC,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Javier Laplaza,Joan Jaume Oliver,Ramón Romero,Alberto Sanfeliu,Anaís Garrell
title: Body Gesture Recognition to Control a Social Robot
title_zh: 通过身体手势识别来控制社交机器人
abstract: In this work, we propose a gesture based language to allow humans to interact with robots using their body in a natural way. We have created a new gesture detection model using neural networks and a custom dataset of humans performing a set of body gestures to train our network. Furthermore, we compare body gesture communication with other communication channels to acknowledge the importance of adding this knowledge to robots. The presented approach is extensively validated in diverse simulations and real-life experiments with non-trained volunteers. This attains remarkable results and shows that it is a valuable framework for social robotics applications, such as human robot collaboration or human-robot interaction.
summary: In this work, we propose a gesture based language to allow humans to interact with robots using their body in a natural way. We have created a new gesture detection model using neural networks and a custom dataset of humans performing a set of body gestures to train our network. Furthermore, we compare body gesture communication with other communication channels to acknowledge the importance of adding this knowledge to robots. The presented approach is extensively validated in diverse simulations and real-life experiments with non-trained volunteers. This attains remarkable results and shows that it is a valuable framework for social robotics applications, such as human robot collaboration or human-robot interaction.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于手势的语言，允许人类以自然的方式使用他们的身体与机器人进行交互。我们使用神经网络和人类执行一组身体姿势的自定义数据集创建了一个新的姿势检测模型来训练我们的网络。此外，我们将身体手势通信与其他通信渠道进行比较，以认识到将这些知识添加到机器人中的重要性。所提出的方法在未经训练的志愿者的各种模拟和现实实验中得到了广泛的验证。这取得了显着的成果，并表明它是社交机器人应用的一个有价值的框架，例如人机协作或人机交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于身体手势识别的系统，用于控制社交机器人，以实现更自然的人机交互方式。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人交互方式存在局限性，引入身体语言可提升人机交互的自然性与效率，从而增强社交机器人的实用性。
AI.method: 采用神经网络构建手势检测模型，结合自定义手势数据集进行训练，并通过模拟与真实实验验证其有效性，同时对比其他通信方式。
AI.result: 在多种模拟和真实实验中验证了该框架的有效性，结果显示其在社交机器人应用中具有较高的准确性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为社交机器人的人机协作与交互提供了有效的技术框架，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Tong Liu,Lei Lei,Kan Zheng,Kuan Zhang
title: Autonomous Platoon Control with Integrated Deep Reinforcement Learning and Dynamic Programming
title_zh: 集成深度强化学习和动态规划的自主排控制
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is regarded as a potential method for car-following control and has been mostly studied to support a single following vehicle. However, it is more challenging to learn a stable and efficient car-following policy when there are multiple following vehicles in a platoon, especially with unpredictable leading vehicle behavior. In this context, we adopt an integrated DRL and Dynamic Programming (DP) approach to learn autonomous platoon control policies, which embeds the Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) algorithm into a finite-horizon value iteration framework. Although the DP framework can improve the stability and performance of DDPG, it has the limitations of lower sampling and training efficiency. In this paper, we propose an algorithm, namely Finite-Horizon-DDPG with Sweeping through reduced state space using Stationary approximation (FH-DDPG-SS), which uses three key ideas to overcome the above limitations, i.e., transferring network weights backward in time, stationary policy approximation for earlier time steps, and sweeping through reduced state space. In order to verify the effectiveness of FH-DDPG-SS, simulation using real driving data is performed, where the performance of FH-DDPG-SS is compared with those of the benchmark algorithms. Finally, platoon safety and string stability for FH-DDPG-SS are demonstrated.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is regarded as a potential method for car-following control and has been mostly studied to support a single following vehicle. However, it is more challenging to learn a stable and efficient car-following policy when there are multiple following vehicles in a platoon, especially with unpredictable leading vehicle behavior. In this context, we adopt an integrated DRL and Dynamic Programming (DP) approach to learn autonomous platoon control policies, which embeds the Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) algorithm into a finite-horizon value iteration framework. Although the DP framework can improve the stability and performance of DDPG, it has the limitations of lower sampling and training efficiency. In this paper, we propose an algorithm, namely Finite-Horizon-DDPG with Sweeping through reduced state space using Stationary approximation (FH-DDPG-SS), which uses three key ideas to overcome the above limitations, i.e., transferring network weights backward in time, stationary policy approximation for earlier time steps, and sweeping through reduced state space. In order to verify the effectiveness of FH-DDPG-SS, simulation using real driving data is performed, where the performance of FH-DDPG-SS is compared with those of the benchmark algorithms. Finally, platoon safety and string stability for FH-DDPG-SS are demonstrated.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）被认为是一种潜在的跟车控制方法，主要研究用于支持单个跟车。然而，当排中存在多辆跟车时，尤其是在前车行为不可预测的情况下，学习稳定且高效的跟车策略更具挑战性。在此背景下，我们采用集成的 DRL 和动态规划（DP）方法来学习自主排控制策略，该方法将深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法嵌入到有限范围值迭代框架中。 DP框架虽然可以提高DDPG的稳定性和性能，但存在采样和训练效率较低的局限性。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法，即使用平稳近似扫描缩减状态空间的有限地平线DDPG（FH-DDPG-SS），该算法使用三个关键思想来克服上述限制，即及时向后传输网络权重、早期时间步的平稳策略近似以及扫描缩减状态空间。为了验证FH-DDPG-SS的有效性，使用真实驾驶数据进行仿真，将FH-DDPG-SS的性能与基准算法的性能进行比较。最后，演示了 FH-DDPG-SS 的排安全性和串稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习与动态规划的自主车队控制方法，解决多车协同中的稳定性与效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习在单车跟车控制中表现良好，但面对多车车队时因领导车行为不可预测导致策略不稳定，且动态规划框架存在训练效率低的缺陷。
AI.method: 提出FH-DDPG-SS算法，通过反向转移网络权重、早期时间步平稳策略近似及缩减状态空间扫描三方面优化，融合DDPG与动态规划框架。
AI.result: 基于真实驾驶数据的仿真验证表明，该方法在车队安全性和串行稳定性上优于基准算法，有效提升多车协同控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 集成DRL与DP的方法可有效解决多车车队控制难题，为自动驾驶车队提供稳定高效的策略框架。

authors_text: Shiqi Zhao,Jie Yang,Yankun Xu,Mohamad Sawan
title: Binary Single-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network for Seizure Prediction
title_zh: 用于癫痫预测的二元单维卷积神经网络
comment: 2020 IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS)
comments: 2020 IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS)
abstract: Nowadays, several deep learning methods are proposed to tackle the challenge of epileptic seizure prediction. However, these methods still cannot be implemented as part of implantable or efficient wearable devices due to their large hardware and corresponding high-power consumption. They usually require complex feature extraction process, large memory for storing high precision parameters and complex arithmetic computation, which greatly increases required hardware resources. Moreover, available yield poor prediction performance, because they adopt network architecture directly from image recognition applications fails to accurately consider the characteristics of EEG signals. We propose in this paper a hardware-friendly network called Binary Single-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network (BSDCNN) intended for epileptic seizure prediction. BSDCNN utilizes 1D convolutional kernels to improve prediction performance. All parameters are binarized to reduce the required computation and storage, except the first layer. Overall area under curve, sensitivity, and false prediction rate reaches 0.915, 89.26%, 0.117/h and 0.970, 94.69%, 0.095/h on American Epilepsy Society Seizure Prediction Challenge (AES) dataset and the CHB-MIT one respectively. The proposed architecture outperforms recent works while offering 7.2 and 25.5 times reductions on the size of parameter and computation, respectively.
summary: Nowadays, several deep learning methods are proposed to tackle the challenge of epileptic seizure prediction. However, these methods still cannot be implemented as part of implantable or efficient wearable devices due to their large hardware and corresponding high-power consumption. They usually require complex feature extraction process, large memory for storing high precision parameters and complex arithmetic computation, which greatly increases required hardware resources. Moreover, available yield poor prediction performance, because they adopt network architecture directly from image recognition applications fails to accurately consider the characteristics of EEG signals. We propose in this paper a hardware-friendly network called Binary Single-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network (BSDCNN) intended for epileptic seizure prediction. BSDCNN utilizes 1D convolutional kernels to improve prediction performance. All parameters are binarized to reduce the required computation and storage, except the first layer. Overall area under curve, sensitivity, and false prediction rate reaches 0.915, 89.26%, 0.117/h and 0.970, 94.69%, 0.095/h on American Epilepsy Society Seizure Prediction Challenge (AES) dataset and the CHB-MIT one respectively. The proposed architecture outperforms recent works while offering 7.2 and 25.5 times reductions on the size of parameter and computation, respectively.
abstract_zh: 如今，提出了几种深度学习方法来应对癫痫发作预测的挑战。然而，由于其庞大的硬件和相应的高功耗，这些方法仍然无法作为可植入或高效可穿戴设备的一部分来实现。它们通常需要复杂的特征提取过程、用于存储高精度参数的大内存以及复杂的算术计算，这大大增加了所需的硬件资源。此外，可用的预测性能较差，因为它们采用直接来自图像识别应用的网络架构，无法准确考虑脑电信号的特征。我们在本文中提出了一种硬件友好的网络，称为二元单维卷积神经网络（BSDCNN），旨在用于癫痫发作预测。 BSDCNN 利用一维卷积核来提高预测性能。除了第一层之外，所有参数都被二值化以减少所需的计算和存储。在美国癫痫协会癫痫预测挑战 (AES) 数据集和 CHB-MIT 数据集上，总体曲线下面积、灵敏度和错误预测率分别达到 0.915、89.26%、0.117/h 和 0.970、94.69%、0.095/h。所提出的架构优于最近的工作，同时参数大小和计算量分别减少了 7.2 倍和 25.5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种硬件友好的二值单维卷积神经网络（BSDCNN），用于癫痫发作预测，旨在解决现有深度学习方法在可穿戴设备中应用的硬件和功耗限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有癫痫发作预测的深度学习方法因计算复杂度高、参数存储需求大且未针对脑电图（EEG）信号特性优化，难以应用于可植入或高效可穿戴设备。
AI.method: 设计BSDCNN网络，采用单维卷积核提取EEG特征，除第一层外所有参数二值化以降低计算和存储需求，优化网络架构以适应EEG信号特性。
AI.result: 在AES和CHB-MIT数据集上，BSDCNN的AUC分别达到0.915和0.970，敏感度分别为89.26%和94.69%，误报率分别为0.117/h和0.095/h，参数量和计算量较现有方法减少7.2倍和25.5倍。
AI.conclusion: BSDCNN在保持高预测性能的同时显著降低硬件资源需求，为癫痫发作预测的可穿戴设备应用提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Binary Single-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network for Seizure Prediction 用于癫痫预测的二元单维卷积神经网络 Nowadays, several deep learning methods are proposed to tackle the challenge of epileptic seizure prediction. However, these methods still cannot be implemented as part of implantable or efficient wearable devices due to their large hardware and corresponding high-power consumption. They usually require complex feature extraction process, large memory for storing high precision parameters and complex arithmetic computation, which greatly increases required hardware resources. Moreover, available yield poor prediction performance, because they adopt network architecture directly from image recognition applications fails to accurately consider the characteristics of EEG signals. We propose in this paper a hardware-friendly network called Binary Single-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network (BSDCNN) intended for epileptic seizure prediction. BSDCNN utilizes 1D convolutional kernels to improve prediction performance. All parameters are binarized to reduce the required computation and storage, except the first layer. Overall area under curve, sensitivity, and false prediction rate reaches 0.915, 89.26%, 0.117/h and 0.970, 94.69%, 0.095/h on American Epilepsy Society Seizure Prediction Challenge (AES) dataset and the CHB-MIT one respectively. The proposed architecture outperforms recent works while offering 7.2 and 25.5 times reductions on the size of parameter and computation, respectively. 如今，提出了几种深度学习方法来应对癫痫发作预测的挑战。然而，由于其庞大的硬件和相应的高功耗，这些方法仍然无法作为可植入或高效可穿戴设备的一部分来实现。它们通常需要复杂的特征提取过程、用于存储高精度参数的大内存以及复杂的算术计算，这大大增加了所需的硬件资源。此外，可用的预测性能较差，因为它们采用直接来自图像识别应用的网络架构，无法准确考虑脑电信号的特征。我们在本文中提出了一种硬件友好的网络，称为二元单维卷积神经网络（BSDCNN），旨在用于癫痫发作预测。 BSDCNN 利用一维卷积核来提高预测性能。除了第一层之外，所有参数都被二值化以减少所需的计算和存储。在美国癫痫协会癫痫预测挑战 (AES) 数据集和 CHB-MIT 数据集上，总体曲线下面积、灵敏度和错误预测率分别达到 0.915、89.26%、0.117/h 和 0.970、94.69%、0.095/h。所提出的架构优于最近的工作，同时参数大小和计算量分别减少了 7.2 倍和 25.5 倍。 本文提出了一种硬件友好的二值单维卷积神经网络（BSDCNN），用于癫痫发作预测，旨在解决现有深度学习方法在可穿戴设备中应用的硬件和功耗限制问题。 Shiqi Zhao,Jie Yang,Yankun Xu,Mohamad Sawan eess.SP,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Zerui Chen,Sonia Xhyn Teo,Andrie Ochtman,Shier Nee Saw,Nicholas Cheng,Eric Tien Siang Lim,Murphy Lyu,Hwee Kuan Lee
title: A Deep Learning Network for the Classification of Intracardiac Electrograms in Atrial Tachycardia
title_zh: 用于房性心动过速心内电图分类的深度学习网络
abstract: A key technology enabling the success of catheter ablation treatment for atrial tachycardia is activation mapping, which relies on manual local activation time (LAT) annotation of all acquired intracardiac electrogram (EGM) signals. This is a time-consuming and error-prone procedure, due to the difficulty in identifying the signal activation peaks for fractionated signals. This work presents a Deep Learning approach for the automated classification of EGM signals into three different types: normal, abnormal, and unclassified, which forms part of the LAT annotation pipeline, and contributes towards bypassing the need for manual annotations of the LAT. The Deep Learning network, the CNN-LSTM model, is a hybrid network architecture which combines convolutional neural network (CNN) layers with long short-term memory (LSTM) layers. 1452 EGM signals from a total of 9 patients undergoing clinically-indicated 3D cardiac mapping were used for the training, validation and testing of our models. From our findings, the CNN-LSTM model achieved an accuracy of 81% for the balanced dataset. For comparison, we separately developed a rule-based Decision Trees model which attained an accuracy of 67% for the same balanced dataset. Our work elucidates that analysing the EGM signals using a set of explicitly specified rules as proposed by the Decision Trees model is not suitable as EGM signals are complex. The CNN-LSTM model, on the other hand, has the ability to learn the complex, intrinsic features within the signals and identify useful features to differentiate the EGM signals.
summary: A key technology enabling the success of catheter ablation treatment for atrial tachycardia is activation mapping, which relies on manual local activation time (LAT) annotation of all acquired intracardiac electrogram (EGM) signals. This is a time-consuming and error-prone procedure, due to the difficulty in identifying the signal activation peaks for fractionated signals. This work presents a Deep Learning approach for the automated classification of EGM signals into three different types: normal, abnormal, and unclassified, which forms part of the LAT annotation pipeline, and contributes towards bypassing the need for manual annotations of the LAT. The Deep Learning network, the CNN-LSTM model, is a hybrid network architecture which combines convolutional neural network (CNN) layers with long short-term memory (LSTM) layers. 1452 EGM signals from a total of 9 patients undergoing clinically-indicated 3D cardiac mapping were used for the training, validation and testing of our models. From our findings, the CNN-LSTM model achieved an accuracy of 81% for the balanced dataset. For comparison, we separately developed a rule-based Decision Trees model which attained an accuracy of 67% for the same balanced dataset. Our work elucidates that analysing the EGM signals using a set of explicitly specified rules as proposed by the Decision Trees model is not suitable as EGM signals are complex. The CNN-LSTM model, on the other hand, has the ability to learn the complex, intrinsic features within the signals and identify useful features to differentiate the EGM signals.
abstract_zh: 房性心动过速导管消融治疗成功的一项关键技术是激活映射，它依赖于所有采集的心内电图 (EGM) 信号的手动局部激活时间 (LAT) 注释。由于难以识别分级信号的信号激活峰值，这是一个耗时且容易出错的过程。这项工作提出了一种深度学习方法，用于将 EGM 信号自动分类为三种不同类型：正常、异常和未分类，这构成了 LAT 注释管道的一部分，有助于绕过 LAT 手动注释的需要。深度学习网络，即 CNN-LSTM 模型，是一种混合网络架构，它将卷积神经网络 (CNN) 层与长短期记忆 (LSTM) 层相结合。来自总共 9 名接受临床指示 3D 心脏测绘的患者的 1452 个 EGM 信号用于我们模型的训练、验证和测试。根据我们的研究结果，CNN-LSTM 模型在平衡数据集上的准确率达到 81%。为了进行比较，我们单独开发了一个基于规则的决策树模型，对于相同的平衡数据集，其准确率达到了 67%。我们的工作阐明，由于 EGM 信号很复杂，因此使用决策树模型提出的一组明确指定的规则来分析 EGM 信号是不合适的。另一方面，CNN-LSTM 模型能够学习信号中复杂的内在特征，并识别有用的特征来区分 EGM 信号。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的卷积神经网络与长短期记忆网络（CNN-LSTM）混合架构，用于对心房心动过速的腔内电图（EGM）信号进行分类，以替代传统手动标注的局部激活时间（LAT）方法。
AI.motivation: 目前腔内电图信号的局部激活时间（LAT）标注依赖人工操作，耗时且易出错，尤其在处理碎裂信号时难以识别激活峰。需开发自动化方法以提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的混合模型（CNN-LSTM），利用1452个临床患者EGM信号进行训练、验证和测试，并与基于规则的决策树模型对比。
AI.result: CNN-LSTM模型在平衡数据集上达到81%的分类准确率，显著优于决策树模型的67%准确率，证明深度学习能更有效地提取EGM信号的复杂特征。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法（CNN-LSTM）能够有效捕捉EGM信号的内在复杂特征，优于传统规则驱动模型，为心房心动过速的自动LAT标注提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Muhammad Turab,Teerath Kumar,Malika Bendechache,Takfarinas Saber
title: Investigating Multi-Feature Selection and Ensembling for Audio Classification
title_zh: 研究音频分类的多特征选择和集成
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) algorithms have shown impressive performance in diverse domains. Among them, audio has attracted many researchers over the last couple of decades due to some interesting patterns--particularly in classification of audio data. For better performance of audio classification, feature selection and combination play a key role as they have the potential to make or break the performance of any DL model. To investigate this role, we conduct an extensive evaluation of the performance of several cutting-edge DL models (i.e., Convolutional Neural Network, EfficientNet, MobileNet, Supper Vector Machine and Multi-Perceptron) with various state-of-the-art audio features (i.e., Mel Spectrogram, Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients, and Zero Crossing Rate) either independently or as a combination (i.e., through ensembling) on three different datasets (i.e., Free Spoken Digits Dataset, Audio Urdu Digits Dataset, and Audio Gujarati Digits Dataset). Overall, results suggest feature selection depends on both the dataset and the model. However, feature combinations should be restricted to the only features that already achieve good performances when used individually (i.e., mostly Mel Spectrogram, Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients). Such feature combination/ensembling enabled us to outperform the previous state-of-the-art results irrespective of our choice of DL model.

However, feature combinations should be restricted to the only features that already achieve good performances when used individually (i.e., mostly Mel Spectrogram, Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients). Such feature combination/ensembling enabled us to outperform the previous state-of-the-art results irrespective of our choice of DL model.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 算法在不同领域都表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。其中，音频在过去几十年中由于一些有趣的模式吸引了许多研究人员，特别是在音频数据的分类方面。为了获得更好的音频分类性能，特征选择和组合起着关键作用，因为它们有可能决定或破坏任何深度学习模型的性能。为了研究这一作用，我们对几个尖端深度学习模型（即卷积神经网络、EfficientNet、MobileNet、超级向量机和多感知器）的性能进行了广泛的评估，这些模型具有各种最先进的音频特征（即梅尔频谱图、梅尔频率倒谱系数和过零率），无论是独立的还是作为组合（即通过集成）在三个不同的数据集上（即免费口语数字数据集、乌尔都语音频数字数据集和古吉拉特语音频数字数据集）。总的来说，结果表明特征选择取决于数据集和模型。然而，特征组合应仅限于单独使用时已经实现良好性能的特征（即，主要是梅尔频谱图、梅尔频率倒谱系数）。无论我们选择什么深度学习模型，这种特征组合/集成都使我们能够超越之前最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多特征选择与集成在音频分类中的应用，评估了多种深度学习模型与音频特征的组合效果。
AI.motivation: 音频分类在多个领域具有广泛应用，而特征选择与组合对深度学习模型的性能有重要影响，因此需要系统研究其效果。
AI.method: 作者对多种深度学习模型（如卷积神经网络、EfficientNet、MobileNet等）与多种音频特征（如梅尔频谱图、梅尔频率倒谱系数等）进行独立和集成评估，使用三个不同数据集进行实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，特征选择依赖于数据集和模型，而将表现良好的特征（如梅尔频谱图和梅尔频率倒谱系数）组合使用能够超越现有最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 特征选择和集成在音频分类中至关重要，合理组合表现良好的特征可以提升模型性能，无论使用何种深度学习模型。

authors_text: Arindam Das,Sudip Das,Ganesh Sistu,Jonathan Horgan,Ujjwal Bhattacharya,Edward Jones,Martin Glavin,Ciarán Eising
title: Deep Multi-Task Networks For Occluded Pedestrian Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于遮挡行人姿势估计的深度多任务网络
abstract: Most of the existing works on pedestrian pose estimation do not consider estimating the pose of an occluded pedestrian, as the annotations of the occluded parts are not available in relevant automotive datasets. For example, CityPersons, a well-known dataset for pedestrian detection in automotive scenes does not provide pose annotations, whereas MS-COCO, a non-automotive dataset, contains human pose estimation. In this work, we propose a multi-task framework to extract pedestrian features through detection and instance segmentation tasks performed separately on these two distributions. Thereafter, an encoder learns pose specific features using an unsupervised instance-level domain adaptation method for the pedestrian instances from both distributions. The proposed framework has improved state-of-the-art performances of pose estimation, pedestrian detection, and instance segmentation.
summary: Most of the existing works on pedestrian pose estimation do not consider estimating the pose of an occluded pedestrian, as the annotations of the occluded parts are not available in relevant automotive datasets. For example, CityPersons, a well-known dataset for pedestrian detection in automotive scenes does not provide pose annotations, whereas MS-COCO, a non-automotive dataset, contains human pose estimation. In this work, we propose a multi-task framework to extract pedestrian features through detection and instance segmentation tasks performed separately on these two distributions. Thereafter, an encoder learns pose specific features using an unsupervised instance-level domain adaptation method for the pedestrian instances from both distributions. The proposed framework has improved state-of-the-art performances of pose estimation, pedestrian detection, and instance segmentation.
abstract_zh: 大多数关于行人姿态估计的现有工作都没有考虑估计被遮挡行人的姿态，因为被遮挡部分的注释在相关的汽车数据集中不可用。例如，著名的汽车场景行人检测数据集 CityPersons 不提供姿势注释，而非汽车数据集 MS-COCO 包含人体姿势估计。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个多任务框架，通过在这两个分布上分别执行的检测和实例分割任务来提取行人特征。此后，编码器使用无监督实例级域适应方法从两个分布的行人实例中学习姿势特定特征。所提出的框架提高了姿势估计、行人检测和实例分割的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务网络框架，解决遮挡行人姿态估计问题，通过结合检测与分割任务并利用域适应方法提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有行人姿态估计方法因数据集缺乏遮挡标注而无法处理遮挡情况，需设计新框架以提升遮挡场景下的估计能力。
AI.method: 构建多任务网络分别处理检测与分割任务，通过无监督实例级域适应方法学习跨数据集的行人特征。
AI.result: 在姿态估计、行人检测及实例分割任务中均超越现有最优方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习与域适应结合可有效解决遮挡问题，为跨场景行人分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Lachlan D. Urquhart,Glenn McGarry,Andy Crabtree
title: Legal Provocations for HCI in the Design and Development of Trustworthy Autonomous Systems
title_zh: 可信自治系统设计和开发中人机交互的法律挑战
abstract: We consider a series of legal provocations emerging from the proposed European Union AI Act 2021 (AIA) and how they open up new possibilities for HCI in the design and development of trustworthy autonomous systems. The AIA continues the by design trend seen in recent EU regulation of emerging technologies. The AIA targets AI developments that pose risks to society and citizens fundamental rights, introducing mandatory design and development requirements for high-risk AI systems (HRAIS). These requirements regulate different stages of the AI development cycle including ensuring data quality and governance strategies, mandating testing of systems, ensuring appropriate risk management, designing for human oversight, and creating technical documentation. These requirements open up new opportunities for HCI that reach beyond established concerns with the ethics and explainability of AI and situate AI development in human-centered processes and methods of design to enable compliance with regulation and foster societal trust in AI.
summary: We consider a series of legal provocations emerging from the proposed European Union AI Act 2021 (AIA) and how they open up new possibilities for HCI in the design and development of trustworthy autonomous systems. The AIA continues the by design trend seen in recent EU regulation of emerging technologies. The AIA targets AI developments that pose risks to society and citizens fundamental rights, introducing mandatory design and development requirements for high-risk AI systems (HRAIS). These requirements regulate different stages of the AI development cycle including ensuring data quality and governance strategies, mandating testing of systems, ensuring appropriate risk management, designing for human oversight, and creating technical documentation. These requirements open up new opportunities for HCI that reach beyond established concerns with the ethics and explainability of AI and situate AI development in human-centered processes and methods of design to enable compliance with regulation and foster societal trust in AI.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑拟议的《2021 年欧盟人工智能法案》(AIA) 中出现的一系列法律挑衅，以及它们如何为人机交互在设计和开发可信赖的自主系统方面开辟新的可能性。 AIA 延续了欧盟最近对新兴技术的监管中所见的设计趋势。 AIA 针对对社会和公民基本权利构成风险的人工智能发展，引入了高风险人工智能系统（HRAIS）的强制性设计和开发要求。这些要求规范了人工智能开发周期的不同阶段，包括确保数据质量和治理策略、强制系统测试、确保适当的风险管理、人类监督设计以及创建技术文档。这些要求为人机交互开辟了新的机遇，超越了对人工智能道德和可解释性的既定关注，并将人工智能开发置于以人为本的流程和设计方法中，以确保遵守法规并培养社会对人工智能的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨欧盟AI法案对人机交互（HCI）在可信自主系统设计中的影响，分析法律要求如何推动HCI方法的演变以确保合规并建立社会信任。
AI.motivation: 随着AI风险增加，现有伦理框架不足，需通过法律框架推动HCI在设计阶段整合合规性，以构建社会信任。
AI.method: 通过分析欧盟AI法案的法律条款，结合人机交互设计原则，探讨法律要求与设计方法的整合途径。
AI.result: 识别出法律要求与HCI设计方法的结合点，提出在AI开发各阶段融入合规性与人类监督的具体策略。
AI.conclusion: 法律框架为HCI提供了新的设计方向，通过整合合规性要求，可提升AI系统的可信度与社会接受度。

search_text: Legal Provocations for HCI in the Design and Development of Trustworthy Autonomous Systems 可信自治系统设计和开发中人机交互的法律挑战 We consider a series of legal provocations emerging from the proposed European Union AI Act 2021 (AIA) and how they open up new possibilities for HCI in the design and development of trustworthy autonomous systems. The AIA continues the by design trend seen in recent EU regulation of emerging technologies. The AIA targets AI developments that pose risks to society and citizens fundamental rights, introducing mandatory design and development requirements for high-risk AI systems (HRAIS). These requirements regulate different stages of the AI development cycle including ensuring data quality and governance strategies, mandating testing of systems, ensuring appropriate risk management, designing for human oversight, and creating technical documentation. These requirements open up new opportunities for HCI that reach beyond established concerns with the ethics and explainability of AI and situate AI development in human-centered processes and methods of design to enable compliance with regulation and foster societal trust in AI. 我们考虑拟议的《2021 年欧盟人工智能法案》(AIA) 中出现的一系列法律挑衅，以及它们如何为人机交互在设计和开发可信赖的自主系统方面开辟新的可能性。 AIA 延续了欧盟最近对新兴技术的监管中所见的设计趋势。 AIA 针对对社会和公民基本权利构成风险的人工智能发展，引入了高风险人工智能系统（HRAIS）的强制性设计和开发要求。这些要求规范了人工智能开发周期的不同阶段，包括确保数据质量和治理策略、强制系统测试、确保适当的风险管理、人类监督设计以及创建技术文档。这些要求为人机交互开辟了新的机遇，超越了对人工智能道德和可解释性的既定关注，并将人工智能开发置于以人为本的流程和设计方法中，以确保遵守法规并培养社会对人工智能的信任。 本文探讨欧盟AI法案对人机交互（HCI）在可信自主系统设计中的影响，分析法律要求如何推动HCI方法的演变以确保合规并建立社会信任。 Lachlan D. Urquhart,Glenn McGarry,Andy Crabtree cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Wei Fu,Chao Yu,Zelai Xu,Jiaqi Yang,Yi Wu
title: Revisiting Some Common Practices in Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 重温合作多智能体强化学习的一些常见实践
comment: 16 pages, published as a conference paper in ICML 2022
comments: 16 pages, published as a conference paper in ICML 2022
abstract: Many advances in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) are based on two common design principles: value decomposition and parameter sharing. A typical MARL algorithm of this fashion decomposes a centralized Q-function into local Q-networks with parameters shared across agents. Such an algorithmic paradigm enables centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) and leads to efficient learning in practice. Despite all the advantages, we revisit these two principles and show that in certain scenarios, e.g., environments with a highly multi-modal reward landscape, value decomposition, and parameter sharing can be problematic and lead to undesired outcomes. In contrast, policy gradient (PG) methods with individual policies provably converge to an optimal solution in these cases, which partially supports some recent empirical observations that PG can be effective in many MARL testbeds. Inspired by our theoretical analysis, we present practical suggestions on implementing multi-agent PG algorithms for either high rewards or diverse emergent behaviors and empirically validate our findings on a variety of domains, ranging from the simplified matrix and grid-world games to complex benchmarks such as StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge and Google Research Football. We hope our insights could benefit the community towards developing more general and more powerful MARL algorithms. Check our project website at https://sites.google.com/view/revisiting-marl.
summary: Many advances in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) are based on two common design principles: value decomposition and parameter sharing. A typical MARL algorithm of this fashion decomposes a centralized Q-function into local Q-networks with parameters shared across agents. Such an algorithmic paradigm enables centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) and leads to efficient learning in practice. Despite all the advantages, we revisit these two principles and show that in certain scenarios, e.g., environments with a highly multi-modal reward landscape, value decomposition, and parameter sharing can be problematic and lead to undesired outcomes. In contrast, policy gradient (PG) methods with individual policies provably converge to an optimal solution in these cases, which partially supports some recent empirical observations that PG can be effective in many MARL testbeds. Inspired by our theoretical analysis, we present practical suggestions on implementing multi-agent PG algorithms for either high rewards or diverse emergent behaviors and empirically validate our findings on a variety of domains, ranging from the simplified matrix and grid-world games to complex benchmarks such as StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge and Google Research Football. We hope our insights could benefit the community towards developing more general and more powerful MARL algorithms. Check our project website at https://sites.google.com/view/revisiting-marl.
abstract_zh: 协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）的许多进展都基于两个常见的设计原则：价值分解和参数共享。这种方式的典型 MARL 算法将集中式 Q 函数分解为局部 Q 网络，参数在代理之间共享。这种算法范式可以实现集中训练和分散执行（CTDE），并在实践中实现高效学习。尽管有所有优点，我们重新审视这两个原则，并表明在某些情况下，例如具有高度多模式奖励景观的环境、价值分解和参数共享可能会出现问题并导致不良结果。相比之下，在这些情况下，具有单独策略的策略梯度（PG）方法可以证明收敛到最优解决方案，这部分支持了最近的一些经验观察，即 PG 在许多 MARL 测试平台中可以有效。受我们理论分析的启发，我们提出了针对高奖励或多样化紧急行为实施多智能体 PG 算法的实用建议，并通过实证验证了我们在各个领域的发现，从简化的矩阵和网格世界游戏到复杂的基准测试，例如星际争霸多智能体挑战赛和谷歌研究足球。我们希望我们的见解能够使社区受益，开发更通用、更强大的 MARL 算法。查看我们的项目网站：https://sites.google.com/view/revisiting-marl。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了合作多智能体强化学习中的两种常见设计原则（价值分解和参数共享），并探讨了在特定场景下策略梯度方法的优越性。
AI.motivation: 尽管价值分解和参数共享在多智能体强化学习中被广泛采用，但在某些复杂环境中（如多模态奖励场景）可能导致次优结果，需探索替代方案。
AI.method: 通过理论分析对比策略梯度方法与传统方法的收敛性，并在多种领域（如矩阵游戏、StarCraft等）进行实验验证。
AI.result: 策略梯度方法在多模态奖励场景中能收敛到最优解，且在多个基准测试中表现出色，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 策略梯度方法在特定场景下优于传统方法，为开发更通用的多智能体强化学习算法提供了理论支持和实践建议。

authors_text: Sergio Abriola,Santiago Cifuentes,María Vanina Martínez,Nina Pardal,Edwin Pin
title: On the complexity of finding set repairs for data-graphs
title_zh: 关于数据图查找集修复的复杂性
abstract: In the deeply interconnected world we live in, pieces of information link domains all around us. As graph databases embrace effectively relationships among data and allow processing and querying these connections efficiently, they are rapidly becoming a popular platform for storage that supports a wide range of domains and applications. As in the relational case, it is expected that data preserves a set of integrity constraints that define the semantic structure of the world it represents. When a database does not satisfy its integrity constraints, a possible approach is to search for a 'similar' database that does satisfy the constraints, also known as a repair. In this work, we study the problem of computing subset and superset repairs for graph databases with data values using a notion of consistency based on a set of Reg-GXPath expressions as integrity constraints. We show that for positive fragments of Reg-GXPath these problems admit a polynomial-time algorithm, while the full expressive power of the language renders them intractable.
summary: In the deeply interconnected world we live in, pieces of information link domains all around us. As graph databases embrace effectively relationships among data and allow processing and querying these connections efficiently, they are rapidly becoming a popular platform for storage that supports a wide range of domains and applications. As in the relational case, it is expected that data preserves a set of integrity constraints that define the semantic structure of the world it represents. When a database does not satisfy its integrity constraints, a possible approach is to search for a 'similar' database that does satisfy the constraints, also known as a repair. In this work, we study the problem of computing subset and superset repairs for graph databases with data values using a notion of consistency based on a set of Reg-GXPath expressions as integrity constraints. We show that for positive fragments of Reg-GXPath these problems admit a polynomial-time algorithm, while the full expressive power of the language renders them intractable.
abstract_zh: 在我们生活的深度互联的世界中，信息片段连接着我们周围的各个领域。由于图数据库有效地包含数据之间的关系并允许有效地处理和查询这些连接，因此它们正在迅速成为支持广泛领域和应用程序的流行存储平台。与关系情况一样，数据应该保留一组完整性约束，这些约束定义了它所代表的世界的语义结构。当数据库不满足其完整性约束时，一种可能的方法是搜索满足约束的“相似”数据库，也称为修复。在这项工作中，我们使用基于一组 Reg-GXPath 表达式作为完整性约束的一致性概念，研究具有数据值的图数据库的计算子集和超集修复问题。我们表明，对于 Reg-GXPath 的正片段，这些问题承认多项式时间算法，而语言的完整表达能力使它们变得棘手。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在数据图中使用Reg-GXPath完整性约束计算子集和超集修复的复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 随着图数据库在存储和处理复杂关系数据中的广泛应用，确保数据满足完整性约束变得至关重要，而修复不一致数据是关键需求。
AI.method: 通过分析Reg-GXPath表达式的不同片段，结合计算复杂性理论，研究子集和超集修复的可解性。
AI.result: 对于Reg-GXPath的正片段，修复问题可在多项式时间内解决；而完整语言表达能力导致问题变得难以处理。
AI.conclusion: 完整性约束的表达能力与修复计算的可行性之间存在权衡，需根据实际需求选择合适的约束片段。

We show that for positive fragments of Reg-GXPath these problems admit a polynomial-time algorithm, while the full expressive power of the language renders them intractable. 在我们生活的深度互联的世界中，信息片段连接着我们周围的各个领域。由于图数据库有效地包含数据之间的关系并允许有效地处理和查询这些连接，因此它们正在迅速成为支持广泛领域和应用程序的流行存储平台。与关系情况一样，数据应该保留一组完整性约束，这些约束定义了它所代表的世界的语义结构。当数据库不满足其完整性约束时，一种可能的方法是搜索满足约束的“相似”数据库，也称为修复。在这项工作中，我们使用基于一组 Reg-GXPath 表达式作为完整性约束的一致性概念，研究具有数据值的图数据库的计算子集和超集修复问题。我们表明，对于 Reg-GXPath 的正片段，这些问题承认多项式时间算法，而语言的完整表达能力使它们变得棘手。 本文研究了在数据图中使用Reg-GXPath完整性约束计算子集和超集修复的复杂性问题。 Sergio Abriola,Santiago Cifuentes,María Vanina Martínez,Nina Pardal,Edwin Pin cs.DB,cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Dimitrios Los,Thomas Sauerwald
title: Balanced Allocations with the Choice of Noise
title_zh: 平衡分配与噪声选择
comment: Full version of PODC 2022 paper, 87 pages, 11 figures, 6 tables
comments: Full version of PODC 2022 paper, 87 pages, 11 figures, 6 tables
abstract: We consider the allocation of $m$ balls (jobs) into $n$ bins (servers). In the standard Two-Choice process, at each step $t=1,2,\ldots,m$ we first sample two randomly chosen bins, compare their two loads and then place a ball in the least loaded bin. It is well-known that for any $m\geq n$, this results in a gap (difference between the maximum and average load) of $\log_2\log n+Θ(1)$ (with high probability). In this work, we consider Two-Choice in different settings with noisy load comparisons. One key setting involves an adaptive adversary whose power is limited by some threshold $g\in\mathbb{N}$. In each step, such adversary can determine the result of any load comparison between two bins whose loads differ by at most $g$, while if the load difference is greater than $g$, the comparison is correct. For this adversarial setting, we first prove that for any $m \geq n$ the gap is $O(g+\log n)$ with high probability. Then through a refined analysis we prove that if $g\leq\log n$, then for any $m \geq n$ the gap is $O(\frac{g}{\log g}\cdot\log\log n)$. For constant values of $g$, this generalizes the heavily loaded analysis of [BCSV06, TW14] for the Two-Choice process, and establishes that asymptotically the same gap bound holds even if load comparisons among "similarly loaded" bins are wrong. Finally, we complement these upper bounds with tight lower bounds, which establish an interesting phase transition on how the parameter $g$ impacts the gap. The analysis also applies to settings with outdated and delayed information. For example, for the setting of [BCEFN12] where balls are allocated in consecutive batches of size $b=n$, we present an improved and tight gap bound of $Θ(\frac{\log n}{\log\log n})$. This bound also extends for a range of values of $b$ and applies to a relaxed setting where the reported load of a bin can be any load value from the last $b$ steps.
summary: We consider the allocation of $m$ balls (jobs) into $n$ bins (servers). In the standard Two-Choice process, at each step $t=1,2,\ldots,m$ we first sample two randomly chosen bins, compare their two loads and then place a ball in the least loaded bin. It is well-known that for any $m\geq n$, this results in a gap (difference between the maximum and average load) of $\log_2\log n+Θ(1)$ (with high probability). In this work, we consider Two-Choice in different settings with noisy load comparisons. One key setting involves an adaptive adversary whose power is limited by some threshold $g\in\mathbb{N}$. In each step, such adversary can determine the result of any load comparison between two bins whose loads differ by at most $g$, while if the load difference is greater than $g$, the comparison is correct. For this adversarial setting, we first prove that for any $m \geq n$ the gap is $O(g+\log n)$ with high probability. Then through a refined analysis we prove that if $g\leq\log n$, then for any $m \geq n$ the gap is $O(\frac{g}{\log g}\cdot\log\log n)$. For constant values of $g$, this generalizes the heavily loaded analysis of [BCSV06, TW14] for the Two-Choice process, and establishes that asymptotically the same gap bound holds even if load comparisons among "similarly loaded" bins are wrong. Finally, we complement these upper bounds with tight lower bounds, which establish an interesting phase transition on how the parameter $g$ impacts the gap. The analysis also applies to settings with outdated and delayed information. For example, for the setting of [BCEFN12] where balls are allocated in consecutive batches of size $b=n$, we present an improved and tight gap bound of $Θ(\frac{\log n}{\log\log n})$. This bound also extends for a range of values of $b$ and applies to a relaxed setting where the reported load of a bin can be any load value from the last $b$ steps.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑将 $m$ 个球（作业）分配到 $n$ 个容器（服务器）中。在标准的二选过程中，在每一步 $t=1,2,\ldots,m$ 中，我们首先对两个随机选择的箱进行采样，比较它们的两个负载，然后将球放入负载最少的箱中。众所周知，对于任何 $m\geq n$，这会导致 $\log_2\log n+θ(1)$ 的差距（最大负载与平均负载之间的差异）（概率很高）。在这项工作中，我们考虑不同设置下的二选一和噪声负载比较。一个关键设置涉及一个自适应对手，其能力受到某个阈值 $g\in\mathbb{N}$ 的限制。在每个步骤中，这样的对手可以确定负载最多相差 $g$ 的两个 bin 之间的任何负载比较的结果，而如果负载差异大于 $g$，则比较是正确的。对于这种对抗性设置，我们首先证明对于任何 $m \geq n$ ，差距很有可能是 $O(g+\log n)$。然后通过精细分析证明，如果$g\leq\log n$，则对于任何$m \geq n$，差距为$O(\frac{g}{\log g}\cdot\log\log n)$。对于 $g$ 的常数值，这概括了二选过程的 [BCSV06，TW14] 的重负载分析，并确定即使“相似负载”箱之间的负载比较是错误的，渐近相同的间隙界限也成立。最后，我们用严格的下限来补充这些上限，这就参数 $g$ 如何影响间隙建立了一个有趣的相变。该分析还适用于信息过时和延迟的设置。例如，对于 [BCEFN12] 的设置，其中球被分配在大小为 $b=n$ 的连续批次中，我们提出了 $θ(\frac{\log n}{\log\log n})$ 的改进且紧密的间隙界限。此界限还扩展到 $b$ 的值范围，并适用于宽松的设置，其中报告的 bin 负载可以是来自最后 $b$ 步骤的任何负载值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在噪声负载比较的情况下，使用Two-Choice策略分配球到箱子时的负载平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的Two-Choice策略假设负载比较准确，但实际系统中可能存在噪声或延迟信息。本文旨在分析噪声对负载差距的影响，并提供鲁棒的理论保证。
AI.method: 通过引入受限对抗模型（当负载差异不超过g时可操控比较结果），结合概率分析与精细数学推导，研究不同噪声阈值下的负载差距，并扩展到批量分配场景。
AI.result: 证明在噪声阈值g下负载差距为O(g+log n)，当g≤log n时进一步优化为O((g/log g)·log log n)；并给出与g相关的紧致下界及相变现象，改进了批量分配场景的间隙界为Θ(log n/log log n)。
AI.conclusion: 即使存在局部噪声比较，Two-Choice策略仍能保持接近无噪声的负载平衡性能，为实际系统中处理不完美信息提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Basak Sakcak,Luca Bascetta
title: Safe Motion Planning for a Mobile Robot Navigating in Environments Shared with Humans
title_zh: 移动机器人在与人类共享的环境中导航的安全运动规划
abstract: In this paper, a robot navigating an environment shared with humans is considered, and a cost function that can be exploited in $\text{RRT}^\text{X}$, a randomized sampling-based replanning algorithm that guarantees asymptotic optimality, to allow for a safe motion is proposed. The cost function is a path length weighted by a danger index based on a prediction of human motion performed using either a linear stochastic model, assuming constant longitudinal velocity and varying lateral velocity, and a GMM/GMR-based model, computed on an experimental dataset of human trajectories. The proposed approach is validated using a dataset of human trajectories collected in a real world setting.
summary: In this paper, a robot navigating an environment shared with humans is considered, and a cost function that can be exploited in $\text{RRT}^\text{X}$, a randomized sampling-based replanning algorithm that guarantees asymptotic optimality, to allow for a safe motion is proposed. The cost function is a path length weighted by a danger index based on a prediction of human motion performed using either a linear stochastic model, assuming constant longitudinal velocity and varying lateral velocity, and a GMM/GMR-based model, computed on an experimental dataset of human trajectories. The proposed approach is validated using a dataset of human trajectories collected in a real world setting.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，考虑了在与人类共享的环境中导航的机器人，并提出了可在 $\text{RRT}^\text{X}$（一种保证渐近最优性的基于随机采样的重新规划算法）中利用的成本函数，以实现安全运动。成本函数是基于危险指数加权的路径长度，该预测基于使用线性随机模型（假设恒定的纵向速度和变化的横向速度）和基于 GMM/GMR 的模型（根据人体轨迹的实验数据集计算）执行的人体运动预测。使用在现实世界环境中收集的人体轨迹数据集来验证所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于共享环境中移动机器人安全路径规划的成本函数，结合人类运动预测模型以确保导航安全。
AI.motivation: 在人类与机器人共享的环境中，传统路径规划方法难以有效预测人类行为，可能导致碰撞风险。需开发能动态避让人类的路径规划策略。
AI.method: 设计基于危险指数的加权路径长度成本函数，结合线性随机模型（假设恒定纵向速度和变化横向速度）与GMM/GMR模型（基于真实人类轨迹数据），集成至RRT*X算法中实现安全重规划。
AI.result: 通过真实场景的人类轨迹数据集验证，该方法能有效生成避让人类的安全路径，降低碰撞风险。
AI.conclusion: 将人类运动预测模型与RRT*X结合，可提升共享环境中机器人路径规划的安全性与适应性。
