search_text: Safe Motion Planning for a Mobile Robot Navigating in Environments Shared with Humans 移动机器人在与人类共享的环境中导航的安全运动规划 In this paper, a robot navigating an environment shared with humans is considered, and a cost function that can be exploited in $\text{RRT}^\text{X}$, a randomized sampling-based replanning algorithm that guarantees asymptotic optimality, to allow for a safe motion is proposed. The cost function is a path length weighted by a danger index based on a prediction of human motion performed using either a linear stochastic model, assuming constant longitudinal velocity and varying lateral velocity, and a GMM/GMR-based model, computed on an experimental dataset of human trajectories. The proposed approach is validated using a dataset of human trajectories collected in a real world setting. 在本文中，考虑了在与人类共享的环境中导航的机器人，并提出了可在 $\text{RRT}^\text{X}$（一种保证渐近最优性的基于随机采样的重新规划算法）中利用的成本函数，以实现安全运动。成本函数是基于危险指数加权的路径长度，该预测基于使用线性随机模型（假设恒定的纵向速度和变化的横向速度）和基于 GMM/GMR 的模型（根据人体轨迹的实验数据集计算）执行的人体运动预测。使用在现实世界环境中收集的人体轨迹数据集来验证所提出的方法。 本文提出一种用于共享环境中移动机器人安全路径规划的成本函数，结合人类运动预测模型以确保导航安全。 Basak Sakcak,Luca Bascetta cs.RO

authors_text: Teodor Chiaburu,Felix Biessmann,Frank Hausser
title: Towards ML Methods for Biodiversity: A Novel Wild Bee Dataset and Evaluations of XAI Methods for ML-Assisted Rare Species Annotations
title_zh: 面向生物多样性的 ML 方法：新型野生蜜蜂数据集以及用于 ML 辅助稀有物种注释的 XAI 方法的评估
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, 1 table submitted to CVPR 2022 All the code and the link to the dataset can be found at https://github.com/TeodorChiaburu/beexplainable
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, 1 table submitted to CVPR 2022 All the code and the link to the dataset can be found at https://github.com/TeodorChiaburu/beexplainable
abstract: Insects are a crucial part of our ecosystem. Sadly, in the past few decades, their numbers have worryingly decreased. In an attempt to gain a better understanding of this process and monitor the insects populations, Deep Learning may offer viable solutions. However, given the breadth of their taxonomy and the typical hurdles of fine grained analysis, such as high intraclass variability compared to low interclass variability, insect classification remains a challenging task. There are few benchmark datasets, which impedes rapid development of better AI models. The annotation of rare species training data, however, requires expert knowledge. Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) could assist biologists in these annotation tasks, but choosing the optimal XAI method is difficult. Our contribution to these research challenges is threefold: 1) a dataset of thoroughly annotated images of wild bees sampled from the iNaturalist database, 2) a ResNet model trained on the wild bee dataset achieving classification scores comparable to similar state-of-the-art models trained on other fine-grained datasets and 3) an investigation of XAI methods to support biologists in annotation tasks.
summary: Insects are a crucial part of our ecosystem. Sadly, in the past few decades, their numbers have worryingly decreased. In an attempt to gain a better understanding of this process and monitor the insects populations, Deep Learning may offer viable solutions. However, given the breadth of their taxonomy and the typical hurdles of fine grained analysis, such as high intraclass variability compared to low interclass variability, insect classification remains a challenging task. There are few benchmark datasets, which impedes rapid development of better AI models. The annotation of rare species training data, however, requires expert knowledge. Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) could assist biologists in these annotation tasks, but choosing the optimal XAI method is difficult. Our contribution to these research challenges is threefold: 1) a dataset of thoroughly annotated images of wild bees sampled from the iNaturalist database, 2) a ResNet model trained on the wild bee dataset achieving classification scores comparable to similar state-of-the-art models trained on other fine-grained datasets and 3) an investigation of XAI methods to support biologists in annotation tasks.
abstract_zh: 昆虫是我们生态系统的重要组成部分。可悲的是，在过去的几十年里，它们的数量令人担忧地减少了。为了更好地了解这一过程并监测昆虫种群，深度学习可能会提供可行的解决方案。然而，考虑到其分类学的广度和细粒度分析的典型障碍，例如与类间变异性较低相比，类内变异性较高，昆虫分类仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。基准数据集很少，这阻碍了更好的人工智能模型的快速开发。然而，稀有物种训练数据的注释需要专业知识。可解释的人工智能（XAI）可以帮助生物学家完成这些注释任务，但选择最佳的 XAI 方法很困难。我们对这些研究挑战的贡献有三方面：1）从 iNaturalist 数据库中采样的经过彻底注释的野生蜜蜂图像数据集，2）在野蜂数据集上训练的 ResNet 模型，其分类分数与在其他细粒度数据集上训练的类似最先进模型相当，3）对 XAI 方法的研究，以支持生物学家完成注释任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个野生蜜蜂图像数据集，并评估可解释人工智能（XAI）方法在辅助生物学家标注稀有物种中的应用。
AI.motivation: 昆虫数量下降威胁生态系统，但昆虫分类因分类学复杂性和细粒度分析困难而具有挑战性，现有基准数据集不足且标注依赖专家知识。
AI.method: 构建来自iNaturalist的野生蜜蜂标注数据集，训练ResNet模型，并系统评估多种XAI方法在稀有物种标注任务中的有效性。
AI.result: 数据集公开可用，ResNet模型在分类性能上达到同类最佳水平，XAI方法评估为生物学家提供标注辅助方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据集、高性能模型和XAI方法评估，为生物多样性研究提供工具支持，未来需进一步优化XAI在生物领域的适用性。

authors_text: Alexander Lobashev,Mikhail V. Tamm
title: Counting Phases and Faces Using Bayesian Thermodynamic Integration
title_zh: 使用贝叶斯热力学积分计算相和面
comment: 20 pages, 9 figures, plus appendix with additional figures
comments: 20 pages, 9 figures, plus appendix with additional figures
abstract: We introduce a new approach to reconstruction of the thermodynamic functions and phase boundaries in two-parametric statistical mechanics systems. Our method is based on expressing the Fisher metric in terms of the posterior distributions over a space of external parameters and approximating the metric field by a Hessian of a convex function. We use the proposed approach to accurately reconstruct the partition functions and phase diagrams of the Ising model and the exactly solvable non-equilibrium TASEP without any a priori knowledge about microscopic rules of the models. We also demonstrate how our approach can be used to visualize the latent space of StyleGAN models and evaluate the variability of the generated images.
summary: We introduce a new approach to reconstruction of the thermodynamic functions and phase boundaries in two-parametric statistical mechanics systems. Our method is based on expressing the Fisher metric in terms of the posterior distributions over a space of external parameters and approximating the metric field by a Hessian of a convex function. We use the proposed approach to accurately reconstruct the partition functions and phase diagrams of the Ising model and the exactly solvable non-equilibrium TASEP without any a priori knowledge about microscopic rules of the models. We also demonstrate how our approach can be used to visualize the latent space of StyleGAN models and evaluate the variability of the generated images.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新方法来重建二参数统计力学系统中的热力学函数和相边界。我们的方法基于用外部参数空间上的后验分布来表达 Fisher 度量，并通过凸函数的 Hessian 矩阵来逼近度量场。我们使用所提出的方法来准确地重建 Ising 模型和精确可解的非平衡 TASEP 的配分函数和相图，而无需任何关于模型微观规则的先验知识。我们还演示了如何使用我们的方法可视化 StyleGAN 模型的潜在空间并评估生成图像的可变性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯热力学积分的新方法，用于重建二维参数统计力学系统的热力学函数和相边界，并应用于Ising模型、TASEP模型及StyleGAN潜在空间分析。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在重建相边界和热力学函数时依赖复杂计算或先验知识，本文旨在提供一种无需微观规则先验知识的通用方法，适用于多种模型。
AI.method: 通过将Fisher度量表示为外部参数空间的后验分布，并利用凸函数的Hessian矩阵近似度量场，结合贝叶斯热力学积分进行重建。
AI.result: 成功重建了Ising模型和TASEP的配分函数及相图，无需先验知识；并应用于StyleGAN模型的潜在空间可视化与生成图像变异性评估。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为统计力学系统和生成模型提供了通用的相边界重建与潜在空间分析工具，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Nikunj Phutela,Abhilash P,Kaushik Sreevathsan,B N Krupa
title: Intelligent analysis of EEG signals to assess consumer decisions: A Study on Neuromarketing
title_zh: 智能分析脑电图信号以评估消费者决策：神经营销学研究
abstract: Neuromarketing is an emerging field that combines neuroscience and marketing to understand the factors that influence consumer decisions better. The study proposes a method to understand consumers' positive and negative reactions to advertisements (ads) and products by analysing electroencephalogram (EEG) signals. These signals are recorded using a low-cost single electrode headset from volunteers belonging to the ages 18-22. A detailed subject dependent (SD) and subject independent (SI) analysis was performed employing machine learning methods like Naive Bayes (NB), Support Vector Machine (SVM), k-nearest neighbour and Decision Tree and the proposed deep learning (DL) model. SVM and NB yielded an accuracy (Acc.) of 0.63 for the SD analysis. In SI analysis, SVM performed better for the advertisement, product and gender-based analysis. Furthermore, the performance of the DL model was on par with that of SVM, especially, in product and ads-based analysis.
summary: Neuromarketing is an emerging field that combines neuroscience and marketing to understand the factors that influence consumer decisions better. The study proposes a method to understand consumers' positive and negative reactions to advertisements (ads) and products by analysing electroencephalogram (EEG) signals. These signals are recorded using a low-cost single electrode headset from volunteers belonging to the ages 18-22. A detailed subject dependent (SD) and subject independent (SI) analysis was performed employing machine learning methods like Naive Bayes (NB), Support Vector Machine (SVM), k-nearest neighbour and Decision Tree and the proposed deep learning (DL) model. SVM and NB yielded an accuracy (Acc.) of 0.63 for the SD analysis. In SI analysis, SVM performed better for the advertisement, product and gender-based analysis. Furthermore, the performance of the DL model was on par with that of SVM, especially, in product and ads-based analysis.
abstract_zh: 神经营销学是一个新兴领域，它将神经科学和营销学相结合，以更好地了解影响消费者决策的因素。该研究提出了一种通过分析脑电图（EEG）信号来了解消费者对广告（ad）和产品的积极和消极反应的方法。这些信号是由 18 至 22 岁的志愿者使用低成本单电极耳机记录的。采用朴素贝叶斯 (NB)、支持向量机 (SVM)、k 最近邻和决策树等机器学习方法以及所提出的深度学习 (DL) 模型，进行了详细的主题相关 (SD) 和主题独立 (SI) 分析。 SVM 和 NB 的 SD 分析准确度 (Acc.) 为 0.63。在 SI 分析中，SVM 在广告、产品和基于性别的分析中表现更好。此外，DL 模型的性能与 SVM 相当，尤其是在基于产品和广告的分析方面。

AI.tldr: 通过分析脑电图（EEG）信号评估消费者决策，研究神经营销中广告和产品反应的智能分析方法。
AI.motivation: 神经营销学旨在结合神经科学与营销学，深入理解影响消费者决策的因素，从而优化广告和产品设计。
AI.method: 使用低成本单电极头戴设备采集18-22岁志愿者的EEG信号，采用受试者依赖（SD）和受试者独立（SI）分析方法，结合机器学习（如SVM、NB）和深度学习模型进行分类评估。
AI.result: SD分析中SVM和NB准确率为63%，SI分析中SVM表现最佳；深度学习模型在广告和产品分析中与SVM性能相当。
AI.conclusion: SVM和深度学习模型在神经营销分析中具有较高可行性，未来可进一步优化模型以提高跨个体泛化能力。

ai_content.tldr: 通过分析脑电图（EEG）信号评估消费者决策，研究神经营销中广告和产品反应的智能分析方法。
ai_content.motivation: 神经营销学旨在结合神经科学与营销学，深入理解影响消费者决策的因素，从而优化广告和产品设计。
ai_content.method: 使用低成本单电极头戴设备采集18-22岁志愿者的EEG信号，采用受试者依赖（SD）和受试者独立（SI）分析方法，结合机器学习（如SVM、NB）和深度学习模型进行分类评估。
ai_content.result: SD分析中SVM和NB准确率为63%，SI分析中SVM表现最佳；深度学习模型在广告和产品分析中与SVM性能相当。
ai_content.conclusion: SVM和深度学习模型在神经营销分析中具有较高可行性，未来可进一步优化模型以提高跨个体泛化能力。

search_text: Intelligent analysis of EEG signals to assess consumer decisions: A Study on Neuromarketing 智能分析脑电图信号以评估消费者决策：神经营销学研究 Neuromarketing is an emerging field that combines neuroscience and marketing to understand the factors that influence consumer decisions better. The study proposes a method to understand consumers' positive and negative reactions to advertisements (ads) and products by analysing electroencephalogram (EEG) signals. These signals are recorded using a low-cost single electrode headset from volunteers belonging to the ages 18-22. A detailed subject dependent (SD) and subject independent (SI) analysis was performed employing machine learning methods like Naive Bayes (NB), Support Vector Machine (SVM), k-nearest neighbour and Decision Tree and the proposed deep learning (DL) model. SVM and NB yielded an accuracy (Acc.) of 0.63 for the SD analysis. In SI analysis, SVM performed better for the advertisement, product and gender-based analysis. Furthermore, the performance of the DL model was on par with that of SVM, especially, in product and ads-based analysis. 神经营销学是一个新兴领域，它将神经科学和营销学相结合，以更好地了解影响消费者决策的因素。该研究提出了一种通过分析脑电图（EEG）信号来了解消费者对广告（ad）和产品的积极和消极反应的方法。这些信号是由 18 至 22 岁的志愿者使用低成本单电极耳机记录的。采用朴素贝叶斯 (NB)、支持向量机 (SVM)、k 最近邻和决策树等机器学习方法以及所提出的深度学习 (DL) 模型，进行了详细的主题相关 (SD) 和主题独立 (SI) 分析。 SVM 和 NB 的 SD 分析准确度 (Acc.) 为 0.63。在 SI 分析中，SVM 在广告、产品和基于性别的分析中表现更好。此外，DL 模型的性能与 SVM 相当，尤其是在基于产品和广告的分析方面。 通过分析脑电图（EEG）信号评估消费者决策，研究神经营销中广告和产品反应的智能分析方法。 Nikunj Phutela,Abhilash P,Kaushik Sreevathsan,B N Krupa eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Lamia Alam,Nasser Kehtarnavaz
title: A Survey of Detection Methods for Die Attachment and Wire Bonding Defects in Integrated Circuit Manufacturing
title_zh: 集成电路制造中芯片附着和引线键合缺陷检测方法综述
abstract: Defect detection plays a vital role in the manufacturing process of integrated circuits (ICs). Die attachment and wire bonding are two steps of the manufacturing process that determine the power and signal transmission quality and dependability in an IC. This paper presents a survey or literature review of the methods used for detecting these defects based on different sensing modalities used including optical, radiological, acoustical, and infrared thermography. A discussion of the detection methods used is provided in this survey. Both conventional and deep learning approaches for detecting die attachment and wire bonding defects are considered along with challenges and future research directions.
summary: Defect detection plays a vital role in the manufacturing process of integrated circuits (ICs). Die attachment and wire bonding are two steps of the manufacturing process that determine the power and signal transmission quality and dependability in an IC. This paper presents a survey or literature review of the methods used for detecting these defects based on different sensing modalities used including optical, radiological, acoustical, and infrared thermography. A discussion of the detection methods used is provided in this survey. Both conventional and deep learning approaches for detecting die attachment and wire bonding defects are considered along with challenges and future research directions.
abstract_zh: 缺陷检测在集成电路（IC）的制造过程中起着至关重要的作用。芯片连接和引线键合是制造过程中的两个步骤，决定了 IC 的功率和信号传输质量以及可靠性。本文对基于不同传感方式（包括光学、放射学、声学和红外热成像）检测这些缺陷的方法进行了调查或文献综述。本次调查对所使用的检测方法进行了讨论。用于检测芯片附着和引线键合缺陷的传统方法和深度学习方法都被考虑，同时也考虑了挑战和未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了集成电路制造中用于检测晶圆粘接和引线键合缺陷的不同传感技术方法，包括传统和深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 晶圆粘接和引线键合是决定集成电路性能和可靠性的关键步骤，缺陷检测对保证产品质量至关重要，需系统梳理现有检测技术并探索未来方向。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾，分析光学、放射学、声学和红外热成像等传感技术的检测方法，比较传统算法与深度学习模型的优劣，并总结技术挑战。
AI.result: 总结了各类检测技术的适用场景与局限性，指出数据获取难度、方法泛化能力不足及多模态融合技术等当前研究瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 未来需加强多技术融合、提升深度学习模型的可解释性，并开发适应复杂制造环境的高效缺陷检测方案。

authors_text: Gennaro Notomista,Siddharth Mayya
title: What Can Robots Teach Us About The COVID-19 Pandemic? Interactive Demonstrations of Epidemiological Models Using a Swarm of Brushbots
title_zh: 关于 COVID-19 大流行，机器人可以教给我们什么？使用一群刷子机器人进行流行病学模型的交互式演示
abstract: This paper describes the methodology and outcomes of a series of educational events conducted in 2021 which leveraged robot swarms to educate high-school and university students about epidemiological models and how they can inform societal and governmental policies. With a specific focus on the COVID-19 pandemic, the events consisted of 4 online and 3 in-person workshops where students had the chance to interact with a swarm of 20 custom-built brushbots -- small-scale vibration-driven robots optimized for portability and robustness. Through the analysis of data collected during a post-event survey, this paper shows how the events positively impacted the students' views on the scientific method to guide real-world decision making, as well as their interest in robotics.
summary: This paper describes the methodology and outcomes of a series of educational events conducted in 2021 which leveraged robot swarms to educate high-school and university students about epidemiological models and how they can inform societal and governmental policies. With a specific focus on the COVID-19 pandemic, the events consisted of 4 online and 3 in-person workshops where students had the chance to interact with a swarm of 20 custom-built brushbots -- small-scale vibration-driven robots optimized for portability and robustness. Through the analysis of data collected during a post-event survey, this paper shows how the events positively impacted the students' views on the scientific method to guide real-world decision making, as well as their interest in robotics.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 2021 年开展的一系列教育活动的方法和成果，这些活动利用机器人群向高中生和大学生介绍流行病学模型以及如何为社会和政府政策提供信息。这些活动特别关注 COVID-19 大流行，包括 4 场在线研讨会和 3 场面对面研讨会，学生们有机会与 20 个定制刷刷机器人进行互动，这些刷刷机器人是针对便携性和坚固性进行了优化的小型振动驱动机器人。通过对事件后调查期间收集的数据进行分析，本文展示了这些事件如何积极影响学生对指导现实世界决策的科学方法的看法以及他们对机器人技术的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文通过机器人集群互动演示，向学生教授流行病学模型及其在新冠疫情政策制定中的应用。
AI.motivation: 利用机器人教学提升学生对科学方法在现实决策中作用的认知，并激发其对机器人技术的兴趣。
AI.method: 使用20个自制刷子机器人（brushbots）举办4场线上和3场线下研讨会，通过互动演示流行病学模型并分析问卷数据。
AI.result: 学生更认可科学方法对政策制定的指导作用，同时增强了对机器人技术的兴趣。
AI.conclusion: 机器人集群是有效的教育工具，能增强学生对流行病学模型和科学决策的理解与兴趣。

authors_text: Yue Wang,Yao Wan,Lu Bai,Lixin Cui,Zhuo Xu,Ming Li,Philip S. Yu,Edwin R Hancock
title: Collaborative Knowledge Graph Fusion by Exploiting the Open Corpus
title_zh: 利用开放语料库进行协作知识图融合
comment: Under review by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE)
comments: Under review by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE)
abstract: To alleviate the challenges of building Knowledge Graphs (KG) from scratch, a more general task is to enrich a KG using triples from an open corpus, where the obtained triples contain noisy entities and relations. It is challenging to enrich a KG with newly harvested triples while maintaining the quality of the knowledge representation. This paper proposes a system to refine a KG using information harvested from an additional corpus. To this end, we formulate our task as two coupled sub-tasks, namely join event extraction (JEE) and knowledge graph fusion (KGF). We then propose a Collaborative Knowledge Graph Fusion Framework to allow our sub-tasks to mutually assist one another in an alternating manner. More concretely, the explorer carries out the JEE supervised by both the ground-truth annotation and an existing KG provided by the supervisor. The supervisor then evaluates the triples extracted by the explorer and enriches the KG with those that are highly ranked. To implement this evaluation, we further propose a Translated Relation Alignment Scoring Mechanism to align and translate the extracted triples to the prior KG. Experiments verify that this collaboration can both improve the performance of the JEE and the KGF.
summary: To alleviate the challenges of building Knowledge Graphs (KG) from scratch, a more general task is to enrich a KG using triples from an open corpus, where the obtained triples contain noisy entities and relations. It is challenging to enrich a KG with newly harvested triples while maintaining the quality of the knowledge representation. This paper proposes a system to refine a KG using information harvested from an additional corpus. To this end, we formulate our task as two coupled sub-tasks, namely join event extraction (JEE) and knowledge graph fusion (KGF). We then propose a Collaborative Knowledge Graph Fusion Framework to allow our sub-tasks to mutually assist one another in an alternating manner. More concretely, the explorer carries out the JEE supervised by both the ground-truth annotation and an existing KG provided by the supervisor. The supervisor then evaluates the triples extracted by the explorer and enriches the KG with those that are highly ranked. To implement this evaluation, we further propose a Translated Relation Alignment Scoring Mechanism to align and translate the extracted triples to the prior KG. Experiments verify that this collaboration can both improve the performance of the JEE and the KGF.
abstract_zh: 为了减轻从头开始构建知识图（KG）的挑战，更一般的任务是使用开放语料库中的三元组来丰富知识图谱，其中获得的三元组包含噪声实体和关系。用新收获的三元组丰富知识图谱，同时保持知识表示的质量是具有挑战性的。本文提出了一种使用从附加语料库中获取的信息来细化知识图谱的系统。为此，我们将任务制定为两个耦合的子任务，即连接事件提取（JEE）和知识图融合（KGF）。然后，我们提出了一种协作知识图融合框架，允许我们的子任务以交替的方式相互协助。更具体地说，探索者在真实注释和监督者提供的现有知识图谱的监督下执行 JEE。然后，监督者评估探索者提取的三元组，并用排名较高的三元组来丰富知识图谱。为了实现这一评估，我们进一步提出了一种翻译关系对齐评分机制，将提取的三元组对齐并翻译为先前的知识图谱。实验证明这种协作可以提高 JEE 和 KGF 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种协作式知识图谱融合框架，通过结合开放语料库中的信息来优化知识图谱的质量。
AI.motivation: 从头构建知识图谱（KG）面临挑战，而利用开放语料库中的三元组进行图谱增强时，噪声实体和关系的存在影响了质量维护。
AI.method: 将任务分解为联合事件抽取（JEE）和知识图谱融合（KGF）两个子任务，通过交替协作机制实现相互优化，并提出翻译关系对齐评分机制以评估和整合新提取的三元组。
AI.result: 实验表明，该协作框架显著提升了JEE和KGF的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过开放语料库与现有知识图谱的协作优化，能够有效提升知识表示的质量和鲁棒性。

search_text: Collaborative Knowledge Graph Fusion by Exploiting the Open Corpus 利用开放语料库进行协作知识图融合 To alleviate the challenges of building Knowledge Graphs (KG) from scratch, a more general task is to enrich a KG using triples from an open corpus, where the obtained triples contain noisy entities and relations. It is challenging to enrich a KG with newly harvested triples while maintaining the quality of the knowledge representation. This paper proposes a system to refine a KG using information harvested from an additional corpus. To this end, we formulate our task as two coupled sub-tasks, namely join event extraction (JEE) and knowledge graph fusion (KGF). We then propose a Collaborative Knowledge Graph Fusion Framework to allow our sub-tasks to mutually assist one another in an alternating manner. More concretely, the explorer carries out the JEE supervised by both the ground-truth annotation and an existing KG provided by the supervisor. The supervisor then evaluates the triples extracted by the explorer and enriches the KG with those that are highly ranked. To implement this evaluation, we further propose a Translated Relation Alignment Scoring Mechanism to align and translate the extracted triples to the prior KG. Experiments verify that this collaboration can both improve the performance of the JEE and the KGF. 为了减轻从头开始构建知识图（KG）的挑战，更一般的任务是使用开放语料库中的三元组来丰富知识图谱，其中获得的三元组包含噪声实体和关系。用新收获的三元组丰富知识图谱，同时保持知识表示的质量是具有挑战性的。本文提出了一种使用从附加语料库中获取的信息来细化知识图谱的系统。为此，我们将任务制定为两个耦合的子任务，即连接事件提取（JEE）和知识图融合（KGF）。然后，我们提出了一种协作知识图融合框架，允许我们的子任务以交替的方式相互协助。更具体地说，探索者在真实注释和监督者提供的现有知识图谱的监督下执行 JEE。然后，监督者评估探索者提取的三元组，并用排名较高的三元组来丰富知识图谱。为了实现这一评估，我们进一步提出了一种翻译关系对齐评分机制，将提取的三元组对齐并翻译为先前的知识图谱。实验证明这种协作可以提高 JEE 和 KGF 的性能。 本文提出一种协作式知识图谱融合框架，通过结合开放语料库中的信息来优化知识图谱的质量。 Yue Wang,Yao Wan,Lu Bai,Lixin Cui,Zhuo Xu,Ming Li,Philip S. Yu,Edwin R Hancock cs.AI

authors_text: Wenzhong Shi,Pengxin Chen,Muyang Wang,Sheng Bao,Haodong Xiang,Yue Yu,Daping Yang
title: PolyU-BPCoMa: A Dataset and Benchmark Towards Mobile Colorized Mapping Using a Backpack Multisensorial System
title_zh: PolyU-BPCoMa：使用背包多传感器系统进行移动彩色绘图的数据集和基准
abstract: Constructing colorized point clouds from mobile laser scanning and images is a fundamental work in surveying and mapping. It is also an essential prerequisite for building digital twins for smart cities. However, existing public datasets are either in relatively small scales or lack accurate geometrical and color ground truth. This paper documents a multisensorial dataset named PolyU-BPCoMA which is distinctively positioned towards mobile colorized mapping. The dataset incorporates resources of 3D LiDAR, spherical imaging, GNSS and IMU on a backpack platform. Color checker boards are pasted in each surveyed area as targets and ground truth data are collected by an advanced terrestrial laser scanner (TLS). 3D geometrical and color information can be recovered in the colorized point clouds produced by the backpack system and the TLS, respectively. Accordingly, we provide an opportunity to benchmark the mapping and colorization accuracy simultaneously for a mobile multisensorial system. The dataset is approximately 800 GB in size covering both indoor and outdoor environments. The dataset and development kits are available at https://github.com/chenpengxin/PolyU-BPCoMa.git.
summary: Constructing colorized point clouds from mobile laser scanning and images is a fundamental work in surveying and mapping. It is also an essential prerequisite for building digital twins for smart cities. However, existing public datasets are either in relatively small scales or lack accurate geometrical and color ground truth. This paper documents a multisensorial dataset named PolyU-BPCoMA which is distinctively positioned towards mobile colorized mapping. The dataset incorporates resources of 3D LiDAR, spherical imaging, GNSS and IMU on a backpack platform. Color checker boards are pasted in each surveyed area as targets and ground truth data are collected by an advanced terrestrial laser scanner (TLS). 3D geometrical and color information can be recovered in the colorized point clouds produced by the backpack system and the TLS, respectively. Accordingly, we provide an opportunity to benchmark the mapping and colorization accuracy simultaneously for a mobile multisensorial system. The dataset is approximately 800 GB in size covering both indoor and outdoor environments. The dataset and development kits are available at https://github.com/chenpengxin/PolyU-BPCoMa.git.
abstract_zh: 从移动激光扫描和图像构建彩色点云是测绘的一项基础工作。这也是构建智慧城市数字孪生的重要先决条件。然而，现有的公共数据集要么规模相对较小，要么缺乏准确的几何和颜色地面实况。本文记录了一个名为 PolyU-BPCoMA 的多传感器数据集，该数据集独特地定位于移动彩色映射。该数据集在背包平台上整合了 3D LiDAR、球面成像、GNSS 和 IMU 资源。当先进的地面激光扫描仪（TLS）收集目标和地面实况数据时，颜色棋盘被粘贴在每个测量区域。 3D 几何和颜色信息可以分别在背包系统和 TLS 生成的彩色点云中恢复。因此，我们提供了同时对移动多传感器系统的映射和着色精度进行基准测试的机会。该数据集大小约为 800 GB，涵盖室内和室外环境。数据集和开发套件可在 https://github.com/chenpengxin/PolyU-BPCoMa.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为PolyU-BPCoMa的多传感器数据集和基准测试，用于移动彩色点云映射。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集规模有限或缺乏准确的几何与颜色真实值，难以支持移动彩色映射的研究与评估。
AI.method: 整合背包平台上的3D LiDAR、球面成像、GNSS和IMU，结合颜色检查板与TLS采集的真实数据生成彩色点云。
AI.result: 构建了约800GB的室内外数据集，包含几何与颜色信息，并提供开发工具包用于基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为移动多传感器系统的映射与着色精度评估提供了新基准，推动数字孪生与智慧城市发展。

authors_text: Paolo Felli,Alessandro Gianola,Marco Montali,Andrey Rivkin,Sarah Winkler
title: Conformance Checking with Uncertainty via SMT (Extended Version)
title_zh: 通过 SMT 进行不确定性一致性检查（扩展版）
comment: Extended version of a conference paper accepted at the 20th International Conference on Business Process Management (BPM 2022)
comments: Extended version of a conference paper accepted at the 20th International Conference on Business Process Management (BPM 2022)
abstract: Logs of real-life processes often feature uncertainty pertaining the recorded timestamps, data values, and/or events. We consider the problem of checking conformance of uncertain logs against data-aware reference processes. Specifically, we show how to solve it via SMT encodings, lifting previous work on data-aware SMT-based conformance checking to this more sophisticated setting. Our approach is modular, in that it homogeneously accommodates for different types of uncertainty. Moreover, using appropriate cost functions, different conformance checking tasks can be addressed. We show the correctness of our approach and witness feasibility through a proof-of-concept implementation.
summary: Logs of real-life processes often feature uncertainty pertaining the recorded timestamps, data values, and/or events. We consider the problem of checking conformance of uncertain logs against data-aware reference processes. Specifically, we show how to solve it via SMT encodings, lifting previous work on data-aware SMT-based conformance checking to this more sophisticated setting. Our approach is modular, in that it homogeneously accommodates for different types of uncertainty. Moreover, using appropriate cost functions, different conformance checking tasks can be addressed. We show the correctness of our approach and witness feasibility through a proof-of-concept implementation.
abstract_zh: 现实生活过程的日志通常具有与记录的时间戳、数据值和/或事件相关的不确定性。我们考虑检查不确定日志与数据感知参考流程的一致性的问题。具体来说，我们展示了如何通过 SMT 编码来解决这个问题，将之前基于数据感知的 SMT 一致性检查的工作提升到这种更复杂的设置。我们的方法是模块化的，因为它均匀地适应不同类型的不确定性。此外，使用适当的成本函数，可以解决不同的一致性检查任务。我们通过概念验证实施展示了我们方法的正确性并证明了可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过SMT编码解决不确定日志与数据感知参考流程的符合性检查问题。
AI.motivation: 现实流程日志存在时间戳、数据值和事件的不确定性，传统方法难以处理此类复杂场景。
AI.method: 将不确定日志的符合性检查问题转化为SMT问题，采用模块化方法处理多种不确定性，并利用成本函数适配不同任务。
AI.result: 证明了方法的正确性，并通过概念验证实现展示了其可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效处理不确定性，具有模块化和灵活性，适用于多样化的符合性检查任务。

Specifically, we show how to solve it via SMT encodings, lifting previous work on data-aware SMT-based conformance checking to this more sophisticated setting. We show the correctness of our approach and witness feasibility through a proof-of-concept implementation. 现实生活过程的日志通常具有与记录的时间戳、数据值和/或事件相关的不确定性。我们考虑检查不确定日志与数据感知参考流程的一致性的问题。具体来说，我们展示了如何通过 SMT 编码来解决这个问题，将之前基于数据感知的 SMT 一致性检查的工作提升到这种更复杂的设置。我们的方法是模块化的，因为它均匀地适应不同类型的不确定性。此外，使用适当的成本函数，可以解决不同的一致性检查任务。我们通过概念验证实施展示了我们方法的正确性并证明了可行性。 本文提出通过SMT编码解决不确定日志与数据感知参考流程的符合性检查问题。 Paolo Felli,Alessandro Gianola,Marco Montali,Andrey Rivkin,Sarah Winkler cs.AI

authors_text: Zhihao Hu,Guo Lu,Jinyang Guo,Shan Liu,Wei Jiang,Dong Xu
title: Coarse-to-fine Deep Video Coding with Hyperprior-guided Mode Prediction
title_zh: 具有超先验引导模式预测的从粗到精的深度视频编码
abstract: The previous deep video compression approaches only use the single scale motion compensation strategy and rarely adopt the mode prediction technique from the traditional standards like H.264/H.265 for both motion and residual compression. In this work, we first propose a coarse-to-fine (C2F) deep video compression framework for better motion compensation, in which we perform motion estimation, compression and compensation twice in a coarse to fine manner. Our C2F framework can achieve better motion compensation results without significantly increasing bit costs. Observing hyperprior information (i.e., the mean and variance values) from the hyperprior networks contains discriminant statistical information of different patches, we also propose two efficient hyperprior-guided mode prediction methods. Specifically, using hyperprior information as the input, we propose two mode prediction networks to respectively predict the optimal block resolutions for better motion coding and decide whether to skip residual information from each block for better residual coding without introducing additional bit cost while bringing negligible extra computation cost. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate our proposed C2F video compression framework equipped with the new hyperprior-guided mode prediction methods achieves the state-of-the-art performance on HEVC, UVG and MCL-JCV datasets.
summary: The previous deep video compression approaches only use the single scale motion compensation strategy and rarely adopt the mode prediction technique from the traditional standards like H.264/H.265 for both motion and residual compression. In this work, we first propose a coarse-to-fine (C2F) deep video compression framework for better motion compensation, in which we perform motion estimation, compression and compensation twice in a coarse to fine manner. Our C2F framework can achieve better motion compensation results without significantly increasing bit costs. Observing hyperprior information (i.e., the mean and variance values) from the hyperprior networks contains discriminant statistical information of different patches, we also propose two efficient hyperprior-guided mode prediction methods. Specifically, using hyperprior information as the input, we propose two mode prediction networks to respectively predict the optimal block resolutions for better motion coding and decide whether to skip residual information from each block for better residual coding without introducing additional bit cost while bringing negligible extra computation cost. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate our proposed C2F video compression framework equipped with the new hyperprior-guided mode prediction methods achieves the state-of-the-art performance on HEVC, UVG and MCL-JCV datasets.
abstract_zh: 以前的深度视频压缩方法仅使用单尺度运动补偿策略，很少采用H.264/H.265等传统标准中的模式预测技术来进行运动和残差压缩。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种从粗到细（C2F）的深度视频压缩框架，以实现更好的运动补偿，其中我们以从粗到细的方式执行两次运动估计、压缩和补偿。我们的C2F框架可以在不显着增加比特成本的情况下获得更好的运动补偿结果。从超先验网络观察超先验信息（即平均值和方差值）包含不同补丁的判别统计信息，我们还提出了两种有效的超先验引导模式预测方法。具体来说，使用超先验信息作为输入，我们提出了两个模式预测网络，分别预测最佳块分辨率以实现更好的运动编码，并决定是否跳过每个块的残差信息以实现更好的残差编码，而不会引入额外的比特成本，同时带来的额外计算成本可以忽略不计。综合实验结果表明，我们提出的 C2F 视频压缩框架配备了新的超先验引导模式预测方法，在 HEVC、UVG 和 MCL-JCV 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合超先验引导模式预测的粗到细深度视频编码框架，以提升视频压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度视频压缩方法未充分利用H.264/H.265中的模式预测技术，导致运动和残差压缩效率不足。
AI.method: 设计粗到细（C2F）框架分阶段进行运动估计与补偿，并提出两种基于超先验信息的模式预测网络，分别优化运动编码分辨率选择和残差信息跳过决策。
AI.result: 在HEVC、UVG和MCL-JCV数据集上达到最先进的压缩性能，且无显著比特成本增加。
AI.conclusion: C2F框架结合超先验引导模式预测有效提升了视频压缩效率，验证了方法的有效性。

Specifically, using hyperprior information as the input, we propose two mode prediction networks to respectively predict the optimal block resolutions for better motion coding and decide whether to skip residual information from each block for better residual coding without introducing additional bit cost while bringing negligible extra computation cost. authors_text: Wenyu Jiang,Yuxin Ge,Hao Cheng,Mingcai Chen,Shuai Feng,Chongjun Wang
title: READ: Aggregating Reconstruction Error into Out-of-distribution Detection
title_zh: 阅读：将重建错误聚合到分布外检测中
abstract: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) samples is crucial to the safe deployment of a classifier in the real world. However, deep neural networks are known to be overconfident for abnormal data. Existing works directly design score function by mining the inconsistency from classifier for in-distribution (ID) and OOD. In this paper, we further complement this inconsistency with reconstruction error, based on the assumption that an autoencoder trained on ID data can not reconstruct OOD as well as ID. We propose a novel method, READ (Reconstruction Error Aggregated Detector), to unify inconsistencies from classifier and autoencoder. Specifically, the reconstruction error of raw pixels is transformed to latent space of classifier. We show that the transformed reconstruction error bridges the semantic gap and inherits detection performance from the original. Moreover, we propose an adjustment strategy to alleviate the overconfidence problem of autoencoder according to a fine-grained characterization of OOD data. Under two scenarios of pre-training and retraining, we respectively present two variants of our method, namely READ-MD (Mahalanobis Distance) only based on pre-trained classifier and READ-ED (Euclidean Distance) which retrains the classifier. Our methods do not require access to test time OOD data for fine-tuning hyperparameters. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods through extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art OOD detection algorithms. On a CIFAR-10 pre-trained WideResNet, our method reduces the average FPR@95TPR by up to 9.8% compared with previous state-of-the-art.
summary: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) samples is crucial to the safe deployment of a classifier in the real world. However, deep neural networks are known to be overconfident for abnormal data. Existing works directly design score function by mining the inconsistency from classifier for in-distribution (ID) and OOD. In this paper, we further complement this inconsistency with reconstruction error, based on the assumption that an autoencoder trained on ID data can not reconstruct OOD as well as ID. We propose a novel method, READ (Reconstruction Error Aggregated Detector), to unify inconsistencies from classifier and autoencoder. Specifically, the reconstruction error of raw pixels is transformed to latent space of classifier. We show that the transformed reconstruction error bridges the semantic gap and inherits detection performance from the original. Moreover, we propose an adjustment strategy to alleviate the overconfidence problem of autoencoder according to a fine-grained characterization of OOD data. Under two scenarios of pre-training and retraining, we respectively present two variants of our method, namely READ-MD (Mahalanobis Distance) only based on pre-trained classifier and READ-ED (Euclidean Distance) which retrains the classifier. Our methods do not require access to test time OOD data for fine-tuning hyperparameters. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods through extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art OOD detection algorithms. On a CIFAR-10 pre-trained WideResNet, our method reduces the average FPR@95TPR by up to 9.8% compared with previous state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 检测分布外 (OOD) 样本对于现实世界中分类器的安全部署至关重要。然而，众所周知，深度神经网络对异常数据过于自信。现有的工作通过挖掘分类器的分布内（ID）和OOD的不一致性来直接设计评分函数。在本文中，我们基于在 ID 数据上训练的自动编码器不能像 ID 一样重建 OOD 的假设，进一步用重建误差来补充这种不一致。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，READ（重建错误聚合检测器），来统一分类器和自动编码器的不一致性。具体来说，原始像素的重建误差被变换到分类器的潜在空间。我们表明，变换后的重建错误弥合了语义差距并继承了原始错误的检测性能。此外，我们根据 OOD 数据的细粒度特征提出了一种调整策略来缓解自动编码器的过度自信问题。在预训练和再训练两种场景下，我们分别提出了我们方法的两种变体，即仅基于预训练分类器的READ-MD（马哈拉诺比斯距离）和重新训练分类器的READ-ED（欧几里得距离）。我们的方法不需要访问测试时 OOD 数据来微调超参数。最后，我们通过与最先进的 OOD 检测算法的广泛比较来证明所提出方法的有效性。在 CIFAR-10 预训练的 WideResNet 上，与之前最先进的技术相比，我们的方法将平均 FPR@95TPR 降低了 9.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出READ方法，通过结合分类器的不一致性与自编码器的重构误差，改进异常数据检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖分类器的不一致性检测异常数据，但深度网络对异常数据过于自信。自编码器在ID数据上训练时难以重构OOD数据，可补充这一不足。
AI.method: 训练自编码器生成重构误差，将其映射到分类器的潜在空间，提出READ-MD和READ-ED两种变体，分别基于预训练分类器和重新训练分类器，无需测试时OOD数据调整超参数。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上，READ方法将FPR@95TPR平均降低9.8%，优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: READ通过融合重构误差与分类器不一致性，有效缩小语义差距，提升OOD检测性能。

authors_text: Joanna Hong,Minsu Kim,Yong Man Ro
title: VisageSynTalk: Unseen Speaker Video-to-Speech Synthesis via Speech-Visage Feature Selection
title_zh: VisageSynTalk：通过 Speech-Visage 特征选择进行看不见的说话者视频到语音合成
abstract: The goal of this work is to reconstruct speech from a silent talking face video. Recent studies have shown impressive performance on synthesizing speech from silent talking face videos. However, they have not explicitly considered on varying identity characteristics of different speakers, which place a challenge in the video-to-speech synthesis, and this becomes more critical in unseen-speaker settings. Our approach is to separate the speech content and the visage-style from a given silent talking face video. By guiding the model to independently focus on modeling the two representations, we can obtain the speech of high intelligibility from the model even when the input video of an unseen subject is given. To this end, we introduce speech-visage selection that separates the speech content and the speaker identity from the visual features of the input video. The disentangled representations are jointly incorporated to synthesize speech through visage-style based synthesizer which generates speech by coating the visage-styles while maintaining the speech content. Thus, the proposed framework brings the advantage of synthesizing the speech containing the right content even with the silent talking face video of an unseen subject. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework on the GRID, TCD-TIMIT volunteer, and LRW datasets.
summary: The goal of this work is to reconstruct speech from a silent talking face video. Recent studies have shown impressive performance on synthesizing speech from silent talking face videos. However, they have not explicitly considered on varying identity characteristics of different speakers, which place a challenge in the video-to-speech synthesis, and this becomes more critical in unseen-speaker settings. Our approach is to separate the speech content and the visage-style from a given silent talking face video. By guiding the model to independently focus on modeling the two representations, we can obtain the speech of high intelligibility from the model even when the input video of an unseen subject is given. To this end, we introduce speech-visage selection that separates the speech content and the speaker identity from the visual features of the input video. The disentangled representations are jointly incorporated to synthesize speech through visage-style based synthesizer which generates speech by coating the visage-styles while maintaining the speech content. Thus, the proposed framework brings the advantage of synthesizing the speech containing the right content even with the silent talking face video of an unseen subject. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework on the GRID, TCD-TIMIT volunteer, and LRW datasets.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是从无声说话的面部视频中重建语音。最近的研究表明，从无声说话的面部视频合成语音的性能令人印象深刻。然而，他们没有明确考虑不同说话者的不同身份特征，这给视频到语音合成带来了挑战，这在看不见的说话者环境中变得更加关键。我们的方法是将语音内容和面部风格与给定的无声说话面部视频分开。通过引导模型独立地专注于对两种表示进行建模，即使给出了未见过的主体的输入视频，我们也可以从模型中获得高清晰度的语音。为此，我们引入了语音面部选择，将语音内容和说话者身份与输入视频的视觉特征分开。解开的表示被联合合并，通过基于面貌风格的合成器合成语音，该合成器通过覆盖面貌风格来生成语音，同时保持语音内容。因此，所提出的框架具有合成包含正确内容的语音的优势，即使是看不见的主题的无声说话面部视频。我们在 GRID、TCD-TIMIT 志愿者和 LRW 数据集上验证了所提出框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VisageSynTalk的方法，用于从无声说话的面部视频中重建语音。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究在从无声说话的面部视频中合成语音方面取得了显著成果，但它们并未充分考虑不同说话者身份特征的变化，这在未见过的说话者场景中成为一大挑战。
AI.method: 该方法通过分离语音内容和面部风格，从输入视频的视觉特征中提取语音内容和说话者身份。通过独立建模这两种表示，即使输入视频来自未见过的说话者，也能生成高可理解性的语音。
AI.result: 在GRID、TCD-TIMIT志愿者和LRW数据集上验证了所提出框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够从未见过的说话者的无声说话视频中合成包含正确内容的语音，具有重要的应用价值。

authors_text: Thomas Griebel,Johannes Müller,Paul Geisler,Charlotte Hermann,Martin Herrmann,Michael Buchholz,Klaus Dietmayer
title: Self-Assessment for Single-Object Tracking in Clutter Using Subjective Logic
title_zh: 使用主观逻辑对杂波中的单目标跟踪进行自我评估
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2022 IEEE 25th International Conference on Information Fusion (FUSION), July 4 - 7, 2022, Linköping, Sweden
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2022 IEEE 25th International Conference on Information Fusion (FUSION), July 4 - 7, 2022, Linköping, Sweden
abstract: Reliable tracking algorithms are essential for automated driving. However, the existing consistency measures are not sufficient to meet the increasing safety demands in the automotive sector. Therefore, this work presents a novel method for self-assessment of single-object tracking in clutter based on Kalman filtering and subjective logic. A key feature of the approach is that it additionally provides a measure of the collected statistical evidence in its online reliability scores. In this way, various aspects of reliability, such as the correctness of the assumed measurement noise, detection probability, and clutter rate, can be monitored in addition to the overall assessment based on the available evidence. Here, we present a mathematical derivation of the reference distribution used in our self-assessment module for our studied problem. Moreover, we introduce a formula that describes how a threshold should be chosen for the degree of conflict, the subjective logic comparison measure used for the reliability decision making. Our approach is evaluated in a challenging simulation scenario designed to model adverse weather conditions. The simulations show that our method can significantly improve the reliability checking of single-object tracking in clutter in several aspects.
summary: Reliable tracking algorithms are essential for automated driving. However, the existing consistency measures are not sufficient to meet the increasing safety demands in the automotive sector. Therefore, this work presents a novel method for self-assessment of single-object tracking in clutter based on Kalman filtering and subjective logic. A key feature of the approach is that it additionally provides a measure of the collected statistical evidence in its online reliability scores. In this way, various aspects of reliability, such as the correctness of the assumed measurement noise, detection probability, and clutter rate, can be monitored in addition to the overall assessment based on the available evidence. Here, we present a mathematical derivation of the reference distribution used in our self-assessment module for our studied problem. Moreover, we introduce a formula that describes how a threshold should be chosen for the degree of conflict, the subjective logic comparison measure used for the reliability decision making. Our approach is evaluated in a challenging simulation scenario designed to model adverse weather conditions. The simulations show that our method can significantly improve the reliability checking of single-object tracking in clutter in several aspects.
abstract_zh: 可靠的跟踪算法对于自动驾驶至关重要。然而，现有的一致性措施不足以满足汽车行业日益增长的安全需求。因此，本文提出了一种基于卡尔曼滤波和主观逻辑的杂波中单目标跟踪自评估的新方法。该方法的一个关键特征是，它还提供了在线可靠性评分中收集的统计证据的衡量标准。这样，除了基于现有证据的总体评估之外，还可以监控可靠性的各个方面，例如假设的测量噪声的正确性、检测概率和杂波率。在这里，我们提出了我们研究问题的自我评估模块中使用的参考分布的数学推导。此外，我们引入了一个公式来描述如何选择冲突程度的阈值，这是用于可靠性决策的主观逻辑比较度量。我们的方法在一个具有挑战性的模拟场景中进行评估，该模拟场景旨在模拟恶劣的天气条件。仿真结果表明，我们的方法可以在多个方面显着提高杂波中单目标跟踪的可靠性检查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卡尔曼滤波和主观逻辑的单目标跟踪自评估方法，用于解决复杂环境中的跟踪可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的一致性度量无法满足自动驾驶领域日益增长的安全需求，需要更精确的跟踪可靠性评估方法。
AI.method: 结合卡尔曼滤波与主观逻辑，通过在线可靠性评分监控测量噪声、检测概率和杂波率等统计证据，并推导参考分布及冲突阈值选择公式。
AI.result: 在模拟恶劣天气场景的测试中，该方法显著提升了单目标跟踪在杂波环境中的可靠性检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过量化统计证据和动态阈值判断，有效增强了复杂场景下单目标跟踪的可靠性评估效果。

authors_text: Houssem Boulahbal,Adrian Voicila,Andrew Comport
title: Forecasting of depth and ego-motion with transformers and self-supervision
title_zh: 使用变压器和自我监督来预测深度​​和自我运动
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of end-to-end self-supervised forecasting of depth and ego motion. Given a sequence of raw images, the aim is to forecast both the geometry and ego-motion using a self supervised photometric loss. The architecture is designed using both convolution and transformer modules. This leverages the benefits of both modules: Inductive bias of CNN, and the multi-head attention of transformers, thus enabling a rich spatio-temporal representation that enables accurate depth forecasting. Prior work attempts to solve this problem using multi-modal input/output with supervised ground-truth data which is not practical since a large annotated dataset is required. Alternatively to prior methods, this paper forecasts depth and ego motion using only self-supervised raw images as input. The approach performs significantly well on the KITTI dataset benchmark with several performance criteria being even comparable to prior non-forecasting self-supervised monocular depth inference methods.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of end-to-end self-supervised forecasting of depth and ego motion. Given a sequence of raw images, the aim is to forecast both the geometry and ego-motion using a self supervised photometric loss. The architecture is designed using both convolution and transformer modules. This leverages the benefits of both modules: Inductive bias of CNN, and the multi-head attention of transformers, thus enabling a rich spatio-temporal representation that enables accurate depth forecasting. Prior work attempts to solve this problem using multi-modal input/output with supervised ground-truth data which is not practical since a large annotated dataset is required. Alternatively to prior methods, this paper forecasts depth and ego motion using only self-supervised raw images as input. The approach performs significantly well on the KITTI dataset benchmark with several performance criteria being even comparable to prior non-forecasting self-supervised monocular depth inference methods.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了深度和自我运动的端到端自监督预测问题。给定一系列原始图像，目的是使用自监督光度损失来预测几何形状和自我运动。该架构是使用卷积和变压器模块设计的。这利用了两个模块的优点：CNN 的归纳偏差和 Transformer 的多头注意力，从而实现丰富的时空表示，从而实现准确的深度预测。先前的工作尝试使用带有监督地面实况数据的多模态输入/输出来解决这个问题，但由于需要大量带注释的数据集，因此不切实际。与现有方法不同，本文仅使用自监督原始图像作为输入来预测深度​​和自我运动。该方法在 KITTI 数据集基准上表现出色，多项性能标准甚至可以与之前的非预测自监督单目深度推理方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的自监督方法，利用原始图像序列预测深度和自身运动，无需标注数据。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标注数据进行深度和运动估计，但获取大规模标注数据成本高昂且不现实，因此需要一种无需标注的自监督方案。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络（CNN）的归纳偏置和变压器（Transformer）的多头注意力机制，通过自监督光度损失函数联合优化深度和运动预测。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上表现优异，部分性能指标可与非预测型自监督单目深度估计方法媲美。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用自监督学习从原始图像中提取时空特征，为无标注数据场景下的深度和运动预测提供了可行方案。

search_text: Forecasting of depth and ego-motion with transformers and self-supervision 使用变压器和自我监督来预测深度​​和自我运动 This paper addresses the problem of end-to-end self-supervised forecasting of depth and ego motion. Given a sequence of raw images, the aim is to forecast both the geometry and ego-motion using a self supervised photometric loss. The architecture is designed using both convolution and transformer modules. This leverages the benefits of both modules: Inductive bias of CNN, and the multi-head attention of transformers, thus enabling a rich spatio-temporal representation that enables accurate depth forecasting. Prior work attempts to solve this problem using multi-modal input/output with supervised ground-truth data which is not practical since a large annotated dataset is required. Alternatively to prior methods, this paper forecasts depth and ego motion using only self-supervised raw images as input. The approach performs significantly well on the KITTI dataset benchmark with several performance criteria being even comparable to prior non-forecasting self-supervised monocular depth inference methods. 本文解决了深度和自我运动的端到端自监督预测问题。给定一系列原始图像，目的是使用自监督光度损失来预测几何形状和自我运动。该架构是使用卷积和变压器模块设计的。这利用了两个模块的优点：CNN 的归纳偏差和 Transformer 的多头注意力，从而实现丰富的时空表示，从而实现准确的深度预测。先前的工作尝试使用带有监督地面实况数据的多模态输入/输出来解决这个问题，但由于需要大量带注释的数据集，因此不切实际。与现有方法不同，本文仅使用自监督原始图像作为输入来预测深度​​和自我运动。该方法在 KITTI 数据集基准上表现出色，多项性能标准甚至可以与之前的非预测自监督单目深度推理方法相媲美。 本文提出了一种端到端的自监督方法，利用原始图像序列预测深度和自身运动，无需标注数据。 Houssem Boulahbal,Adrian Voicila,Andrew Comport cs.CV

authors_text: Jinyi Wu,Xun Gong,Zhemin Zhang
title: Self-Supervised Implicit Attention: Guided Attention by The Model Itself
title_zh: 自我监督的内隐注意力：模型本身的引导注意力
abstract: We propose Self-Supervised Implicit Attention (SSIA), a new approach that adaptively guides deep neural network models to gain attention by exploiting the properties of the models themselves. SSIA is a novel attention mechanism that does not require any extra parameters, computation, or memory access costs during inference, which is in contrast to existing attention mechanism. In short, by considering attention weights as higher-level semantic information, we reconsidered the implementation of existing attention mechanisms and further propose generating supervisory signals from higher network layers to guide lower network layers for parameter updates. We achieved this by building a self-supervised learning task using the hierarchical features of the network itself, which only works at the training stage. To verify the effectiveness of SSIA, we performed a particular implementation (called an SSIA block) in convolutional neural network models and validated it on several image classification datasets. The experimental results show that an SSIA block can significantly improve the model performance, even outperforms many popular attention methods that require additional parameters and computation costs, such as Squeeze-and-Excitation and Convolutional Block Attention Module. Our implementation will be available on GitHub.
summary: We propose Self-Supervised Implicit Attention (SSIA), a new approach that adaptively guides deep neural network models to gain attention by exploiting the properties of the models themselves. SSIA is a novel attention mechanism that does not require any extra parameters, computation, or memory access costs during inference, which is in contrast to existing attention mechanism. In short, by considering attention weights as higher-level semantic information, we reconsidered the implementation of existing attention mechanisms and further propose generating supervisory signals from higher network layers to guide lower network layers for parameter updates. We achieved this by building a self-supervised learning task using the hierarchical features of the network itself, which only works at the training stage. To verify the effectiveness of SSIA, we performed a particular implementation (called an SSIA block) in convolutional neural network models and validated it on several image classification datasets. The experimental results show that an SSIA block can significantly improve the model performance, even outperforms many popular attention methods that require additional parameters and computation costs, such as Squeeze-and-Excitation and Convolutional Block Attention Module. Our implementation will be available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了自监督隐式注意力（SSIA），这是一种新方法，可自适应地引导深度神经网络模型通过利用模型本身的属性来获得注意力。 SSIA 是一种新颖的注意力机制，与现有的注意力机制相比，它在推理过程中不需要任何额外的参数、计算或内存访问成本。简而言之，通过将注意力权重视为更高级别的语义信息，我们重新考虑了现有注意力机制的实现，并进一步提出从较高网络层生成监督信号以指导较低网络层进行参数更新。我们通过使用网络本身的分层特征构建自监督学习任务来实现这一目标，该任务仅在训练阶段起作用。为了验证 SSIA 的有效性，我们在卷积神经网络模型中执行了特定的实现（称为 SSIA 块），并在多个图像分类数据集上进行了验证。实验结果表明，SSIA 块可以显着提高模型性能，甚至优于许多需要额外参数和计算成本的流行注意力方法，例如 Squeeze-and-Exitation 和 Convolutional Block Attention Module。我们的实现将在 GitHub 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为自监督隐式注意力（SSIA）的新方法，用于自适应引导深度神经网络模型获得注意力。
AI.motivation: 现有的注意力机制通常需要额外的参数、计算或内存访问成本，而本文旨在开发一种无需额外开销的注意力机制。
AI.method: 通过将注意力权重视为更高层次的语义信息，本文重新考虑了现有注意力机制的实现，并提出了从更高网络层生成监督信号以指导低层网络参数更新的方法。通过构建一个仅在训练阶段工作的自监督学习任务来实现这一点。
AI.result: 在多个图像分类数据集上验证了SSIA块的有效性，实验结果表明SSIA块可以显著提高模型性能，甚至优于许多需要额外参数和计算成本的流行注意力方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的SSIA方法在无需额外参数和计算成本的情况下显著提升了模型性能，具有重要的应用价值。

authors_text: Cyprien Ruffino,Rachel Blin,Samia Ainouz,Gilles Gasso,Romain Hérault,Fabrice Meriaudeau,Stéphane Canu
title: Physically-admissible polarimetric data augmentation for road-scene analysis
title_zh: 用于道路场景分析的物理上可接受的偏振数据增强
abstract: Polarimetric imaging, along with deep learning, has shown improved performances on different tasks including scene analysis. However, its robustness may be questioned because of the small size of the training datasets. Though the issue could be solved by data augmentation, polarization modalities are subject to physical feasibility constraints unaddressed by classical data augmentation techniques. To address this issue, we propose to use CycleGAN, an image translation technique based on deep generative models that solely relies on unpaired data, to transfer large labeled road scene datasets to the polarimetric domain. We design several auxiliary loss terms that, alongside the CycleGAN losses, deal with the physical constraints of polarimetric images. The efficiency of this solution is demonstrated on road scene object detection tasks where generated realistic polarimetric images allow to improve performances on cars and pedestrian detection up to 9%. The resulting constrained CycleGAN is publicly released, allowing anyone to generate their own polarimetric images.
summary: Polarimetric imaging, along with deep learning, has shown improved performances on different tasks including scene analysis. However, its robustness may be questioned because of the small size of the training datasets. Though the issue could be solved by data augmentation, polarization modalities are subject to physical feasibility constraints unaddressed by classical data augmentation techniques. To address this issue, we propose to use CycleGAN, an image translation technique based on deep generative models that solely relies on unpaired data, to transfer large labeled road scene datasets to the polarimetric domain. We design several auxiliary loss terms that, alongside the CycleGAN losses, deal with the physical constraints of polarimetric images. The efficiency of this solution is demonstrated on road scene object detection tasks where generated realistic polarimetric images allow to improve performances on cars and pedestrian detection up to 9%. The resulting constrained CycleGAN is publicly released, allowing anyone to generate their own polarimetric images.
abstract_zh: 偏振成像与深度学习一起，在包括场景分析在内的不同任务上表现出了改进的性能。然而，由于训练数据集规模较小，其稳健性可能会受到质疑。尽管这个问题可以通过数据增强来解决，但偏振模态受到传统数据增强技术无法解决的物理可行性约束。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用 CycleGAN，一种基于深度生成模型的图像翻译技术，仅依赖于不成对的数据，将大型标记道路场景数据集传输到极化域。我们设计了几个辅助损失项，与 CycleGAN 损失一起处理偏振图像的物理约束。该解决方案的效率在道路场景对象检测任务中得到了证明，其中生成的逼真偏振图像可以将汽车和行人检测的性能提高高达 9%。由此产生的受限 CycleGAN 被公开发布，允许任何人生成自己的偏振图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CycleGAN的物理可行的偏振数据增强方法，用于改善道路场景分析的深度学习模型性能。
AI.motivation: 偏振成像与深度学习结合在场景分析任务中表现出色，但受限于训练数据集规模小，且传统数据增强方法无法满足偏振图像的物理可行性约束。
AI.method: 利用CycleGAN图像翻译技术，结合设计的辅助损失函数，将大规模标注的道路场景数据集转换为偏振域，并确保生成图像符合物理约束。
AI.result: 在道路场景目标检测任务中，生成的偏振图像使车辆和行人检测性能提升了9%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了偏振图像的物理可行性问题，并提升了深度学习模型在道路场景分析中的性能。

The resulting constrained CycleGAN is publicly released, allowing anyone to generate their own polarimetric images. 偏振成像与深度学习一起，在包括场景分析在内的不同任务上表现出了改进的性能。然而，由于训练数据集规模较小，其稳健性可能会受到质疑。尽管这个问题可以通过数据增强来解决，但偏振模态受到传统数据增强技术无法解决的物理可行性约束。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用 CycleGAN，一种基于深度生成模型的图像翻译技术，仅依赖于不成对的数据，将大型标记道路场景数据集传输到极化域。我们设计了几个辅助损失项，与 CycleGAN 损失一起处理偏振图像的物理约束。该解决方案的效率在道路场景对象检测任务中得到了证明，其中生成的逼真偏振图像可以将汽车和行人检测的性能提高高达 9%。由此产生的受限 CycleGAN 被公开发布，允许任何人生成自己的偏振图像。 本文提出了一种基于CycleGAN的物理可行的偏振数据增强方法，用于改善道路场景分析的深度学习模型性能。 Cyprien Ruffino,Rachel Blin,Samia Ainouz,Gilles Gasso,Romain Hérault,Fabrice Meriaudeau,Stéphane Canu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Emiru Tsunoo,Yosuke Kashiwagi,Chaitanya Narisetty,Shinji Watanabe
title: Residual Language Model for End-to-end Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于端到端语音识别的残差语言模型
abstract: End-to-end automatic speech recognition suffers from adaptation to unknown target domain speech despite being trained with a large amount of paired audio--text data. Recent studies estimate a linguistic bias of the model as the internal language model (LM). To effectively adapt to the target domain, the internal LM is subtracted from the posterior during inference and fused with an external target-domain LM. However, this fusion complicates the inference and the estimation of the internal LM may not always be accurate. In this paper, we propose a simple external LM fusion method for domain adaptation, which considers the internal LM estimation in its training. We directly model the residual factor of the external and internal LMs, namely the residual LM. To stably train the residual LM, we propose smoothing the estimated internal LM and optimizing it with a combination of cross-entropy and mean-squared-error losses, which consider the statistical behaviors of the internal LM in the target domain data. We experimentally confirmed that the proposed residual LM performs better than the internal LM estimation in most of the cross-domain and intra-domain scenarios.
summary: End-to-end automatic speech recognition suffers from adaptation to unknown target domain speech despite being trained with a large amount of paired audio--text data. Recent studies estimate a linguistic bias of the model as the internal language model (LM). To effectively adapt to the target domain, the internal LM is subtracted from the posterior during inference and fused with an external target-domain LM. However, this fusion complicates the inference and the estimation of the internal LM may not always be accurate. In this paper, we propose a simple external LM fusion method for domain adaptation, which considers the internal LM estimation in its training. We directly model the residual factor of the external and internal LMs, namely the residual LM. To stably train the residual LM, we propose smoothing the estimated internal LM and optimizing it with a combination of cross-entropy and mean-squared-error losses, which consider the statistical behaviors of the internal LM in the target domain data. We experimentally confirmed that the proposed residual LM performs better than the internal LM estimation in most of the cross-domain and intra-domain scenarios.
abstract_zh: 尽管使用大量配对的音频-文本数据进行训练，但端到端自动语音识别仍无法适应未知的目标域语音。最近的研究将该模型的语言偏差估计为内部语言模型（LM）。为了有效地适应目标域，在推理过程中从后验中减去内部 LM，并与外部目标域 LM 融合。然而，这种融合使推理变得复杂，并且内部 LM 的估计可能并不总是准确的。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于域自适应的简单外部 LM 融合方法，该方法在训练中考虑了内部 LM 估计。我们直接对外部和内部 LM 的残差因子进行建模，即残差 LM。为了稳定地训练残差LM，我们建议平滑估计的内部LM，并结合交叉熵和均方误差损失对其进行优化，其中考虑了内部LM在目标域数据中的统计行为。我们通过实验证实，在大多数跨域和域内场景中，所提出的残差 LM 比内部 LM 估计表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种残差语言模型（Residual LM）方法，用于改进端到端语音识别的领域适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过减去内部语言模型（LM）并融合外部领域LM进行适应，但存在估计不准确和推理复杂的问题。
AI.method: 直接建模外部LM与内部LM的残差因子，通过平滑估计的内部LM，并结合交叉熵与均方误差损失进行优化。
AI.result: 在跨领域和同领域场景中，残差LM性能优于内部LM估计方法。
AI.conclusion: 残差LM通过稳定训练和领域数据统计特性优化，有效提升了语音识别的领域适应能力。

authors_text: Qianfan Zhao,Lu Zhang,Bin He,Hong Qiao,Zhiyong Liu
title: Zero-shot object goal visual navigation
title_zh: 零样本目标视觉导航
abstract: Object goal visual navigation is a challenging task that aims to guide a robot to find the target object based on its visual observation, and the target is limited to the classes pre-defined in the training stage. However, in real households, there may exist numerous target classes that the robot needs to deal with, and it is hard for all of these classes to be contained in the training stage. To address this challenge, we study the zero-shot object goal visual navigation task, which aims at guiding robots to find targets belonging to novel classes without any training samples. To this end, we also propose a novel zero-shot object navigation framework called semantic similarity network (SSNet). Our framework use the detection results and the cosine similarity between semantic word embeddings as input. Such type of input data has a weak correlation with classes and thus our framework has the ability to generalize the policy to novel classes. Extensive experiments on the AI2-THOR platform show that our model outperforms the baseline models in the zero-shot object navigation task, which proves the generalization ability of our model. Our code is available at: https://github.com/pioneer-innovation/Zero-Shot-Object-Navigation.
summary: Object goal visual navigation is a challenging task that aims to guide a robot to find the target object based on its visual observation, and the target is limited to the classes pre-defined in the training stage. However, in real households, there may exist numerous target classes that the robot needs to deal with, and it is hard for all of these classes to be contained in the training stage. To address this challenge, we study the zero-shot object goal visual navigation task, which aims at guiding robots to find targets belonging to novel classes without any training samples. To this end, we also propose a novel zero-shot object navigation framework called semantic similarity network (SSNet). Our framework use the detection results and the cosine similarity between semantic word embeddings as input. Such type of input data has a weak correlation with classes and thus our framework has the ability to generalize the policy to novel classes. Extensive experiments on the AI2-THOR platform show that our model outperforms the baseline models in the zero-shot object navigation task, which proves the generalization ability of our model. Our code is available at: https://github.com/pioneer-innovation/Zero-Shot-Object-Navigation.
abstract_zh: 目标目标视觉导航是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在引导机器人根据视觉观察找到目标物体，并且目标仅限于训练阶段预先定义的类别。然而，在现实家庭中，机器人需要处理的目标类别可能非常多，而训练阶段很难包含所有这些类别。为了应对这一挑战，我们研究了零样本目标目标视觉导航任务，该任务旨在引导机器人在没有任何训练样本的情况下找到属于新类别的目标。为此，我们还提出了一种新颖的零样本对象导航框架，称为语义相似性网络（SSNet）。我们的框架使用检测结果和语义词嵌入之间的余弦相似度作为输入。这种类型的输入数据与类的相关性很弱，因此我们的框架能够将策略推广到新的类。 AI2-THOR平台上的大量实验表明，我们的模型在零样本目标导航任务中优于基线模型，这证明了我们模型的泛化能力。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/pioneer-innovation/Zero-Shot-Object-Navigation。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种零样本目标视觉导航方法，使机器人能够在未见过的目标类别中进行导航。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉导航任务依赖于预定义的训练类别，但实际场景中可能存在大量未在训练阶段覆盖的新类别，导致模型无法处理。
AI.method: 提出语义相似度网络（SSNet），利用目标检测结果和语义词嵌入的余弦相似度作为输入，通过弱类别关联性实现策略泛化。
AI.result: 在AI2-THOR平台的实验表明，该模型在零样本目标导航任务中优于基线模型，验证了其泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SSNet通过语义相似度建模有效解决了零样本视觉导航问题，为应对现实场景中未知目标类别的导航任务提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Amirreza Mahbod,Rahim Entezari,Isabella Ellinger,Olga Saukh
title: Deep Neural Network Pruning for Nuclei Instance Segmentation in Hematoxylin & Eosin-Stained Histological Images
title_zh: 用于苏木精和曙红染色组织学图像中细胞核实例分割的深度神经网络修剪
abstract: Recently, pruning deep neural networks (DNNs) has received a lot of attention for improving accuracy and generalization power, reducing network size, and increasing inference speed on specialized hardwares. Although pruning was mainly tested on computer vision tasks, its application in the context of medical image analysis has hardly been explored. This work investigates the impact of well-known pruning techniques, namely layer-wise and network-wide magnitude pruning, on the nuclei instance segmentation performance in histological images. Our utilized instance segmentation model consists of two main branches: (1) a semantic segmentation branch, and (2) a deep regression branch. We investigate the impact of weight pruning on the performance of both branches separately and on the final nuclei instance segmentation result. Evaluated on two publicly available datasets, our results show that layer-wise pruning delivers slightly better performance than networkwide pruning for small compression ratios (CRs) while for large CRs, network-wide pruning yields superior performance. For semantic segmentation, deep regression and final instance segmentation, 93.75 %, 95 %, and 80 % of the model weights can be pruned by layer-wise pruning with less than 2 % reduction in the performance of respective models.
summary: Recently, pruning deep neural networks (DNNs) has received a lot of attention for improving accuracy and generalization power, reducing network size, and increasing inference speed on specialized hardwares. Although pruning was mainly tested on computer vision tasks, its application in the context of medical image analysis has hardly been explored. This work investigates the impact of well-known pruning techniques, namely layer-wise and network-wide magnitude pruning, on the nuclei instance segmentation performance in histological images. Our utilized instance segmentation model consists of two main branches: (1) a semantic segmentation branch, and (2) a deep regression branch. We investigate the impact of weight pruning on the performance of both branches separately and on the final nuclei instance segmentation result. Evaluated on two publicly available datasets, our results show that layer-wise pruning delivers slightly better performance than networkwide pruning for small compression ratios (CRs) while for large CRs, network-wide pruning yields superior performance. For semantic segmentation, deep regression and final instance segmentation, 93.75 %, 95 %, and 80 % of the model weights can be pruned by layer-wise pruning with less than 2 % reduction in the performance of respective models.
abstract_zh: 最近，剪枝深度神经网络 (DNN) 由于提高准确性和泛化能力、减小网络规模以及提高专用硬件上的推理速度而受到广泛关注。尽管剪枝主要在计算机视觉任务上进行测试，但其在医学图像分析中的应用几乎没有被探索过。这项工作研究了众所周知的修剪技术（即分层和网络范围的幅度修剪）对组织学图像中细胞核实例分割性能的影响。我们使用的实例分割模型由两个主要分支组成：（1）语义分割分支，（2）深度回归分支。我们分别研究了权重剪枝对两个分支性能以及最终核实例分割结果的影响。通过对两个公开可用的数据集进行评估，我们的结果表明，对于小压缩比 (CR)，分层剪枝的性能比全网络剪枝稍好，而对于大 CR，全网络剪枝可产生卓越的性能。对于语义分割、深度回归和最终实例分割，93.75%、95%和80%的模型权重可以通过逐层剪枝来剪枝，各个模型的性能下降幅度小于2%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度神经网络剪枝技术对组织学图像中细胞核实例分割性能的影响，比较了分层剪枝与全局剪枝的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管剪枝技术在计算机视觉领域广泛应用，但其在医学图像分析中的应用尚未充分探索，尤其针对细胞核分割任务的模型优化需求迫切。
AI.method: 采用包含语义分割分支和深度回归分支的双分支模型，分别评估分层剪枝与全局剪枝对各分支及最终分割结果的影响，并在两个公开数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 分层剪枝在小型压缩比下表现优于全局剪枝，而大型压缩比下全局剪枝更优。分层剪枝可分别保留93.75%、95%、80%的模型权重，且性能下降均小于2%。
AI.conclusion: 剪枝技术能有效压缩医学图像分割模型，同时保持较高精度，不同剪枝策略适用于不同压缩需求，为模型部署提供优化方向。

search_text: Deep Neural Network Pruning for Nuclei Instance Segmentation in Hematoxylin & Eosin-Stained Histological Images 用于苏木精和曙红染色组织学图像中细胞核实例分割的深度神经网络修剪 Recently, pruning deep neural networks (DNNs) has received a lot of attention for improving accuracy and generalization power, reducing network size, and increasing inference speed on specialized hardwares. Although pruning was mainly tested on computer vision tasks, its application in the context of medical image analysis has hardly been explored. This work investigates the impact of well-known pruning techniques, namely layer-wise and network-wide magnitude pruning, on the nuclei instance segmentation performance in histological images. Our utilized instance segmentation model consists of two main branches: (1) a semantic segmentation branch, and (2) a deep regression branch. We investigate the impact of weight pruning on the performance of both branches separately and on the final nuclei instance segmentation result. Evaluated on two publicly available datasets, our results show that layer-wise pruning delivers slightly better performance than networkwide pruning for small compression ratios (CRs) while for large CRs, network-wide pruning yields superior performance. For semantic segmentation, deep regression and final instance segmentation, 93.75 %, 95 %, and 80 % of the model weights can be pruned by layer-wise pruning with less than 2 % reduction in the performance of respective models. 最近，剪枝深度神经网络 (DNN) 由于提高准确性和泛化能力、减小网络规模以及提高专用硬件上的推理速度而受到广泛关注。尽管剪枝主要在计算机视觉任务上进行测试，但其在医学图像分析中的应用几乎没有被探索过。这项工作研究了众所周知的修剪技术（即分层和网络范围的幅度修剪）对组织学图像中细胞核实例分割性能的影响。我们使用的实例分割模型由两个主要分支组成：（1）语义分割分支，（2）深度回归分支。我们分别研究了权重剪枝对两个分支性能以及最终核实例分割结果的影响。通过对两个公开可用的数据集进行评估，我们的结果表明，对于小压缩比 (CR)，分层剪枝的性能比全网络剪枝稍好，而对于大 CR，全网络剪枝可产生卓越的性能。对于语义分割、深度回归和最终实例分割，93.75%、95%和80%的模型权重可以通过逐层剪枝来剪枝，各个模型的性能下降幅度小于2%。 本文研究了深度神经网络剪枝技术对组织学图像中细胞核实例分割性能的影响，比较了分层剪枝与全局剪枝的效果。 Amirreza Mahbod,Rahim Entezari,Isabella Ellinger,Olga Saukh eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Huy-Dung Nguyen,Michaël Clément,Boris Mansencal,Pierrick Coupé
title: Interpretable differential diagnosis for Alzheimer's disease and Frontotemporal dementia
title_zh: 阿尔茨海默病和额颞叶痴呆的可解释鉴别诊断
abstract: Alzheimer's disease and Frontotemporal dementia are two major types of dementia. Their accurate diagnosis and differentiation is crucial for determining specific intervention and treatment. However, differential diagnosis of these two types of dementia remains difficult at the early stage of disease due to similar patterns of clinical symptoms. Therefore, the automatic classification of multiple types of dementia has an important clinical value. So far, this challenge has not been actively explored. Recent development of deep learning in the field of medical image has demonstrated high performance for various classification tasks. In this paper, we propose to take advantage of two types of biomarkers: structure grading and structure atrophy. To this end, we propose first to train a large ensemble of 3D U-Nets to locally discriminate healthy versus dementia anatomical patterns. The result of these models is an interpretable 3D grading map capable of indicating abnormal brain regions. This map can also be exploited in various classification tasks using graph convolutional neural network. Finally, we propose to combine deep grading and atrophy-based classifications to improve dementia type discrimination. The proposed framework showed competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods for different tasks of disease detection and differential diagnosis.
summary: Alzheimer's disease and Frontotemporal dementia are two major types of dementia. Their accurate diagnosis and differentiation is crucial for determining specific intervention and treatment. However, differential diagnosis of these two types of dementia remains difficult at the early stage of disease due to similar patterns of clinical symptoms. Therefore, the automatic classification of multiple types of dementia has an important clinical value. So far, this challenge has not been actively explored. Recent development of deep learning in the field of medical image has demonstrated high performance for various classification tasks. In this paper, we propose to take advantage of two types of biomarkers: structure grading and structure atrophy. To this end, we propose first to train a large ensemble of 3D U-Nets to locally discriminate healthy versus dementia anatomical patterns. The result of these models is an interpretable 3D grading map capable of indicating abnormal brain regions. This map can also be exploited in various classification tasks using graph convolutional neural network. Finally, we propose to combine deep grading and atrophy-based classifications to improve dementia type discrimination. The proposed framework showed competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods for different tasks of disease detection and differential diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病和额颞叶痴呆是痴呆的两种主要类型。它们的准确诊断和鉴别对于确定具体的干预和治疗至关重要。然而，由于临床症状相似，这两种类型的痴呆症在疾病早期的鉴别诊断仍然很困难。因此，多型痴呆的自动分类具有重要的临床价值。到目前为止，这一挑战尚未得到积极探索。深度学习在医学图像领域的最新发展已经在各种分类任务中表现出了高性能。在本文中，我们建议利用两种类型的生物标志物：结构分级和结构萎缩。为此，我们建议首先训练大型 3D U-Net 集合，以局部区分健康与痴呆的解剖模式。这些模型的结果是一个可解释的 3D 分级图，能够指示异常的大脑区域。该图还可以用于使用图卷积神经网络的各种分类任务。最后，我们建议将深度分级和基于萎缩的分类相结合，以改善痴呆症类型的区分。与疾病检测和鉴别诊断的不同任务的最先进方法相比，所提出的框架显示出具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构分级和萎缩标志物的可解释框架，用于自动鉴别阿尔茨海默病和额颞叶痴呆。
AI.motivation: 两种痴呆症早期症状相似导致鉴别困难，而准确诊断对治疗至关重要，但现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 训练3D U-Net生成异常脑区分级图，结合图卷积网络进行分类，并融合结构分级与萎缩特征提升鉴别能力。
AI.result: 该框架在疾病检测和鉴别诊断任务中表现与现有最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合结构特征与图神经网络，框架实现了可解释的痴呆类型鉴别，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Kaustav Bose,Abhinav Chakraborty,Krishnendu Mukhopadhyaya
title: Mutual Visibility by Fat Robots with Slim Omnidirectional Camera
title_zh: 胖机器人与超薄全向相机的相互可见性
abstract: In the existing literature of the Mutual Visibility problem for autonomous robot swarms, the adopted visibility models have some idealistic assumptions that are not consistent with practical sensing device implementations. This paper investigates the problem in the more realistic visibility model called opaque fat robots with slim omnidirectional camera. The robots are modeled as unit disks, each having an omnidirectional camera represented as a disk of smaller size. We assume that the robots have compasses that allow agreement in the direction and orientation of both axes of their local coordinate systems. The robots are equipped with visible lights which serve as a medium of communication and also as a form of memory. We present a distributed algorithm for the Mutual Visibility problem which is provably correct in the semi-synchronous setting. Our algorithm also provides a solution for Leader Election which we use as a subroutine in our main algorithm. Although Leader Election is trivial with two axis agreement in the full visibility model, it is challenging in our case and is of independent interest.
summary: In the existing literature of the Mutual Visibility problem for autonomous robot swarms, the adopted visibility models have some idealistic assumptions that are not consistent with practical sensing device implementations. This paper investigates the problem in the more realistic visibility model called opaque fat robots with slim omnidirectional camera. The robots are modeled as unit disks, each having an omnidirectional camera represented as a disk of smaller size. We assume that the robots have compasses that allow agreement in the direction and orientation of both axes of their local coordinate systems. The robots are equipped with visible lights which serve as a medium of communication and also as a form of memory. We present a distributed algorithm for the Mutual Visibility problem which is provably correct in the semi-synchronous setting. Our algorithm also provides a solution for Leader Election which we use as a subroutine in our main algorithm. Although Leader Election is trivial with two axis agreement in the full visibility model, it is challenging in our case and is of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 在自主机器人群的相互可见性问题的现有文献中，所采用的可见性模型具有一些与实际传感设备实现不一致的理想化假设。本文研究了更现实的可见性模型中的问题，该模型称为带有细长全向相机的不透明脂肪机器人。机器人被建模为单位圆盘，每个圆盘都有一个全向摄像机，表示为较小尺寸的圆盘。我们假设机器人具有指南针，可以使其局部坐标系的两个轴的方向和方位保持一致。这些机器人配备了可见光，可作为通信媒介和记忆形式。我们提出了一种用于解决相互可见性问题的分布式算法，该算法在半同步设置中被证明是正确的。我们的算法还提供了领导者选举的解决方案，我们将其用作主算法中的子例程。尽管在完整可见性模型中，领导者选举对于两轴协议来说是微不足道的，但在我们的案例中它具有挑战性并且具有独立的利益。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在更现实的机器人模型下解决自主机器人集群的相互可见性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中的可见性模型存在理想化假设，与实际传感设备实现不一致，需提出更符合实际的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用分布式算法，在半同步环境下解决相互可见性问题，并设计领导者选举子程序作为辅助。
AI.result: 提出了一种可证明正确的分布式算法，并解决了在有限可见性模型下的领导者选举问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文为实际机器人系统提供了可行的相互可见性解决方案，并展示了领导者选举的独立研究价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了在更现实的机器人模型下解决自主机器人集群的相互可见性问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有文献中的可见性模型存在理想化假设，与实际传感设备实现不一致，需提出更符合实际的解决方案。

ai_content.result: 提出了一种可证明正确的分布式算法，并解决了在有限可见性模型下的领导者选举问题。

search_text: Mutual Visibility by Fat Robots with Slim Omnidirectional Camera 胖机器人与超薄全向相机的相互可见性 In the existing literature of the Mutual Visibility problem for autonomous robot swarms, the adopted visibility models have some idealistic assumptions that are not consistent with practical sensing device implementations. This paper investigates the problem in the more realistic visibility model called opaque fat robots with slim omnidirectional camera. The robots are modeled as unit disks, each having an omnidirectional camera represented as a disk of smaller size. We assume that the robots have compasses that allow agreement in the direction and orientation of both axes of their local coordinate systems. The robots are equipped with visible lights which serve as a medium of communication and also as a form of memory. We present a distributed algorithm for the Mutual Visibility problem which is provably correct in the semi-synchronous setting. Our algorithm also provides a solution for Leader Election which we use as a subroutine in our main algorithm. Although Leader Election is trivial with two axis agreement in the full visibility model, it is challenging in our case and is of independent interest. 在自主机器人群的相互可见性问题的现有文献中，所采用的可见性模型具有一些与实际传感设备实现不一致的理想化假设。本文研究了更现实的可见性模型中的问题，该模型称为带有细长全向相机的不透明脂肪机器人。机器人被建模为单位圆盘，每个圆盘都有一个全向摄像机，表示为较小尺寸的圆盘。我们假设机器人具有指南针，可以使其局部坐标系的两个轴的方向和方位保持一致。这些机器人配备了可见光，可作为通信媒介和记忆形式。我们提出了一种用于解决相互可见性问题的分布式算法，该算法在半同步设置中被证明是正确的。我们的算法还提供了领导者选举的解决方案，我们将其用作主算法中的子例程。尽管在完整可见性模型中，领导者选举对于两轴协议来说是微不足道的，但在我们的案例中它具有挑战性并且具有独立的利益。 本文研究了在更现实的机器人模型下解决自主机器人集群的相互可见性问题。 Kaustav Bose,Abhinav Chakraborty,Krishnendu Mukhopadhyaya cs.RO,cs.CG,cs.DC

authors_text: Antonio Bruno,Davide Moroni,Massimo Martinelli
title: Efficient Adaptive Ensembling for Image Classification
title_zh: 用于图像分类的高效自适应集成
abstract: In recent times, with the exception of sporadic cases, the trend in Computer Vision is to achieve minor improvements compared to considerable increases in complexity. To reverse this trend, we propose a novel method to boost image classification performances without increasing complexity. To this end, we revisited ensembling, a powerful approach, often not used properly due to its more complex nature and the training time, so as to make it feasible through a specific design choice. First, we trained two EfficientNet-b0 end-to-end models (known to be the architecture with the best overall accuracy/complexity trade-off for image classification) on disjoint subsets of data (i.e. bagging). Then, we made an efficient adaptive ensemble by performing fine-tuning of a trainable combination layer. In this way, we were able to outperform the state-of-the-art by an average of 0.5$\%$ on the accuracy, with restrained complexity both in terms of the number of parameters (by 5-60 times), and the FLoating point Operations Per Second (FLOPS) by 10-100 times on several major benchmark datasets.
summary: In recent times, with the exception of sporadic cases, the trend in Computer Vision is to achieve minor improvements compared to considerable increases in complexity. To reverse this trend, we propose a novel method to boost image classification performances without increasing complexity. To this end, we revisited ensembling, a powerful approach, often not used properly due to its more complex nature and the training time, so as to make it feasible through a specific design choice. First, we trained two EfficientNet-b0 end-to-end models (known to be the architecture with the best overall accuracy/complexity trade-off for image classification) on disjoint subsets of data (i.e. bagging). Then, we made an efficient adaptive ensemble by performing fine-tuning of a trainable combination layer. In this way, we were able to outperform the state-of-the-art by an average of 0.5$\%$ on the accuracy, with restrained complexity both in terms of the number of parameters (by 5-60 times), and the FLoating point Operations Per Second (FLOPS) by 10-100 times on several major benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 近年来，除了零星的情况外，计算机视觉的趋势是与复杂性的大幅增加相比，实现微小的改进。为了扭转这一趋势，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来提高图像分类性能而不增加复杂性。为此，我们重新审视了集成这一强大的方法，但由于其更复杂的性质和训练时间而经常未被正确使用，以便通过特定的设计选择使其变得可行。首先，我们在不相交的数据子集（即装袋）上训练了两个 EfficientNet-b0 端到端模型（已知是图像分类方面具有最佳整体精度/复杂性权衡的架构）。然后，我们通过对可训练的组合层进行微调来制作高效的自适应集成。通过这种方式，我们能够在准确度上平均优于最先进的技术 0.5$\%$，同时在参数数量（5-60 倍）和几个主要基准数据集上的每秒浮点操作数 (FLOPS) 方面降低复杂性 10-100 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的自适应集成方法，用于提升图像分类的性能，同时不增加模型复杂度。
AI.motivation: 目前计算机视觉领域在提升性能的同时，往往伴随着复杂度的显著增加。为了改变这一趋势，本文希望通过改进集成方法，在不增加复杂度的情况下提高图像分类性能。
AI.method: 本文首先使用两个EfficientNet-b0模型在不同的数据子集上进行训练（即袋外采样）。随后，通过训练一个可调的组合层进行微调，实现高效的自适应集成。
AI.result: 在多个主要基准数据集上，该方法在保持较低复杂度（参数数量减少5-60倍，FLOPS减少10-100倍）的同时，平均准确率提升了0.5%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自适应集成方法可以在不显著增加模型复杂度的前提下，有效提升图像分类性能，为未来的研究提供了新的思路。
