authors_text: André Artelt,Alexander Schulz,Barbara Hammer
title: "Why Here and Not There?" -- Diverse Contrasting Explanations of Dimensionality Reduction
title_zh: “为什么在这里而不是那里？” ——降维的多种对比解释
comment: Accepted and presented as a full conference paper at ICPRAM 2023
comments: Accepted and presented as a full conference paper at ICPRAM 2023
abstract: Dimensionality reduction is a popular preprocessing and a widely used tool in data mining. Transparency, which is usually achieved by means of explanations, is nowadays a widely accepted and crucial requirement of machine learning based systems like classifiers and recommender systems. However, transparency of dimensionality reduction and other data mining tools have not been considered in much depth yet, still it is crucial to understand their behavior -- in particular practitioners might want to understand why a specific sample got mapped to a specific location. In order to (locally) understand the behavior of a given dimensionality reduction method, we introduce the abstract concept of contrasting explanations for dimensionality reduction, and apply a realization of this concept to the specific application of explaining two dimensional data visualization.
summary: Dimensionality reduction is a popular preprocessing and a widely used tool in data mining. Transparency, which is usually achieved by means of explanations, is nowadays a widely accepted and crucial requirement of machine learning based systems like classifiers and recommender systems. However, transparency of dimensionality reduction and other data mining tools have not been considered in much depth yet, still it is crucial to understand their behavior -- in particular practitioners might want to understand why a specific sample got mapped to a specific location. In order to (locally) understand the behavior of a given dimensionality reduction method, we introduce the abstract concept of contrasting explanations for dimensionality reduction, and apply a realization of this concept to the specific application of explaining two dimensional data visualization.
abstract_zh: 降维是数据挖掘中流行的预处理和广泛使用的工具。透明度通常通过解释来实现，如今已成为分类器和推荐系统等基于机器学习的系统的广泛接受和关键要求。然而，降维和其他数据挖掘工具的透明度尚未得到深入考虑，但了解它们的行为仍然至关重要——特别是从业者可能想了解为什么特定样本被映射到特定位置。为了（局部）理解给定降维方法的行为，我们引入了降维对比解释的抽象概念，并将该概念的实现应用于解释二维数据可视化的具体应用。

AI.tldr: 提出对比解释方法以增强降维技术的透明性，解释数据点在可视化中的位置原因。
AI.motivation: 当前降维方法的透明性不足，实践者需要理解数据点映射位置的原因，以提高模型可解释性。
AI.method: 引入对比解释框架，通过局部分析降维方法的行为，生成不同数据点位置的对比解释。
AI.result: 该方法能有效生成对比解释，帮助理解降维结果中的位置差异。
AI.conclusion: 对比解释增强了降维的透明性，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zequn Qin,Pengyi Zhang,Xi Li
title: Ultra Fast Deep Lane Detection with Hybrid Anchor Driven Ordinal Classification
title_zh: 具有混合锚驱动序数分类的超快速深度车道检测
abstract: Modern methods mainly regard lane detection as a problem of pixel-wise segmentation, which is struggling to address the problems of efficiency and challenging scenarios like severe occlusions and extreme lighting conditions. Inspired by human perception, the recognition of lanes under severe occlusions and extreme lighting conditions is mainly based on contextual and global information. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel, simple, yet effective formulation aiming at ultra fast speed and the problem of challenging scenarios. Specifically, we treat the process of lane detection as an anchor-driven ordinal classification problem using global features. First, we represent lanes with sparse coordinates on a series of hybrid (row and column) anchors. With the help of the anchor-driven representation, we then reformulate the lane detection task as an ordinal classification problem to get the coordinates of lanes. Our method could significantly reduce the computational cost with the anchor-driven representation. Using the large receptive field property of the ordinal classification formulation, we could also handle challenging scenarios. Extensive experiments on four lane detection datasets show that our method could achieve state-of-the-art performance in terms of both speed and accuracy. A lightweight version could even achieve 300+ frames per second(FPS). Our code is at https://github.com/cfzd/Ultra-Fast-Lane-Detection-v2.
summary: Modern methods mainly regard lane detection as a problem of pixel-wise segmentation, which is struggling to address the problems of efficiency and challenging scenarios like severe occlusions and extreme lighting conditions. Inspired by human perception, the recognition of lanes under severe occlusions and extreme lighting conditions is mainly based on contextual and global information. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel, simple, yet effective formulation aiming at ultra fast speed and the problem of challenging scenarios. Specifically, we treat the process of lane detection as an anchor-driven ordinal classification problem using global features. First, we represent lanes with sparse coordinates on a series of hybrid (row and column) anchors. With the help of the anchor-driven representation, we then reformulate the lane detection task as an ordinal classification problem to get the coordinates of lanes. Our method could significantly reduce the computational cost with the anchor-driven representation. Using the large receptive field property of the ordinal classification formulation, we could also handle challenging scenarios. Extensive experiments on four lane detection datasets show that our method could achieve state-of-the-art performance in terms of both speed and accuracy. A lightweight version could even achieve 300+ frames per second(FPS). Our code is at https://github.com/cfzd/Ultra-Fast-Lane-Detection-v2.
abstract_zh: 现代方法主要将车道检测视为逐像素分割的问题，该问题正在努力解决效率问题和具有挑战性的场景（例如严重遮挡和极端照明条件）。受人类感知的启发，严重遮挡和极端光照条件下的车道识别主要基于上下文和全局信息。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种新颖、简单但有效的公式，旨在解决超快的速度和具有挑战性的场景问题。具体来说，我们将车道检测过程视为使用全局特征的锚驱动的序数分类问题。首先，我们在一系列混合（行和列）锚点上表示具有稀疏坐标的车道。在锚驱动表示的帮助下，我们将车道检测任务重新表述为序数分类问题以获取车道坐标。我们的方法可以通过锚驱动表示显着降低计算成本。利用序数分类公式的大感受野特性，我们还可以处理具有挑战性的场景。对四个车道检测数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以在速度和准确性方面实现最先进的性能。轻量级版本甚至可以达到每秒 300 帧以上 (FPS)。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/cfzd/Ultra-Fast-Lane-Detection-v2。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合锚点驱动序数分类的超快速车道检测方法，旨在解决传统像素级分割在效率和复杂场景下的不足。
AI.motivation: 现代车道检测方法依赖像素级分割，难以应对严重遮挡和极端光照等挑战场景，同时效率低下。受人类感知机制启发，作者提出利用全局上下文信息提升检测鲁棒性并提高速度。
AI.method: 将车道检测建模为锚点驱动的序数分类问题，通过混合行列锚点稀疏坐标表示车道，并利用序数分类的大感受野特性处理复杂场景，显著降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上达到速度与精度的最先进水平，轻量版本实现300+ FPS，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的锚点序数分类框架，在保证检测精度的同时实现了超高速车道检测，适用于实时自动驾驶场景。

search_text: Ultra Fast Deep Lane Detection with Hybrid Anchor Driven Ordinal Classification 具有混合锚驱动序数分类的超快速深度车道检测 Modern methods mainly regard lane detection as a problem of pixel-wise segmentation, which is struggling to address the problems of efficiency and challenging scenarios like severe occlusions and extreme lighting conditions. Inspired by human perception, the recognition of lanes under severe occlusions and extreme lighting conditions is mainly based on contextual and global information. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel, simple, yet effective formulation aiming at ultra fast speed and the problem of challenging scenarios. Specifically, we treat the process of lane detection as an anchor-driven ordinal classification problem using global features. First, we represent lanes with sparse coordinates on a series of hybrid (row and column) anchors. With the help of the anchor-driven representation, we then reformulate the lane detection task as an ordinal classification problem to get the coordinates of lanes. Our method could significantly reduce the computational cost with the anchor-driven representation. Using the large receptive field property of the ordinal classification formulation, we could also handle challenging scenarios. Extensive experiments on four lane detection datasets show that our method could achieve state-of-the-art performance in terms of both speed and accuracy. A lightweight version could even achieve 300+ frames per second(FPS). Our code is at https://github.com/cfzd/Ultra-Fast-Lane-Detection-v2. 现代方法主要将车道检测视为逐像素分割的问题，该问题正在努力解决效率问题和具有挑战性的场景（例如严重遮挡和极端照明条件）。受人类感知的启发，严重遮挡和极端光照条件下的车道识别主要基于上下文和全局信息。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种新颖、简单但有效的公式，旨在解决超快的速度和具有挑战性的场景问题。具体来说，我们将车道检测过程视为使用全局特征的锚驱动的序数分类问题。首先，我们在一系列混合（行和列）锚点上表示具有稀疏坐标的车道。在锚驱动表示的帮助下，我们将车道检测任务重新表述为序数分类问题以获取车道坐标。我们的方法可以通过锚驱动表示显着降低计算成本。利用序数分类公式的大感受野特性，我们还可以处理具有挑战性的场景。对四个车道检测数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以在速度和准确性方面实现最先进的性能。轻量级版本甚至可以达到每秒 300 帧以上 (FPS)。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/cfzd/Ultra-Fast-Lane-Detection-v2。 本文提出了一种基于混合锚点驱动序数分类的超快速车道检测方法，旨在解决传统像素级分割在效率和复杂场景下的不足。 Zequn Qin,Pengyi Zhang,Xi Li cs.CV

authors_text: Dmitry Ivlev
title: Subsurface Depths Structure Maps Reconstruction with Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络重建地下深度结构图
abstract: This paper described a method for reconstruction of detailed-resolution depth structure maps, usually obtained after the 3D seismic surveys, using the data from 2D seismic depth maps. The method uses two algorithms based on the generative-adversarial neural network architecture. The first algorithm StyleGAN2-ADA accumulates in the hidden space of the neural network the semantic images of mountainous terrain forms first, and then with help of transfer learning, in the ideal case - the structure geometry of stratigraphic horizons. The second algorithm, the Pixel2Style2Pixel encoder, using the semantic level of generalization of the first algorithm, learns to reconstruct the original high-resolution images from their degraded copies (super-resolution technology). There was demonstrated a methodological approach to transferring knowledge on the structural forms of stratigraphic horizon boundaries from the well-studied areas to the underexplored ones. Using the multimodal synthesis of Pixel2Style2Pixel encoder, it is proposed to create a probabilistic depth space, where each point of the project area is represented by the density of probabilistic depth distribution of equally probable reconstructed geological forms of structural images. Assessment of the reconstruction quality was carried out for two blocks. Using this method, credible detailed depth reconstructions comparable with the quality of 3D seismic maps have been obtained from 2D seismic maps.
summary: This paper described a method for reconstruction of detailed-resolution depth structure maps, usually obtained after the 3D seismic surveys, using the data from 2D seismic depth maps. The method uses two algorithms based on the generative-adversarial neural network architecture. The first algorithm StyleGAN2-ADA accumulates in the hidden space of the neural network the semantic images of mountainous terrain forms first, and then with help of transfer learning, in the ideal case - the structure geometry of stratigraphic horizons. The second algorithm, the Pixel2Style2Pixel encoder, using the semantic level of generalization of the first algorithm, learns to reconstruct the original high-resolution images from their degraded copies (super-resolution technology). There was demonstrated a methodological approach to transferring knowledge on the structural forms of stratigraphic horizon boundaries from the well-studied areas to the underexplored ones. Using the multimodal synthesis of Pixel2Style2Pixel encoder, it is proposed to create a probabilistic depth space, where each point of the project area is represented by the density of probabilistic depth distribution of equally probable reconstructed geological forms of structural images. Assessment of the reconstruction quality was carried out for two blocks. Using this method, credible detailed depth reconstructions comparable with the quality of 3D seismic maps have been obtained from 2D seismic maps.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种使用 2D 地震深度图数据重建详细分辨率深度结构图的方法，通常在 3D 地震勘测后获得。该方法使用两种基于生成对抗性神经网络架构的算法。第一个算法 StyleGAN2-ADA 在神经网络的隐藏空间中首先积累山区地形的语义图像，然后在迁移学习的帮助下，在理想情况下形成地层层位的结构几何形状。第二种算法，Pixel2Style2Pixel 编码器，使用第一种算法的泛化语义级别，学习从降级的副本重建原始高分辨率图像（超分辨率技术）。展示了一种将地层层位边界结构形式的知识从充分研究的区域转移到未充分勘探的区域的方法论。使用Pixel2Style2Pixel编码器的多模态合成，提出创建一个概率深度空间，其中项目区域的每个点由结构图像的等概率重建地质形态的概率深度分布的密度来表示。对两个区块进行了重建质量评估。使用这种方法，可以从 2D 地震图获得与 3D 地震图质量相当的可靠详细深度重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络的方法，利用2D地震深度图重建高分辨率的地下深度结构图。
AI.motivation: 3D地震调查通常可以获得详细的深度结构图，但成本高昂且耗时。本文旨在通过2D地震数据实现类似的高分辨率深度结构图重建，以降低成本和提高效率。
AI.method: 本文采用了两种基于生成对抗网络的算法：StyleGAN2-ADA和Pixel2Style2Pixel编码器。StyleGAN2-ADA在神经网络的隐藏空间中积累山地地形的语义图像，并通过迁移学习获得理想的地层结构几何形状。Pixel2Style2Pixel编码器则利用第一种算法的语义泛化水平，从降质的图像中重建高分辨率图像。
AI.result: 在两个区块中评估了重建质量，结果表明该方法可以从2D地震图中获得与3D地震图相当的可信详细深度重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种有效的知识迁移方法，将已研究区域的结构形式知识转移到未研究区域，并通过多模态合成创建了概率深度空间，为地质结构图像的重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sebastian Bordt,Uddeshya Upadhyay,Zeynep Akata,Ulrike von Luxburg
title: The Manifold Hypothesis for Gradient-Based Explanations
title_zh: 基于梯度的解释的流形假设
comment: Extended version of a CVPR Workshop paper, available at https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2023W/XAI4CV/papers/Bordt_The_Manifold_Hypothesis_for_Gradient-Based_Explanations_CVPRW_2023_paper.pdf
comments: Extended version of a CVPR Workshop paper, available at https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2023W/XAI4CV/papers/Bordt_The_Manifold_Hypothesis_for_Gradient-Based_Explanations_CVPRW_2023_paper.pdf
abstract: When do gradient-based explanation algorithms provide perceptually-aligned explanations? We propose a criterion: the feature attributions need to be aligned with the tangent space of the data manifold. To provide evidence for this hypothesis, we introduce a framework based on variational autoencoders that allows to estimate and generate image manifolds. Through experiments across a range of different datasets -- MNIST, EMNIST, CIFAR10, X-ray pneumonia and Diabetic Retinopathy detection -- we demonstrate that the more a feature attribution is aligned with the tangent space of the data, the more perceptually-aligned it tends to be. We then show that the attributions provided by popular post-hoc methods such as Integrated Gradients and SmoothGrad are more strongly aligned with the data manifold than the raw gradient. Adversarial training also improves the alignment of model gradients with the data manifold. As a consequence, we suggest that explanation algorithms should actively strive to align their explanations with the data manifold. This is an extended version of a CVPR Workshop paper. Code is available at https://github.com/tml-tuebingen/explanations-manifold.
summary: When do gradient-based explanation algorithms provide perceptually-aligned explanations? We propose a criterion: the feature attributions need to be aligned with the tangent space of the data manifold. To provide evidence for this hypothesis, we introduce a framework based on variational autoencoders that allows to estimate and generate image manifolds. Through experiments across a range of different datasets -- MNIST, EMNIST, CIFAR10, X-ray pneumonia and Diabetic Retinopathy detection -- we demonstrate that the more a feature attribution is aligned with the tangent space of the data, the more perceptually-aligned it tends to be. We then show that the attributions provided by popular post-hoc methods such as Integrated Gradients and SmoothGrad are more strongly aligned with the data manifold than the raw gradient. Adversarial training also improves the alignment of model gradients with the data manifold. As a consequence, we suggest that explanation algorithms should actively strive to align their explanations with the data manifold. This is an extended version of a CVPR Workshop paper. Code is available at https://github.com/tml-tuebingen/explanations-manifold.
abstract_zh: 基于梯度的解释算法何时提供感知一致的解释？我们提出一个标准：特征属性需要与数据流形的切线空间对齐。为了为这一假设提供证据，我们引入了一个基于变分自动编码器的框架，该框架允许估计和生成图像流形。通过对一系列不同数据集（MNIST、EMNIST、CIFAR10、X 射线肺炎和糖尿病视网膜病变检测）进行的实验，我们证明特征归因与数据的切线空间越一致，它在感知上就越趋于一致。然后，我们表明，与原始梯度相比，流行的事后方法（例如 Integrated Gradients 和 SmoothGrad）提供的归因与数据流形更加一致。对抗性训练还提高了模型梯度与数据流形的一致性。因此，我们建议解释算法应积极努力使其解释与数据流形保持一致。这是 CVPR 研讨会论文的扩展版本。代码可在 https://github.com/tml-tuebingen/explanations-manifold 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出流形假设，研究梯度基解释方法的感知对齐性，通过变分自编码器框架验证特征归因与数据流形切空间对齐的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度基解释方法的感知对齐性不足，需探索特征归因与数据流形结构的关系以提升解释效果。
AI.method: 构建基于变分自编码器的框架估计数据流形，通过多数据集实验量化特征归因与流形切空间的对齐程度。
AI.result: 实验表明特征归因与流形对齐程度越高，感知对齐性越强；集成梯度等方法比原始梯度更对齐，对抗训练可提升模型梯度对齐性。
AI.conclusion: 解释算法应主动对齐数据流形，以生成更符合人类感知的特征归因。

search_text: The Manifold Hypothesis for Gradient-Based Explanations 基于梯度的解释的流形假设 When do gradient-based explanation algorithms provide perceptually-aligned explanations? We propose a criterion: the feature attributions need to be aligned with the tangent space of the data manifold. To provide evidence for this hypothesis, we introduce a framework based on variational autoencoders that allows to estimate and generate image manifolds. Through experiments across a range of different datasets -- MNIST, EMNIST, CIFAR10, X-ray pneumonia and Diabetic Retinopathy detection -- we demonstrate that the more a feature attribution is aligned with the tangent space of the data, the more perceptually-aligned it tends to be. We then show that the attributions provided by popular post-hoc methods such as Integrated Gradients and SmoothGrad are more strongly aligned with the data manifold than the raw gradient. Adversarial training also improves the alignment of model gradients with the data manifold. As a consequence, we suggest that explanation algorithms should actively strive to align their explanations with the data manifold. This is an extended version of a CVPR Workshop paper. Code is available at https://github.com/tml-tuebingen/explanations-manifold. 基于梯度的解释算法何时提供感知一致的解释？我们提出一个标准：特征属性需要与数据流形的切线空间对齐。为了为这一假设提供证据，我们引入了一个基于变分自动编码器的框架，该框架允许估计和生成图像流形。通过对一系列不同数据集（MNIST、EMNIST、CIFAR10、X 射线肺炎和糖尿病视网膜病变检测）进行的实验，我们证明特征归因与数据的切线空间越一致，它在感知上就越趋于一致。然后，我们表明，与原始梯度相比，流行的事后方法（例如 Integrated Gradients 和 SmoothGrad）提供的归因与数据流形更加一致。对抗性训练还提高了模型梯度与数据流形的一致性。因此，我们建议解释算法应积极努力使其解释与数据流形保持一致。这是 CVPR 研讨会论文的扩展版本。代码可在 https://github.com/tml-tuebingen/explanations-manifold 获取。 本文提出流形假设，研究梯度基解释方法的感知对齐性，通过变分自编码器框架验证特征归因与数据流形切空间对齐的重要性。 Sebastian Bordt,Uddeshya Upadhyay,Zeynep Akata,Ulrike von Luxburg cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoteng Ma,Shuai Ma,Li Xia,Qianchuan Zhao
title: Mean-Semivariance Policy Optimization via Risk-Averse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过风险规避强化学习进行均值半方差策略优化
comment: Accecpted by Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research
comments: Accecpted by Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research
abstract: Keeping risk under control is often more crucial than maximizing expected rewards in real-world decision-making situations, such as finance, robotics, autonomous driving, etc. The most natural choice of risk measures is variance, which penalizes the upside volatility as much as the downside part. Instead, the (downside) semivariance, which captures the negative deviation of a random variable under its mean, is more suitable for risk-averse proposes. This paper aims at optimizing the mean-semivariance (MSV) criterion in reinforcement learning w.r.t. steady reward distribution. Since semivariance is time-inconsistent and does not satisfy the standard Bellman equation, the traditional dynamic programming methods are inapplicable to MSV problems directly. To tackle this challenge, we resort to Perturbation Analysis (PA) theory and establish the performance difference formula for MSV. We reveal that the MSV problem can be solved by iteratively solving a sequence of RL problems with a policy-dependent reward function. Further, we propose two on-policy algorithms based on the policy gradient theory and the trust region method. Finally, we conduct diverse experiments from simple bandit problems to continuous control tasks in MuJoCo, which demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed methods.
summary: Keeping risk under control is often more crucial than maximizing expected rewards in real-world decision-making situations, such as finance, robotics, autonomous driving, etc. The most natural choice of risk measures is variance, which penalizes the upside volatility as much as the downside part. Instead, the (downside) semivariance, which captures the negative deviation of a random variable under its mean, is more suitable for risk-averse proposes. This paper aims at optimizing the mean-semivariance (MSV) criterion in reinforcement learning w.r.t. steady reward distribution. Since semivariance is time-inconsistent and does not satisfy the standard Bellman equation, the traditional dynamic programming methods are inapplicable to MSV problems directly. To tackle this challenge, we resort to Perturbation Analysis (PA) theory and establish the performance difference formula for MSV. We reveal that the MSV problem can be solved by iteratively solving a sequence of RL problems with a policy-dependent reward function. Further, we propose two on-policy algorithms based on the policy gradient theory and the trust region method. Finally, we conduct diverse experiments from simple bandit problems to continuous control tasks in MuJoCo, which demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界的决策环境中，例如金融、机器人、自动驾驶等，控制风险往往比最大化预期回报更重要。风险衡量标准的最自然选择是方差，它对上行波动的影响与对下行波动的影响一样大。相反，（下行）半方差捕获随机变量在其均值之下的负偏差，更适合风险规避的建议。本文旨在优化强化学习中的均值半方差（MSV）标准。稳定的奖励分配。由于半方差是时间不一致的并且不满足标准贝尔曼方程，传统的动态规划方法不能直接应用于MSV问题。为了应对这一挑战，我们采用扰动分析（PA）理论并建立了 MSV 的性能差异公式。我们揭示了 MSV 问题可以通过迭代解决一系列具有策略相关奖励函数的 RL 问题来解决。此外，我们提出了两种基于策略梯度理论和信任域方法的同策略算法。最后，我们在 MuJoCo 中进行了从简单的老虎机问题到连续控制任务的各种实验，这证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过风险厌恶强化学习优化均值-半方差（MSV）准则，解决传统方法因半方差时间不一致性导致的强化学习风险控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方差风险度量对正负波动同等惩罚，而半方差仅关注负面波动更符合风险厌恶需求，但其时间不一致性导致动态规划方法失效，需新方法解决MSV优化。
AI.method: 基于扰动分析理论建立MSV性能差分公式，将问题转化为序列策略优化问题，并提出两种基于策略梯度和信任区域的on-policy算法。
AI.result: 在简单老虎机问题到MuJoCo连续控制任务的多场景实验验证了方法有效性，证明所提算法能有效平衡均值与半方差目标。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将半方差风险度量纳入强化学习框架，通过理论分析与算法设计解决了其时间不一致性难题，为风险敏感决策提供了新方法。

authors_text: Ahmed Abdelali,Nadir Durrani,Cenk Demiroglu,Fahim Dalvi,Hamdy Mubarak,Kareem Darwish
title: NatiQ: An End-to-end Text-to-Speech System for Arabic
title_zh: NatiQ：阿拉伯语端到端文本转语音系统
abstract: NatiQ is end-to-end text-to-speech system for Arabic. Our speech synthesizer uses an encoder-decoder architecture with attention. We used both tacotron-based models (tacotron-1 and tacotron-2) and the faster transformer model for generating mel-spectrograms from characters. We concatenated Tacotron1 with the WaveRNN vocoder, Tacotron2 with the WaveGlow vocoder and ESPnet transformer with the parallel wavegan vocoder to synthesize waveforms from the spectrograms. We used in-house speech data for two voices: 1) neutral male "Hamza"- narrating general content and news, and 2) expressive female "Amina"- narrating children story books to train our models. Our best systems achieve an average Mean Opinion Score (MOS) of 4.21 and 4.40 for Amina and Hamza respectively. The objective evaluation of the systems using word and character error rate (WER and CER) as well as the response time measured by real-time factor favored the end-to-end architecture ESPnet. NatiQ demo is available on-line at https://tts.qcri.org
summary: NatiQ is end-to-end text-to-speech system for Arabic. Our speech synthesizer uses an encoder-decoder architecture with attention. We used both tacotron-based models (tacotron-1 and tacotron-2) and the faster transformer model for generating mel-spectrograms from characters. We concatenated Tacotron1 with the WaveRNN vocoder, Tacotron2 with the WaveGlow vocoder and ESPnet transformer with the parallel wavegan vocoder to synthesize waveforms from the spectrograms. We used in-house speech data for two voices: 1) neutral male "Hamza"- narrating general content and news, and 2) expressive female "Amina"- narrating children story books to train our models. Our best systems achieve an average Mean Opinion Score (MOS) of 4.21 and 4.40 for Amina and Hamza respectively. The objective evaluation of the systems using word and character error rate (WER and CER) as well as the response time measured by real-time factor favored the end-to-end architecture ESPnet. NatiQ demo is available on-line at https://tts.qcri.org
abstract_zh: NatiQ 是阿拉伯语端到端文本转语音系统。我们的语音合成器使用带有注意力机制的编码器-解码器架构。我们使用基于 tacotron 的模型（tacotron-1 和 tacotron-2）和更快的变压器模型来从字符生成梅尔谱图。我们将 Tacotron1 与 WaveRNN 声码器、Tacotron2 与 WaveGlow 声码器以及 ESPnet 变压器与并行 Wavegan 声码器连接起来，以合成频谱图中的波形。我们使用两种声音的内部语音数据：1）中性男性“Hamza” - 叙述一般内容和新闻，2）富有表现力的女性“Amina” - 叙述儿童故事书来训练我们的模型。我们最好的系统对 Amina 和 Hamza 的平均意见得分 (MOS) 分别为 4.21 和 4.40。使用单词和字符错误率（WER 和 CER）以及通过实时因素测量的响应时间对系统进行客观评估，有利于端到端架构 ESPnet。 NatiQ 演示可在线获取：https://tts.qcri.org

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个针对阿拉伯语的端到端文本到语音合成系统NatiQ，通过多种模型架构与声码器组合实现语音生成。
AI.motivation: 现有阿拉伯语TTS系统在自然度与效率上存在不足，需探索更高效的端到端解决方案以提升语音合成质量。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构结合注意力机制，使用Tacotron1/2、ESPnet Transformer生成梅尔频谱，并分别搭配WaveRNN、WaveGlow、Parallel WaveGan声码器合成语音，基于自建的男声Hamza与女声Amina数据集训练模型。
AI.result: Amina与Hamza语音的平均MOS得分分别为4.40和4.21，ESPnet架构在词错误率（WER）、字符错误率（CER）及实时因子等客观指标上表现最优。
AI.conclusion: ESPnet端到端架构在阿拉伯语TTS任务中综合性能最佳，可为实际应用提供高效高质量的语音合成方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一个针对阿拉伯语的端到端文本到语音合成系统NatiQ，通过多种模型架构与声码器组合实现语音生成。
ai_content.motivation: 现有阿拉伯语TTS系统在自然度与效率上存在不足，需探索更高效的端到端解决方案以提升语音合成质量。
ai_content.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构结合注意力机制，使用Tacotron1/2、ESPnet Transformer生成梅尔频谱，并分别搭配WaveRNN、WaveGlow、Parallel WaveGan声码器合成语音，基于自建的男声Hamza与女声Amina数据集训练模型。
ai_content.result: Amina与Hamza语音的平均MOS得分分别为4.40和4.21，ESPnet架构在词错误率（WER）、字符错误率（CER）及实时因子等客观指标上表现最优。
ai_content.conclusion: ESPnet端到端架构在阿拉伯语TTS任务中综合性能最佳，可为实际应用提供高效高质量的语音合成方案。

search_text: NatiQ: An End-to-end Text-to-Speech System for Arabic NatiQ：阿拉伯语端到端文本转语音系统 NatiQ is end-to-end text-to-speech system for Arabic. Our speech synthesizer uses an encoder-decoder architecture with attention. We used both tacotron-based models (tacotron-1 and tacotron-2) and the faster transformer model for generating mel-spectrograms from characters. We concatenated Tacotron1 with the WaveRNN vocoder, Tacotron2 with the WaveGlow vocoder and ESPnet transformer with the parallel wavegan vocoder to synthesize waveforms from the spectrograms. We used in-house speech data for two voices: 1) neutral male "Hamza"- narrating general content and news, and 2) expressive female "Amina"- narrating children story books to train our models. Our best systems achieve an average Mean Opinion Score (MOS) of 4.21 and 4.40 for Amina and Hamza respectively. The objective evaluation of the systems using word and character error rate (WER and CER) as well as the response time measured by real-time factor favored the end-to-end architecture ESPnet. NatiQ demo is available on-line at https://tts.qcri.org NatiQ 是阿拉伯语端到端文本转语音系统。我们的语音合成器使用带有注意力机制的编码器-解码器架构。我们使用基于 tacotron 的模型（tacotron-1 和 tacotron-2）和更快的变压器模型来从字符生成梅尔谱图。我们将 Tacotron1 与 WaveRNN 声码器、Tacotron2 与 WaveGlow 声码器以及 ESPnet 变压器与并行 Wavegan 声码器连接起来，以合成频谱图中的波形。我们使用两种声音的内部语音数据：1）中性男性“Hamza” - 叙述一般内容和新闻，2）富有表现力的女性“Amina” - 叙述儿童故事书来训练我们的模型。我们最好的系统对 Amina 和 Hamza 的平均意见得分 (MOS) 分别为 4.21 和 4.40。使用单词和字符错误率（WER 和 CER）以及通过实时因素测量的响应时间对系统进行客观评估，有利于端到端架构 ESPnet。 NatiQ 演示可在线获取：https://tts.qcri.org 本文提出一个针对阿拉伯语的端到端文本到语音合成系统NatiQ，通过多种模型架构与声码器组合实现语音生成。 Ahmed Abdelali,Nadir Durrani,Cenk Demiroglu,Fahim Dalvi,Hamdy Mubarak,Kareem Darwish cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Zequn Qin,Xi Li
title: MonoGround: Detecting Monocular 3D Objects from the Ground
title_zh: MonoGround：从地面检测单眼 3D 物体
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection has attracted great attention for its advantages in simplicity and cost. Due to the ill-posed 2D to 3D mapping essence from the monocular imaging process, monocular 3D object detection suffers from inaccurate depth estimation and thus has poor 3D detection results. To alleviate this problem, we propose to introduce the ground plane as a prior in the monocular 3d object detection. The ground plane prior serves as an additional geometric condition to the ill-posed mapping and an extra source in depth estimation. In this way, we can get a more accurate depth estimation from the ground. Meanwhile, to take full advantage of the ground plane prior, we propose a depth-align training strategy and a precise two-stage depth inference method tailored for the ground plane prior. It is worth noting that the introduced ground plane prior requires no extra data sources like LiDAR, stereo images, and depth information. Extensive experiments on the KITTI benchmark show that our method could achieve state-of-the-art results compared with other methods while maintaining a very fast speed. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/cfzd/MonoGround.
summary: Monocular 3D object detection has attracted great attention for its advantages in simplicity and cost. Due to the ill-posed 2D to 3D mapping essence from the monocular imaging process, monocular 3D object detection suffers from inaccurate depth estimation and thus has poor 3D detection results. To alleviate this problem, we propose to introduce the ground plane as a prior in the monocular 3d object detection. The ground plane prior serves as an additional geometric condition to the ill-posed mapping and an extra source in depth estimation. In this way, we can get a more accurate depth estimation from the ground. Meanwhile, to take full advantage of the ground plane prior, we propose a depth-align training strategy and a precise two-stage depth inference method tailored for the ground plane prior. It is worth noting that the introduced ground plane prior requires no extra data sources like LiDAR, stereo images, and depth information. Extensive experiments on the KITTI benchmark show that our method could achieve state-of-the-art results compared with other methods while maintaining a very fast speed. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/cfzd/MonoGround.
abstract_zh: 单目3D物体检测因其简单性和成本的优势而受到广泛关注。由于单目成像过程中 2D 到 3D 映射本质上的不适定，单目 3D 目标检测存在深度估计不准确的问题，因此 3D 检测结果较差。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议在单目 3d 物体检测中引入地平面作为先验。地平面先验充当不适定映射的附加几何条件以及深度估计的额外来源。这样，我们就可以得到更准确的地面深度估计。同时，为了充分利用地平面先验，我们提出了一种针对地平面先验的深度对齐训练策略和精确的两阶段深度推理方法。值得注意的是，引入的地平面先验不需要额外的数据源，如激光雷达、立体图像和深度信息。对 KITTI 基准的大量实验表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法可以实现最先进的结果，同时保持非常快的速度。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/cfzd/MonoGround 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于地面平面先验的单目3D目标检测方法，通过引入地面几何信息提升深度估计准确性。
AI.motivation: 单目3D检测因2D到3D映射的病态性导致深度估计不准确，现有方法依赖昂贵传感器数据，本文旨在利用无需额外数据的地面平面先验解决此问题。
AI.method: 引入地面平面作为几何先验，结合深度对齐训练策略与两阶段深度推理方法，通过地面约束优化深度估计过程。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中达到当时最先进的检测性能，同时保持高效推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 地面平面先验有效提升单目3D检测精度，且无需依赖LiDAR等外部传感器数据，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Cong Fu,Xuan Zhang,Huixin Zhang,Hongyi Ling,Shenglong Xu,Shuiwang Ji
title: Lattice Convolutional Networks for Learning Ground States of Quantum Many-Body Systems
title_zh: 用于学习量子多体系统基态的格卷积网络
abstract: Deep learning methods have been shown to be effective in representing ground-state wave functions of quantum many-body systems. Existing methods use convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for square lattices due to their image-like structures. For non-square lattices, existing method uses graph neural network (GNN) in which structure information is not precisely captured, thereby requiring additional hand-crafted sublattice encoding. In this work, we propose lattice convolutions in which a set of proposed operations are used to convert non-square lattices into grid-like augmented lattices on which regular convolution can be applied. Based on the proposed lattice convolutions, we design lattice convolutional networks (LCN) that use self-gating and attention mechanisms. Experimental results show that our method achieves performance on par or better than existing methods on spin 1/2 $J_1$-$J_2$ Heisenberg model over the square, honeycomb, triangular, and kagome lattices while without using hand-crafted encoding.
summary: Deep learning methods have been shown to be effective in representing ground-state wave functions of quantum many-body systems. Existing methods use convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for square lattices due to their image-like structures. For non-square lattices, existing method uses graph neural network (GNN) in which structure information is not precisely captured, thereby requiring additional hand-crafted sublattice encoding. In this work, we propose lattice convolutions in which a set of proposed operations are used to convert non-square lattices into grid-like augmented lattices on which regular convolution can be applied. Based on the proposed lattice convolutions, we design lattice convolutional networks (LCN) that use self-gating and attention mechanisms. Experimental results show that our method achieves performance on par or better than existing methods on spin 1/2 $J_1$-$J_2$ Heisenberg model over the square, honeycomb, triangular, and kagome lattices while without using hand-crafted encoding.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法已被证明可以有效地表示量子多体系统的基态波函数。由于其类似图像的结构，现有方法将卷积神经网络（CNN）用于方格。对于非方形点阵，现有方法使用图神经网络（GNN），其中结构信息无法精确捕获，因此需要额外的手工制作的子点阵编码。在这项工作中，我们提出了格子卷积，其中使用一组建议的操作将非方形格子转换为可以应用常规卷积的网格状增强格子。基于所提出的格卷积，我们设计了使用自门和注意力机制的格卷积网络（LCN）。实验结果表明，我们的方法在方形、蜂窝、三角形和 kagome 晶格上的自旋 1/2 $J_1$-$J_2$ 海森堡模型上实现了与现有方法相当或更好的性能，而无需使用手工编码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为晶格卷积网络（LCN）的深度学习方法，用于学习量子多体系统的基态波函数，尤其针对非正方形晶格结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理非正方形晶格时依赖图神经网络（GNN），但无法精确捕捉结构信息，需额外的人工子晶格编码，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 提出晶格卷积操作，将非正方形晶格转换为网格状增强晶格，结合自门控机制和注意力机制设计LCN网络，避免人工编码。
AI.result: 在正方形、蜂窝、三角形和克格伦晶格的自旋1/2 $J_1$-$J_2$海森堡模型中，LCN性能与现有方法相当或更优，且无需人工编码。
AI.conclusion: 晶格卷积网络通过结构化转换和自适应机制，有效解决了非正方形晶格的基态学习问题，为量子多体系统研究提供了新工具。

In this work, we propose lattice convolutions in which a set of proposed operations are used to convert non-square lattices into grid-like augmented lattices on which regular convolution can be applied. Based on the proposed lattice convolutions, we design lattice convolutional networks (LCN) that use self-gating and attention mechanisms. Experimental results show that our method achieves performance on par or better than existing methods on spin 1/2 $J_1$-$J_2$ Heisenberg model over the square, honeycomb, triangular, and kagome lattices while without using hand-crafted encoding. 深度学习方法已被证明可以有效地表示量子多体系统的基态波函数。由于其类似图像的结构，现有方法将卷积神经网络（CNN）用于方格。对于非方形点阵，现有方法使用图神经网络（GNN），其中结构信息无法精确捕获，因此需要额外的手工制作的子点阵编码。在这项工作中，我们提出了格子卷积，其中使用一组建议的操作将非方形格子转换为可以应用常规卷积的网格状增强格子。基于所提出的格卷积，我们设计了使用自门和注意力机制的格卷积网络（LCN）。实验结果表明，我们的方法在方形、蜂窝、三角形和 kagome 晶格上的自旋 1/2 $J_1$-$J_2$ 海森堡模型上实现了与现有方法相当或更好的性能，而无需使用手工编码。 本文提出了一种称为晶格卷积网络（LCN）的深度学习方法，用于学习量子多体系统的基态波函数，尤其针对非正方形晶格结构。 Cong Fu,Xuan Zhang,Huixin Zhang,Hongyi Ling,Shenglong Xu,Shuiwang Ji quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Adrian Arnaiz-Rodriguez,Ahmed Begga,Francisco Escolano,Nuria Oliver
title: DiffWire: Inductive Graph Rewiring via the Lovász Bound
title_zh: DiffWire：通过 Lovász Bound 进行归纳图重新布线
comment: 27 pages, 24 figures and 6 tables. Accepted at Learning on Graphs Conference 2022. A. Arnaiz-Rodriguez et al., DiffWire: Inductive Graph Rewiring via the Lovász Bound. Proceedings of the First Learning on Graphs Conference (LoG 2022), PMLR 198, Virtual Event, December, 2022
comments: 27 pages, 24 figures and 6 tables. Accepted at Learning on Graphs Conference 2022. A. Arnaiz-Rodriguez et al., DiffWire: Inductive Graph Rewiring via the Lovász Bound. Proceedings of the First Learning on Graphs Conference (LoG 2022), PMLR 198, Virtual Event, December, 2022
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been shown to achieve competitive results to tackle graph-related tasks, such as node and graph classification, link prediction and node and graph clustering in a variety of domains. Most GNNs use a message passing framework and hence are called MPNNs. Despite their promising results, MPNNs have been reported to suffer from over-smoothing, over-squashing and under-reaching. Graph rewiring and graph pooling have been proposed in the literature as solutions to address these limitations. However, most state-of-the-art graph rewiring methods fail to preserve the global topology of the graph, are neither differentiable nor inductive, and require the tuning of hyper-parameters. In this paper, we propose DiffWire, a novel framework for graph rewiring in MPNNs that is principled, fully differentiable and parameter-free by leveraging the Lovász bound. The proposed approach provides a unified theory for graph rewiring by proposing two new, complementary layers in MPNNs: CT-Layer, a layer that learns the commute times and uses them as a relevance function for edge re-weighting; and GAP-Layer, a layer to optimize the spectral gap, depending on the nature of the network and the task at hand. We empirically validate the value of each of these layers separately with benchmark datasets for graph classification. We also perform preliminary studies on the use of CT-Layer for homophilic and heterophilic node classification tasks. DiffWire brings together the learnability of commute times to related definitions of curvature, opening the door to creating more expressive MPNNs.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been shown to achieve competitive results to tackle graph-related tasks, such as node and graph classification, link prediction and node and graph clustering in a variety of domains. Most GNNs use a message passing framework and hence are called MPNNs. Despite their promising results, MPNNs have been reported to suffer from over-smoothing, over-squashing and under-reaching. Graph rewiring and graph pooling have been proposed in the literature as solutions to address these limitations. However, most state-of-the-art graph rewiring methods fail to preserve the global topology of the graph, are neither differentiable nor inductive, and require the tuning of hyper-parameters. In this paper, we propose DiffWire, a novel framework for graph rewiring in MPNNs that is principled, fully differentiable and parameter-free by leveraging the Lovász bound. The proposed approach provides a unified theory for graph rewiring by proposing two new, complementary layers in MPNNs: CT-Layer, a layer that learns the commute times and uses them as a relevance function for edge re-weighting; and GAP-Layer, a layer to optimize the spectral gap, depending on the nature of the network and the task at hand. We empirically validate the value of each of these layers separately with benchmark datasets for graph classification. We also perform preliminary studies on the use of CT-Layer for homophilic and heterophilic node classification tasks. DiffWire brings together the learnability of commute times to related definitions of curvature, opening the door to creating more expressive MPNNs.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已被证明可以在处理与图相关的任务时取得有竞争力的结果，例如各个领域中的节点和图分类、链接预测以及节点和图聚类。大多数 GNN 使用消息传递框架，因此称为 MPNN。尽管取得了令人鼓舞的结果，但据报道 MPNN 存在过度平滑、过度挤压和延伸不足的问题。文献中已提出图重新布线和图池化作为解决这些限制的解决方案。然而，大多数最先进的图重新布线方法无法保留图的全局拓扑，既不可微分也不可归纳，并且需要调整超参数。在本文中，我们提出了 DiffWire，这是一种在 MPNN 中进行图重新布线的新颖框架，它利用 Lovász 界限，具有原则性、完全可微分和无参数。所提出的方法通过在 MPNN 中提出两个新的互补层，为图重新布线提供了统一的理论：CT 层，该层学习通勤时间并将其用作边缘重新加权的相关函数； GAP-Layer，根据网络的性质和手头的任务来优化光谱间隙的层。我们使用图分类的基准数据集分别凭经验验证每个层的值。我们还对使用 CT-Layer 进行同性和异性节点分类任务进行了初步研究。 DiffWire 将通勤时间的可学习性与曲率的相关定义结合在一起，为创建更具表现力的 MPNN 打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffWire框架，通过Lovász bound实现可微且参数免费的图重布线，解决图神经网络中的过平滑等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络（MPNNs）存在过平滑、过压缩等缺陷，而主流图重布线方法难以保留全局拓扑、不可微且需调参。
AI.method: 基于Lovász bound设计DiffWire框架，包含CT-Layer（学习通勤时间进行边重加权）和GAP-Layer（优化谱隙），实现可微、归纳性图重布线。
AI.result: 在图分类基准数据集上验证了CT-Layer和GAP-Layer的有效性，并初步应用于同质/异质节点分类任务。
AI.conclusion: DiffWire通过结合通勤时间与曲率定义，为构建更强大的图神经网络提供了理论支持与方法基础。

authors_text: Eman Yahia Alqaissi,Fahd Saleh Alotaibi,Muhammad Sher Ramzan
title: Modern Machine-Learning Predictive Models for Diagnosing Infectious Diseases
title_zh: 用于诊断传染病的现代机器学习预测模型
abstract: Controlling infectious diseases is a major health priority because they can spread and infect humans, thus evolving into epidemics or pandemics. Therefore, early detection of infectious diseases is a significant need, and many researchers have developed models to diagnose them in the early stages. This paper reviewed research articles for recent machine-learning (ML) algorithms applied to infectious disease diagnosis. We searched the Web of Science, ScienceDirect, PubMed, Springer, and IEEE databases from 2015 to 2022, identified the pros and cons of the reviewed ML models, and discussed the possible recommendations to advance the studies in this field. We found that most of the articles used small datasets, and few of them used real-time data. Our results demonstrated that a suitable ML technique depends on the nature of the dataset and the desired goal.
summary: Controlling infectious diseases is a major health priority because they can spread and infect humans, thus evolving into epidemics or pandemics. Therefore, early detection of infectious diseases is a significant need, and many researchers have developed models to diagnose them in the early stages. This paper reviewed research articles for recent machine-learning (ML) algorithms applied to infectious disease diagnosis. We searched the Web of Science, ScienceDirect, PubMed, Springer, and IEEE databases from 2015 to 2022, identified the pros and cons of the reviewed ML models, and discussed the possible recommendations to advance the studies in this field. We found that most of the articles used small datasets, and few of them used real-time data. Our results demonstrated that a suitable ML technique depends on the nature of the dataset and the desired goal.
abstract_zh: 控制传染病是一项重要的健康优先事项，因为它们可以传播和感染人类，从而演变成流行病或大流行病。因此，传染病的早期检测是一个重要的需求，许多研究人员已经开发了早期诊断模型。本文回顾了近期应用于传染病诊断的机器学习 (ML) 算法的研究文章。我们检索了 2015 年至 2022 年的 Web of Science、ScienceDirect、PubMed、Springer 和 IEEE 数据库，确定了所审查的 ML 模型的优缺点，并讨论了推进该领域研究的可能建议。我们发现大多数文章都使用小型数据集，很少有使用实时数据的文章。我们的结果表明，合适的机器学习技术取决于数据集的性质和期望的目标。

AI.tldr: 综述近期用于传染病诊断的机器学习算法，分析其优缺点并提出研究建议
AI.motivation: 传染病易引发疫情，早期检测至关重要，但现有研究多使用小数据集且缺乏实时数据，需总结模型优缺点以指导未来研究
AI.method: 通过多数据库检索2015至2022年的文献，分析不同机器学习模型的优缺点，并讨论未来研究方向
AI.result: 多数研究使用小规模数据集，实时数据应用较少，且最佳ML技术依赖于数据特性和研究目标
AI.conclusion: 传染病诊断需根据数据集特性选择合适的ML方法，未来研究应注重扩大数据规模和应用实时数据以提升模型效果

authors_text: Jiangpeng Yan,Chenghui Yu,Hanbo Chen,Zhe Xu,Junzhou Huang,Xiu Li,Jianhua Yao
title: Seeking Common Ground While Reserving Differences: Multiple Anatomy Collaborative Framework for Undersampled MRI Reconstruction
title_zh: 求同存异：欠采样 MRI 重建的多解剖学协作框架
abstract: Recently, deep neural networks have greatly advanced undersampled Magnetic Resonance Image (MRI) reconstruction, wherein most studies follow the one-anatomy-one-network fashion, i.e., each expert network is trained and evaluated for a specific anatomy. Apart from inefficiency in training multiple independent models, such convention ignores the shared de-aliasing knowledge across various anatomies which can benefit each other. To explore the shared knowledge, one naive way is to combine all the data from various anatomies to train an all-round network. Unfortunately, despite the existence of the shared de-aliasing knowledge, we reveal that the exclusive knowledge across different anatomies can deteriorate specific reconstruction targets, yielding overall performance degradation. Observing this, in this study, we present a novel deep MRI reconstruction framework with both anatomy-shared and anatomy-specific parameterized learners, aiming to "seek common ground while reserving differences" across different anatomies.Particularly, the primary anatomy-shared learners are exposed to different anatomies to model flourishing shared knowledge, while the efficient anatomy-specific learners are trained with their target anatomy for exclusive knowledge. Four different implementations of anatomy-specific learners are presented and explored on the top of our framework in two MRI reconstruction networks. Comprehensive experiments on brain, knee and cardiac MRI datasets demonstrate that three of these learners are able to enhance reconstruction performance via multiple anatomy collaborative learning.
summary: Recently, deep neural networks have greatly advanced undersampled Magnetic Resonance Image (MRI) reconstruction, wherein most studies follow the one-anatomy-one-network fashion, i.e., each expert network is trained and evaluated for a specific anatomy. Apart from inefficiency in training multiple independent models, such convention ignores the shared de-aliasing knowledge across various anatomies which can benefit each other. To explore the shared knowledge, one naive way is to combine all the data from various anatomies to train an all-round network. Unfortunately, despite the existence of the shared de-aliasing knowledge, we reveal that the exclusive knowledge across different anatomies can deteriorate specific reconstruction targets, yielding overall performance degradation. Observing this, in this study, we present a novel deep MRI reconstruction framework with both anatomy-shared and anatomy-specific parameterized learners, aiming to "seek common ground while reserving differences" across different anatomies.Particularly, the primary anatomy-shared learners are exposed to different anatomies to model flourishing shared knowledge, while the efficient anatomy-specific learners are trained with their target anatomy for exclusive knowledge. Four different implementations of anatomy-specific learners are presented and explored on the top of our framework in two MRI reconstruction networks. Comprehensive experiments on brain, knee and cardiac MRI datasets demonstrate that three of these learners are able to enhance reconstruction performance via multiple anatomy collaborative learning.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度神经网络极大地推进了欠采样磁共振图像（MRI）重建，其中大多数研究遵循“一解剖一网络”的方式，即每个专家网络都针对特定的解剖结构进行训练和评估。除了训练多个独立模型的效率低下之外，这种约定还忽略了不同解剖结构之间可以相互受益的共享去锯齿知识。为了探索共享知识，一种简单的方法是将来自不同解剖结构的所有数据结合起来训练一个全方位的网络。不幸的是，尽管存在共享的去锯齿知识，但我们发现不同解剖结构的专有知识可能会恶化特定的重建目标，从而导致整体性能下降。鉴于此，在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度 MRI 重建框架，同时包含解剖共享和特定解剖参数化学习器，旨在跨不同解剖结构“求同存异”。特别是，初级解剖共享学习器接触不同的解剖结构以建模丰富的共享知识，而高效的特定解剖学习器则通过其目标解剖结构进行训练以获得专有知识。在我们的框架之上，在两个 MRI 重建网络中提出并探索了解剖学特定学习器的四种不同实现。对大脑、膝盖和心脏 MRI 数据集的综合实验表明，其中三个学习者能够通过多个解剖协作学习来提高重建性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合解剖学共享知识与特定知识的深度学习框架，用于改进欠采样MRI重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法为每种解剖结构单独训练模型，导致效率低下且忽略跨结构的共享去混叠知识，而直接融合所有数据会因专属知识冲突导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计包含共享参数学习器（建模跨解剖共性）和特定参数学习器（保留解剖特异性）的双分支网络，提出四种特定学习器实现方案。
AI.result: 在脑部、膝关节和心脏MRI数据集上验证，三种方案通过多解剖协作学习显著提升重建性能。
AI.conclusion: 框架通过平衡共享知识与专属知识，有效解决了跨解剖MRI重建中的性能退化问题。

search_text: Seeking Common Ground While Reserving Differences: Multiple Anatomy Collaborative Framework for Undersampled MRI Reconstruction 求同存异：欠采样 MRI 重建的多解剖学协作框架 Recently, deep neural networks have greatly advanced undersampled Magnetic Resonance Image (MRI) reconstruction, wherein most studies follow the one-anatomy-one-network fashion, i.e., each expert network is trained and evaluated for a specific anatomy. Apart from inefficiency in training multiple independent models, such convention ignores the shared de-aliasing knowledge across various anatomies which can benefit each other. To explore the shared knowledge, one naive way is to combine all the data from various anatomies to train an all-round network. Unfortunately, despite the existence of the shared de-aliasing knowledge, we reveal that the exclusive knowledge across different anatomies can deteriorate specific reconstruction targets, yielding overall performance degradation. Observing this, in this study, we present a novel deep MRI reconstruction framework with both anatomy-shared and anatomy-specific parameterized learners, aiming to "seek common ground while reserving differences" across different anatomies.Particularly, the primary anatomy-shared learners are exposed to different anatomies to model flourishing shared knowledge, while the efficient anatomy-specific learners are trained with their target anatomy for exclusive knowledge. Four different implementations of anatomy-specific learners are presented and explored on the top of our framework in two MRI reconstruction networks. Comprehensive experiments on brain, knee and cardiac MRI datasets demonstrate that three of these learners are able to enhance reconstruction performance via multiple anatomy collaborative learning. 最近，深度神经网络极大地推进了欠采样磁共振图像（MRI）重建，其中大多数研究遵循“一解剖一网络”的方式，即每个专家网络都针对特定的解剖结构进行训练和评估。除了训练多个独立模型的效率低下之外，这种约定还忽略了不同解剖结构之间可以相互受益的共享去锯齿知识。为了探索共享知识，一种简单的方法是将来自不同解剖结构的所有数据结合起来训练一个全方位的网络。不幸的是，尽管存在共享的去锯齿知识，但我们发现不同解剖结构的专有知识可能会恶化特定的重建目标，从而导致整体性能下降。鉴于此，在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度 MRI 重建框架，同时包含解剖共享和特定解剖参数化学习器，旨在跨不同解剖结构“求同存异”。特别是，初级解剖共享学习器接触不同的解剖结构以建模丰富的共享知识，而高效的特定解剖学习器则通过其目标解剖结构进行训练以获得专有知识。在我们的框架之上，在两个 MRI 重建网络中提出并探索了解剖学特定学习器的四种不同实现。对大脑、膝盖和心脏 MRI 数据集的综合实验表明，其中三个学习者能够通过多个解剖协作学习来提高重建性能。 本文提出一种结合解剖学共享知识与特定知识的深度学习框架，用于改进欠采样MRI重建。 Jiangpeng Yan,Chenghui Yu,Hanbo Chen,Zhe Xu,Junzhou Huang,Xiu Li,Jianhua Yao eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Joosung Lee
title: The Emotion is Not One-hot Encoding: Learning with Grayscale Label for Emotion Recognition in Conversation
title_zh: 情感不是一种热编码：使用灰度标签学习对话中的情感识别
abstract: In emotion recognition in conversation (ERC), the emotion of the current utterance is predicted by considering the previous context, which can be utilized in many natural language processing tasks. Although multiple emotions can coexist in a given sentence, most previous approaches take the perspective of a classification task to predict only a given label. However, it is expensive and difficult to label the emotion of a sentence with confidence or multi-label. In this paper, we automatically construct a grayscale label considering the correlation between emotions and use it for learning. That is, instead of using a given label as a one-hot encoding, we construct a grayscale label by measuring scores for different emotions. We introduce several methods for constructing grayscale labels and confirm that each method improves the emotion recognition performance. Our method is simple, effective, and universally applicable to previous systems. The experiments show a significant improvement in the performance of baselines.
summary: In emotion recognition in conversation (ERC), the emotion of the current utterance is predicted by considering the previous context, which can be utilized in many natural language processing tasks. Although multiple emotions can coexist in a given sentence, most previous approaches take the perspective of a classification task to predict only a given label. However, it is expensive and difficult to label the emotion of a sentence with confidence or multi-label. In this paper, we automatically construct a grayscale label considering the correlation between emotions and use it for learning. That is, instead of using a given label as a one-hot encoding, we construct a grayscale label by measuring scores for different emotions. We introduce several methods for constructing grayscale labels and confirm that each method improves the emotion recognition performance. Our method is simple, effective, and universally applicable to previous systems. The experiments show a significant improvement in the performance of baselines.
abstract_zh: 在对话中的情绪识别（ERC）中，通过考虑先前的上下文来预测当前话语的情绪，这可以在许多自然语言处理任务中使用。尽管多种情绪可以共存于给定的句子中，但大多数先前的方法都采用分类任务的角度来仅预测给定的标签。然而，自信或多标签地标记句子的情感是昂贵且困难的。在本文中，我们考虑情绪之间的相关性自动构建灰度标签并将其用于学习。也就是说，我们不是使用给定的标签作为 one-hot 编码，而是通过测量不同情绪的分数来构建灰度标签。我们介绍了几种构建灰度标签的方法，并确认每种方法都提高了情感识别性能。我们的方法简单、有效，并且普遍适用于以前的系统。实验表明基线性能有了显着改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于对话情绪识别的灰度标签学习方法，替代传统的一-hot 编码标签。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将情绪识别视为单标签分类任务，但实际对话中情绪可能共存，且多标签标注成本高昂。本文旨在通过灰度标签捕捉情绪相关性，提升模型性能。
AI.method: 自动构建基于情绪相关性的灰度标签，通过计算不同情绪的得分代替一-hot 编码，并验证多种构建方法的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基线模型上显著提升了情绪识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 灰度标签方法简单有效且具有普适性，为对话情绪识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Benjamin Camus,Corentin Le Barbu,Eric Monteux
title: Robust SAR ATR on MSTAR with Deep Learning Models trained on Full Synthetic MOCEM data
title_zh: MSTAR 上的稳健 SAR ATR 以及基于全合成 MOCEM 数据训练的深度学习模型
abstract: The promising potential of Deep Learning for Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) on Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images vanishes when considering the complexity of collecting training datasets measurements. Simulation can overcome this issue by producing synthetic training datasets. However, because of the limited representativeness of simulation, models trained in a classical way with synthetic images have limited generalization abilities when dealing with real measurement at test time. Previous works identified a set of equally promising deep-learning algorithms to tackle this issue. However, these approaches have been evaluated in a very favorable scenario with a synthetic training dataset that overfits the ground truth of the measured test data. In this work, we study the ATR problem outside of this ideal condition, which is unlikely to occur in real operational contexts. Our contribution is threefold. (1) Using the MOCEM simulator (developed by SCALIAN DS for the French MoD/DGA), we produce a synthetic MSTAR training dataset that differs significantly from the real measurements. (2) We experimentally demonstrate the limits of the state-of-the-art. (3) We show that domain randomization techniques and adversarial training can be combined to overcome this issue. We demonstrate that this approach is more robust than the state-of-the-art, with an accuracy of 75 %, while having a limited impact on computing performance during training.
summary: The promising potential of Deep Learning for Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) on Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images vanishes when considering the complexity of collecting training datasets measurements. Simulation can overcome this issue by producing synthetic training datasets. However, because of the limited representativeness of simulation, models trained in a classical way with synthetic images have limited generalization abilities when dealing with real measurement at test time. Previous works identified a set of equally promising deep-learning algorithms to tackle this issue. However, these approaches have been evaluated in a very favorable scenario with a synthetic training dataset that overfits the ground truth of the measured test data. In this work, we study the ATR problem outside of this ideal condition, which is unlikely to occur in real operational contexts. Our contribution is threefold. (1) Using the MOCEM simulator (developed by SCALIAN DS for the French MoD/DGA), we produce a synthetic MSTAR training dataset that differs significantly from the real measurements. (2) We experimentally demonstrate the limits of the state-of-the-art. (3) We show that domain randomization techniques and adversarial training can be combined to overcome this issue. We demonstrate that this approach is more robust than the state-of-the-art, with an accuracy of 75 %, while having a limited impact on computing performance during training.
abstract_zh: 当考虑到收集训练数据集测量的复杂性时，深度学习在合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像上自动目标识别 (ATR) 的巨大潜力就消失了。模拟可以通过生成合成训练数据集来克服这个问题。然而，由于模拟的代表性有限，使用合成图像以经典方式训练的模型在处理测试时的实际测量时泛化能力有限。之前的工作确定了一组同样有前途的深度学习算法来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法已经在非常有利的场景中使用合成训练数据集进行了评估，该数据集过度拟合了测量测试数据的基本事实。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种理想条件之外的 ATR 问题，这在实际操作环境中不太可能发生。我们的贡献是三重的。 (1) 使用 MOCEM 模拟器（由 SCALIAN DS 为法国 MoD/DGA 开发），我们生成了一个与真实测量值显着不同的合成 MSTAR 训练数据集。 (2)我们通过实验证明了最先进技术的局限性。 (3) 我们证明可以将领域随机化技术和对抗性训练相结合来克服这个问题。我们证明这种方法比最先进的方法更稳健，准确率为 75%，同时对训练期间的计算性能影响有限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在合成数据上训练深度学习模型以提高合成孔径雷达（SAR）自动目标识别（ATR）的鲁棒性，特别是在面对与真实测量数据差异较大的合成数据时。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在SAR ATR中潜力巨大，但合成数据与真实数据的差异导致模型泛化能力不足，现有方法在理想条件下表现良好，但难以应对实际操作中的复杂情况。
AI.method: 使用MOCEM模拟器生成与真实测量差异显著的合成MSTAR数据集，并结合领域随机化和对抗训练技术提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 提出的联合领域随机化与对抗训练方法在测试中达到75%的准确率，且对训练计算性能影响有限。
AI.conclusion: 领域随机化与对抗训练结合的方法比现有技术更鲁棒，为解决合成与真实数据差异问题提供了有效方案。

ai_content_json.result: 提出的联合领域随机化与对抗训练方法在测试中达到75%的准确率，且对训练计算性能影响有限。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 领域随机化与对抗训练结合的方法比现有技术更鲁棒，为解决合成与真实数据差异问题提供了有效方案。

search_text: Robust SAR ATR on MSTAR with Deep Learning Models trained on Full Synthetic MOCEM data MSTAR 上的稳健 SAR ATR 以及基于全合成 MOCEM 数据训练的深度学习模型 The promising potential of Deep Learning for Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) on Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images vanishes when considering the complexity of collecting training datasets measurements. Simulation can overcome this issue by producing synthetic training datasets. However, because of the limited representativeness of simulation, models trained in a classical way with synthetic images have limited generalization abilities when dealing with real measurement at test time. Previous works identified a set of equally promising deep-learning algorithms to tackle this issue. However, these approaches have been evaluated in a very favorable scenario with a synthetic training dataset that overfits the ground truth of the measured test data. In this work, we study the ATR problem outside of this ideal condition, which is unlikely to occur in real operational contexts. Our contribution is threefold. (1) Using the MOCEM simulator (developed by SCALIAN DS for the French MoD/DGA), we produce a synthetic MSTAR training dataset that differs significantly from the real measurements. (2) We experimentally demonstrate the limits of the state-of-the-art. (3) We show that domain randomization techniques and adversarial training can be combined to overcome this issue. We demonstrate that this approach is more robust than the state-of-the-art, with an accuracy of 75 %, while having a limited impact on computing performance during training. 当考虑到收集训练数据集测量的复杂性时，深度学习在合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像上自动目标识别 (ATR) 的巨大潜力就消失了。模拟可以通过生成合成训练数据集来克服这个问题。然而，由于模拟的代表性有限，使用合成图像以经典方式训练的模型在处理测试时的实际测量时泛化能力有限。之前的工作确定了一组同样有前途的深度学习算法来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法已经在非常有利的场景中使用合成训练数据集进行了评估，该数据集过度拟合了测量测试数据的基本事实。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种理想条件之外的 ATR 问题，这在实际操作环境中不太可能发生。我们的贡献是三重的。 (1) 使用 MOCEM 模拟器（由 SCALIAN DS 为法国 MoD/DGA 开发），我们生成了一个与真实测量值显着不同的合成 MSTAR 训练数据集。 (2)我们通过实验证明了最先进技术的局限性。 (3) 我们证明可以将领域随机化技术和对抗性训练相结合来克服这个问题。我们证明这种方法比最先进的方法更稳健，准确率为 75%，同时对训练期间的计算性能影响有限。 本文研究了在合成数据上训练深度学习模型以提高合成孔径雷达（SAR）自动目标识别（ATR）的鲁棒性，特别是在面对与真实测量数据差异较大的合成数据时。 Benjamin Camus,Corentin Le Barbu,Eric Monteux cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE,eess.IV

authors_text: Jiacheng Shi,Yuting He,Youyong Kong,Jean-Louis Coatrieux,Huazhong Shu,Guanyu Yang,Shuo Li
title: XMorpher: Full Transformer for Deformable Medical Image Registration via Cross Attention
title_zh: XMorpher：通过交叉注意力进行可变形医学图像配准的完整 Transformer
abstract: An effective backbone network is important to deep learning-based Deformable Medical Image Registration (DMIR), because it extracts and matches the features between two images to discover the mutual correspondence for fine registration. However, the existing deep networks focus on single image situation and are limited in registration task which is performed on paired images. Therefore, we advance a novel backbone network, XMorpher, for the effective corresponding feature representation in DMIR. 1) It proposes a novel full transformer architecture including dual parallel feature extraction networks which exchange information through cross attention, thus discovering multi-level semantic correspondence while extracting respective features gradually for final effective registration. 2) It advances the Cross Attention Transformer (CAT) blocks to establish the attention mechanism between images which is able to find the correspondence automatically and prompts the features to fuse efficiently in the network. 3) It constrains the attention computation between base windows and searching windows with different sizes, and thus focuses on the local transformation of deformable registration and enhances the computing efficiency at the same time. Without any bells and whistles, our XMorpher gives Voxelmorph 2.8% improvement on DSC , demonstrating its effective representation of the features from the paired images in DMIR. We believe that our XMorpher has great application potential in more paired medical images. Our XMorpher is open on https://github.com/Solemoon/XMorpher
summary: An effective backbone network is important to deep learning-based Deformable Medical Image Registration (DMIR), because it extracts and matches the features between two images to discover the mutual correspondence for fine registration. However, the existing deep networks focus on single image situation and are limited in registration task which is performed on paired images. Therefore, we advance a novel backbone network, XMorpher, for the effective corresponding feature representation in DMIR. 1) It proposes a novel full transformer architecture including dual parallel feature extraction networks which exchange information through cross attention, thus discovering multi-level semantic correspondence while extracting respective features gradually for final effective registration. 2) It advances the Cross Attention Transformer (CAT) blocks to establish the attention mechanism between images which is able to find the correspondence automatically and prompts the features to fuse efficiently in the network. 3) It constrains the attention computation between base windows and searching windows with different sizes, and thus focuses on the local transformation of deformable registration and enhances the computing efficiency at the same time. Without any bells and whistles, our XMorpher gives Voxelmorph 2.8% improvement on DSC , demonstrating its effective representation of the features from the paired images in DMIR. We believe that our XMorpher has great application potential in more paired medical images. Our XMorpher is open on https://github.com/Solemoon/XMorpher
abstract_zh: 有效的主干网络对于基于深度学习的可变形医学图像配准（DMIR）非常重要，因为它提取并匹配两个图像之间的特征以发现精细配准的相互对应关系。然而，现有的深度网络专注于单图像情况，并且在配对图像上执行的配准任务受到限制。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的骨干网络 XMorpher，用于 DMIR 中有效的相应特征表示。 1）提出了一种新颖的全变压器架构，包括双并行特征提取网络，通过交叉注意交换信息，从而发现多级语义对应，同时逐渐提取各自的特征以进行最终有效的注册。 2）它提出了交叉注意变换器（CAT）块来建立图像之间的注意机制，能够自动找到对应关系并促使特征在网络中有效融合。 3）约束了不同大小的基础窗口和搜索窗口之间的注意力计算，从而集中于形变配准的局部变换，同时提高了计算效率。在没有任何附加功能的情况下，我们的 XMorpher 使 Voxelmorph 在 DSC 上提高了 2.8%，证明了它可以有效地表示 DMIR 中配对图像的特征。我们相信我们的XMorpher在更多配对的医学图像中具有巨大的应用潜力。我们的 XMorpher 已在 https://github.com/Solemoon/XMorpher 上开放

AI.tldr: 本文提出XMorpher，一种基于全变压器架构的可变形医学图像配准方法，通过交叉注意力机制提升配准效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理配对医学图像配准时存在局限性，传统网络难以有效提取和匹配双图像特征。
AI.method: 设计包含双并行特征提取网络的全变压器架构，通过交叉注意力机制实现跨图像特征交互，并引入CAT模块与窗口约束优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在DSC指标上较Voxelmorph提升2.8%，验证了XMorpher在配对医学图像特征表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: XMorpher为医学图像配准任务提供了高效解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力并已开源。

authors_text: Quanfeng Xu,Yi Tang,Yumei She
title: Unsupervised multi-branch Capsule for Hyperspectral and LiDAR classification
title_zh: 用于高光谱和激光雷达分类的无监督多分支胶囊
abstract: With the convenient availability of remote sensing data, how to make models to interpret complex remote sensing data attracts wide attention. In remote sensing data, hyperspectral images contain spectral information and LiDAR contains elevation information. Hence, more explorations are warranted to better fuse the features of different source data. In this paper, we introduce semantic understanding to dynamically fuse data from two different sources, extract features of HSI and LiDAR through different capsule network branches and improve self-supervised loss and random rigid rotation in Canonical Capsule to a high-dimensional situation. Canonical Capsule computes the capsule decomposition of objects by permutation-equivariant attention and the process is self-supervised by training pairs of randomly rotated objects. After fusing the features of HSI and LiDAR with semantic understanding, the unsupervised extraction of spectral-spatial-elevation fusion features is achieved. With two real-world examples of HSI and LiDAR fused, the experimental results show that the proposed multi-branch high-dimensional canonical capsule algorithm can be effective for semantic understanding of HSI and LiDAR. It indicates that the model can extract HSI and LiDAR data features effectively as opposed to existing models for unsupervised extraction of multi-source RS data.
summary: With the convenient availability of remote sensing data, how to make models to interpret complex remote sensing data attracts wide attention. In remote sensing data, hyperspectral images contain spectral information and LiDAR contains elevation information. Hence, more explorations are warranted to better fuse the features of different source data. In this paper, we introduce semantic understanding to dynamically fuse data from two different sources, extract features of HSI and LiDAR through different capsule network branches and improve self-supervised loss and random rigid rotation in Canonical Capsule to a high-dimensional situation. Canonical Capsule computes the capsule decomposition of objects by permutation-equivariant attention and the process is self-supervised by training pairs of randomly rotated objects. After fusing the features of HSI and LiDAR with semantic understanding, the unsupervised extraction of spectral-spatial-elevation fusion features is achieved. With two real-world examples of HSI and LiDAR fused, the experimental results show that the proposed multi-branch high-dimensional canonical capsule algorithm can be effective for semantic understanding of HSI and LiDAR. It indicates that the model can extract HSI and LiDAR data features effectively as opposed to existing models for unsupervised extraction of multi-source RS data.
abstract_zh: 随着遥感数据的便捷获取，如何建立模型来解释复杂的遥感数据引起了广泛的关注。在遥感数据中，高光谱图像包含光谱信息，激光雷达包含高程信息。因此，有必要进行更多的探索，以更好地融合不同源数据的特征。在本文中，我们引入语义理解来动态融合来自两个不同来源的数据，通过不同的胶囊网络分支提取HSI和LiDAR的特征，并将Canonical Capsule中的自监督损失和随机刚性旋转改进到高维情况。 Canonical Capsule 通过排列等变注意力来计算对象的胶囊分解，并且该过程通过训练随机旋转对象对进行自我监督。将HSI和LiDAR的特征与语义理解融合后，实现了光谱-空间-高程融合特征的无监督提取。通过 HSI 和 LiDAR 融合的两个真实例子，实验结果表明，所提出的多分支高维规范胶囊算法可以有效地实现 HSI 和 LiDAR 的语义理解。这表明，与现有的多源遥感数据无监督提取模型相比，该模型可以有效地提取 HSI 和 LiDAR 数据特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督多分支高维规范胶囊网络，用于融合高光谱图像（HSI）和激光雷达（LiDAR）数据的分类任务。
AI.motivation: 遥感数据复杂且多源，现有方法难以有效融合HSI的光谱信息与LiDAR的高程信息，需探索更优的特征融合策略以提升分类性能。
AI.method: 设计多分支胶囊网络分别提取HSI和LiDAR特征，改进规范胶囊的自监督损失函数与高维随机刚性旋转机制，并通过语义理解动态融合多源特征。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在无监督场景下有效提取了光谱-空间-高程融合特征，优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过语义驱动的多源特征融合，显著提升了HSI与LiDAR数据的无监督分类效果。

In remote sensing data, hyperspectral images contain spectral information and LiDAR contains elevation information. In this paper, we introduce semantic understanding to dynamically fuse data from two different sources, extract features of HSI and LiDAR through different capsule network branches and improve self-supervised loss and random rigid rotation in Canonical Capsule to a high-dimensional situation. Canonical Capsule computes the capsule decomposition of objects by permutation-equivariant attention and the process is self-supervised by training pairs of randomly rotated objects. After fusing the features of HSI and LiDAR with semantic understanding, the unsupervised extraction of spectral-spatial-elevation fusion features is achieved. With two real-world examples of HSI and LiDAR fused, the experimental results show that the proposed multi-branch high-dimensional canonical capsule algorithm can be effective for semantic understanding of HSI and LiDAR. It indicates that the model can extract HSI and LiDAR data features effectively as opposed to existing models for unsupervised extraction of multi-source RS data. 随着遥感数据的便捷获取，如何建立模型来解释复杂的遥感数据引起了广泛的关注。在遥感数据中，高光谱图像包含光谱信息，激光雷达包含高程信息。因此，有必要进行更多的探索，以更好地融合不同源数据的特征。在本文中，我们引入语义理解来动态融合来自两个不同来源的数据，通过不同的胶囊网络分支提取HSI和LiDAR的特征，并将Canonical Capsule中的自监督损失和随机刚性旋转改进到高维情况。 Canonical Capsule 通过排列等变注意力来计算对象的胶囊分解，并且该过程通过训练随机旋转对象对进行自我监督。将HSI和LiDAR的特征与语义理解融合后，实现了光谱-空间-高程融合特征的无监督提取。通过 HSI 和 LiDAR 融合的两个真实例子，实验结果表明，所提出的多分支高维规范胶囊算法可以有效地实现 HSI 和 LiDAR 的语义理解。这表明，与现有的多源遥感数据无监督提取模型相比，该模型可以有效地提取 HSI 和 LiDAR 数据特征。 本文提出一种无监督多分支高维规范胶囊网络，用于融合高光谱图像（HSI）和激光雷达（LiDAR）数据的分类任务。 Quanfeng Xu,Yi Tang,Yumei She cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Kai Li,Xiaolin Hu,Yi Luo
title: On the Use of Deep Mask Estimation Module for Neural Source Separation Systems
title_zh: 关于深度掩模估计模块在神经源分离系统中的使用
abstract: Most of the recent neural source separation systems rely on a masking-based pipeline where a set of multiplicative masks are estimated from and applied to a signal representation of the input mixture. The estimation of such masks, in almost all network architectures, is done by a single layer followed by an optional nonlinear activation function. However, recent literatures have investigated the use of a deep mask estimation module and observed performance improvement compared to a shallow mask estimation module. In this paper, we analyze the role of such deeper mask estimation module by connecting it to a recently proposed unsupervised source separation method, and empirically show that the deep mask estimation module is an efficient approximation of the so-called overseparation-grouping paradigm with the conventional shallow mask estimation layers.
summary: Most of the recent neural source separation systems rely on a masking-based pipeline where a set of multiplicative masks are estimated from and applied to a signal representation of the input mixture. The estimation of such masks, in almost all network architectures, is done by a single layer followed by an optional nonlinear activation function. However, recent literatures have investigated the use of a deep mask estimation module and observed performance improvement compared to a shallow mask estimation module. In this paper, we analyze the role of such deeper mask estimation module by connecting it to a recently proposed unsupervised source separation method, and empirically show that the deep mask estimation module is an efficient approximation of the so-called overseparation-grouping paradigm with the conventional shallow mask estimation layers.
abstract_zh: 最近的大多数神经源分离系统都依赖于基于掩蔽的管道，其中根据输入混合物的信号表示来估计一组乘法掩码并将其应用于输入混合物的信号表示。在几乎所有网络架构中，此类掩模的估计都是由单层和可选的非线性激活函数完成的。然而，最近的文献研究了深度掩模估计模块的使用，并观察到与浅掩模估计模块相比性能的改进。在本文中，我们通过将这种更深的掩模估计模块连接到最近提出的无监督源分离方法来分析这种更深的掩模估计模块的作用，并凭经验表明，深层掩模估计模块是具有传统浅掩模估计层的所谓过度分离分组范式的有效近似。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度掩码估计模块在神经源分离系统中的应用，分析其相较于传统浅层结构的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统浅层掩码估计模块在源分离任务中存在性能瓶颈，而深度模块虽有效但缺乏理论支持，需进一步分析其机制。
AI.method: 通过将深度掩码估计模块与无监督源分离方法结合，进行理论分析与实验验证，比较其与浅层模块的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，深度掩码估计模块在源分离任务中优于浅层结构，且能有效逼近过分离分组范式。
AI.conclusion: 深度掩码估计模块能有效提升源分离性能，为神经网络设计提供新思路，是传统浅层方法的高效替代方案。

authors_text: Kantip Kiratiratanapruk,Pitchayagan Temniranrat,Wasin Sinthupinyo,Sanparith Marukatat,Sujin Patarapuwadol
title: Automatic Detection of Rice Disease in Images of Various Leaf Sizes
title_zh: 不同叶片尺寸图像中水稻病害的自动检测
abstract: Fast, accurate and affordable rice disease detection method is required to assist rice farmers tackling equipment and expertise shortages problems. In this paper, we focused on the solution using computer vision technique to detect rice diseases from rice field photograph images. Dealing with images took in real-usage situation by general farmers is quite challenging due to various environmental factors, and rice leaf object size variation is one major factor caused performance gradation. To solve this problem, we presented a technique combining a CNN object detection with image tiling technique, based on automatically estimated width size of rice leaves in the images as a size reference for dividing the original input image. A model to estimate leaf width was created by small size CNN such as 18 layer ResNet architecture model. A new divided tiled sub-image set with uniformly sized object was generated and used as input for training a rice disease prediction model. Our technique was evaluated on 4,960 images of eight different types of rice leaf diseases, including blast, blight, brown spot, narrow brown spot, orange, red stripe, rice grassy stunt virus, and streak disease. The mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) for leaf width prediction task evaluated on all eight classes was 11.18% in the experiment, indicating that the leaf width prediction model performed well. The mean average precision (mAP) of the prediction performance on YOLOv4 architecture was enhanced from 87.56% to 91.14% when trained and tested with the tiled dataset. According to our study, the proposed image tiling technique improved rice disease detection efficiency.
summary: Fast, accurate and affordable rice disease detection method is required to assist rice farmers tackling equipment and expertise shortages problems. In this paper, we focused on the solution using computer vision technique to detect rice diseases from rice field photograph images. Dealing with images took in real-usage situation by general farmers is quite challenging due to various environmental factors, and rice leaf object size variation is one major factor caused performance gradation. To solve this problem, we presented a technique combining a CNN object detection with image tiling technique, based on automatically estimated width size of rice leaves in the images as a size reference for dividing the original input image. A model to estimate leaf width was created by small size CNN such as 18 layer ResNet architecture model. A new divided tiled sub-image set with uniformly sized object was generated and used as input for training a rice disease prediction model. Our technique was evaluated on 4,960 images of eight different types of rice leaf diseases, including blast, blight, brown spot, narrow brown spot, orange, red stripe, rice grassy stunt virus, and streak disease. The mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) for leaf width prediction task evaluated on all eight classes was 11.18% in the experiment, indicating that the leaf width prediction model performed well. The mean average precision (mAP) of the prediction performance on YOLOv4 architecture was enhanced from 87.56% to 91.14% when trained and tested with the tiled dataset. According to our study, the proposed image tiling technique improved rice disease detection efficiency.
abstract_zh: 需要快速、准确且经济实惠的水稻病害检测方法来帮助稻农解决设备和专业知识短缺问题。在本文中，我们重点研究了使用计算机视觉技术从稻田照片图像中检测水稻病害的解决方案。由于各种环境因素，处理一般农民在实际使用情况下拍摄的图像相当具有挑战性，而稻叶物体尺寸变化是导致性能分级的主要因素之一。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种将 CNN 目标检测与图像平铺技术相结合的技术，基于自动估计图像中稻叶的宽度尺寸作为分割原始输入图像的尺寸参考。通过小型 CNN（例如 18 层 ResNet 架构模型）创建了估计叶子宽度的模型。生成具有均匀大小对象的新划分平铺子图像集，并将其用作训练水稻病害预测模型的输入。我们的技术对 8 种不同类型的水稻叶部病害的 4,960 张图像进行了评估，包括稻瘟病、枯萎病、褐斑病、窄褐斑病、橙色、红色条纹、水稻草矮化病毒和条斑病。实验中，在所有八个类别上评估的叶宽预测任务的平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）为11.18%，表明叶宽预测模型表现良好。使用平铺数据集进行训练和测试时，YOLOv4 架构上的预测性能的平均精度 (mAP) 从 87.56% 提高到 91.14%。根据我们的研究，所提出的图像拼接技术提高了水稻病害检测效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合CNN目标检测与图像分块技术的水稻病害自动检测方法，以解决实际拍摄图像中水稻叶片尺寸差异导致的检测性能问题。
AI.motivation: 传统水稻病害检测面临设备短缺和专业人员不足的问题，而实际拍摄图像中叶片尺寸差异会显著影响检测效果，亟需一种高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-18小规模CNN预估叶片宽度作为分块基准，通过图像分块技术生成统一尺寸的子图像集，结合YOLOv4架构训练病害检测模型。
AI.result: 叶片宽度预测MAPE为11.18%，YOLOv4模型mAP从87.56%提升至91.14%，验证了分块技术对检测性能的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 图像分块技术有效缓解了叶片尺寸差异对检测的影响，显著提升了水稻病害识别的准确率与鲁棒性。

The mean average precision (mAP) of the prediction performance on YOLOv4 architecture was enhanced from 87.56% to 91.14% when trained and tested with the tiled dataset. authors_text: Hugo Gilbert,Mohamed Ouaguenouni,Meltem Ozturk,Olivier Spanjaard
title: Cautious Learning of Multiattribute Preferences
title_zh: 谨慎学习多属性偏好
comment: ef:13th Multidisciplinary Workshop on Advances in Preference Handling, Jul 2022, Vienna, Austria
comments: ef:13th Multidisciplinary Workshop on Advances in Preference Handling, Jul 2022, Vienna, Austria
abstract: This paper is dedicated to a cautious learning methodology for predicting preferences between alternatives characterized by binary attributes (formally, each alternative is seen as a subset of attributes). By "cautious", we mean that the model learned to represent the multi-attribute preferences is general enough to be compatible with any strict weak order on the alternatives, and that we allow ourselves not to predict some preferences if the data collected are not compatible with a reliable prediction. A predicted preference will be considered reliable if all the simplest models (following Occam's razor principle) explaining the training data agree on it. Predictions are based on an ordinal dominance relation between alternatives [Fishburn and LaValle, 1996]. The dominance relation relies on an uncertainty set encompassing the possible values of the parameters of the multi-attribute utility function. Numerical tests are provided to evaluate the richness and the reliability of the predictions made.
summary: This paper is dedicated to a cautious learning methodology for predicting preferences between alternatives characterized by binary attributes (formally, each alternative is seen as a subset of attributes). By "cautious", we mean that the model learned to represent the multi-attribute preferences is general enough to be compatible with any strict weak order on the alternatives, and that we allow ourselves not to predict some preferences if the data collected are not compatible with a reliable prediction. A predicted preference will be considered reliable if all the simplest models (following Occam's razor principle) explaining the training data agree on it. Predictions are based on an ordinal dominance relation between alternatives [Fishburn and LaValle, 1996]. The dominance relation relies on an uncertainty set encompassing the possible values of the parameters of the multi-attribute utility function. Numerical tests are provided to evaluate the richness and the reliability of the predictions made.
abstract_zh: 本文致力于一种谨慎的学习方法，用于预测以二元属性为特征的替代方案之间的偏好（正式地，每个替代方案都被视为属性的子集）。 “谨慎”是指学习到的表示多属性偏好的模型足够通用，可以与替代方案上的任何严格的弱顺序兼容，并且如果收集的数据与可靠的预测不兼容，我们允许自己不预测某些偏好。如果解释训练数据的所有最简单模型（遵循奥卡姆剃刀原理）都同意预测偏好，则预测偏好将被认为是可靠的。预测基于备选方案之间的序数优势关系 [Fishburn 和 LaValle，1996]。优势关系依赖于包含多属性效用函数的参数的可能值的不确定性集。提供数值测试来评估所做预测的丰富性和可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种谨慎学习方法，用于预测具有二元属性的备选方案之间的偏好，确保模型兼容任何严格弱序且仅在数据支持时进行预测。
AI.motivation: 传统多属性偏好预测可能因数据不足或模型假设不当导致不可靠结论，需设计一种在数据不确定时避免预测的通用框架。
AI.method: 基于序数支配关系（Ordinal Dominance）和参数不确定性集，通过奥卡姆剃刀原则筛选最简模型，仅当所有模型一致时才输出预测。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了该方法在预测丰富性和可靠性上的有效性，尤其在数据稀疏场景下表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过谨慎预测机制和模型共识原则，为多属性决策提供了更可靠的理论支持，适用于不确定环境下的偏好学习。
