authors_text: Kai Li,Yi Luo
title: On the Design and Training Strategies for RNN-based Online Neural Speech Separation Systems
title_zh: 基于RNN的在线神经语音分离系统的设计和训练策略
abstract: While the performance of offline neural speech separation systems has been greatly advanced by the recent development of novel neural network architectures, there is typically an inevitable performance gap between the systems and their online variants. In this paper, we investigate how RNN-based offline neural speech separation systems can be changed into their online counterparts while mitigating the performance degradation. We decompose or reorganize the forward and backward RNN layers in a bidirectional RNN layer to form an online path and an offline path, which enables the model to perform both online and offline processing with a same set of model parameters. We further introduce two training strategies for improving the online model via either a pretrained offline model or a multitask training objective. Experiment results show that compared to the online models that are trained from scratch, the proposed layer decomposition and reorganization schemes and training strategies can effectively mitigate the performance gap between two RNN-based offline separation models and their online variants.
summary: While the performance of offline neural speech separation systems has been greatly advanced by the recent development of novel neural network architectures, there is typically an inevitable performance gap between the systems and their online variants. In this paper, we investigate how RNN-based offline neural speech separation systems can be changed into their online counterparts while mitigating the performance degradation. We decompose or reorganize the forward and backward RNN layers in a bidirectional RNN layer to form an online path and an offline path, which enables the model to perform both online and offline processing with a same set of model parameters. We further introduce two training strategies for improving the online model via either a pretrained offline model or a multitask training objective. Experiment results show that compared to the online models that are trained from scratch, the proposed layer decomposition and reorganization schemes and training strategies can effectively mitigate the performance gap between two RNN-based offline separation models and their online variants.
abstract_zh: 虽然离线神经语音分离系统的性能由于最近新型神经网络架构的发展而得到了极大的提高，但系统与其在线变体之间通常存在不可避免的性能差距。在本文中，我们研究了如何将基于 RNN 的离线神经语音分离系统转变为在线系统，同时减轻性能下降。我们分解或重组双向RNN层中的前向和后向RNN层，形成在线路径和离线路径，这使得模型能够使用同一组模型参数执行在线和离线处理。我们进一步介绍了两种通过预训练离线模型或多任务训练目标来改进在线模型的训练策略。实验结果表明，与从头开始训练的在线模型相比，所提出的层分解和重组方案以及训练策略可以有效缩小两种基于RNN的离线分离模型及其在线变体之间的性能差距。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将基于RNN的离线语音分离系统转化为在线系统，同时减少性能下降。
AI.motivation: 离线神经语音分离系统性能优异，但其在线变体通常存在性能差距，需解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过分解或重组双向RNN层形成在线路径和离线路径，并引入预训练模型或多任务训练策略优化在线模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效缩小了离线与在线RNN语音分离系统的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 层分解重组方案及训练策略能显著提升在线系统的性能，缩小与离线系统的差距。

authors_text: Shujie Hu,Xurong Xie,Mengzhe Geng,Mingyu Cui,Jiajun Deng,Guinan Li,Tianzi Wang,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Exploiting Cross-domain And Cross-Lingual Ultrasound Tongue Imaging Features For Elderly And Dysarthric Speech Recognition
title_zh: 利用跨域和跨语言超声舌头成像功能进行老年人和构音障碍语音识别
abstract: Articulatory features are inherently invariant to acoustic signal distortion and have been successfully incorporated into automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems designed for normal speech. Their practical application to atypical task domains such as elderly and disordered speech across languages is often limited by the difficulty in collecting such specialist data from target speakers. This paper presents a cross-domain and cross-lingual A2A inversion approach that utilizes the parallel audio and ultrasound tongue imaging (UTI) data of the 24-hour TaL corpus in A2A model pre-training before being cross-domain and cross-lingual adapted to three datasets across two languages: the English DementiaBank Pitt and Cantonese JCCOCC MoCA elderly speech corpora; and the English TORGO dysarthric speech data, to produce UTI based articulatory features. Experiments conducted on three tasks suggested incorporating the generated articulatory features consistently outperformed the baseline TDNN and Conformer ASR systems constructed using acoustic features only by statistically significant word or character error rate reductions up to 4.75%, 2.59% and 2.07% absolute (14.69%, 10.64% and 22.72% relative) after data augmentation, speaker adaptation and cross system multi-pass decoding were applied.
summary: Articulatory features are inherently invariant to acoustic signal distortion and have been successfully incorporated into automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems designed for normal speech. Their practical application to atypical task domains such as elderly and disordered speech across languages is often limited by the difficulty in collecting such specialist data from target speakers. This paper presents a cross-domain and cross-lingual A2A inversion approach that utilizes the parallel audio and ultrasound tongue imaging (UTI) data of the 24-hour TaL corpus in A2A model pre-training before being cross-domain and cross-lingual adapted to three datasets across two languages: the English DementiaBank Pitt and Cantonese JCCOCC MoCA elderly speech corpora; and the English TORGO dysarthric speech data, to produce UTI based articulatory features. Experiments conducted on three tasks suggested incorporating the generated articulatory features consistently outperformed the baseline TDNN and Conformer ASR systems constructed using acoustic features only by statistically significant word or character error rate reductions up to 4.75%, 2.59% and 2.07% absolute (14.69%, 10.64% and 22.72% relative) after data augmentation, speaker adaptation and cross system multi-pass decoding were applied.
abstract_zh: 发音特征本质上不受声学信号失真的影响，并且已成功纳入为正常语音设计的自动语音识别（ASR）系统中。它们在非典型任务领域（例如老年人和跨语言言语障碍）的实际应用通常受到从目标说话者收集此类专业数据的困难的限制。本文提出了一种跨域和跨语言的 A2A 反演方法，该方法利用 A2A 模型预训练中 24 小时 TaL 语料库的并行音频和超声舌成像（UTI）数据，然后跨域和跨语言适应跨两种语言的三个数据集：英语 DementiaBank Pitt 和粤语 JCCOCC MoCA 老年人语音语料库；和英语 TORGO 构音障碍语音数据，以产生基于 UTI 的发音特征。对三项任务进行的实验表明，在应用数据增强、说话人自适应和跨系统多通道解码后，合并生成的发音特征始终优于使用声学特征构建的基线 TDNN 和 Conformer ASR 系统，仅统计显着的单词或字符错误率降低了 4.75%、2.59% 和 2.07% 绝对值（14.69%、10.64% 和 22.72% 相对值）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨领域和跨语言的A2A逆变换方法，利用超声波舌像（UTI）特征提升老年人和构音障碍者语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统声学特征在老年人及构音障碍者语音识别中表现受限，而专用数据集获取困难，需探索跨领域跨语言的鲁棒特征提取方法。
AI.method: 基于24小时TaL语料库进行A2A模型预训练，通过跨领域跨语言适配生成UTI特征，结合数据增强、说话人自适应和多通道解码优化识别系统。
AI.result: 在三个任务中，UTI特征使词/字符错误率绝对值降低2.07%-4.75%（相对降低10.64%-22.72%），显著优于仅使用声学特征的基线系统。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域跨语言UTI特征有效提升了老年人及构音障碍者语音识别的鲁棒性，为特殊人群语音技术提供新思路。

search_text: Exploiting Cross-domain And Cross-Lingual Ultrasound Tongue Imaging Features For Elderly And Dysarthric Speech Recognition 利用跨域和跨语言超声舌头成像功能进行老年人和构音障碍语音识别 Articulatory features are inherently invariant to acoustic signal distortion and have been successfully incorporated into automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems designed for normal speech. Their practical application to atypical task domains such as elderly and disordered speech across languages is often limited by the difficulty in collecting such specialist data from target speakers. This paper presents a cross-domain and cross-lingual A2A inversion approach that utilizes the parallel audio and ultrasound tongue imaging (UTI) data of the 24-hour TaL corpus in A2A model pre-training before being cross-domain and cross-lingual adapted to three datasets across two languages: the English DementiaBank Pitt and Cantonese JCCOCC MoCA elderly speech corpora; and the English TORGO dysarthric speech data, to produce UTI based articulatory features. Experiments conducted on three tasks suggested incorporating the generated articulatory features consistently outperformed the baseline TDNN and Conformer ASR systems constructed using acoustic features only by statistically significant word or character error rate reductions up to 4.75%, 2.59% and 2.07% absolute (14.69%, 10.64% and 22.72% relative) after data augmentation, speaker adaptation and cross system multi-pass decoding were applied. 发音特征本质上不受声学信号失真的影响，并且已成功纳入为正常语音设计的自动语音识别（ASR）系统中。它们在非典型任务领域（例如老年人和跨语言言语障碍）的实际应用通常受到从目标说话者收集此类专业数据的困难的限制。本文提出了一种跨域和跨语言的 A2A 反演方法，该方法利用 A2A 模型预训练中 24 小时 TaL 语料库的并行音频和超声舌成像（UTI）数据，然后跨域和跨语言适应跨两种语言的三个数据集：英语 DementiaBank Pitt 和粤语 JCCOCC MoCA 老年人语音语料库；和英语 TORGO 构音障碍语音数据，以产生基于 UTI 的发音特征。对三项任务进行的实验表明，在应用数据增强、说话人自适应和跨系统多通道解码后，合并生成的发音特征始终优于使用声学特征构建的基线 TDNN 和 Conformer ASR 系统，仅统计显着的单词或字符错误率降低了 4.75%、2.59% 和 2.07% 绝对值（14.69%、10.64% 和 22.72% 相对值）。 本文提出一种跨领域和跨语言的A2A逆变换方法，利用超声波舌像（UTI）特征提升老年人和构音障碍者语音识别性能。 Shujie Hu,Xurong Xie,Mengzhe Geng,Mingyu Cui,Jiajun Deng,Guinan Li,Tianzi Wang,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng eess.AS,cs.AI

authors_text: Chiranjibi Sitaula,Tej Bahadur Shahi,Faezeh Marzbanrad,Jagannath Aryal
title: Recent Advances in Scene Image Representation and Classification
title_zh: 场景图像表示和分类的最新进展
comment: This paper is under review in Multimedia Tools and Applications (Springer) journal. This article may be deleted or updated based on the policies of the journal
comments: This paper is under review in Multimedia Tools and Applications (Springer) journal. This article may be deleted or updated based on the policies of the journal
abstract: With the rise of deep learning algorithms nowadays, scene image representation methods have achieved a significant performance boost in classification. However, the performance is still limited because the scene images are mostly complex having higher intra-class dissimilarity and inter-class similarity problems. To deal with such problems, there have been several methods proposed in the literature with their advantages and limitations. A detailed study of previous works is necessary to understand their advantages and disadvantages in image representation and classification problems. In this paper, we review the existing scene image representation methods that are being widely used for image classification. For this, we, first, devise the taxonomy using the seminal existing methods proposed in the literature to this date {using deep learning (DL)-based, computer vision (CV)-based, and search engine (SE)-based methods}. Next, we compare their performance both qualitatively (e.g., quality of outputs, pros/cons, etc.) and quantitatively (e.g., accuracy). Last, we speculate on the prominent research directions in scene image representation tasks using {keyword growth and timeline analysis.} Overall, this survey provides in-depth insights and applications of recent scene image representation methods under three different methods.
summary: With the rise of deep learning algorithms nowadays, scene image representation methods have achieved a significant performance boost in classification. However, the performance is still limited because the scene images are mostly complex having higher intra-class dissimilarity and inter-class similarity problems. To deal with such problems, there have been several methods proposed in the literature with their advantages and limitations. A detailed study of previous works is necessary to understand their advantages and disadvantages in image representation and classification problems. In this paper, we review the existing scene image representation methods that are being widely used for image classification. For this, we, first, devise the taxonomy using the seminal existing methods proposed in the literature to this date {using deep learning (DL)-based, computer vision (CV)-based, and search engine (SE)-based methods}. Next, we compare their performance both qualitatively (e.g., quality of outputs, pros/cons, etc.) and quantitatively (e.g., accuracy). Last, we speculate on the prominent research directions in scene image representation tasks using {keyword growth and timeline analysis.} Overall, this survey provides in-depth insights and applications of recent scene image representation methods under three different methods.
abstract_zh: 随着当今深度学习算法的兴起，场景图像表示方法在分类方面取得了显着的性能提升。然而，由于场景图像大多比较复杂，具有较高的类内相异性和类间相似性问题，因此性能仍然受到限制。为了解决这些问题，文献中提出了几种方法，各有其优点和局限性。有必要对以前的工作进行详细研究，以了解它们在图像表示和分类问题上的优点和缺点。在本文中，我们回顾了广泛用于图像分类的现有场景图像表示方法。为此，我们首先使用迄今为止文献中提出的开创性现有方法{使用基于深度学习（DL）、计算机视觉（CV）和搜索引擎（SE）的方法}来设计分类法。接下来，我们从定性（例如，输出质量、优缺点等）和定量（例如，准确性）上比较它们的表现。最后，我们使用{关键词增长和时间线分析}推测场景图像表示任务中的突出研究方向。总体而言，本次调查提供了三种不同方法下最新场景图像表示方法的深入见解和应用。

AI.tldr: 综述现有场景图像表示与分类方法，分析其优缺点并探讨未来方向
AI.motivation: 解决场景图像分类中类内差异大、类间相似度高的问题，通过分析现有方法优缺点以指导未来研究
AI.method: 采用分类法对现有方法进行归类（深度学习/计算机视觉/搜索引擎），结合定性分析（输出质量、优缺点）与定量分析（准确率），并利用关键词增长和时间线分析预测研究趋势
AI.result: 系统比较了不同方法的性能表现，揭示了各类方法在场景图像分类中的适用场景与局限性
AI.conclusion: 总结现有技术路线的发展脉络，指出未来需重点突破类内表示一致性与类间特征区分度的提升

authors_text: Hong Wang,Peng Liu,Phuoc Thanh Tran Ngoc,Bing Li,Yao Li,Hirotaka Sato
title: Toward the smooth mesh climbing of a miniature robot using bioinspired soft and expandable claws
title_zh: 使用仿生柔软且可扩展的爪子实现微型机器人的平滑网格攀爬
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Medical Robotics and Bionics ( Volume: 6, Issue: 1, February 2024)
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Medical Robotics and Bionics ( Volume: 6, Issue: 1, February 2024)
abstract: While most micro-robots face difficulty traveling on rugged and uneven terrain, beetles can walk smoothly on the complex substrate without slipping or getting stuck on the surface due to their stiffness-variable tarsi and expandable hooks on the tip of tarsi. In this study, we found that beetles actively bent and expanded their claws regularly to crawl freely on mesh surfaces. Inspired by the crawling mechanism of the beetles, we designed an 8-cm miniature climbing robot equipping artificial claws to open and bend in the same cyclic manner as natural beetles. The robot can climb freely with a controllable gait on the mesh surface, steep incline of the angle of 60°, and even transition surface. To our best knowledge, this is the first micro-scale robot that can climb both the mesh surface and cliffy incline.
summary: While most micro-robots face difficulty traveling on rugged and uneven terrain, beetles can walk smoothly on the complex substrate without slipping or getting stuck on the surface due to their stiffness-variable tarsi and expandable hooks on the tip of tarsi. In this study, we found that beetles actively bent and expanded their claws regularly to crawl freely on mesh surfaces. Inspired by the crawling mechanism of the beetles, we designed an 8-cm miniature climbing robot equipping artificial claws to open and bend in the same cyclic manner as natural beetles. The robot can climb freely with a controllable gait on the mesh surface, steep incline of the angle of 60°, and even transition surface. To our best knowledge, this is the first micro-scale robot that can climb both the mesh surface and cliffy incline.
abstract_zh: 虽然大多数微型机器人在崎岖不平的地形上行走都面临困难，但甲虫可以在复杂的基质上平稳行走，而不会滑倒或卡在表面上，因为它们的跗节刚度可变，跗节尖端有可扩展的钩子。在这项研究中，我们发现甲虫会定期主动弯曲和张开爪子，以便在网格表面自由爬行。受甲虫爬行机制的启发，我们设计了一个8厘米的微型攀爬机器人，配备人工爪子，以与天然甲虫相同的循环方式张开和弯曲。机器人可以在网格表面、60°陡坡、甚至过渡表面上以可控步态自由攀爬。据我们所知，这是第一个可以攀爬网格表面和陡峭斜坡的微型机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种受甲虫启发的微型攀爬机器人，通过仿生软体可扩展爪实现复杂表面的稳定攀爬。
AI.motivation: 微型机器人难以在复杂地形（如网格表面、陡坡）移动，而甲虫凭借可变刚度的爪部结构能灵活适应不同表面。
AI.method: 通过观察甲虫爪部周期性弯曲与扩张机制，设计8厘米微型机器人，采用仿生人工爪实现类似运动模式。
AI.result: 机器人可稳定攀爬网格表面、60°陡坡及过渡表面，实现了微米级机器人首次同时具备网格与陡坡攀爬能力。
AI.conclusion: 仿生软体爪结构为微型机器人复杂地形移动提供了新方案，拓展了微型机器人应用场景。

result: 机器人可稳定攀爬网格表面、60°陡坡及过渡表面，实现了微米级机器人首次同时具备网格与陡坡攀爬能力。
conclusion: 仿生软体爪结构为微型机器人复杂地形移动提供了新方案，拓展了微型机器人应用场景。
search_text: Toward the smooth mesh climbing of a miniature robot using bioinspired soft and expandable claws 使用仿生柔软且可扩展的爪子实现微型机器人的平滑网格攀爬 While most micro-robots face difficulty traveling on rugged and uneven terrain, beetles can walk smoothly on the complex substrate without slipping or getting stuck on the surface due to their stiffness-variable tarsi and expandable hooks on the tip of tarsi. In this study, we found that beetles actively bent and expanded their claws regularly to crawl freely on mesh surfaces. Inspired by the crawling mechanism of the beetles, we designed an 8-cm miniature climbing robot equipping artificial claws to open and bend in the same cyclic manner as natural beetles. The robot can climb freely with a controllable gait on the mesh surface, steep incline of the angle of 60°, and even transition surface. To our best knowledge, this is the first micro-scale robot that can climb both the mesh surface and cliffy incline. 虽然大多数微型机器人在崎岖不平的地形上行走都面临困难，但甲虫可以在复杂的基质上平稳行走，而不会滑倒或卡在表面上，因为它们的跗节刚度可变，跗节尖端有可扩展的钩子。在这项研究中，我们发现甲虫会定期主动弯曲和张开爪子，以便在网格表面自由爬行。受甲虫爬行机制的启发，我们设计了一个8厘米的微型攀爬机器人，配备人工爪子，以与天然甲虫相同的循环方式张开和弯曲。机器人可以在网格表面、60°陡坡、甚至过渡表面上以可控步态自由攀爬。据我们所知，这是第一个可以攀爬网格表面和陡峭斜坡的微型机器人。 本文设计了一种受甲虫启发的微型攀爬机器人，通过仿生软体可扩展爪实现复杂表面的稳定攀爬。 Hong Wang,Peng Liu,Phuoc Thanh Tran Ngoc,Bing Li,Yao Li,Hirotaka Sato cs.RO

authors_text: Fabian Mentzer,George Toderici,David Minnen,Sung-Jin Hwang,Sergi Caelles,Mario Lucic,Eirikur Agustsson
title: VCT: A Video Compression Transformer
title_zh: VCT：视频压缩转换器
comment: NeurIPS'22 Camera Ready Version. Code: https://goo.gle/vct-paper
comments: NeurIPS'22 Camera Ready Version. Code: https://goo.gle/vct-paper
abstract: We show how transformers can be used to vastly simplify neural video compression. Previous methods have been relying on an increasing number of architectural biases and priors, including motion prediction and warping operations, resulting in complex models. Instead, we independently map input frames to representations and use a transformer to model their dependencies, letting it predict the distribution of future representations given the past. The resulting video compression transformer outperforms previous methods on standard video compression data sets. Experiments on synthetic data show that our model learns to handle complex motion patterns such as panning, blurring and fading purely from data. Our approach is easy to implement, and we release code to facilitate future research.
summary: We show how transformers can be used to vastly simplify neural video compression. Previous methods have been relying on an increasing number of architectural biases and priors, including motion prediction and warping operations, resulting in complex models. Instead, we independently map input frames to representations and use a transformer to model their dependencies, letting it predict the distribution of future representations given the past. The resulting video compression transformer outperforms previous methods on standard video compression data sets. Experiments on synthetic data show that our model learns to handle complex motion patterns such as panning, blurring and fading purely from data. Our approach is easy to implement, and we release code to facilitate future research.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了如何使用 Transformer 来极大地简化神经视频压缩。以前的方法一直依赖于越来越多的架构偏差和先验，包括运动预测和扭曲操作，从而导致模型变得复杂。相反，我们独立地将输入帧映射到表示，并使用变压器对它们的依赖关系进行建模，让它预测给定过去的未来表示的分布。由此产生的视频压缩转换器在标准视频压缩数据集上优于以前的方法。对合成数据的实验表明，我们的模型能够纯粹从数据中学习处理复杂的运动模式，例如平移、模糊和淡入淡出。我们的方法很容易实现，并且我们发布代码以促进未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的视频压缩方法VCT，通过建模帧间依赖关系实现高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统视频压缩方法依赖复杂运动预测和变形操作，模型架构复杂且需大量先验知识。
AI.method: 独立映射输入帧到表示空间，利用Transformer建模帧间依赖关系并预测未来表示分布。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上优于现有方法，可学习处理平移、模糊等复杂运动模式，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构能简化视频压缩流程，实现高性能且易于复现的压缩方案。

authors_text: Baihan Lin
title: Knowledge Management System with NLP-Assisted Annotations: A Brief Survey and Outlook
title_zh: 具有 NLP 辅助注释的知识管理系统：简要调查与展望
abstract: Knowledge management systems (KMS) are in high demand for industrial researchers, chemical or research enterprises, or evidence-based decision making. However, existing systems have limitations in categorizing and organizing paper insights or relationships. Traditional databases are usually disjoint with logging systems, which limit its utility in generating concise, collated overviews. In this work, we briefly survey existing approaches of this problem space and propose a unified framework that utilizes relational databases to log hierarchical information to facilitate the research and writing process, or generate useful knowledge from references or insights from connected concepts. Our framework of bidirectional knowledge management system (BKMS) enables novel functionalities encompassing improved hierarchical note-taking, AI-assisted brainstorming, and multi-directional relationships. Potential applications include managing inventories and changes for manufacture or research enterprises, or generating analytic reports with evidence-based decision making.
summary: Knowledge management systems (KMS) are in high demand for industrial researchers, chemical or research enterprises, or evidence-based decision making. However, existing systems have limitations in categorizing and organizing paper insights or relationships. Traditional databases are usually disjoint with logging systems, which limit its utility in generating concise, collated overviews. In this work, we briefly survey existing approaches of this problem space and propose a unified framework that utilizes relational databases to log hierarchical information to facilitate the research and writing process, or generate useful knowledge from references or insights from connected concepts. Our framework of bidirectional knowledge management system (BKMS) enables novel functionalities encompassing improved hierarchical note-taking, AI-assisted brainstorming, and multi-directional relationships. Potential applications include managing inventories and changes for manufacture or research enterprises, or generating analytic reports with evidence-based decision making.
abstract_zh: 工业研究人员、化学或研究企业或基于证据的决策对知识管理系统 (KMS) 的需求很高。然而，现有系统在分类​​和组织论文见解或关系方面存在局限性。传统数据库通常与日志系统脱节，这限制了其生成简洁、整理的概述的效用。在这项工作中，我们简要调查了该问题空间的现有方法，并提出了一个统一的框架，利用关系数据库来记录分层信息，以促进研究和写作过程，或从相关概念的参考或见解中生成有用的知识。我们的双向知识管理系统 (BKMS) 框架可实现新颖的功能，包括改进的分层笔记、人工智能辅助头脑风暴和多向关系。潜在的应用包括管理制造或研究企业的库存和变更，或通过基于证据的决策生成分析报告。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了现有知识管理系统（KMS）的局限性，并提出一个结合关系数据库与自然语言处理（NLP）的双向知识管理系统（BKMS）框架，以改进知识组织与利用效率。
AI.motivation: 现有知识管理系统难以有效分类和整合研究洞察，传统数据库与日志系统分离导致生成综合概述困难，亟需更高效的知识管理方案。
AI.method: 设计统一框架利用关系数据库记录分层信息，结合NLP技术实现双向知识管理功能，包括分层笔记、AI辅助头脑风暴及多向关系处理。
AI.result: 框架验证了整合数据库与NLP技术的可行性，可提升企业库存管理、研发流程及证据驱动决策的效率，支持生成结构化知识输出。
AI.conclusion: BKMS框架为知识管理提供了新方向，未来需进一步优化NLP算法并扩展其在制造业与科研领域的应用场景。

authors_text: Valerio Capraro,Joseph Y. Halpern,Matjaz Perc
title: From Outcome-Based to Language-Based Preferences
title_zh: 从基于结果到基于语言的偏好
comment: Forthcoming in the Journal of Economic Literature
comments: Forthcoming in the Journal of Economic Literature
abstract: We review the literature on models that try to explain human behavior in social interactions described by normal-form games with monetary payoffs. We start by covering social and moral preferences. We then focus on the growing body of research showing that people react to the language in which actions are described, especially when it activates moral concerns. We conclude by arguing that behavioral economics is in the midst of a paradigm shift towards language-based preferences, which will require an exploration of new models and experimental setups.
summary: We review the literature on models that try to explain human behavior in social interactions described by normal-form games with monetary payoffs. We start by covering social and moral preferences. We then focus on the growing body of research showing that people react to the language in which actions are described, especially when it activates moral concerns. We conclude by arguing that behavioral economics is in the midst of a paradigm shift towards language-based preferences, which will require an exploration of new models and experimental setups.
abstract_zh: 我们回顾了有关模型的文献，这些模型试图解释由具有金钱回报的正常形式博弈所描述的社会互动中的人类行为。我们首先讨论社会和道德偏好。然后，我们关注越来越多的研究，这些研究表明人们会对描述行为的语言做出反应，尤其是当它引发道德担忧时。最后，我们认为行为经济学正处于向基于语言的偏好的范式转变之中，这将需要探索新的模型和实验设置。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了行为经济学中从结果导向偏好向语言导向偏好的范式转变，探讨语言对人类社会互动行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统模型难以充分解释人类在社会互动中的复杂行为，尤其当行动描述语言触发道德关切时，需重新审视偏好理论框架。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有模型，聚焦语言描述对道德决策影响的实证研究，对比不同表述方式下的行为差异。
AI.result: 发现语言表述显著影响个体决策，尤其在激活道德关切时，传统结果导向模型无法完全解释行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 行为经济学正经历向语言基于偏好的范式转型，未来需开发融合语言因素的新模型与实验方法。

ai_content.result: 发现语言表述显著影响个体决策，尤其在激活道德关切时，传统结果导向模型无法完全解释行为模式。

ai_content_json.method: 通过文献综述分析现有模型，聚焦语言描述对道德决策影响的实证研究，对比不同表述方式下的行为差异。
ai_content_json.result: 发现语言表述显著影响个体决策，尤其在激活道德关切时，传统结果导向模型无法完全解释行为模式。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 行为经济学正经历向语言基于偏好的范式转型，未来需开发融合语言因素的新模型与实验方法。

search_text: From Outcome-Based to Language-Based Preferences 从基于结果到基于语言的偏好 We review the literature on models that try to explain human behavior in social interactions described by normal-form games with monetary payoffs. We start by covering social and moral preferences. We then focus on the growing body of research showing that people react to the language in which actions are described, especially when it activates moral concerns. We conclude by arguing that behavioral economics is in the midst of a paradigm shift towards language-based preferences, which will require an exploration of new models and experimental setups. 我们回顾了有关模型的文献，这些模型试图解释由具有金钱回报的正常形式博弈所描述的社会互动中的人类行为。我们首先讨论社会和道德偏好。然后，我们关注越来越多的研究，这些研究表明人们会对描述行为的语言做出反应，尤其是当它引发道德担忧时。最后，我们认为行为经济学正处于向基于语言的偏好的范式转变之中，这将需要探索新的模型和实验设置。 本文综述了行为经济学中从结果导向偏好向语言导向偏好的范式转变，探讨语言对人类社会互动行为的影响。 Valerio Capraro,Joseph Y. Halpern,Matjaz Perc cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.CY,physics.soc-ph

authors_text: Mohammed A. M. Elhassan,Chenhui Yang,Chenxi Huang,Tewodros Legesse Munea,Xin Hong,Abuzar B. M. Adam,Amina Benabid
title: S$^2$-FPN: Scale-ware Strip Attention Guided Feature Pyramid Network for Real-time Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: S$^2$-FPN：用于实时语义分割的Scale-ware Strip Attention引导特征金字塔网络
abstract: Modern high-performance semantic segmentation methods employ a heavy backbone and dilated convolution to extract the relevant feature. Although extracting features with both contextual and semantic information is critical for the segmentation tasks, it brings a memory footprint and high computation cost for real-time applications. This paper presents a new model to achieve a trade-off between accuracy/speed for real-time road scene semantic segmentation. Specifically, we proposed a lightweight model named Scale-aware Strip Attention Guided Feature Pyramid Network (S$^2$-FPN). Our network consists of three main modules: Attention Pyramid Fusion (APF) module, Scale-aware Strip Attention Module (SSAM), and Global Feature Upsample (GFU) module. APF adopts an attention mechanisms to learn discriminative multi-scale features and help close the semantic gap between different levels. APF uses the scale-aware attention to encode global context with vertical stripping operation and models the long-range dependencies, which helps relate pixels with similar semantic label. In addition, APF employs channel-wise reweighting block (CRB) to emphasize the channel features. Finally, the decoder of S$^2$-FPN then adopts GFU, which is used to fuse features from APF and the encoder. Extensive experiments have been conducted on two challenging semantic segmentation benchmarks, which demonstrate that our approach achieves better accuracy/speed trade-off with different model settings. The proposed models have achieved a results of 76.2\%mIoU/87.3FPS, 77.4\%mIoU/67FPS, and 77.8\%mIoU/30.5FPS on Cityscapes dataset, and 69.6\%mIoU,71.0\% mIoU, and 74.2\% mIoU on Camvid dataset. The code for this work will be made available at \url{https://github.com/mohamedac29/S2-FPN

abstract_zh: 现代高性能语义分割方法采用重型主干和扩张卷积来提取相关特征。尽管提取具有上下文和语义信息的特征对于分割任务至关重要，但它为实时应用程序带来了内存占用和高昂的计算成本。本文提出了一种新模型来实现实时道路场景语义分割的准确性/速度之间的权衡。具体来说，我们提出了一种名为 Scale-aware Strip Attention Guided Feature Pyramid Network (S$^2$-FPN) 的轻量级模型。我们的网络由三个主要模块组成：注意力金字塔融合（APF）模块、尺度感知条带注意力模块（SSAM）和全局特征上采样（GFU）模块。 APF 采用注意力机制来学习有区别的多尺度特征，并帮助缩小不同级别之间的语义差距。 APF 使用尺度感知注意力通过垂直剥离操作对全局上下文进行编码，并对远程依赖关系进行建模，这有助于将像素与相似的语义标签相关联。此外，APF 采用通道级重加权块（CRB）来强调通道特征。最后，S$^2$-FPN 的解码器采用 GFU，用于融合 APF 和编码器的特征。在两个具有挑战性的语义分割基准上进行了广泛的实验，这表明我们的方法在不同的模型设置下实现了更好的准确性/速度权衡。所提出的模型在 Cityscapes 数据集上取得了 76.2\%mIoU/87.3FPS、77.4\%mIoU/67FPS 和 77.8\%mIoU/30.5FPS 的结果，在 Camvid 数据集上取得了 69.6\%mIoU、71.0\% mIoU 和 74.2\% mIoU 的结果。这项工作的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/mohamedac29/S2-FPN 提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级模型S²-FPN，通过改进特征金字塔网络实现实时道路场景语义分割的精度与速度平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有高精度语义分割方法因使用复杂结构和空洞卷积导致计算量大、内存占用高，难以满足实时应用需求。
AI.method: 设计包含注意力金字塔融合模块（APF）、尺度感知条形注意力模块（SSAM）和全局特征上采样模块（GFU）的S²-FPN网络，通过多尺度特征学习、通道重加权和特征融合优化分割效果。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上达到76.2%mIoU/87.3FPS、77.4%mIoU/67FPS、77.8%mIoU/30.5FPS，在Camvid数据集上分别达到69.6%、71.0%、74.2%mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 提出的S²-FPN在保持较高分割精度的同时显著提升推理速度，验证了模型在实时语义分割任务中的有效性。

Although extracting features with both contextual and semantic information is critical for the segmentation tasks, it brings a memory footprint and high computation cost for real-time applications. authors_text: Shengkui Zhao,Bin Ma,Karn N. Watcharasupat,Woon-Seng Gan
title: FRCRN: Boosting Feature Representation using Frequency Recurrence for Monaural Speech Enhancement
title_zh: FRCRN：使用频率循环增强单声道语音增强的特征表示
comment: The paper has been accepted by ICASSP 2022. 5 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
comments: The paper has been accepted by ICASSP 2022. 5 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Convolutional recurrent networks (CRN) integrating a convolutional encoder-decoder (CED) structure and a recurrent structure have achieved promising performance for monaural speech enhancement. However, feature representation across frequency context is highly constrained due to limited receptive fields in the convolutions of CED. In this paper, we propose a convolutional recurrent encoder-decoder (CRED) structure to boost feature representation along the frequency axis. The CRED applies frequency recurrence on 3D convolutional feature maps along the frequency axis following each convolution, therefore, it is capable of catching long-range frequency correlations and enhancing feature representations of speech inputs. The proposed frequency recurrence is realized efficiently using a feedforward sequential memory network (FSMN). Besides the CRED, we insert two stacked FSMN layers between the encoder and the decoder to model further temporal dynamics. We name the proposed framework as Frequency Recurrent CRN (FRCRN). We design FRCRN to predict complex Ideal Ratio Mask (cIRM) in complex-valued domain and optimize FRCRN using both time-frequency-domain and time-domain losses. Our proposed approach achieved state-of-the-art performance on wideband benchmark datasets and achieved 2nd place for the real-time fullband track in terms of Mean Opinion Score (MOS) and Word Accuracy (WAcc) in the ICASSP 2022 Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) challenge (https://github.com/modelscope/ClearerVoice-Studio).
summary: Convolutional recurrent networks (CRN) integrating a convolutional encoder-decoder (CED) structure and a recurrent structure have achieved promising performance for monaural speech enhancement. However, feature representation across frequency context is highly constrained due to limited receptive fields in the convolutions of CED. In this paper, we propose a convolutional recurrent encoder-decoder (CRED) structure to boost feature representation along the frequency axis. The CRED applies frequency recurrence on 3D convolutional feature maps along the frequency axis following each convolution, therefore, it is capable of catching long-range frequency correlations and enhancing feature representations of speech inputs. The proposed frequency recurrence is realized efficiently using a feedforward sequential memory network (FSMN). Besides the CRED, we insert two stacked FSMN layers between the encoder and the decoder to model further temporal dynamics. We name the proposed framework as Frequency Recurrent CRN (FRCRN). We design FRCRN to predict complex Ideal Ratio Mask (cIRM) in complex-valued domain and optimize FRCRN using both time-frequency-domain and time-domain losses. Our proposed approach achieved state-of-the-art performance on wideband benchmark datasets and achieved 2nd place for the real-time fullband track in terms of Mean Opinion Score (MOS) and Word Accuracy (WAcc) in the ICASSP 2022 Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) challenge (https://github.com/modelscope/ClearerVoice-Studio).
abstract_zh: 集成卷积编码器-解码器（CED）结构和循环结构的卷积循环网络（CRN）在单耳语音增强方面取得了良好的性能。然而，由于 CED 卷积中的感受野有限，跨频率上下文的特征表示受到高度限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种卷积循环编码器-解码器（CRED）结构来增强沿频率轴的特征表示。 CRED 在每次卷积后沿着频率轴在 3D 卷积特征图上应用频率递归，因此，它能够捕获长范围频率相关性并增强语音输入的特征表示。使用前馈顺序存储网络（FSMN）有效地实现了所提出的频率循环。除了 CRED 之外，我们还在编码器和解码器之间插入两个堆叠的 FSMN 层，以进一步模拟时间动态。我们将提议的框架命名为频率循环 CRN (FRCRN)。我们设计 FRCRN 来预测复值域中的复杂理想比率模板（cIRM），并使用时频域和时域损失来优化 FRCRN。我们提出的方法在宽带基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并在 ICASSP 2022 深度噪声抑制 (DNS) 挑战 (https://github.com/modelscope/ClearerVoice-Studio) 中的平均意见得分 (MOS) 和词准确度 (WAcc) 方面获得了实时全带跟踪的第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FRCRN的框架，用于单声道语音增强，通过频率递归提升特征表示。
AI.motivation: 现有的卷积循环网络（CRN）在卷积的接受域有限，导致在频率上下文中的特征表示受限，因此需要改进以捕捉长距离频率相关性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种卷积循环编码解码（CRED）结构，通过在3D卷积特征图上应用频率递归，使用前馈顺序记忆网络（FSMN）实现频率递归，并在编码器和解码器之间插入两个堆叠的FSMN层以建模时间动态。该框架预测复理想比掩码（cIRM），并使用时频域和时域损失进行优化。
AI.result: 该方法在宽带基准数据集上达到了最先进的性能，并在ICASSP 2022 DNS挑战中实时全带赛道中获得了第二名，MOS和WAcc指标表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FRCRN通过频率递归显著提升了特征表示，为单声道语音增强提供了有效的解决方案。

search_text: FRCRN: Boosting Feature Representation using Frequency Recurrence for Monaural Speech Enhancement FRCRN：使用频率循环增强单声道语音增强的特征表示 Convolutional recurrent networks (CRN) integrating a convolutional encoder-decoder (CED) structure and a recurrent structure have achieved promising performance for monaural speech enhancement. However, feature representation across frequency context is highly constrained due to limited receptive fields in the convolutions of CED. In this paper, we propose a convolutional recurrent encoder-decoder (CRED) structure to boost feature representation along the frequency axis. The CRED applies frequency recurrence on 3D convolutional feature maps along the frequency axis following each convolution, therefore, it is capable of catching long-range frequency correlations and enhancing feature representations of speech inputs. The proposed frequency recurrence is realized efficiently using a feedforward sequential memory network (FSMN). Besides the CRED, we insert two stacked FSMN layers between the encoder and the decoder to model further temporal dynamics. We name the proposed framework as Frequency Recurrent CRN (FRCRN). We design FRCRN to predict complex Ideal Ratio Mask (cIRM) in complex-valued domain and optimize FRCRN using both time-frequency-domain and time-domain losses. Our proposed approach achieved state-of-the-art performance on wideband benchmark datasets and achieved 2nd place for the real-time fullband track in terms of Mean Opinion Score (MOS) and Word Accuracy (WAcc) in the ICASSP 2022 Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) challenge (https://github.com/modelscope/ClearerVoice-Studio). 集成卷积编码器-解码器（CED）结构和循环结构的卷积循环网络（CRN）在单耳语音增强方面取得了良好的性能。然而，由于 CED 卷积中的感受野有限，跨频率上下文的特征表示受到高度限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种卷积循环编码器-解码器（CRED）结构来增强沿频率轴的特征表示。 CRED 在每次卷积后沿着频率轴在 3D 卷积特征图上应用频率递归，因此，它能够捕获长范围频率相关性并增强语音输入的特征表示。使用前馈顺序存储网络（FSMN）有效地实现了所提出的频率循环。除了 CRED 之外，我们还在编码器和解码器之间插入两个堆叠的 FSMN 层，以进一步模拟时间动态。我们将提议的框架命名为频率循环 CRN (FRCRN)。我们设计 FRCRN 来预测复值域中的复杂理想比率模板（cIRM），并使用时频域和时域损失来优化 FRCRN。我们提出的方法在宽带基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并在 ICASSP 2022 深度噪声抑制 (DNS) 挑战 (https://github.com/modelscope/ClearerVoice-Studio) 中的平均意见得分 (MOS) 和词准确度 (WAcc) 方面获得了实时全带跟踪的第二名。 本文提出了一种名为FRCRN的框架，用于单声道语音增强，通过频率递归提升特征表示。 Shengkui Zhao,Bin Ma,Karn N. Watcharasupat,Woon-Seng Gan cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Felix Petersen,Hilde Kuehne,Christian Borgelt,Oliver Deussen
title: Differentiable Top-k Classification Learning
title_zh: 可微的 Top-k 分类学习
abstract: The top-k classification accuracy is one of the core metrics in machine learning. Here, k is conventionally a positive integer, such as 1 or 5, leading to top-1 or top-5 training objectives. In this work, we relax this assumption and optimize the model for multiple k simultaneously instead of using a single k. Leveraging recent advances in differentiable sorting and ranking, we propose a differentiable top-k cross-entropy classification loss. This allows training the network while not only considering the top-1 prediction, but also, e.g., the top-2 and top-5 predictions. We evaluate the proposed loss function for fine-tuning on state-of-the-art architectures, as well as for training from scratch. We find that relaxing k does not only produce better top-5 accuracies, but also leads to top-1 accuracy improvements. When fine-tuning publicly available ImageNet models, we achieve a new state-of-the-art for these models.
summary: The top-k classification accuracy is one of the core metrics in machine learning. Here, k is conventionally a positive integer, such as 1 or 5, leading to top-1 or top-5 training objectives. In this work, we relax this assumption and optimize the model for multiple k simultaneously instead of using a single k. Leveraging recent advances in differentiable sorting and ranking, we propose a differentiable top-k cross-entropy classification loss. This allows training the network while not only considering the top-1 prediction, but also, e.g., the top-2 and top-5 predictions. We evaluate the proposed loss function for fine-tuning on state-of-the-art architectures, as well as for training from scratch. We find that relaxing k does not only produce better top-5 accuracies, but also leads to top-1 accuracy improvements. When fine-tuning publicly available ImageNet models, we achieve a new state-of-the-art for these models.
abstract_zh: top-k 分类准确率是机器学习的核心指标之一。这里，k 通常是正整数，例如 1 或 5，导致 top-1 或 top-5 训练目标。在这项工作中，我们放宽了这一假设，同时优化多个 k 的模型，而不是使用单个 k。利用可微排序和排名方面的最新进展，我们提出了可微的 top-k 交叉熵分类损失。这使得训练网络时不仅可以考虑 top-1 预测，还可以考虑 top-2 和 top-5 预测等。我们评估了所提出的损失函数，以对最先进的架构进行微调，以及从头开始进行训练。我们发现放宽 k 不仅可以产生更好的 top-5 精度，而且还可以提高 top-1 精度。当微调公开可用的 ImageNet 模型时，我们为这些模型实现了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可微分Top-k分类学习方法，通过同时优化多个k值提升分类模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Top-k分类仅针对单一k值优化，限制了模型在不同k值下的泛化能力，难以兼顾多层级预测准确性。
AI.method: 基于可微分排序技术，设计可同时优化多k值的Top-k交叉熵损失函数，实现对Top-1、Top-2等多层级预测的联合训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet等数据集上，该方法在微调和从头训练中均取得优于现有方法的Top-1/Top-5准确率，微调模型达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 多k值联合优化能提升模型鲁棒性，验证了可微分Top-k损失的有效性，为分类任务提供了新的优化视角。

authors_text: Linkai Peng,Yingming Gao,Binghuai Lin,Dengfeng Ke,Yanlu Xie,Jinsong Zhang
title: Text-Aware End-to-end Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis
title_zh: 文本感知的端到端发音错误检测和诊断
abstract: Mispronunciation detection and diagnosis (MDD) technology is a key component of computer-assisted pronunciation training system (CAPT). In the field of assessing the pronunciation quality of constrained speech, the given transcriptions can play the role of a teacher. Conventional methods have fully utilized the prior texts for the model construction or improving the system performance, e.g. forced-alignment and extended recognition networks. Recently, some end-to-end based methods attempt to incorporate the prior texts into model training and preliminarily show the effectiveness. However, previous studies mostly consider applying raw attention mechanism to fuse audio representations with text representations, without taking possible text-pronunciation mismatch into account. In this paper, we present a gating strategy that assigns more importance to the relevant audio features while suppressing irrelevant text information. Moreover, given the transcriptions, we design an extra contrastive loss to reduce the gap between the learning objective of phoneme recognition and MDD. We conducted experiments using two publicly available datasets (TIMIT and L2-Arctic) and our best model improved the F1 score from $57.51\%$ to $61.75\%$ compared to the baselines. Besides, we provide a detailed analysis to shed light on the effectiveness of gating mechanism and contrastive learning on MDD.
summary: Mispronunciation detection and diagnosis (MDD) technology is a key component of computer-assisted pronunciation training system (CAPT). In the field of assessing the pronunciation quality of constrained speech, the given transcriptions can play the role of a teacher. Conventional methods have fully utilized the prior texts for the model construction or improving the system performance, e.g. forced-alignment and extended recognition networks. Recently, some end-to-end based methods attempt to incorporate the prior texts into model training and preliminarily show the effectiveness. However, previous studies mostly consider applying raw attention mechanism to fuse audio representations with text representations, without taking possible text-pronunciation mismatch into account. In this paper, we present a gating strategy that assigns more importance to the relevant audio features while suppressing irrelevant text information. Moreover, given the transcriptions, we design an extra contrastive loss to reduce the gap between the learning objective of phoneme recognition and MDD. We conducted experiments using two publicly available datasets (TIMIT and L2-Arctic) and our best model improved the F1 score from $57.51\%$ to $61.75\%$ compared to the baselines. Besides, we provide a detailed analysis to shed light on the effectiveness of gating mechanism and contrastive learning on MDD.
abstract_zh: 误读检测与诊断（MDD）技术是计算机辅助发音训练系统（CAPT）的关键组成部分。在评估受限语音的发音质量领域，给定的转录可以起到老师的作用。传统方法充分利用了现有文献来构建模型或提高系统性能，例如强制对齐和扩展识别网络。最近，一些基于端到端的方法尝试将先验文本纳入模型训练中并初步显示了有效性。然而，之前的研究大多考虑应用原始注意力机制将音频表示与文本表示融合，而没有考虑可能的文本发音不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了一种门控策略，该策略更加重视相关的音频特征，同时抑制不相关的文本信息。此外，考虑到转录，我们设计了额外的对比损失，以缩小音素识别和 MDD 学习目标之间的差距。我们使用两个公开可用的数据集（TIMIT 和 L2-Arctic）进行了实验，与基线相比，我们的最佳模型将 F1 分数从 $57.51\%$ 提高到 $61.75\%$。此外，我们还提供了详细的分析来阐明门控机制和对比学习在 MDD 上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合文本信息的端到端发音错误检测与诊断方法，通过改进模型结构提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在融合音频与文本信息时未考虑文本与发音可能存在的不匹配问题，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 设计门控机制增强相关音频特征权重并抑制无关文本信息，同时引入对比损失缩小音素识别与发音诊断目标差异。
AI.result: 在TIMIT和L2-Arctic数据集上，模型F1分数从57.51%提升至61.75%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 门控机制与对比学习的结合能有效提升发音诊断性能，为文本感知的端到端MDD提供新思路。

search_text: Text-Aware End-to-end Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis 文本感知的端到端发音错误检测和诊断 Mispronunciation detection and diagnosis (MDD) technology is a key component of computer-assisted pronunciation training system (CAPT). In the field of assessing the pronunciation quality of constrained speech, the given transcriptions can play the role of a teacher. Conventional methods have fully utilized the prior texts for the model construction or improving the system performance, e.g. forced-alignment and extended recognition networks. Recently, some end-to-end based methods attempt to incorporate the prior texts into model training and preliminarily show the effectiveness. However, previous studies mostly consider applying raw attention mechanism to fuse audio representations with text representations, without taking possible text-pronunciation mismatch into account. In this paper, we present a gating strategy that assigns more importance to the relevant audio features while suppressing irrelevant text information. Moreover, given the transcriptions, we design an extra contrastive loss to reduce the gap between the learning objective of phoneme recognition and MDD. We conducted experiments using two publicly available datasets (TIMIT and L2-Arctic) and our best model improved the F1 score from $57.51\%$ to $61.75\%$ compared to the baselines. Besides, we provide a detailed analysis to shed light on the effectiveness of gating mechanism and contrastive learning on MDD. 误读检测与诊断（MDD）技术是计算机辅助发音训练系统（CAPT）的关键组成部分。在评估受限语音的发音质量领域，给定的转录可以起到老师的作用。传统方法充分利用了现有文献来构建模型或提高系统性能，例如强制对齐和扩展识别网络。最近，一些基于端到端的方法尝试将先验文本纳入模型训练中并初步显示了有效性。然而，之前的研究大多考虑应用原始注意力机制将音频表示与文本表示融合，而没有考虑可能的文本发音不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了一种门控策略，该策略更加重视相关的音频特征，同时抑制不相关的文本信息。此外，考虑到转录，我们设计了额外的对比损失，以缩小音素识别和 MDD 学习目标之间的差距。我们使用两个公开可用的数据集（TIMIT 和 L2-Arctic）进行了实验，与基线相比，我们的最佳模型将 F1 分数从 $57.51\%$ 提高到 $61.75\%$。此外，我们还提供了详细的分析来阐明门控机制和对比学习在 MDD 上的有效性。 本文提出一种结合文本信息的端到端发音错误检测与诊断方法，通过改进模型结构提升检测效果。 Linkai Peng,Yingming Gao,Binghuai Lin,Dengfeng Ke,Yanlu Xie,Jinsong Zhang cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Ziyi Chen,Haoran Miao,Pengyuan Zhang
title: Streaming non-autoregressive model for any-to-many voice conversion
title_zh: 用于任意对多语音转换的流式非自回归模型
abstract: Voice conversion models have developed for decades, and current mainstream research focuses on non-streaming voice conversion. However, streaming voice conversion is more suitable for practical application scenarios than non-streaming voice conversion. In this paper, we propose a streaming any-to-many voice conversion based on fully non-autoregressive model, which includes a streaming transformer based acoustic model and a streaming vocoder. Streaming transformer based acoustic model is composed of a pre-trained encoder from streaming end-to-end based automatic speech recognition model and a decoder modified on FastSpeech blocks. Streaming vocoder is designed for streaming task with pseudo quadrature mirror filter bank and causal convolution. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves significant performance both in latency and conversion quality and can be real-time on CPU and GPU.
summary: Voice conversion models have developed for decades, and current mainstream research focuses on non-streaming voice conversion. However, streaming voice conversion is more suitable for practical application scenarios than non-streaming voice conversion. In this paper, we propose a streaming any-to-many voice conversion based on fully non-autoregressive model, which includes a streaming transformer based acoustic model and a streaming vocoder. Streaming transformer based acoustic model is composed of a pre-trained encoder from streaming end-to-end based automatic speech recognition model and a decoder modified on FastSpeech blocks. Streaming vocoder is designed for streaming task with pseudo quadrature mirror filter bank and causal convolution. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves significant performance both in latency and conversion quality and can be real-time on CPU and GPU.
abstract_zh: 语音转换模型已经发展了数十年，当前主流研究集中在非流式语音转换。但流式语音转换比非流式语音转换更适合实际应用场景。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于完全非自回归模型的流式任意对多语音转换，其中包括基于流式变压器的声学模型和流式声码器。基于流式变压器的声学模型由基于流式端到端自动语音识别模型的预训练编码器和在 FastSpeech 块上修改的解码器组成。流式声码器专为具有伪正交镜像滤波器组和因果卷积的流式任务而设计。实验结果表明，该方法在延迟和转换质量方面均取得了显着的性能，并且可以在CPU和GPU上实现实时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全非自回归模型的流式任意到多语音转换方法，包含流式声学模型和声码器。
AI.motivation: 主流语音转换研究聚焦非流式模型，但流式转换更符合实际应用需求，需解决实时性与转换质量平衡问题。
AI.method: 设计流式变压器声学模型（含预训练编码器与改进解码器）及支持流式任务的声码器（伪QMF滤波器+因果卷积）。
AI.result: 在延迟与转换质量指标上表现优异，可在CPU/GPU实现实时语音转换。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升流式语音转换性能，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Shweta Jain,Yosuke Mizutani,Blair Sullivan
title: Faster Decomposition of Weighted Graphs into Cliques using Fisher's Inequality
title_zh: 使用费舍尔不等式将加权图更快地分解为派系
abstract: Mining groups of genes that consistently co-express is an important problem in biomedical research, where it is critical for applications such as drug-repositioning and designing new disease treatments. Recently, Cooley et al. modeled this problem as Exact Weighted Clique Decomposition (EWCD) in which, given an edge-weighted graph $G$ and a positive integer $k$, the goal is to decompose $G$ into at most $k$ (overlapping) weighted cliques so that an edge's weight is exactly equal to the sum of weights for cliques it participates in. They show EWCD is fixed-parameter-tractable, giving a $4^k$-kernel alongside a backtracking algorithm (together called cricca) to iteratively build a decomposition. Unfortunately, because of inherent exponential growth in the space of potential solutions, cricca is typically able to decompose graphs only when $k \leq 11$. In this work, we establish reduction rules that exponentially decrease the size of the kernel (from $4^k$ to $k2^k$) for EWCD. In addition, we use insights about the structure of potential solutions to give new search rules that speed up the decomposition algorithm. At the core of our techniques is a result from combinatorial design theory called Fisher's inequality characterizing set systems with restricted intersections. We deploy our kernelization and decomposition algorithms (together called DeCAF) on a corpus of biologically-inspired data and obtain over two orders of magnitude speed-up over cricca. As a result, DeCAF scales to instances with $k \geq 17$.
summary: Mining groups of genes that consistently co-express is an important problem in biomedical research, where it is critical for applications such as drug-repositioning and designing new disease treatments. Recently, Cooley et al. modeled this problem as Exact Weighted Clique Decomposition (EWCD) in which, given an edge-weighted graph $G$ and a positive integer $k$, the goal is to decompose $G$ into at most $k$ (overlapping) weighted cliques so that an edge's weight is exactly equal to the sum of weights for cliques it participates in. They show EWCD is fixed-parameter-tractable, giving a $4^k$-kernel alongside a backtracking algorithm (together called cricca) to iteratively build a decomposition. Unfortunately, because of inherent exponential growth in the space of potential solutions, cricca is typically able to decompose graphs only when $k \leq 11$. In this work, we establish reduction rules that exponentially decrease the size of the kernel (from $4^k$ to $k2^k$) for EWCD. In addition, we use insights about the structure of potential solutions to give new search rules that speed up the decomposition algorithm. At the core of our techniques is a result from combinatorial design theory called Fisher's inequality characterizing set systems with restricted intersections. We deploy our kernelization and decomposition algorithms (together called DeCAF) on a corpus of biologically-inspired data and obtain over two orders of magnitude speed-up over cricca. As a result, DeCAF scales to instances with $k \geq 17$.
abstract_zh: 挖掘一致共表达的基因组是生物医学研究中的一个重要问题，对于药物重新定位和设计新疾病治疗等应用至关重要。最近，库利等人。将这个问题建模为精确加权团分解（EWCD），其中给定边加权图 $G$ 和正整数 $k$，目标是将 $G$ 分解为最多 $k$ （重叠）加权团，以便边的权重完全等于其参与的团的权重总和。他们表明 EWCD 是固定参数可处理的，同时给出 $4^k$ 核用于迭代构建分解的回溯算法（统称为 cricca）。不幸的是，由于潜在解决方案空间固有的指数增长，cricca 通常只能在 $k \leq 11$ 时才能分解图。在这项工作中，我们建立了缩减规则，以指数方式减小 EWCD 的内核大小（从 $4^k$ 到 $k2^k$）。此外，我们利用对潜在解决方案结构的见解来给出新的搜索规则，以加速分解算法。我们技术的核心是称为费希尔不等式的组合设计理论的结果，该理论描述了具有受限交集的集合系统。我们在生物启发数据的语料库上部署我们的核化和分解算法（统称为 DeCAF），并获得比 cricca 快两个数量级的速度。因此，DeCAF 可以扩展到 $k \geq 17$ 的实例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Fisher不等式的改进算法DeCAF，用于加速加权图的精确团分解（EWCD）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法cricca在处理大规模生物医学数据时存在k值上限（k≤11）的瓶颈，需提升算法效率以支持更大k值的分解需求。
AI.method: 通过引入组合设计理论中的Fisher不等式，提出指数级缩小核大小的约简规则（4^k→k2^k）和基于解结构特性的搜索规则优化算法。
AI.result: 实验表明DeCAF在生物启发数据集上较cricca提速超100倍，可处理k≥17的实例。
AI.conclusion: 利用Fisher不等式和核化技术显著提升了EWCD问题的求解效率，为大规模生物网络分析提供了新方法。
